Bengaluru’s haven for emerging artists and creative entrepreneurs - A Third Space. 

Blending collaborative studios, performing arts, and a thriving ecosystem where innovation meets artistry.

Name: Travel And Tour World
Description:
Travel And Tour World (TTW) is a comprehensive B2B travel e-magazine and news portal. TTW boasts a readership of over 15 million industry leaders in 195 countries the travel, tourism, airlines, cruise and hospitality industries and also social media influencers and think tanks. We take immense pride in our extensive media partnership history, spanning over a decade since 2009, with 1200+ prestigious travel trade shows worldwide.

Send your press releases at: pr@travelandtourworld.com

Want to list your event? Email us at: marketing@travelandtourworld.com

For editorial collaborations. Email us at: @marketing@travelandtourworld.com

Name: International Documentary Film Festival Amsterdam (IDFA)
Description:
The International Documentary Film Festival Amsterdam is one of the leading documentary festivals in the world. Over the course of twelve days, more than 250 international documentaries are screened for a huge number of film lovers and professionals. For filmmakers, IDFA is the perfect place to screen their films to enthusiastic audiences in sold out cinemas. The festival is also an exciting meeting place for directors, producers, buyers, financiers and audiences alike. 

IDFA is unique for its largely international film program, the variety of genres showing there, its politically committed program and the many European and world premieres featured each year. Add to that the presence of many filmmakers, sizeable audiences, all the discussions, workshops, masterclasses and the experienced staff, and it’s no wonder IDFA is the pre-eminent festival  for creative documentaries.

The IDFA Bertha Fund offers support to documentary projects and festivals in developing countries, the IDFA Forum is Europe's biggest co-financing market for international documentary productions, and Docs for Sale is an international documentary market where buyers, sales agents and distributors can see a selection from the best creative documentaries of the past year. Together, these activities have propelled IDFA to its current, top-ranked status within the world of creative documentary cinema.

You want to work at IDFA? Go to  https://jobs.idfa.nl/

Name: EMG
Description:
EMG is one of the world’s leading providers of broadcast services and media solutions for live sports, entertainment, and events, active in 10 countries: EMG France (incl. Origins Digital), EMG Belgium, EMG The Netherlands, EMG Germany, EMG UK (incl. ACS), Switzerland (Livetools), Luxembourg (DB video), EMG USA, Australia (Origins Digital) and EMG Italy. 

The EMG Group combines unique know-how and world-renowned expertise to master the entire value chain from image creation to distribution. EMG places innovation, cloud and IP technology at the heart of its strategy, allowing the group to offer its customers unrivalled services to enrich and manage high value-added content and to provide viewers and internet users an ever richer and more exciting experience.

EMG owns the largest range of studios as well as the greatest fleet of mobile facilities in Europe and is a valued partner for hundreds of customers worldwide.

Name: Beauty Packaging Magazine
Description:
Beauty Packaging continues to bring brand marketers together with packaging suppliers in every issue—and through its dynamic website and online community—with reports on the important packaging trends and innovations that are shaping the global beauty industry. Topics are relevant and interesting to our readers, who are executives at companies ranging from Estée Lauder, L’Oréal, Coty, Revlon, Elizabeth Arden and Procter & Gamble, to Urban Decay, Bare Escentuals, IT, Stila, Tarte and NYX.

Each issue includes in-depth, staff-written, exclusive articles focusing on market segments such as skin care, color cosmetics, sampling, hair care and fragrance—and packaging components such as labels, tubes, cartons, applicators and dispensers. Most articles include experts’ market insight and a survey of suppliers’ latest introductions.

In addition, we tackle industry-wide issues such as sustainable packaging, global manufacturing and anti-counterfeiting. Articles such as Company of the Year and Top 20 Global Beauty Companies provide additional coverage of market leaders. Beauty Packaging also covers key industry expos throughout the year, including Luxe Pack New York, Monaco and Los Angeles; Cosmoprof/Cosmopack Bologna and Las Vegas; MakeUp in Paris, NewYork, Asia, Los Angeles and Sao Paulo; Indie Beauty Expo New York; and ADF&PCD New York, as well as regional trade organization events presented by CIBS, CEW, and NJPEC to give readers as complete a view of the beauty industry as possible.

Beauty Packaging is the ONLY vertical cosmetic, fragrance & personal care packaging magazine and online community in the industry!

Name: ZDF Studios
Description:
ZDF Studios is a commercial subsidiary of ZDF, one of the largest TV broadcasters in Europe. Founded in 1993 and headquartered in Mainz, Germany, the ZDF Studios Group operates more than 30 direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliates in Germany, the Netherlands and the United Kingdom spanning TV production, distribution and services.

The parent company, ZDF Studios, is responsible for global programme distribution, realisation of international co-productions, acquisition of licences and merchandising of successful programme brands under its own name, for ZDF and third parties. ZDF Studios has the largest German-language programme inventory in the world and a constantly growing range of international productions, consisting of series and mini-series, television films, documentaries and children's programmes. 

The companies of the ZDF Studios Group cover the entire value chain from the development of scripted and unscripted TV content to production, marketing and monetizing, including TV and streaming licences as well as merchandising and online rights. 

The positioning of ZDF Studios as an integrated media company enables the development of innovative, outstanding and high-quality programmes and makes the Group an attractive workplace for German and international talent to flourish in a very inspiring and creative environment.

Name: World CBD Awards
Description:
With the anticipated growth across the CBD industries, United Hemp Alliance believe it is more important than ever to self-govern and establish standards.

To that end, we launch the second World CBD Awards recognising, achievement and identifying companies that strive to stand out as clean, ethical and innovative. We believe “We can Do Better”.

CBD has been around for a while, but the industry is only now emerging. We have now set the forum for ethical practices and will recognise the “best of the best”.

Name: Forbes Indonesia
Description:
Forbes Indonesia is a licensed edition of Forbes Media, a global media company with a focus on news and information about business, investing, technology, entrepreneurship, leadership and affluent lifestyles. Forbes Indonesia is published once a month in English. 

The magazine showcases exclusive, in-depth profiles of the country’s top tycoons, entrepreneurs and corporate achievers. It brings fresh insights into leading a company, managing investments, and living the good life (from luxury getaways to philanthropic endeavours). 
A regular feature will be the signature lists, including the wealthiest Indonesians and the most succesful public listed companies.

In addition, ForbesLife Indonesia has been launched in order to uncover the finest fashion, travel, homes, art and dining of Indonesia. It is published quarterly, in English.

Subscribe at circulation@forbesindonesia.com

Name: Trilith Studios
Description: Trilith Studios, located in South Metro Atlanta, is the largest purpose-built movie studio in North America, offering world-class facilities, state-of-the-art technology, and bespoke production support. Spanning over 700 acres, it features 1.5 million square feet of production space, including 34 premium sound stages, construction workshops, costume shops, and a first-of-its-kind virtual production stage. With nearly 1,000 acres of customizable backlot space, Trilith has hosted blockbuster films like "Spider-Man: No Way Home," "Avengers: Endgame," and "Black Adam," as well as TV productions such as "College Bowl" and "Family Feud," and streaming hits like "WandaVision" and "The Falcon and The Winter Soldier."

Name: Spiritz Magazine
Description:
Spiritz is India's largest circulated monthly on wine, beer, spirits & hospitality.  Being published by a team of senior journalists, based out of New Delhi, Spiritz has become the most admired magazine in the last 12 & half years for its objective reporting, lucid contents and insightful writing. It is read by  Alcobev industry & hospitality professionals, government officials, diplomats, Hotel Management & Catering Colleges and a sizable  number of end consumers.  Spiritz's reach has spread out to all continents through its e-magazine and Spiritz TV on YouTube. 
Spiritz also created two award properties - 
Spiritz Selection Awards (SSA) - SSA recognizes blends, malts, wines, brews through blind tastings and also, packaging
Spiritz Achievers' Awards (SAA) - SAA recognizes brands, campaigns, people and companies

Name: EjendomsWatch

Vi opdaterer hver dag på ejendomswatch.dk, hvor du kan finde uafhængig, kritisk og fair erhvervsjournalistik med fokus på substansen.

Følg med, når vi skriver om mål og resultater, projekter og konkurrencer, ledelse, holdninger, rammevilkår, innovation, profiler, jobskift og meget mere.

Prøv EjendomsWatch gratis – opret dig på ejendomswatch.dk

Name: CollegeTips.in

Name: The Production Guild of Great Britain
Description:
The Production Guild of Great Britain supports the most experienced production personnel in UK film and television drama. We represent professionals working across production, including accounts, location management, assistant directors, post production, VFX and the production office.

Based at Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden, we have over 1,050 experienced production members and more than 100 Company affiliates who provide production services and facilities.

Our unique Availability Service which provides the most current information about our member's availability for work for feature film and television drama production, is used and respected nationally and internationally.

Name: Indiana Production
Description:
Indiana Production è una società di produzione indipendente che ha saputo costruire un profilo internazionale di alto livello grazie al costante impegno a favore di contenuti di qualità e a partnership con i migliori talent. Un giovane e agguerrito team di sviluppo sta dando vita in questi anni a progetti innovativi mentre l’esperienza e il know-how produttivo garantiscono sempre il più elevato degli standard. Tanti i nomi prestigiosi - registi, attori, sceneggiatori - italiani e non solo con cui collabora da tempo, da premi Oscar ad autori acclamati.

Da sempre crossmediale, Indiana nasce come casa di produzione per il cinema, la tv e l’advertising. La contaminazione, gli scambi, le ispirazioni continue da un media all’altro non fanno che costantemente arricchire un patrimonio e un approccio che si distinguono per la creatività del metodo e l’innovazione nei processi.

Fondata nel 2005 a Milano da Fabrizio Donvito e Marco Cohen, raggiunti nel 2008 da Benedetto Habib, nel 2015 da Karim Bartoletti e nel 2019 da Daniel Campos Pavoncelli. Ha uffici a Milano e Roma.

Name: Amarujala.com
Description:
Founded in 1948, Amar Ujala is one of India’s leading Hindi newspapers with 22 editions in 179 districts in 6 states and 2 union territories. With a total daily readership of 4.70 crore (Source: IRS2019Q2, TR), making it one of the most widely read broadsheet newspapers in the country. The geography of Amar Ujala covers North India, including Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Haryana, Chandigarh, Punjab, and Delhi NCR.
Post-independence, India saw a clear dominance of British-established English dailies. Amar Ujala was founded with an objective of promoting social awakening and introducing a feeling of responsibility among the citizens of a recently independent India, heading towards building a new India. Amar Ujala has now completed 75 years since inception and has constantly contributed towards nation-building through a bold, unbiased, and trust-based news reporting.
The strength of Amar Ujala lies in its consistent and superior editorial coverage, with a clear focus on a variety of local issues in our 179 districts of operation, as well as issues of state, national, and international prerogatives.

Amar Ujala Web Services has its focus on quality content, videos, ground-stories, and the assurance of credible news. Amarujala.com and the app have a reach of over 65+ million unique worldwide visitors and more than 300 million video views per month. It has an active social media presence, with over 8.5 million Facebook followers, 4.5 million YouTube subscribers, 1 million Instagram followers and, 2.1 million Twitter followers. AUW offers Amar Ujala mobile app in the Hindi language for both Android and Apple users to make it easier for the audience to consume the content.

Name: Elstree Studios
Description:
London's most versatile and famous TV and Film Studio. 

Elstree Studios boasts six high quality sound stages and one silent stage, providing more than 60,000sq ft of stage space with studios ranging in area from 3,000 to 16,000sq ft and from 25ft to 50ft in height – offering two of the tallest sound proof stages in Europe. 

Elstree also offers workshops, production offices, dressing rooms, wardrobe, make up rooms, access to 800 car parking spaces, special entrances for audiences, event hall for audience holding, space for film trailers and heavy good vehicles, 24/7 security, on-site catering plus 40 on-site media related support services from lighting and casting agencies to post production and special effects.

Located in Borehamwood Elstree, the Studios are very convenient for central London – just 20 minutes by rail from Kings Cross, situated at the bottom of the M1 and A1, four minutes from the M25 and serviced by two airports – Luton and Heathrow.  There is also excellent access to local amenities for lumber, building materials, shops, restaurants and hotels.  

Just 20 minutes from the heart of London, Elstree Studios is without doubt London's No.1 studio for any film or television production, tour rehearsal, promo, commercial or corporate event.

Name: Zeppelin
Description:
Dirigida por Miguel Martín, Zeppelin (Banijay Iberia) es una compañía dedicada a la creación y producción de programas de entretenimiento y series de ficción en España, que desarrolla con gran éxito desde 1992.

Zeppelin es responsable de la introducción del reality en nuestro país con grandes marcas como ‘Gran Hermano’, ‘GH VIP’, ‘GH Dúo’ y ‘Secret Story’, así como experta en grandes formatos como 'Hasta el fin del mundo', la gran revelación de la nueva temporada televisiva. Además, Zeppelin produce actualmente 'Batalla de Restaurantes' y 'Joc de Cartes' (Ondas 2022), así como la serie documental 'Benita'.

Gracias a su apuesta constante por la innovación, es creadora de programas 100% originales como ‘El Puente’, 'Time Zone', 'Baila Como Puedas' o 'A este paso (no) estrenamos', que han sido reconocidos por crítica y público y se han exportado a otros países como Francia, Reino Unido, Brasil y Australia.

Igualmente es pionera en el desarrollo de proyectos de anime en España (‘Virtual Hero’, ‘Memorias de Idhún’) y ha desarrollado proyectos de ficción como la adaptación para España de la serie ‘SKAM’.  

Zeppelin ha producido programas como 'FAMA a bailar', 'Todos contra uno', ‘Radio Gaga’ y ‘Cero en Historia’, y creado otros originales como ‘Susi Free’ y ‘Rojo Caramelo’. ‘Pioneras’, ‘Ruralitas’, ‘Os mellores da clase’ y ‘A miña familia pola túa’ se suman al catálogo de producciones recientes de la compañía.

En paralelo, Zeppelin explora el terreno de las coproducciones. ‘The Language of Love’, un dating show para Channel 4 que se estrenó en enero de 2022 en la televisión británica.

Name: All3Media International
Description:
All3Media International is the distribution arm of the all3media group. We promote and license a catalogue of award-winning TV programmes and formats to broadcasters and media platforms across the globe. Over 1,000 broadcast, DVD and digital platform clients from over 200 countries entertain their audiences with the content we supply.

As part of the UK’s leading production group, All3Media, we partner with UK and international producers from both inside and outside the group to fund, develop, produce and distribute TV content and formats. Our relationships with leading global broadcasters and digital platforms, plus our unsurpassed marketing support and customer services have been recognized across the industry – we consistently top the annual Broadcast Indie Survey and have been twice awarded the Queen’s Award for Enterprise in International Trade.

Our rich catalogue contains over 11,000 hours of content across all genres, with a focus on drama, comedy, factual, entertainment and formats. We are proud to work with the best programme makers in the world, including our own production studios based in the UK, Europe, USA and Australasia.

We represent the best in compelling drama such as Informer, Cheat, The Missing and Liar, as well as Midsomer Murders, Britain’s top drama export, and leading detective drama brands such as The Brokenwood Mysteries and Miss Fisher’s Murder Mysteries, alongside ground-breaking comedies including Fleabag and The Bisexual. Our factual entertainment slate includes Gogglebox and Celebrity Undercover as well as shows featuring Gordon Ramsay, Guy Martin and Grayson Perry, and our entertainment brands include The Circle, Flirty Dancing and Beat the Internet.

To find out about on All3Media International’s values and culture follow the link below 
https://www.all3mediainternational.com/company-culture

Name: Nonwovens Industry
Description: Nonwovens Industry magazine is the only monthly trade magazine dedicated to the worldwide business of nonwovens. For more than 50 years the magazine has tracked the growth of the nonwovens industry, through technological changes and market developments. No other magazine has been around for as long or covered as much of the global nonwovens business. Our staff follows industry trends and issues, conducts market surveys and tracks the latest nonwovens news as it happens. We also attend all major nonwovens industry trade shows and conferences.

Name: The Institute of Art and Ideas
Description:
The Institute of Art and Ideas (IAI) is a truly non-partisan organisation dedicated to bringing philosophy and big ideas into public life. 

The IAI runs the world’s largest philosophy festival ‘HowTheLightGetsIn’, bringing together thought-leaders across all disciplines to discuss the most pressing global issues of our times. We bring you the latest big ideas and world-leading thinkers all in one place, with new articles and debates every weekday. 

Subscribe and stay up-to-date with the ideas that will change your world.https://iai.tv/subscribe

Name: DAS INVESTMENT
Description:
DAS INVESTMENT – Verstehen ist Vermögen. 

Wir glauben, dass unabhängige, tiefgründige Berichterstattung entscheidend für den Erfolg professioneller Investoren und Berater ist. Seit 1999 begleiten wir die Finanzbranche mit fundierten Analysen, exklusiven Insights und aktuellen Marktentwicklungen, um Klarheit in komplexen Themen zu schaffen. 

Unsere Redaktion aus erfahrenen Journalisten konzentriert sich auf jene Themen, die für Investmentprofis wirklich zählen – von innovativen Anlagestrategien über neue Trends bis hin zu Hintergründen großer Marktentwicklungen. 

Wer die Finanzmärkte versteht, trifft bessere Entscheidungen. Bleiben Sie mit uns informiert über Trends und Analysen für Ihre Investmententscheidungen.

Name: SaaSiest

SaaSiest is a community-driven initiative run by Thomas Sjöberg and Daniel Nackovski with the purpose of facilitating dialogue and knowledge exchange to help European B2B SaaS professionals and companies reach their full potential.

Join us on our mission to make European SaaS companies the most successful ones in the world!

Its singular mission is helping device companies, suppliers, service providers and individuals improve their performance through timely and relevant business intelligence, product commercialization guidance, comprehensive marketing solutions and educational conferences.

Name: NOWNESS

Name: Dagens Juridik

Dagens Juridik är Sveriges Juridiska dagstidning på nätet med cirka 55-70 000 unika läsare i veckan.

Description:
Roya Media Group

Name: UR, Swedish Educational Broadcasting company
Description:
UR (Swedish Educational Broadcasting Company) is part of the public service broadcasting group in Sweden, with Swedish Radio (SR) and Swedish Television (SVT). UR’s mandate is to produce and broadcast educational and general knowledge programmes which enhance, fill out, and strengthen the work of others active in education. 

We take particular responsibility for those with disabilities and for those among ethnic and language minorities in Sweden. We run the Knowledge Channel in collaboration with SVT and also broadcast on SR and SVT channels. UR is financed by household radio and television licence payments.

The central term describing our strategy is: we are to be useful. That permeates all we do, so that our programmes can be used throughout the educational system – from pre-school level to university level. We strive continually to improve accessibility on the Web, in order to make UR an even more effective source of support for teaching staff, pupils, students and parents. We aim at "liberating educational programmes" so that all our 11.000 television and radio programmes become available to everyone – where and when required.

Name: Quirk's Media
Description:
Quirk's is the place where the best, brightest and boldest in marketing research – clients and agencies alike – exchange their most effective ideas. Designed to promote the understanding, use and value of marketing research, our articles, directories, Webinars, tools and other free resources give insights professionals the real-world solutions they need to take their marketing research and insights capabilities to a new level of excellence.

How we got started 

Before starting Quirk's Marketing Research Review in 1986, Tom Quirk worked in the marketing research field for more than 20 years. Seeing a need for a publication to promote the value of marketing research, as well as a comprehensive directory of research providers, he launched Quirk’s Marketing Research Review in October 1986.

The largest media provider in the industry

Today we have over 60,000 subscribers in 110+ countries. We also offer the Quirk’s e-newsletter; Quirk’s Daily News Queue, which provides research and insights news on the go; and our robust and dynamic Web site that launched in 2016 and receives nearly 1.3 million visits each year. On top of this, we actively engage with our audience via Webinars, our two LinkedIn groups and on Twitter @QuirksMR, where we have 12,000+ followers.
 
In 2015 Quirk’s saw another need in the industry and launched the Quirk’s Event (www.thequirksevent.com/), an inclusive event created for the entire marketing research and insights community. 

To get your own FREE access visit www.quirks.com.

Name: ScuolaZoo
Description:
ScuolaZoo è il media brand degli studenti italiani, conta oltre 10 milioni di follower sui social! 
Nata nel 2007 da un’idea di Paolo De Nadai per denunciare un caso di mala scuola si è fin da subito posta l’obiettivo di ispirare gli studenti italiani e promuovere la condivisione di progetti ed esperienze.

Oggi ScuolaZoo è la più grande community di studenti italiani (non solo online!), una testata giornalistica, l’unico network di rappresentanti d'istituto, milioni di diari scolastici venduti, un tour operator che porta in vacanza 15.000 studenti ogni anno.

Insomma, la magia di ScuolaZoo si materializza in molte forme, ma l’obiettivo rimane sempre e solo uno: vivere le nuove generazioni e raccontare i loro sogni e bisogni, dando vita a contenuti ed esperienze WOW che uniscono e liberano il potenziale di ognuno e ciò che ci contraddistingue.

ScuolaZoo fa parte di OneDay Group, il business & community builder che mette le nuove generazioni al centro, con cui condivide l’headquarter a Milano (il C30) e l’approccio disruptive.

Name: Bonne Pioche
Description:
BONNE PIOCHE, fondée et dirigée aujourd'hui par Yves Darondeau et Emmanuel Priou, est un groupe indépendant de production de films pour le cinéma et la télévision.

Sa raison d’être : éclairer, divertir et engager le grand public sur notre monde.

Ses domaines d’activités s’étendent de la production de documentaires et captations de pièces de théâtre (Bonne Pioche Télévision) à la production de longs-métrages (Bonne Pioche Cinéma) et fictions TV et plateformes (Bonne Pioche Story), en passant par la musique à l'image (Bonne Pioche Music) et la vente de programmes TV en France et à l’international (Lucky You).

En 2006, Bonne Pioche vit une aventure cinématographique extraordinaire avec le film «  La Marche de l’Empereur », réalisé par Luc Jacquet, qui connaît un succès international exceptionnel couronné par de nombreux prix dont l’Oscar du meilleur documentaire.

Aujourd’hui BONNE PIOCHE est ainsi devenu un groupe de production et de distribution dont la volonté est de surprendre le public avec des histoires originales et innovantes où priment émotions et audace.

-	Avec 17 longs métrages produits pour le cinéma, Bonne Pioche Cinéma a obtenu sept nominations aux César, une nomination aux Bafta, a remporté un Oscar, deux César, une Victoire de la Musique, un Magritte et 2 prix du public au Colcoa.

-	Forte d’un catalogue de plus de 500 programmes, Bonne Pioche Télévision garde sa volonté de surprendre les téléspectateurs avec des formats originaux et innovants. 

-	Bonne Pioche Story développe et produit des fictions unitaires et série en France et à l'international pour les chaînes TV traditionnelles et les plateformes. 

-	Bonne Pioche Music est l’éditeur de nombreuses bandes originales de films et a développé en quelques années un catalogue de plus de 2000 titres.

-	Lucky You représente et vend à l’international les programmes de plus d’une trentaine de producteurs européens de documentaires.

Mit jährlich mehr als 3.500 gesendeten Programmstunden präsentiert sich die heutige UFA-Gruppe als leistungsstarker Programmkreateur, der seine Marktführerschaft als Film- und Fernsehproduzent in Deutschland in den vergangenen Jahren kontinuierlich ausgebaut hat. Dabei entwickelte sich die UFA vom Programmgestalter und TV-Produzenten zum Inhalte-Spezialisten, der Lösungsangebote für eine digitale und multimediale Inhalteverwertung anbietet – für alle großen Sender in Deutschland ebenso für zahlreiche weitere Partner.
Unter dem Dach der UFA agieren die Produktionsunits UFA Fiction, UFA Serial Drama, UFA Show & Factual und UFA Documentary. Das weitreichende Produktportfolio bietet eine einzigartige Vielfalt komplementär ausgerichteter Programme. Hochwertige fiktionale Produktionen wie TV Movies, Serien, Reihen und TV Events realisiert die UFA Fiction. Erstklassige Shows aller Genres, von Talent- und Gameshows, über Quiz-, Panel- und Datingshows bis hin zu Comedy- und Musikshows, sowie hochwertige Factual-Programme, emotional, journalistisch und dokumentarisch, entstehen in der UFA Show & Factual. UFA Serial Drama ist führender Anbieter für industrielle Serienproduktionen. Die UFA Documentary legt ihren Fokus auf Dokumentationen, Dokuhybride und serielle Features.

Name: StoryCorps
Description:
Founded in 2003 by Dave Isay, StoryCorps has given people of all backgrounds and beliefs, in thousands of towns and cities in all 50 states, the chance to record interviews about their lives. The organization preserves the recordings in its archive at the American Folklife Center at the Library of Congress, the largest single collection of human voices ever gathered, and shares select stories with the public through StoryCorps’ podcast, NPR broadcasts, animated shorts, digital platforms, and best-selling books. These powerful human stories reflect the vast range of American experiences, wisdom and values; engender empathy and connection; and remind us how much more we have in common than what divides us.  
 
StoryCorps is especially committed to capturing and amplifying voices least heard in the media. The StoryCorps MobileBooth, an Airstream trailer the organization has transformed into a traveling recording booth, crisscrosses the country year-round in order to gather the stories of people nationwide. With the 2015 TED Prize awarded to Dave Isay, StoryCorps launched a free mobile app that puts the StoryCorps experience entirely in the hands of users and enables anyone, anywhere to record meaningful conversations with another person and upload the audio to the Library of Congress. StoryCorps also records interviews in its permanent StoryBooths located in Chicago and Atlanta.
 
Recording an interview in a StoryCorps booth couldn’t be easier: You invite a loved one, or anyone else you choose, to a StoryCorps recording site. There you’re met by a trained facilitator who explains the interview process, brings you into a quiet recording room and seats you across from your interview partner, each of you in front of a microphone. The facilitator hits “record,” and you share a 40-minute conversation. At the end of the session, you walk away with a copy of the interview, and a digital file goes to the Library of Congress, where it will be preserved for generations to come.

Name: revista piauí
Description:
A piauí é uma revista mensal de jornalismo, ideias e humor. 
 
Publicamos para quem gosta de ler. Vale praticamente qualquer tema. Política, literatura, economia, televisão, arquitetura, cinema, futebol, odontologia – contanto que o dentista seja interessante, ou o tratamento de canal, revolucionário. 
 
Jornalistas, escritores, artistas gráficos, ensaístas, críticos e humoristas de todas as idades expressam em piauí diferentes aspectos da vida nacional, que, convenhamos, não anda fácil de ser compreendida. Numa situação como essa, é melhor admitir a perplexidade do que prescrever receitas infalíveis de salvação. Não salvamos ninguém, estamos perplexos, mas somos muito curiosos. 

Nossa curiosidade, aliada à nossa certeza de que é difícil ter certeza, nos afasta da seriedade taxativa de quem tem causas a defender e bandeiras a empunhar. Preferimos desconfiar de quem não tem dúvida, e achamos que um pouco de ceticismo não faz mal a ninguém – e a nenhuma revista.  
 
piauí não tem resposta para nada. Nem para quem pergunta por que ela se chama piauí, porque a esse respeito ainda não chegamos a um consenso. 
 
Gostamos de imaginar que somos uma revista serena, que dá tempo a seus jornalistas para que trabalhem, e que isso não é sinônimo de lentidão, mas de apuro. Talvez tenhamos sido influenciados pelas nossas leituras de criança, quando aprendemos que nem sempre a lebre vence a corrida. Com nosso passo cuidadoso, já chegamos na frente várias vezes.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Olemme mukana ihmisten arjessa ja juhlassa, vaikutamme valintoihin ja käsitykseen maailmasta, autamme yrityksiä menestymään. Sillä on merkitystä.

Meillä on isot, kaikkien tuntemat mediabrändit ja joukko maan suurimpia digipalveluja. Sanoman mediat tavoittavat 97 % suomalaisista joka viikko.

Sanomalla työtä tehdään asiakas edellä, datan pohjalta, fiksusti, vastuullisesti ja yhdessä. Meillä jokaisella on tilaa kehittyä, toimia ja olla oma itsensä. Arjen käytännöt joustavat ja niitä kehitetään jatkuvasti. Tähtäämme korkealle ja teemme tosissaan, mutta töissä on myös hauskaa. Työkavereina on alan parhaat tekijät: luovia kykyjä, huippuasiantuntijoita, kehuttuja esihenkilöitä ja ylipäätään poikkeuksellisen kivoja ihmisiä. 

Työ Sanomalla näkyy, kuuluu, herättää tunteita, vaikuttaa ja saa aikaan keskustelua. Onko sulla #sanomista?

Sanoma Media Finland on osa Sanomaa. Sanoma on kuluttajamedian ja oppimisen eurooppalainen edelläkävijä.

Name: Hacking Work
Description:
Muncim zi de zi pentru o viziune: vom aduce progres și performanță în profesie și bunăstare în viața socio-profesională pentru 1 milion de oameni, într-un interval de 10 ani.

Misiunea noastră este să construim un viitor mai bun pentru oameni, organizații și comunități, prin educație, dialog și colaborare, așezând la temelia acestei construcții libertatea, creativitatea, integritatea, curajul, umanitatea, responsabilitatea și respectul pentru cunoaștere.

Să mergem la serviciu, nu la scârbiciu
Românii merită să lucreze în organizații sănătoase, fiind fericiți cu activitatea, meseria, jobul, șefii și colegii lor.

La Hacking Work, spunem lucrului pe nume. Schimbăm idei, informații experiențe și mentalități. Ca să mergem toți la serviciu, nu la scârbiciu.

Prin educație, acces la informație de calitate și colaborare reală putem produce schimbarea pozitivă. Promovăm ideea de leadership corect, responsabil, uman și sustenabil. Sancționăm abuzurile și comportamentele iresponsabile, inumane sau antisociale. Îi încurajăm pe oameni să caute experiențe de muncă pozitive, să-și spună poveștile în mod public și să gestioneze corect, cinstit și benefic relația lor cu angajatorii.

Name: World Aviation Festival
Description:
The World Aviation Festival is not just a conference and exhibition - it’s the premier global gathering for the most influential leaders in aviation. Bringing together the world’s airlines, airports, and their top executives in charge of software, services, marketing, and distribution, this is where the future of aviation is shaped.

 CONFERENCE
The World Aviation Festival conference features speakers from the most forward-thinking airlines, airports, and travel technology companies across the globe. Our conference is designed to inspire, inform, and shape the future of aviation, offering an unparalleled platform for discussing challenges, and sharing ideas and innovations. With sixteen content-packed tracks, the conference offers something for every facet of the aviation industry. Whether you’re focused on enhancing customer experience, leveraging the latest in AI and machine learning, or driving sustainability initiatives, we’ve got you covered.

Take Step Africa shapes politics, democracy, and power; and censorship, surveillance, and the power of control. Take Step Africa is expansive and awkward. It includes storytellers, technologists, entrepreneurs, investors, scientists, publishers, designers, startups, political and social activists, evil-doers, creation, disruption, information overload, a world of choice – and choices about how we live, and learn and care for each other.

Name: TheWire.in
Description:
Instead of the traditional models of family-owned, corporate-funded and controlled or advertising-driven newspapers, websites and TV channels, can we reimagine the media as a joint venture in the public sphere between journalists, readers and a concerned citizenry? One in which decisions over what to cover and how, who to hire and where to send a correspondent or photographer, are taken by editors on the basis of professional judgment, without worrying about what a proprietor or politician, official or advertiser might think or want.

In a democracy, this is the least that readers or viewers expect. And yet, the business model that underpins most Indian news media seldom allows editors the freedom they need. Worse, it has slowly eroded professional standards of reporting and contaminated the media ecosystem with toxic practices like rampant editorializing, paid news and ‘private treaties’. Increasingly, media houses are reluctant to spend money on newsgathering; and as they develop secondary business interests and ‘no go areas’ proliferate, their newsrooms suffer further collateral damage – especially as these interests often depend on proximity to politicians and bureaucrats. Is it any wonder that readers have begun to notice the erosion of professional standards, ethical breaches and fall in quality? They now feel shortchanged.

The founding premise of The Wire is this: if good journalism is to survive and thrive, it can only do so by being both editorially and financially independent. 

As a digital media company, The Wire will be firmly committed to the public interest and democratic values. Apart from providing authoritative analysis and commentary, the aim is to build ourselves as a platform driven by good old-fashioned reporting on issues of national and international importance and interest.

Name: revista piauí
Description:
A piauí é uma revista mensal de jornalismo, ideias e humor. 
 
Publicamos para quem gosta de ler. Vale praticamente qualquer tema. Política, literatura, economia, televisão, arquitetura, cinema, futebol, odontologia – contanto que o dentista seja interessante, ou o tratamento de canal, revolucionário. 
 
Jornalistas, escritores, artistas gráficos, ensaístas, críticos e humoristas de todas as idades expressam em piauí diferentes aspectos da vida nacional, que, convenhamos, não anda fácil de ser compreendida. Numa situação como essa, é melhor admitir a perplexidade do que prescrever receitas infalíveis de salvação. Não salvamos ninguém, estamos perplexos, mas somos muito curiosos. 

Nossa curiosidade, aliada à nossa certeza de que é difícil ter certeza, nos afasta da seriedade taxativa de quem tem causas a defender e bandeiras a empunhar. Preferimos desconfiar de quem não tem dúvida, e achamos que um pouco de ceticismo não faz mal a ninguém – e a nenhuma revista.  
 
piauí não tem resposta para nada. Nem para quem pergunta por que ela se chama piauí, porque a esse respeito ainda não chegamos a um consenso. 
 
Gostamos de imaginar que somos uma revista serena, que dá tempo a seus jornalistas para que trabalhem, e que isso não é sinônimo de lentidão, mas de apuro. Talvez tenhamos sido influenciados pelas nossas leituras de criança, quando aprendemos que nem sempre a lebre vence a corrida. Com nosso passo cuidadoso, já chegamos na frente várias vezes.

Name: socialpolicy.gr
Description:
Το socialpolicy.gr ολοκλήρωσε δέκα χρόνια λειτουργίας (2013-2023).

Κυριότερος στόχος μας είναι η ανάδειξη και παρουσίαση θεματικών κοινωνικής πολιτικής μέσα από το πρίσμα της αλληλεγγύης, της ιδιότητας του πολίτη, των ανθρωπίνων και κοινωνικών δικαιωμάτων με ιδιαίτερη εστίαση σε ζητήματα φύλου.

Πέραν αυτής της βασικής επιδίωξης το socialpolicy.gr ενημερώνει καθημερινά τους κοινωνικούς επιστήμονες για θέσεις εργασίας και ευκαιρίες καριέρας σε φορείς της Ελλάδας αλλά και του εξωτερικού.

Παράλληλα, αποτελεί μία ενημερωτική πύλη για σεμινάρια, εκπαιδευτικά και μεταπτυχιακά προγράμματα στις κοινωνικές, παιδαγωγικές επιστήμες και στον τομέα της ψυχολογίας.

Καινοτομώντας, προσπαθούμε να προσφέρουμε με συνέπεια και ποιότητα ερευνητικό υλικό στο πεδίο των κοινωνικών επιστημών μέσω σημαντικών πηγών διεθνών οργανισμών αλλά και σύντομων μελετών/αρθρογραφιών.

Επιπρόσθετα, θεωρούμε ότι ο δημόσιος διάλογος γύρω από σύνθετα πολιτικά και κοινωνικά ζητήματα συχνά αμελεί να λάβει υπόψιν του σημαντικές κοινωνικές, κοινωνιακές και κοινωνιολογικές παραμέτρους. 

Προσπαθούμε, έτσι, να συμβάλλουμε με τοποθετήσεις που έχουν ως κύριο γνώμονα την κοινωνική δικαιοσύνη, τα ανθρώπινα δικαιώματα και την καταπολέμηση των ανισοτήτων.

Name: CIO Views Magazine
Description:
Today’s reader are looking for ‘perspectives’ from a business or technology magazine, and not news or analysis that skim the surface. Thanks to Internet, most readers are exposed to multiple media so there is little scope to get the perspectives from business leaders and companies that actually matter. Realizing the importance of CIO’s views, a platform is established to present the views that reshape our world. With an aim to provide content that is relevant, insightful and credible in an engaging manner, we at CIOViews, set out to revolutionize the magazine landscape across the globe.
At its core, CIOViews is a business magazine that talks about the emerging CIOs, their journeys, views on current economic scenarios, and everything else that concern business world. Our goal is to be a leading source of information devoted to provide you with the up-to date business and technology views of CIOs that are redefining the business goals of their enterprises. With our special magazines on various innovative technologies such Big Data, Cloud, AI, and the list goes on, CIOViews focuses on providing and promoting excellence within the tech-world.

CIOViews is a one-stop-destination for our readers and be a single source of information, knowledge and views that shape our world. We are an excellent platform where companies can present their innovative services. With CIOViews, C-level executives can share their views and analysis on technology trends, thereby helping emerging startups with the latest information on the market. With our startup special magazines, we also wish to present the success stories of innovative platforms that are making mark on the industry while changing the world for better tomorrow.

Name: Florida Entertainment GmbH
Description:
Zuerst der Schock: Hinter dem verheißungsvollen Namen Florida Entertainment steckt weder ein raffinierter Cocktail mit Orangenscheibe, noch eine rentable Offshore-Firma auf den Caiman Islands, sondern eine der erfolgreichsten unabhängigen Produktionsfirmen in Deutschland. Über unser Netzwerk decken wir sämtliche Programm-Genres ab: Mit der Unterhaltungs-Unit Florida TV entwickeln und realisieren wir Late-Night- und große Primetime-Formate – darunter sämtliche Shows mit den Entertainern Joko Winterscheidt und Klaas Heufer-Umlauf. Zu den preisgekrönten Produktionen zählen „Joko & Klaas gegen ProSieben“, „Wer stiehlt mir die Show?“, „JDas Duell um die Welt“ oder „Experte für alles“, „Ein sehr gutes Quiz (mit hoher Gewinnsumme“ sowie „Joko & Klaas – 15 Minuten LIVE“. 
Unsere hauseigene Werbe-Unit, Florida Reklame, verantwortet die Kreation und Produktion von TV-Werbespots und Branded-Content-Formaten für Marken wie Porsche, Samsung, Henkel oder die Deutsche Bundesregierung, während die Florida Film GmbH sich der Produktion von Spiel- und Dokumentarfilmen sowie Serien für digitale Plattformen und Fernsehsender (u.a. „Legend of Wacken“ für RTL+, den Kinofilm „Mittagsstunde“, sowie die ARD-Impro-Serien „Für immer Sommer 90“, „Kranitz - Bei Trennung Geld zurück“ oder „Das Begräbnis“) widmet. Die Florida Factual GmbH hat sich die Produktion zeitgemäßer journalistischer Inhalte in Talk- und Doku-Formaten zur Aufgabe gemacht (u. a. „Hart aber Fair“, „ZDFzeit“, „Die ProSieben-Bundestagswahl-Show“, „ZDFzoom“), während mit der kürzlich gegründeten PrettyWellDone GmbH die Online-Produktionen der Entertainer Benni und Dennis Wolter („World Wide Wohnzimmer“) umgesetzt werden. Darüber hinaus hält die Florida Entertainment eine Beteiligung an dem führenden Podcast-Label Studio Bummens („Baywatch Berlin“, „Apokalypse & Filterkaffee“, „Einfach mal Luppen“, , „Cui Bono“ usw.). Geschäftsführer der Florida Entertainment GmbH sind Arne Kreutzfeldt & Thomas Schmitt.

Name: Studio Lambert
Description:
Studio Lambert is a fast-growing independent television production company based in London, Manchester and Los Angeles. It is part of All3Media.

Stephen Lambert, creator of many well-known global formats including Wife Swap, Secret Millionaire and Faking It, launched the company in 2008. It quickly grew a reputation on both sides of the Atlantic for making innovative and popular unscripted shows.  

Creative director Tim Harcourt joined in 2012 and leads the company's unscripted business-winning in the UK, while in Los Angeles Greg Goldman joined as president of Studio Lambert USA in 2013 to create and oversee original unscripted programming as well as help bring the company's UK formats to the US market. In America, Studio Lambert produces in partnership with All3Media America (click here for further information about All3Media America).

In 2015, Studio Lambert established a scripted division run by Susan Hogg to produce high-quality drama series with British and American writers, directors and on-screen talent.

All3Media International distribute Studio Lambert's formats and finished programmes internationally.

Name: Table.Briefings
Description:
You are a minister or responsible officer, you work as a scientist or you belong to a board. You work as a lawyer or in an NGO, your advice is heard, your decisions have consequences. You must be well informed in your field. Always reliable and first – in the shortest possible time. Then Table.Media's Professional Briefings are made for you.

Table.Media professional briefings are read in the right places: in the federal government and the EU Commission, in global corporations and NGOs, at universities and in think tanks, in associations and embassies, in law firms and consulting firms, always on several levels - by those who decide and those who prepare decisions. The best description of our audience: It's the Competence Leaders. What connects them is their competence in and for a topic.

Name: America's Test Kitchen
Description:
The mission of America’s Test Kitchen (ATK) is to empower and inspire confidence, community, and creativity in the kitchen. Founded in 1992, the company is the leading multimedia cooking resource serving millions of fans with TV shows (America’s Test Kitchen, Cook's Country, and America’s Test Kitchen: The Next Generation), award-winning magazine (Cook’s Illustrated) and limited-edition newsstand issues, cookbooks, a podcast (Proof), FAST channels, short-form video series, and the ATK Essential Membership for digital content. Based in a state-of-the-art 15,000-square-foot test kitchen in Boston’s Seaport District, ATK has earned the trust of home cooks and culinary experts alike thanks to its one-of-a-kind processes and best-in-class techniques. Fifty full-time (admittedly very meticulous) test cooks, editors, and product testers spend their days tweaking every variable to find the very best recipes, equipment, ingredients, and techniques. Learn more at https://www.americastestkitchen.com/.

The perks of the job include more than surprise calls to sample recipes in development (“Need tasters for Chocolate-Caramel Layer Cake in the on-set kitchen!”). 
We also keep the whole team happy with some special perks:
Christmas Eve to New Year’s Day Break - The whole company powers down for a winter break. No vacation time needed and no one comes back to a full email in-box!
Take-Home Fridge - What’s inside . . . a slice of pie, ingredients for a salmon dinner, both? You never know.
Free Copies of Publications - Get a selection of our iconic cooking magazines and cookbooks (we publish 10+ each year) before they hit stores.
Equipment Giveaways - Employees circle this date on our calendars each year. Score equipment we’ve used for product testing, from high-end blenders and stand mixers to knives and cookware. 
Dogs at work - They make us happy and more productive, and they make sure we take regular work breaks. Win, win, win!

Name: Impresa
Description:
A IMPRESA nasceu com o Expresso, cresceu com a SIC e é hoje um universo. Diariamente, produz 8 canais (SIC, SIC Internacional, SIC Notícias, SIC Radical, SIC Mulher, SIC K, SIC Caras e SIC Novelas) e o maior jornal do País, o Expresso, líder de vendas.
 
Em 2024, contactaram diariamente com a SIC mais de 3 milhões e 600 mil telespetadores em Portugal. Os canais temáticos da SIC foram, dentro dos grupos de canais portugueses, os mais vistos em 2024. Todos os dias, assistiram à SIC Notícias, SIC Radical, SIC Mulher, SIC Caras, SIC K e SIC Novelas perto de 2 milhões e 500 mil telespetadores.
 
Em 2024 (janeiro a dezembro, dados APCT), o Expresso é a publicação mais vendida em Portugal, com uma média de 83 mil 985 exemplares e continua a destacar-se como o jornal mais vendido em Portugal desde 2017.
 
O grupo IMPRESA é a empresa de comunicação social portuguesa com o maior número de canais de televisão a emitir além-fronteiras: 6 canais.
A SIC Internacional chega a 10 milhões de telespetadores em todo o mundo através dos sistemas de cabo, satélite e IPTV. O canal é distribuído em França, Suíça, Luxemburgo, Andorra, Alemanha, EUA, Canadá, Brasil, Austrália, Moçambique e Cabo Verde.

A SIC Notícias está presente em França, Andorra, Suíça, Luxemburgo, EUA, Canadá, Moçambique e Cabo Verde. A SIC Mulher, a SIC Radical e a SIC K são vistas em Angola e em Moçambique. Em Cabo Verde a SIC Mulher, a SIC Radical SIC K e a SIC CARAS.
 
No total, os canais SIC chegam a 11 países, através de 40 operadores.
 
Através da Opto, a plataforma de streaming da SIC, é possível ver em direto a SIC em todo o mundo. A SIC Notícias também integra a oferta internacional da Opto. Basta ter a aplicação num dispositivo com ligação à internet ou aceder a opto.sic.pt.
 
Além disso, os canais digitais 24h Opto SIC, SIC Alta Definição e SIC Replay estão também disponíveis em qualquer parte do mundo.
Location: Paço de Arcos, Paço de Arcos

It is hugely respected as a major source of independent news, analysis, interviews, debate and product trends - in fact 84% of kbb retailers said they would choose it over any other magazine.

kbbreview is a 100% individually requested controlled circulation magazine, mailed free to 15,000 registered readers. This means that not only do we know who every single one of those readers are but also that each meets the criteria necessary to receive the magazine. Likewise, each of them has personally requested to receive it - we don’t believe in sending it out to just anyone...

We are very proud of our editorial which is impartial and independent from advertising sales. This policy means we are free to tackle difficult industry issues and debates, and this has reinforced the integrity of kbbreview and generated significant respect from our valued readers.

Our network connects young people with the information, skills and resources they need to take control; embedding them in a digital and real-world community that gives them the self-belief to succeed, in their context and on their terms.

Since launching in 2009, Shujaaz Inc has proven that when young people take control of their lives, they create transformational change. Sehsucht equals visual addiction. That is what we create.

Seh | sucht [ˈze:zu:xt]
noun

1. the state of being habitually occupied with visual aesthetics or beauty (or involved in creating such), as design or moving images, to an extent that its cessation causes severe trauma
2. the domination of one's thoughts or feelings by a persistent visual idea, image, desire, etc.

Name: Mongabay India
Description:
Mongabay-India is a conservation and environment news and features service that aims to bring high quality, original reports from nature’s frontline in India. As the India-specific portal of the global news platform mongabay.com, this website follows the format of Mongabay’s dedicated Indonesia and Latin America news outlets. Rhett A. Butler founded mongabay.com in 1999 out of his passion for tropical forests. He named the site Mongabay after an island in Madagascar.

Since it was founded, Mongabay has grown into the world’s most popular rainforest information site and a well-known source of environmental news reporting and analysis. Today, Mongabay draws more than 2.5 million visitors per month and publishes stories in half a dozen languages. It is commonly used as an information source by mainstream media, including The Economist, Bloomberg, National Geographic, and the Associated Press. Mongabay is also widely recognised as an accurate and trustworthy source by civil society organisations as well as development agencies.

Mongabay-India looks at India’s development through the prism of conservation and environment. As an emerging economy, India’s growth story has had varying impact on the country’s habitats, natural resources, biological diversity and forest-dwelling communities. Stretching from tropical to temperate latitudes, with a 7500 km long coastline, two archipelagos, and home to the tallest mountains and largest mangrove tracts in the world, India harbours biodiversity hotspots of global importance. From these landscapes, we bring you stories of people, animals, plants and their habitats.

This website will focus on producing written content in English, but in time, we intend to broaden our offerings to video and other languages. Our articles are produced under an open Creative Commons license allowing other outlets to use our content, commercially or non-commercially, at no cost.

Name: Condé Nast Germany
Description:
Unsere globalen Marken sind stilprägend und in ihren Segmenten der Inbegriff für Exzellenz.
1909 von Condé Montrose Nast in den USA gegründet, ist Condé Nast heute die Heimat zahlreicher einflussreicher Medienmarken wie VOGUE, Vanity Fair, GLAMOUR, GQ, The New Yorker und WIRED. Als Tochtergesellschaft von Advance Publications gehört Condé Nast zu den größten privaten Medienunternehmen weltweit.

Seit 1978 setzt Condé Nast auch in Deutschland die Benchmarks im Premiummedien-Segment. Aktuell zählen die Marken VOGUE, GLAMOUR, GQ und AD zum Portfolio.

Außer im Premiummedien-Segment, unserem Kerngeschäft, ist Condé Nast Deutschland auf weiteren Geschäftsfeldern aktiv:
Die Condé Nast Manufaktur ist unsere content-fokussierte Kreativagentur für Premium-Lifestyle- und Luxusmarken. Unternehmen, die mit uns arbeiten, bringen Premium-Content erfolgreich und authentisch in ihre Zielgruppen und bauen vertrauensvolle Markenbeziehungen auf.
Unser hausinternes Studio Condé Nast fotografiert für Corporate-Publishing-Projekte der Condé Nast Manufaktur und für unsere eigenen Medienmarken. Das auf Still-Fotografie in den Bereichen Fashion, Beauty, Interior und Accessoires spezialisierte Studio vermarktet ausgewählte Bilder auch an Dritte und wird für Produktionen vermietet.

Darüber hinaus ist Condé Nast seit einigen Jahren in Deutschland und auch international im Bereich Mergers & Acquisitions aktiv. Wir beteiligen uns an Start-up-Unternehmen, die hinsichtlich ihrer Innovationsstärke, ihrer Qualitätsorientierung und ihres Unternehmergeistes zu Condé Nast passen.

Name: Content With Purpose
Description:
We are strategists, creatives, producers, filmmakers and marketers and we surround ourselves with the best industry experts and partners to uncover, create and share stories that will make tomorrow better - for both people and the planet.

CWP's mission:

We are at a pivotal moment in history where the lives of people and the health of the planet are at stake if we don’t take action.

In a world where headlines are often dominated by negativity and misinformation, we urgently need to shift the narrative to create optimism and give people real-world solutions. We need to show what is possible, not impossible.

That is why we are dedicated to uncovering, creating and sharing stories that truly matter, stories that inspire action, cultivate hope, and pave the way for a future where every individual and organisation recognises their potential to contribute to a better society and a healthier planet.

Our vision is a world where everyone feels empowered to play their part in creating a better tomorrow.

Wir schaffen einen fundierten, engagierten Journalismus sowie Unterhaltung, die anregt und bewegt. Auf dem Weg zu diesem Anspruch orientieren wir uns an unseren Werten.

Offenheit:
Wir stehen für eine Publizistik mit einer liberalen Haltung. Wir tragen zur freien Meinungsbildung, zu Erkenntnisgewinn und Orientierung bei und schaffen so eine Grundlage für eine offene demokratische Gesellschaft.

Nähe:
Wir erreichen die Menschen und ihre Interessen, bringen relevante Themen auf den Punkt und machen sie erlebbar. Deshalb engagieren wir uns für einen Journalismus, der an der Lebenswelt der Menschen anknüpft und bieten Unterhaltung, die bewegt.

Eigenständigkeit:
Wir sind einem unvoreingenommenen, unabhängigen und fairen Journalismus verpflichtet. Wir denken und handeln auf Grund unserer eigenen Überzeugungen und setzen auf Kreativität und Unternehmergeist.

We help C-suite executives, founders, and top-tier professionals build strong, influential personal brands through magazine features and LinkedIn growth.

In today’s landscape, who you are and how you’re seen are critical. At Mirror Review, we position your personal brand as a strategic asset—an extension of your company’s reputation and values.

In 2017, we started with a vision: Every leader has a story worth telling—and that story deserves to be told to the right people.

Since then, we’ve worked with C-suite executives, founders, and top-tier professionals, helping them enhance their digital presence, build credibility, and develop a strong professional network.

In every interview, we ask them one core question: “What’s the best advice you’d give to the next generation of leaders?” And the answer is almost always the same—“Connect with growth-minded people.” We believe it’s not just about what you know, but who you connect with—and we make sure your voice reaches that “who.”

Our approach is simple yet strategic—we combine magazine storytelling with LinkedIn growth strategies to reach the people who matter most for your career and reputation. With each feature, we position you as a thought leader and open doors to powerful connections and opportunities.

P.S. Why trust Mirror Review? We’ve interviewed 5,200+ C-suite leaders and published features in industries ranging from technology to finance—helping executives everywhere become leaders in visibility and influence.

Name: PBS
Description:
PBS is made up of more than 350 local public noncommercial TV stations serving all 50 states, Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands, Guam and American Samoa. PBS stations reach more than 120 million people each month through on-air and online content.

PBS is a private, nonprofit corporation, founded in 1969, whose members are Americaâ€s public Television stations.

PBS oversees program acquisition and provides program distribution and promotion; education services; new media ventures; fundraising support; engineering and technology development; and video marketing.

Find and Follow us on: Facebook (@PBS), Twitter (@PBS), YouTube (@PBS), Instagram (@PBS), and TikTok (@PBS).

Description:
Founded in Hong Kong in 2005, Hypebeast is a global leading platform for contemporary culture and lifestyle and a premier destination for editorially-driven news and commerce. For more than 15 years, we have been on a mission to share the most authentic aspect of culture around the globe. 

Our business is comprised of three major divisions – Hypemedia, an umbrella of online editorial and social media platforms; Hypemaker, an in-house creative production agency; and HBX, an e-commerce platform and omnichannel shopping destination.

Description:
Amplifying local stories on a global scale, we produce and deliver premium, multi-genre IP across the 27 territories we operate in. From Got TalenttoNeighbours,PasswordtoPoor Things,Alice & JacktoAmerica the Beautiful,The Lost OnestoBig Mood andPriscillatoHouse of Kardashian,our focus is simple: create and deliver irresistible entertainment.

Name: Indian Transport & Logistics News
Description:
Indian Transport & Logistics News (ITLN) is a bimonthly magazine from STAT Publishing Group LLC, a transport and logistics specialist global trade publishing group. 

Launched in 2009, ITLN brings the latest and most credible news and views of the transportation & logistics industries from one of the world’s largest markets. 

The magazine reaches logistics and supply chain managers of India’s key manufacturing sectors like auto, pharma, textile, high-tech, gem, and jewellery. The magazine also reaches India’s key industry organizations like FFFAI, ACAAI, ACFI, and FIEO. 

ITLN has a strong online presence at www.itln.in, which is updated with news from the latest transport and logistics news from India and the rest of the world.

ITLN also organises industry-dedicated conferences throughout the year, including Global Pharma Logistics Summit, E-commerce Logistics Summit, AutoSCM Summit, and High Tech Logistics Summit.

Name: FINANCE Magazin
Description:
Seit mehr als zehn Jahren steht die FINANCE-Redaktion in engem und kritischem Dialog mit CFOs, Banken und Vertretern der Financial Community. Mit Büros in Frankfurt, London und Berlin sind wir die größte CFO-Redaktion in Europa. FINANCE liefert spannende Einblicke in die Finanzwelt und nützliche Tipps für die Arbeit in den Finanzabteilungen großer und mittelständischer Unternehmen – seit Mai 2012 täglich in Beiträgen und Web-TV-Sendungen auf unserer Online-Plattform www.finance-magazin.de und acht Mal jährlich im gedruckten Heft. 

Unser Online-Portal www.finance-magazin.de versorgt Finanzchefs tagesaktuell mit Neuigkeiten und Hintergründen – stets durch die Brille des CFOs betrachtet. Interviews, Reportagen und kritische Kommentare von Redakteuren und hochkarätigen Experten, Webinare sowie das börsentägliche Web-Fernsehformat FINANCE-TV liefern wertvolle Informationen aus den Bereichen Persönlich & Personal, Geld & Liquidität, Bilanzierung & Controlling, Risiko & IT, Strategie & Effizienz sowie Märkte & Wirtschaft. 
Das FINANCE Magazin gehört zur FINANCIAL GATES GmbH, einem Unternehmen der renommierten F.A.Z.-Verlagsgruppe. Zum Portfolio gehören Print-Magazine, Studien, Veranstaltungen und Online-Medien, darunter das Magazin Markt und Mittelstand, das englischsprachige Magazin CFO Insight, der führende Kongress für Finanzentscheider (Structured FINANCE), die Online-Newsletter Der Treasurer und EuroTreasurer und das Web-Fernsehformat FINANCE-TV.

Name: Endemol Shine Group
Description:
Endemol Shine Group creates world class content for all platforms.

Last year Endemol Shine Group travelled formats originating from 12  countries, these included global ‘superbrands’ MasterChef which enjoyed its biggest year to date in 2019 and Big Brother, which in its 20th anniversary year has seen returns in eight countries.

Streamer commissions include Quibi’s first ever commission in the UK (Elba Vs Block) and Amazon’s first non-scripted original in Italy (Celebrity Hunted). 2020 has to date seen the return of timeless classics Extreme Makeover: Home Edition, The Biggest Loser in the US and Ready Steady Cook in the UK along with further adaptations of industry leaders All Together Now and The Wall and long-running favourites such as Deal or No Deal. Whilst Mr Bean and Simon’s Cat lead a digital network which boasts over 3 billion monthly views.

A diverse portfolio of drama includes recent successful launches Deadwater Fell and Calpihate, high profile returners including Grantchester and Tin Star, and popular global scripted titles which include Bron (Sweden/Denmark) which has now been adapted in nine territories, Penoza (Netherlands), Fifty (Israel), La Catedral del Mar (Spain), Nicky Jam: El Ganador (LatAm) and Beforeigners (Norway).

In July 2020 Endemol Shine Group was acquired by Banijay, creating the world’s largest international content producer and distributor spanning 22 territories with over 120 production companies and a multi-genre catalogue boasting over 88,000 hours of original standout programming.

Name: Fortiche Production
Description:
At the crossroads of animation and filmmaking, Fortiche is an award-winning entertainment company developing original IPs and delivering large-scale international productions.

Founded in 2009, Fortiche has built a distinctive 2D/3D aesthetic that has become its hallmark. The company is behind Arcane (Netflix/Tencent), one of the most awarded animated drama series for adults, based on Riot Games’ League of Legends. Its portfolio also includes collaborations with Riot Games (Rise, K/DA – POP/STARS, Warriors), music videos for Stromae/Pomme, Coldplay, and Gorillaz, as well as the Rocket & Groot series for Marvel Studios.

With teams in Paris, Montpellier, and Las Palmas (Spain), Fortiche brings together up to 450 professionals across all stages of creation, direction, and production, combining creative ambition with global reach.

Name: HT Media Group
Description: HT Media Group is among India's largest media and entertainment conglomerates. The Group's offerings spanning Print, Audio, and Digital verticals, have remained crucial and relevant for nearly a century in influencing culture and shaping public opinion. The Group enjoys wide-reaching popularity and has built reliable credibility across its Print brands - English daily Hindustan Times, the Hindi daily Hindustan, and the business publication Mint. It enjoys a prominent presence in the Audio space through much-loved and enjoyed brand offerings, including Fever FM, Radio Nasha, Radio One, FAB Market, HT Smartcast, and Punjabi Fever. The Group has continued to build on the success of its online recruitment and skills training portal Shine.com, with a positive foray to further its Digital offerings through the Mosaic Digital product umbrella that operates news and research platforms VCCircle, TechCircle, and EdgeInsights focused on serving the investment and enterprise technology communities. The Group also owns popular Internet businesses, including OTT Play, Slurrp, and Healthshots. For more details, visit www.htmedia.in.

Description:
We are a media business focused on creating content that matters to millions of people across Europe. Our offer covers print and online Publishing, Audio broadcasting and entertainment, Out of Home advertising, and Investments in other media related sectors. 

We are one of Europe’s largest Publishers, with almost 500 million copies sold each year. From women’s and celebrities’ magazines and TV listings to food and special interest, we own some of Europe’s most popular digital and print publishing brands. Family-owned in the 5th generation, Bauer Media focuses 
on the long-term with a consumer first mindset. Our 
workforce of over 12,000 shares a common purpose: 
to deliver content and services that enrich people‘s everyday lives. 

Our mission is to entertain, serve and inspire our customers, making each day a little better and supporting them as they organise their lives and discover more.

Our Purpose is to enrich everyday life. This Purpose is our reason for being in business. It’s why our consumers buy our products and services. It’s why we come to work every day. It’s at the heart of everything we do and what unites us. 

Our group-wide company values are Trust, Passion, Excellence and Entrepreneurship. These four values underpin our corporate identity and culture. They are our guide for how we want to work and grow together.

With the N2 franchising model, team members enjoy a fulfilling, lucrative opportunity that, in turn, provides more than 25,000 businesses an avenue to reach their ideal clients.

The N2 Company proves that, given the right niche, print media can defy odds in an era dominated by digital. We’ve been named an Inc. 5000 winner eight years in a row, made it on Entrepreneur's Franchise 500 list for our culture, growth, investment, and opportunity, and have been recognized as a great place to work by Glassdoor, Fortune, and many others. Description:

The company delivers quality up to date content to its readers, viewers, delegates and guests through digital, print, events, awards, video content, social media platforms and social media influencers.  These brands include major international and regional names such as Time Out, Arabian Business, Harper’s Bazaar, Complex MENA, T Magazine, Construction Week and Gault&Millau.

ITP strives to offer its customers the largest audience in the GCC with the highest engagement levels by adopting a 360 degree approach.

ITP Live, which was designed to extend the company’s digital footprint as well as enhance its total reach on social media, has four key business areas - the region’s largest social influencers’ agency, video content creation (ITP Originals), e-games (ITP Gaming) and live events.  

The ITP Customer division publishes the catalogues, previews and daily show newspapers for all exhibitions organised by Dubai World Trade Centre as well as a host of specialist publications for major retail and financial organisations.  

ITP was founded in 1987 in the UK, and to reflect the international scope of its business, the company subsequently relocated to Dubai in the United Arab Emirates, where over 400 staff are based. The company also has offices in Mumbai, London and LA and is led by CEO Ali Akawi.  
www.itp.com

OUR MISSION
To help our media and entertainment customers build more efficient supply chains, more valuable products,

WORLD CLASS TEAM
Our team is comprised of subject matter experts and industry craftsmen who are passionate about their work, each having an extensive background working on the world’s most respected feature and episodic titles. We cultivate an open and transparent atmosphere that values integrity, continuous improvement and achievement. Our clients benefit from our forward looking approach and relentless commitment to customer service.

SECURITY FIRST

Name: Vanguard Media Limited
Description:
A Nigerian daily newspaper covering general national news, politics, business, energy, sports, entertainment, fashion,lifestyle human interest stories, etc.

Sam Amuka was editor of Sunday Times and the First Managing Director of the Punch Newspaper.) He is from Itsekiri land  in the present Delta State of Nigeria.

Description:
RTÉ (Raidió Teilifís Éireann) is Ireland's national public service media, operating 25 radio, television, online and mobile services. www.rte.ie

RTÉ's radio service began on 1 January 1926, while television broadcasts began on 31 December 1961, making it one of the oldest continuously operating public service broadcasters in the world. 

RTÉ services are impartial in accordance with statutory obligations. At its heart, RTÉ is a creative organisation, making and commissioning a broad range of high-quality programming and content to meet the needs of multiple audiences.

Description:
Moonbug is an award-winning global entertainment company inspiring kids everywhere to laugh, learn and grow. The company is behind some of the biggest kids entertainment brands in the world including CoComelon and Blippi. 

Moonbug believes every child should have access to our entertaining and educational content, which is why our shows are available on more than 150 platforms globally including Netflix, Disney+, BBC iPlayer and YouTube Kids. The company’s portfolio currently stands at 29 IPs and its content is available in 32 languages (including ASL).

Name: Aviation International News
Description:
Founded in 1972 by aviation editor James Holahan and publisher Wilson S. Leach, The Convention News Company (now branded as AIN Publications) published its first issues of NBAA Convention News at that year's National Business Aviation Convention in Cincinnati, Ohio. While still publishing NBAA Convention News each year, the company has expanded its offerings to include on-site daily publications at the annual Heli-Expo (HAI Convention News) and European Business Aviation Convention and Exhibition (EBACE Convention News) and at four biennial international airshows in Farnborough, England, Paris, France, Dubai and Singapore.

The company also publishes Aviation International News, a monthly trade publication widely called "AIN," which covers news, features, special reports, aircraft evaluations and surveys on business, commercial and regional aviation worldwide, and a four-times-weekly electronic newsletter, available by e-mail, AINalerts (www.ainalerts.com), which focuses on the same subjects as Aviation International News. Other digital publications produced by the AIN Publications editorial staff are AIN Air Transport Perspective and AIN Defense Perspective.

شركة أبوظبي للإعلام هي شركة الإعلام الرائدة في دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة، تركز على تطوير وإنتاج وتوزيع المحتوى المتميز والهادف للجمهور المحلي والعربي عبر 21 منصة إعلامية تشمل التلفزيون، الإذاعة، المنصات الرقمية، والمطبوعات. تأسست عام 1969 برؤية المغفور له الشيخ زايد بن سلطان آل نهيان، وتلعب دوراً محورياً في دعم وترويج القيم الوطنية والمعرفة والثقافة في دولة الإمارات والمنطقة.
Abu Dhabi Media is the UAE’s leading media organization, producing and distributing premium content across 21 platforms — including TV, radio, digital, and print. Founded in 1969 under the vision of the late Sheikh Zayed bin Sultan Al Nahyan, ADM plays a key role in promoting national values, culture, and knowledge across the UAE and Arab world.

The only bias consumers of TKWS can expect is our undying mission to support Kenya in becoming the most efficient, effective, and business-friendly country on the African continent. 

TKWS is a digital-first company equipped with some of Africa’s most experienced and respected journalists while also producing high-quality audio and video content that meets the needs of the modern generation. La squadra multidisciplinare spazia dal marketing al giornalismo e dalla giurisprudenza alla psicologia.

Name: Economic and Political Weekly
Description:
First published in 1949 as the Economic Weekly and since 1966 as the Economic and Political Weekly, EPW, as the journal is popularly known, occupies a special place in the intellectual history of independent India.

The Economic and Political Weekly, published from Mumbai, India, is a journal/ magazine published from Mumbai, India.

The journal/ magazine was first published in 1949 as the Economic Weekly (edited by Sachin Chaudhuri) and since 1966 was re-christened the Economic and Political Weekly, EPW. The journal is regarded to be an unique forum that has brought various academics, researchers, policy makers, independent thinkers, members of non-governmental organisations and political activists for debates straddling economics, politics, sociology, culture, the environment and numerous other disciplines. It was edited by Krishna Raj for more than three decades. 

EPW is published by the Sameeksha Trust, a registered charitable trust.

EPW is known to take strong editorial positions and forthright stances on current affairs and its pages have for decades been open to writers who have highlighted the challenges facing the disadvantaged. It is known as a publication with a "social conscience". Some have even called it independent India's conscience. The EPW's biggest influence on social sciences in India has been in catalysing debates and disseminating research output.

Name: ArtReview
Description:
Founded in 1949, ArtReview is one of the world’s leading international contemporary art magazines, dedicated to expanding contemporary art’s audience and reach, and tracing the ways it interacts with culture in general. Aimed at both a specialist and a general audience, the magazine and its sibling publication, ArtReview Asia (launched in 2013), feature a mixture of criticism, reviews, commentary and analysis alongside commissioned artist projects, guides and special supplements.

ArtReview publishes nine issues a year, including two dedicated to particular areas of focus: the Power 100 in the December issue and Future Greats at the beginning of the year. It is distributed throughout Europe, the Americas and Asia-Pacific. ArtReview Asia publishes four issues a year and is distributed throughout the region and in selected outlets elsewhere.

ArtReview’s website artreview.com features art and cultural news, criticism, opinion, video, podcasts, articles from the latest issues of ArtReview and ArtReview Asia, artist projects, highlights from the magazines’ 70-year archives and multimedia content from around the web. Through regular newsletters and social media, ArtReview connects with over a million people every month.

ArtReview develops and hosts regular events, ranging from talks and screenings to launches and conferences, both in its bar in London and at venues around the globe. In addition ArtReview curates live events and programmes for nonprofit institutions, art fairs and major art festivals. It also offers high-quality content and creative solutions to select global brand partners, including bespoke events, contract publishing of books and supplements, high-spec video and podcast content, and much more.

المجموعة السعودية للأبحاث والإعلام SRMG أكبر مجموعة إعلامية متكاملة من  منطقة الشرق الأوسط وشمال إفريقيا. منذ عام 1972 ونحن نواصل قيادة التغيير في صناعة الإعلام من خلال 35 منصة رائدة ومن أبرزها: «الشرق الأوسط»، «عرب نيوز»، «اقتصاد الشرق مع بلومبرغ»، «بيلبورد عربية»، «إندبندنت عربية»، وعبر القنوات الفضائية، والمنصات الرقمية، والمطبوعات، وصناعة الأفلام، نقدّم محتوى عالي الجودة يصل لأكثر من 172 مليون شخص حول العالم، بـ 7 لغات، في أربع قارات. 

مهمتنا تتمحور  في تقديم محتوى متميز وملهم وموثوق يحقق تطلعات القراء والمتابعين، بالاعتماد على أدق الأبحاث، لبناء جسور التواصل بين ثقافات العالم، وتعزيز المعرفة في ظل التغيرات التي يشهدها العالم اليوم.

لدينا شراكات ناجحة مع عدد من المؤسسات الإعلامية العالمية الرائدة مثل: «وارنر براذرز ديسكفري»، و «بلومبرغ الإعلامية» تمنحنا الوصول إلى محتوى عالمي مميز، والاستفادة من الخبرات لصناعة الإنتاجات عالية الجودة، وجلب الترفيه المتميز للجمهور في المنطقة.

Name: Forbes Bulgaria
Description:
Forbes, гласът на предприемаческия капитализъм, достига до 180 млн. читатели, което го прави най-големия бизнес медия бранд в света. Forbes възхвалява свободното предприемачество и успеха. Мисията му е да помага на хората да следват мечтите си и да преследват щастието. „Business was originated to produce happiness, not to pile up millions.“, пише основателят му B. C. Forbes в редакционния си коментар в първия брой на списанието през септември 1917 г.

Forbes следва високи професионални и етични стандарти и предлага най-високото качество журналистика със своите над 2800 редактори, журналисти и автори.

Съдържанието е с фокус върху новините и информацията за бизнеса, инвестирането, технологиите, предприемачеството, иновациите, лидерството и филантропията. Известно е със своите класации – най-богатите хора в света, най-влиятелните личности, най-големите компании, знаменитостите, младите предприемачи под 30 и т.н. – които се цитират от медиите в цял свят.

Forbes има 40 местни издания, сред които е Forbes България.

Forbes стъпи на българския пазар през 2010 г. и до края на 2018 г. има издадени около 100 броя на списанието. От 2019 Forbes България има нов издател – “Българска бизнес медия” ЕООД, която се притежава от “Фондация за насърчаване на предприемачеството”, регистрирана в обществена полза, с изпълнителен директор и действителен собственик Йордан Матеев, бивш главен редактор в периода 2010-2018 г.
