Name: ProPublica
Description:
ProPublica is an independent, nonprofit newsroom that produces investigative journalism with moral force. We dig deep into important issues, shining a light on abuses of power and betrayals of public trust — and we stick with those issues as long as it takes to hold power to account.

With a team of more than 75 dedicated journalists, ProPublica covers a range of topics including government and politics, business, criminal justice, the environment, education, health care, immigration, and technology. We focus on stories with the potential to spur real-world impact. Among other positive changes, our reporting has contributed to the passage of new laws; reversals of harmful policies and practices; and accountability for leaders at local, state and national levels.

Investigative journalism requires a great deal of time and resources, and many newsrooms can no longer afford to take on this kind of deep-dive reporting. As a nonprofit, ProPublica’s work is powered primarily through donations. The vast bulk of the money we spend goes directly into world-class, award-winning journalism. We are committed to uncovering the truth, no matter how long it takes or how much it costs, and we practice transparent financial reporting so donors know how their dollars are spent.

ProPublica was founded in 2007-2008 with the belief that investigative journalism is critical to our democracy. Our staff remains dedicated to carrying forward the important work of exposing corruption, informing the public about complex issues, and using the power of investigative journalism to spur reform.

The bar was to be called El Cañonazo. It never opened.

Founded in 2010, El Cañonazo Transmedia, is an award-winning and independent company based in Madrid and specialised on three business areas: transmedia formats development, branded content strategy, and multi-platform content production.

El Cañonazo Productions: on demand digital content production service 

WE ARE CREATIVE
We are narrative storytellers, not advertising copywriters. Our ideas become scripts, stories, documentaries, etc. They are designed to attract and engage audiences instead of interrupting the content they are watching. We aim to entertain.

WE ARE AUDIOVISUAL
We produce on-demand content. We know that close and direct content is vital on these channels, and that is what we strive for. We have been creating content for these platforms for years and our know-how allows us to adapt to our client's needs. 

WE ARE DIGITAL
El Cañonazo was born digital. We have distributed online video since before YouTube ever existed and we are constantly on the look-out for new platforms and connected screens so that we can innovate on our proposals and also adapt to them. We think Anyscreen-Anywhere

Sorry, we don't make cocktails.

Name: ACCESS: VFX
Description:
For the first time in our history the VFX community has joined forces to create ACCESS: VFX, an industry movement with one common goal: to increase diversity and promote better inclusion within the creative sector. That’s 8 world renowned VFX studios, 7 industry institutions and 2 government bodies. As a collective we have recognised that to create real change we need to stop acting as individual studio’s and come together as one voice so that the inclusion priority cannot be ignored. 

ACCESS: VFX launched during National Inclusion Week 2017 with a host of inspiring workshops, networking mixers, panel events and screenings all taking place across the London VFX community to create and sustain a conversation on real inclusion. In addition to creating a space for this dialogue, we hosted a careers day for 15 to 18 year old students from underrepresented schools and connected them to mentors from the 8 participating VFX houses; we also asked our current apprentices to design and deliver a full day workshop raising awareness of routes into industry. 

The team includes representatives from VFX studios including Framestore, Double Negative, The Mill, Industrial Light & Magic, Union VFX, Blue Zoo, MPC and Jellyfish Pictures,  training bodies Escape Studios, Escape Technology and FX Digital and institutions such as The UK Screen Alliance, Into Film, Creative Skillset and the Greater London Authority.  

ACCESS: VFX is about taking action, challenging and calling out both our creative community and educational establishments. 

We firmly believe that working as a collective whole is the missing link to creating real change.

Name: Ink World
Description:
The global ink industry was worth more than $20 billion in 2015, with the U.S., Europe and Asia-Pacific accounting for the largest portions. In the U.S. alone, there are approximately 200 companies that manufacture ink.

For the past 22 years, when ink industry professionals want the latest industry news and information, they turn to InkWorld, the most widely read source for ink news and in-depth information on the development, manufacture and sale of litho, flexo, gravure, radiation-cured, inkjet, RFID and printed electronics, and specialty inks, coatings and allied products. Ink World covers the latest trends with in-depth articles and also keeps ink manufacturers informed about pigments, resins, varnishes, solvents, waxes, equipment and other essential products. In the pages of Ink World, top company officials discuss their thoughts about the industry along with reports on
developments affecting printers and suppliers. Our featured columnists cover Europe and Latin America.

There’s much more to Ink World: regular departments provide the latest information on small companies, industry news, new products, market information, personnel moves,
meetings and other news. Ink Inc. profiles an up-and-coming ink company.

In addition, Ink World’s web site, www.inkworldmagazine.com, offers all of this plus our breaking news updates while our e-mail newsletter provides up-to-the-minute news to keep our readers up-to-date with current events

Name: Freelance Video Professional
Description:
David Hinshaw’s video production career spans over thirty years. He holds a Masters degree from the University of Cincinnati where he was elected Vice President of the Student Body and served on many student/faculty committees.

David began his video production career as an independent contractor for Gannett Production Services in Atlanta, Georgia. From there he branched out to work for numerous Atlanta based production companies. Eventually David formed Mud Puppy Productions and purchased network quality broadcast equipment. He then began working for corporate clients as well as many broadcast and cable networks including ABC, ESPN, CBS, NBC, HBO, Sky News, AT&T, The Coca-Cola Company, Microsoft, Bank of America, and many more. 

Primarily a Director of Photography and camera operator he has over the years increased his skills to fit the digital world learning Final Cut Pro, Dreamweaver, SoundTrack Pro, and other non linear based editing and web based programs. He also is well trained in field audio production. 

Owning and running a business David acquired skills of budgeting, time management and personnel management as well as equipment maintenance, customer relations and marketing. During this time he produced the award winning documentary "Through the Tunnel & Beyond" which has aired in Europe, South America and Japan. It was sold in America by PBS Home Video and Barnes & Noble.

In 2005 David sold Mud Puppy Productions and moved to London where he freelanced with several independent production companies and taught briefly at the American School in London.

Returning to Atlanta in 2007 David continues to freelance and is a part-time teacher at the Art Institute of Atlanta. He is also serving as North American field producer for a production company in Australia producing a series for National Geographic Television.

Name: African Leadership Magazine
Description:
The African Leadership magazine is published by ALG Strategy Group Limited and focuses on showcasing the best of Africa to a global audience, telling the African story from an African perspective; while evolving solutions to peculiar challenges being faced by the continent today.

Since its maiden edition in August 2008, African Leadership Magazine has grown to become a leading pan-African flagship leadership-focused publication read by over 580, 000 targeted international investors, business executives, government policy makers and multilateral agencies across Africa, the Middle East and Asia, Europe and the US. It is distributed at major international and African Leadership events around the world.

Our mission is to promote innovation, entrepreneurship and development in Africa, thereby heralding the emergence of a new Africa, growing beyond potential into true greatness.

The magazine ploughs back its profits into providing a future for vulnerable children of Africa through its SEND A CHILD TO SCHOOL PROGRAM, which it wholly supports in collaboration with the Centre for Economic and Leadership Development Nigeria. The magazine actualizes its corporate social responsibility objective through the Centre for Economic and Leadership Development – its strategic development outlet and social impact arm, an NGO currently in special consultative status with the United Nations Economic and Social Council (UN ECOSOC). 

The Centre currently has impacted numerous African children under its care, and totally sponsors the secondary school education of these children currently schooling in Nigeria, Liberia, Kenya and Ghana; and Is continually adding vulnerable children from the various countries of Africa, as its resources permits.

Description:

Agon started it with an empowering message of changing lives over one nightfall, and that a bad past doesn't need to mean a bad future.

Fast forward to today, after reaching millions of people, Project Nightfall has grown far beyond one man. We have become a social movement and the Project Nightfall Organization is the ultimate reason our team wakes up every day, motivated to impact this world. 

What sets us apart from other non-profit organizations is our incredible online presence. We average 500,000,000 views every month, have a truly globally diverse audience, and are known for discussing uncomfortable topics.

We have the power to share the struggles faced by the most underrepresented people who don't get enough attention but desperately need our help. Together we will continue to work hard every single day not only to educate people with our videos but also to make sure that not even one dollar goes to waste in our organization.

Name: Militär Aktuell
Description:
Ausbildungsdetails von Spezialeinheiten, die Durchschlagskraft von Panzermunition, die umfangreiche Logistik hinter Abfangjägern oder die Präzision von Lenkwaffensystemen. Viele Menschen haben ein gewisses Grundverständnis zu Dutzenden militärischen Themenbereichen. Eine Herausforderung ist es, dieses partielle Wissen in einen fundierten Kontext zu bringen und wie Puzzleteile Stück für Stück zu einem großen Ganzen zusammenzufügen. Dank vieler engagierter Journalisten, Fotografen und Mitarbeiter versteht sich unsere Zeitschrift Militär Aktuell aber genau darauf.

Viermal jährlich berichten wir über aktuelle Krisenherde und neue Waffensysteme. Wir stellen Truppenteile vor, erklären Gerätschaften und Waffensysteme im Detail, begleiten Soldaten durch ihren Alltag, beobachten sie im Einsatz oder bei Übungen, befragen Experten und geben unseren Lesern auf Basis gewissenhafter Recherchen einen umfassenden Überblick über das militärische Weltgeschehen. Dazu bedienen wir uns umfangreicher Hintergrundberichte ebenso wie aufwendiger Reportagen und Fotostrecken, aufschlussreicher Grafiken, kritischer Interviews und erklärender Expertenkommentare. Unser Ziel sind sorgfältig aufbereitete Texte, die nicht nur informieren, sondern auch unterhalten. Wir bieten gute Lesbarkeit, ein ausgewogenes Verhältnis von Nähe und Distanz sowie Qualität in Text und Bild.

Policy reforms, public awareness, and community empowerment.

OTHER PRODUCTS
Digital Content Curation

Media Monitoring via Command News
Our powerful forecasting tool provides real-time breaking news alerts to help you see tomorrow’s news today.

Stylebook

Editorial Production Services

Real-time Data

A pedagoga e ilustradora Bruna Bandeira é a mente criativa à frente da Imagine e Desenhe.  

Criada em 2013, a  marca surgiu do desejo da artista de expressar seus sentimentos através da arte. 

De uma forma leve, colorida e recheada de afeto, sua arte aborda temas sérios como saúde mental, autocuidado, aceitação, oportunidades, empreendedorismo, diversidade, representatividade e inclusão.  

Suas ilustrações se tornaram fenômeno de engajamento nas mídias sociais,  criando uma rede de apoio e acolhimento entre seguidores que se identificam com tais questões.  

Gerar conexão entre as pessoas nos mais variados segmentos em que atua — ilustração personalizada, oficinas, palestras, murais, desenvolvimento de soluções para humanizar o setor corporativo — só faz aumentar o senso de propósito da Imagine e Desenhe. 

Afinal, sonhar e realizar é possível! Melhor ainda é criar em rede, gerando transformação coletiva, porque como diz a ciberativista/roteirista Triscila Oliveira: "Se a luta não for por todos, não está sendo por nenhum de nós”.

É nisso que a Imagine e Desenhe acredita!



Ilustrações personalizadas, projetos, brindes e campanhas é só
entrar em contato pelo email da Imagine e Desenhe :)

contato@imagineedesenhe.com

Unidad Editorial es el grupo de comunicación multimedia líder del sector en España. El rigor, la veracidad y la independencia son las claves que han guiado el éxito de la compañía, que puede enorgullecerse de ser una referencia máxima a nivel informativo.

Entre sus cabeceras, el grupo edita el diario EL MUNDO, referencia informativa de la actualidad nacional; EXPANSIÓN, líder en el sector económico, y MARCA, el periódico más leído de la prensa española, muy por encima de cualquier generalista.

En su oferta informativa, se incluyen asimismo YO DONA, el semanario femenino que combina los reportajes de actualidad con la información de moda y belleza; FUERA DE SERIE, el suplemento dedicado al lujo y la exclusividad; LA LUNA DE METRÓPOLI, la referencia gastronómica y de ocio de los quioscos españoles; PAPEL, la revista dominical, y El Cultural, que se distribuye conjuntamente con EL MUNDO.

Entre las revistas que edita Unidad Editorial se encuentra TELVA, la revista de alta gama con mayor acogida entre los lectores; ACTUALIDAD ECONÓMICA, la decana de las finanzas y los mercados en España y MARCA Motor, que se perfila como la publicación más leída del sector del automóvil.

Por su parte, la información de medicina y salud se ve reflejada en DIARIO MÉDICO, CORREO FARMACÉUTICO y CUIDATEPLUS.com, referencias de la actualidad sanitaria en sus respectivos ámbitos.

Name: MRO Business Today
Description: MRO BT is a fortnightly Digital Magazine that reaches out to some 25000+ MRO professionals , most of whom finds their coveted places in the Who –is-Who Book of the Industry,  worldwide.

Name: Viory
Description:
Headquartered in Abu Dhabi, with strategic hubs worldwide, Viory is the video news agency of the Global South. We deliver vital news, empowering diverse perspectives from today’s rising epicenters, as well as international stories seen through their lens.

Our flagship product is exclusive, verified raw video news footage, captured the moment news breaks anywhere in the world by our global network of thousands of on-the-ground video journalists.

Through our platform, we publish over 60 high-quality news videos daily, stream 440+ hours of live events each month, and provide access to an archive of more than 180,000 video packages.

Our main topics include breaking news, politics, conflicts, sports, science and technology, as well as lighter stories that capture cultural moments and viral trends, always keeping the spotlight on our core regions and what matters to them.

Our clients include major international news outlets, local media organizations, and independent creatives in more than 170 countries, throughout the Global South and beyond.

As a next-generation, digital-native news company, we leverage the latest technologies to meet our clients’ needs, delivering unprecedented speed, flexibility, reliability, and one-click access to essential news footage.

Looking for fast, exclusive, and verified coverage from the frontlines of a changing world?

Join us for the latest news from and for the Global South, narratives that can no longer be overlooked, events reshaping the world, and content vital to telling the story in full.

Name: FinansWatch
Description:
FinansWatch leverer troværdige, uafhængige og aktuelle nyheder om virksomheder og personer i den finansielle sektor. 

FinansWatch dækker store og små historier, når de breaker, indhenter de hurtige kommentarer og laver de dybdegående artikler. Vi skriver om pengeinstitutter, pensionskasser, forsikringsselskaber, realkreditinstitutter, kapitalforvaltere samt følger de hyppige politiske og regulative bevægelser.

Vi tror på, at den bedste journalistik bliver lavet af folk, der ved, hvad de skriver om. Og vores ambition er at levere uafhængig, kritisk og fair finansjournalistik – hver eneste dag.

Da vi har ambitioner om at levere kvalitetsjournalistik, kræver det abonnement at læse en del af artiklerne på FinansWatch. Læs mere på vores hjemmeside, hvis din virksomhed ønsker et abonnement på FinansWatch.

Name: Newslaundry
Description:
Newslaundry is a media critique, news and current affairs portal and YouTube channel. We value independence and transparency and believe the two are integral to democracy and a healthy society. This applies to news media too, often referred to as the fourth pillar of democracy. 

We will question established ways and models that get too comfortable and cozy.

No one should be above scrutiny: Not politics, industry, civil society, and certainly not the media. Not them, not you, not us - no one.

Welcome to Newslaundry. Sabki dhulai. You watch. We’re watching. 

Subscribe: https://newslaundry.com/subscription?ref=social

Name: CIOandLeader
Description:
CIOandLeader is India’s leading fortnightly magazine for technology decision-makers. It promotes the exchange of informed perspectives and insights on trends, management techniques and new IT business strategies, between CIOs and other stakeholders. CIO & Leader is acknowledged as a 'trusted source' of knowledge for top management responsible for balancing the demands on technology for ‘growth and governance’. 
Log on to www.cioandleader.com for more information.

Name: Al Bayan Newspaper
Description:
Al Bayan Newspaper is a one of the leading Arab and Khaleeji newspapers, characterized by credibility and transparency in monitoring the events and news of interest to the Arab world, through a network of correspondents and editors who seek the truth and bring a definite credibility to their news coverage. Since its inception in May 10, 1980, the Al Bayan Newspaper has been distinct from other local and Arabic newspapers in its news coverage and interest in local and Arab affairs, and was able to establish a good reputation and wide distribution, taking advantage of the advent and advancement of the Internet technology and online press, which have significantly increased its readership within and outside the Arab World.

To know more and view Al Bayan Newspaper, visit us at http://www.albayan.ae

Name: Imaginary Forces
Description:
Founded in 1996, Imaginary Forces is an award-winning design studio and creative agency specializing in brand strategy and visual storytelling. 

Across entertainment, media, technology, and culture, we connect audiences through beautiful, design-driven content. We are powered by talented individuals working together to push the limits of creative possibility.

Partnering with high-profile entertainment properties (Netflix, HBO, Apple TV+) and top cultural tastemakers (Meta, Google, PepsiCo), from strategy through execution, we’re always looking to create impact and ignite the imagination.


Visit us at www.imaginaryforces.com

Name: International Media Investments (IMI)
Description:
We are IMI, a global media powerhouse headquartered in the UAE, bringing the world closer by leading the market in news, knowledge, and factual entertainment.

We are more than just a media company. We are pioneers in storytelling. We use the power of stories to open minds, connect people and, ultimately, enrich lives. 

We partner with the best minds globally, embracing technology to elevate our storytelling and create immersive experiences that resonate. 

We break down barriers, celebrate diversity, and empower individuals. 

Behind the scenes, we are shaping the future of media to explore new ways of taking you further and deeper than ever before— bringing you closer to your world.

Name: Bloomberg Originals
Description: Bloomberg Originals offers cinematic documentary-style explorations and feature shows at the intersection of business, climate, technology, sports and beyond.

Name: Pensions & Investments
Description: Pensions & Investments is the leading news, events and data source for money managers, investment consultants and institutional investors. For more than 40 years, P&I has covered the investment activities of defined benefit plans, defined contribution plans, endowments and foundations and the investment consultants and investment managers that serve them.

Name: Sportico
Description: Sportico is a high quality digital content company providing sports industry breaking news, data, information, strategies, leadership and insight.

Name: Rise25
Description:
We help B2B businesses connect to their ‘Dream 200’ clients,  referral partners, strategic partners and more, and get ROI using a podcast. 

We are an easy button to launch and run your podcast so you get ROI.

Using our Podcast Copilot platform, Rise25 helps you to connect quicker to higher caliber referral partners, clients, strategic partners and industry influencers to generate ROI without heavy selling.

If you have been dreaming of starting a podcast for your B2B business and want to use it to connect with clients and referral partners and be known as a leader in your industry, we are your solution.

Name: ADVOCATUS
Description: Revista de referência na advocacia e do direito, powered by ECO - Economia Online.

Name: Mining Weekly
Description: Mining Weekly provides news on mining developments in South Africa and around the world.

Name: OneWorld
Description:
OneWorld brengt de rest van de wereld dichterbij. Op OneWorld.nl en in OneWorld Magazine zie je dat ons leven verbonden is met dat van mensen wereldwijd. En andersom, hoe dat wat daar gebeurt, ons hier raakt. Hoe zit die wederzijdse beïnvloeding in elkaar? Hoe kunnen we deze processen positief beïnvloeden? Wat kunnen we zelf doen?

OneWorld.nl is de grootste Nederlandse website over mondiale verbondenheid en klimaatrechvaardigheid. Het tijdschrift OneWorld magazine verschijnt tien keer per jaar.

Name: Poets&Quants
Description: Covering all that matters in the business school world, with in-depth analysis of B-schools rankings and full-time MBA programs

Name: eVTOL Insights
Description:
eVTOL Insights is one of the leading source of news, information and analysis into the global electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft market.

As well as news, we have a popular podcast series and YouTube channel, and now host industry conferences in key regions across the world. Our previous events have been held in New York, London, Dubai, Singapore and Montreal.

To keep you updated on the latest developments, we publish newsletters every Wednesday and Friday and also launched the first industry news channel on WhatsApp and Signal. 

We also launch four Special Reports each year; the Powerbook in January, CTO Report in June, Women in eVTOL in September and then Ones to Watch in December.

You can also join us on the social networking app Clubhouse every first Thursday of the month, where we go through the biggest stories from the global Advanced Air Mobility market.

Name: EM-Efficient Manufacturing Magazine
Description: Efficient Manufacturing is a monthly magazine published by Publish Industry India for discrete manufacturers. The print version of this magazine is available in India, China, Taiwan, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand and Hong Kong

Name: Bleav
Description: Bleav is The Show Network. We are a sports and entertainment company, producing premium content for all passionate fanbases. With more than 500 shows, Bleav features over 800 hosts, including 100 professional athletes that produce more than 1,000 hours of original audio and video content per month. Our content can be heard, watched, and read across more than 40 of your favorite podcast, audio, video, TV, radio, FAST channel, streaming, digital and social media platforms. Every Team. Every Topic. Every Fanbase.

Name: iPhone Photography School
Description:
iPhone Photography School is the world’s leader in mobile photography education.

We make online courses that help people take stunning photos with the iPhone, but our purpose is so much more than that. 

We help people appreciate the beauty of the world, and through our beautiful, engaging courses we show the many benefits that photography can bring to people.

We are also one of the most ambitious young companies out there, and we have a very exciting mission. We plan to get Apple to put our app on every iPhone by 2025, and it is this kind of ambition that drives our extraordinarily high standards.

If you're interested in working with us then you can check out our current vacancies here: https://careers.iphonephotographyschool.com

Name: BluTV
Description:
BluTV is Turkey’s first and largest local subscription video-on-demand service which is globally available to all Turkish and Arabic speaking audiences. Since its start in 2016, BluTV has demonstrated a strong growth thanks to its focus on original content and technology, combined with over 10k hours of leading local and international series and movies. The company fosters the local TV series and cinema industry by streaming domestic contents locally and internationally and therefore contributes to the popularity of the Turkish production industry and to the global rise of OTT.

BluTV not only offers a wide range of local and international TV series, movies, shorts and documentaries, but also provides live TV broadcasts. The contents on the platform can be watched anytime and anywhere without commercials by using smartphones, laptops and smart TV applications with internet connection.

Name: AdvokatWatch
Description:
AdvokatWatch leverer uafhængig, kritik og fair erhvervsjournalistik om advokatbranchen — og henvender sig til alle med særlig interesse for én af de vigtigste brancher i dansk erhvervsliv.

AdvokatWatch går helt tæt på personer og virksomheder inden for blandt andet erhvervsret, M&A, offentlig ret, public, strafferet og privatret. Det handler om strategi, ledelse, resultater, konkurrence, mandater, tvister, rådgivning, rammevilkår, innovation, teknologi, profiler, karriere, talent, løn, jobskifte og meget andet.

Vores ambition er at levere kvalitetsjournalistik om branchen. For at finansiere dette, er en del af vores artikler forbeholdt abonnenter. Et abonnement på AdvokatWatch giver adgang til alt vores indhold, der også kan tilgås via vores app til iOS og Android.

Vores indhold kan tilgås via en personlig licens eller en IP-løsning, der giver adgang til alle på en virksomheds IP-adresse. Prisen afhænger af størrelsen på abonnementet. Vi tilbyder gratis og uforpligtende prøveabonnementer til alle — og forlængede prøveperioder til virksomheder. Kontakt vores salgsafdeling på 70 777 126 eller skriv til advokatwatch@infowatch.dk og hør nærmere.

Name: Personal & Ledarskap
Description: Sedan 1969 har anrika magasinet Personal & Ledarskap guidat HR-chefer i deras vardag.

Name: TN - Tecnologia & Negócios
Description:
Ano de 1998, quem se lembra?

No Brasil, apenas começávamos a entender como as coisas funcionavam, imaginando que caminhos ainda percorreríamos com a flexibilização da Petrobras abrindo as portas para a entrada de novos players no país.

Neste cenário, a Benício Biz Editores lança a TN Petróleo, a única revista especializada em tecnologia e negócios dos setores de petróleo e gás do Brasil. A publicação veio preencher uma importante lacuna no mercado que, a partir daí, passou a ser reconhecida como a revista de profissionais e pesquisadores do setor.

Leitura completa: http://issuu.com/webmaster-tn/docs/tn_82_final_para_site?mode=window&backgroundColor=%23222222
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: FoodInSpace
Description:
FoodInSpace is the first magazine that publish exclusively Food & Beverage spaces, globally.
We believe that everything that comes into contact with the disciplines of creativity is a means of evoking feelings and emotions in individuals.
Therefore, we are in a state of constant exploration and examination of content, applied to Food & Beverage, that interprets this constant search for emotions.
Because when we revisit the rules, extraordinary ideas come to life.

Name: EVENTFAQS MEDIA
Description:
EVENTFAQS Media Pvt. Ltd.

Founded in 2007, EVENTFAQS is India’s only platform dedicated to the experiential marketing industry. The platform is targeted to marketers, organizers and suppliers in the promotions, business events and entertainment space.

The platform facilitates the creation of effective meetings, events, promotions and other experiential marketing opportunities through its following manifestations;

www.eventfaqs.com - Daily Event Industry News Website

www.wowawards.com

Entertainers Connect - Showcase platform for artists and entertainers
ec.eventfaqs.com

Experiential Venues - Showcase platform  of event & activation venues

Name: BabyBillion
Description:
BabyBillion is India’s #1 Kids' YouTube Channel, delivering fun and educational content for young minds. With 1B+ monthly views, we’re on a mission to reach 20B monthly views by Dec 2026, making BabyBillion the World’s #1 YouTube Channel, surpassing MrBeast & T-Series.

We’re not just creating videos—we’re shaping the future of kids’ digital content. Our content entertains, educates, and inspires, fostering creativity, learning, and positive values for children worldwide.

Join a fast-growing, impact-driven company that’s redefining kids' entertainment at a global scale.

Name: Vida Imobiliária
Description:
A VIDA IMOBILIÁRIA é a líder de informação do mercado  imobiliário em multi-plataforma para Portugal - Angola – Moçambique.

Fundada em 1996, tem como MISSÃO informar com rigor os profissionais do setor imobiliário, com a atualidade da informação produzida em sintonia com as necessidades do mercado e dos seus players. 

Apostamos na comunicação multi-plataforma 360º, através do formato revista, e-news, site e APPS, além da organização de eventos que se destacam pela oportunidade de networking e de debate dos temas essenciais.

Com 20 anos de experiência, somos a marca de referência na produção de conteúdos sobre imobiliário em Portugal e nos principais mercados africanos de língua portuguesa.

Ancoramos a nossa família de produtos em quatro grandes eixos:

1 -  Notícias Vida Imobiliária:
               Revista + Site Vida Imobiliária + E-News 
2 -  Público Imobiliário:
               Produção do suplemento semanal  do jornal Público
3 -  Eventos Vida Imobiliária: 
                Semana Reabilitação Urbana
                Prémio Nacional de Reabilitação Urbana 
                Building Energy Symposium 
                Portugal Real Estate Summit
                Almoços-Conferência VI
4 - Promoção Internacional: 
                Presença nas maiores feiras internacionais do setor imobiliário 

Conheça-nos e saiba mais sobre nós em www.vidaimobiliaria.com

Name: O Telegrama
Description:
Fundado a 25 de Outubro de 2022, O TELEGRAMA é uma revista lusófona, de periodicidade quinzenal, tendo como pauta o mundo financeiro, de negócios, a rotina empreendedora, economia e política, editada em bilíngue (português e inglês). Levamos até si a melhor informação noticiosa dos países falantes do português. Esta página foi feita para mantê-lo(a) informado(a).

ENDEREÇO:

Rua Fernão de Sousa, Edifício Condomínio Bengo, Bloco A, 9.º Andar, Porta D., Vila Alice, Luanda- Angola.

Name: Advanced Systems Group, LLC
Description:
Advanced Systems Group (ASG) empowers creativity through technology for Media Creatives and Content Owners.

By fusing technical and creative expertise, we design, build, and operate media-centric solutions to bring your vision to life. We deliver proven results by deploying engineering, system integration, training, and support services along with customized operational, and managed services for all phases of media production. Industry leaders rely on ASG to transform their operations on-premises and in the cloud.

From production to delivery, whether on-premises or in the cloud, ASG’s goal is to ensure customer success throughout the entire media supply chain. Our tailored services and solutions help our clients meet their objectives efficiently.

Name: Prodigious Paris
Description:
Prodigious est l’agence de production de Publicis France, intégré dans le réseau mondial Prodigious Worldwide -50 localisations, plus de 3000 expert·e·s en production, 11000 linguistes-. Nous concevons, produisons et délivrons des contenus marketing pour les marques.

#performance
Nous répondons aux plus hautes exigences artistiques et créatives des marques et des agences de communication. Nous intégrons l’ensemble des expertises, du conseil en production à la finalisation des contenus vidéo, son, digitaux, sociaux et print. 
Nous avons développé une offre unique d’accompagnement des marques dans le design et la production de leurs contenus digitaux avec la Content Factory, qui conçoit et produit des kits d’assets pour alimenter leur run de contenus sur le social et déployer une campagne globale sur le digital. 
Pour être au plus près de nos clients, nous développons également des studios intégrés où la proximité permet de valider en temps réel et garantir la fluidité et l’agilité en production. 
Nous pensons global : une de nos expertises est entièrement dédiée à la gestion et au déploiement des campagnes à l’international.

#innovation
Nous sommes acteurs du changement du monde de la production, avec notre investissement sur l’automatisation et l’intelligence artificielle afin de réinventer toujours nos process pour être à la pointe de l’innovation. Nos expertises s’ancrent de plus en plus dans cette évolution avec le recrutement de profils hybrides ou encore le développement des métiers de demain comme la DCO. 

#talent
Nous sommes plus de 300 collaborateurs·trices passionné·e·s et 1500 intermittents à l’année. 

Pour en savoir plus sur la façon dont nous utilisons et protégeons vos données personnelles : https://prodigious.fr/fr/politique-de-protection-des-donnees-personnelles

Name: Shifter.no
Description: Shifter er Norges ledende nettavis om tech og innovasjon.  Vi skal dekke smått og stort i startupbransjen, men også følge innovasjon i større selskaper. Det er ideer, utfordringer, penger, makt, mennesker og gode historier overalt.

Name: Asianet News Network Pvt.Ltd
Description:
Asianetnews Media & Entertainment Pvt Ltd is multi-platform and multi-channel media group with presence in Broadcast, Radio, Digital and Print. Asianet News TV is the No. 1 News TV channel in Kerala. Suvarna TV is amongst the Top 3 News TV channels in Karnataka. Indigo 919 is one the top International Music Radio channels in Bangalore and Goa. Asianetnews.com (the digital news platform of the group) is one of the Top 10 News platforms of India.
Viewers tune into Asianet News for its unbiased reportage and its strong advocacy for the rights of the underprivileged and the marginalised. Equipped with the latest technology, AsianetNews Media & Entertainment Pvt Ltd (AMEL) has been consistently been on top of TV & Digital Rankings and across all viewership strata. The multiple perspectives on a news story and the honest insight of the seasoned journalist has enabled viewers to form informed opinions and take informed decisions The innovative and varied nature of programming content and formats have kept a diverse, but loyal, audience forever engaged to AMEL and it's associated Brands.

AMP interactive, Streamfactory, e-motion (web et IP TV)

Name: Dagens Byggeri
Description:
Dagens Byggeri er det daglige omdrejningspunkt, som samler alle aspekter af branchen og sætter dagsordenen med aktualitet og nyeste viden. Vi har en målsætning om at blive bygge- og anlægsbranchens foretrukne nyhedskilde, og derfor går vi tæt på aktuelle sager og tør udfordre gennem en skarp, uafhængig og kritisk journalistik.

www.dagensbyggeri.dk

Name: Mandag Morgen
Description:
Mandag Morgen er en unik kombination af mediehus og tænketank, som hjælper beslutningstagere med at forstå de udfordringer, vores samfund står over for, og med at udvikle og formidle nye løsninger.
Med Mandag Morgen får du uundværlig strategisk viden om de største forandringer indenfor økonomi, politik og velfærd, grøn omstilling, digital omstilling og ledelse. Også dem, der venter forude. Få adgang til det hele på: mm.dk/abonnement

Name: The Fish Site
Description: A knowledge sharing platform with premium news, analysis and resources for the aquafarmers of today and tomorrow.

Name: Impact Theory
Description: Impact Theory is a mission-driven modern media company designed to create positive change in people’s lives through the relentless creation of entertaining and empowering content. Designed as an integrated studio, Impact Theory develops and produces video games, web comics, film & TV, as well as world-class YouTube and podcast content that has garnered roughly half a billion views on YouTube alone. Regardless of type, Impact Theory’s content underscores the company's mission to ensure the global spread of a growth mindset through ideas and entertainment. For more info, visit https://bit.ly/ImpactTheoryLI

Name: SciePro GmbH
Description: SciePro builds medically-verified 3D anatomy models, illustrations and animations that companies can license instead of developing from scratch. We remove the cost, time and risk of producing accurate anatomical assets internally or through agencies, and provide production-ready source files for use in VR/AR, apps, education, surgery simulation, medical devices and marketing. Our models are expert-reviewed, consistent across the full body and available immediately, allowing teams to launch faster and with scientific certainty.

Name: VicScreen
Description:
VicScreen is the Victorian Government’s creative and economic screen development agency. Behind the scenes, supporting professionals, infrastructure, projects and events – elevating Victoria as a global screen destination.  
  
You’ll find us wherever the action is. Investing in production and content development. Industry placements. Filming incentives. Location assistance. Skills training. Industry events. Partnership activities. And anything else that boosts Victoria’s standing as a global screen powerhouse.  

Whether you’re in planning, production, animation, post-production, visual effects or games development – we’re helping behind the scenes and across the screen ecosystem.

Name: Solutions Journalism Network
Description:
The Solutions Journalism Network is an independent, non-profit organization working to support and spread the practice of solutions journalism: rigorous and compelling reporting on responses to social problems.  

The Solutions Journalism Network is driving this practice change in several ways:

1. LEARNING PLATFORM: Our website is the go-to source for tools on the practice of solutions journalism. We offer guidebooks, checklists, and case studies—all for free. 

2. JOURNALISM DEVELOPMENT: We’re working with dozens of the nation’s leading news organizations to build the practice of solutions journalism in newsrooms. We provide training and story coaching, connect journalists with data providers, and offer modest project funding. 

3. COMMUNITY: SJN’s emerging network offers journalists and news organizations a platform for shared learning and collaboration, and in-person events offering professional development, connections, and celebration for journalists interested in doing solutions journalism.

Name: Defected Records
Description:
Defected Records is an independent British record label specialising in house music recordings, compilation albums, an internationally syndicated radio show, events, publishing, artist booking and management. Established in 1999 by former AM:PM and Cooltempo A&R Simon Dunmore. Defected has a number of sub-labels including DFTD, Soulfuric, 4 To The Floor, Glitterbox Recordings and Classic Music Company, Defected also owns and manages over 30 catalogues for heritage house imprints.
 
The Defected catalogue includes singles from artists such as Bob Sinclar, Kings of Tomorrow, Masters At Work, Inner City, Dennis Ferrer, Lenny Fontana, DJ Gregory, Mr G, MK and more recently Franky Rizardo, Purple Disco Machine, Amine Edge & DANCE, Peggy Gou and many more.
 
Defected run events globally including stages at major music festivals and standalone club nights, as well as residencies in Ibiza since 2003. 2016 saw the inaugural Defected Croatia, a 6-day festival that draws more than 4,000 people from the UK, Australia, North America, South Africa and all corners of Europe, featuring 80+ artists from the Defected roster from across the years. One of the longest running independent labels of its kind, Defected has paved the way for house music in the UK and remained a well-respected constant in the music industry for 20 years.
 
More than just a label, the recipe for Defected Records’ success has been its ability to evolve and adapt within the industry, while maintaining a robust ethos and core musical identity. One of the longest running independent labels of its kind, Defected has paved the way for house music in the UK and remained a well-respected constant in the music industry for 20 years.

https://defected.com
https://www.facebook.com/DefectedRecords/
https://twitter.com/DefectedRecords
https://www.instagram.com/defectedrecords/

Name: Ay Yapım
Description:
Ay Yapım shot its first scene in 2005 and has since grown into one of the world’s leading production companies for TV series, high-end dramas and thematic productions.  A steady string of hit drama series has left Ay Yapim’s mark on prime time in Turkey and around the world.

Celebrated Ay Yapim series like KARA SEVDA (Endless Love), KARADAYI, MEDCEZIR, KARA PARA AŞK (Black Money Love), KUZEY GÜNEY, SON (The End), 20 MINUTES, FATMAGÜL, AŞK-I MEMNU, EZEL and YAPRAK DÖKÜMÜ have become a regular part of the lives of millions of people worldwide.  Ay Yapım continues to raise the bar for Turkish drama with innovative new series like IÇERDE (Insider), BANA SEVMEYI ANLAT (Wings of Love), CESUR VE GÜZEL (Brave and Beautiful), FI (Phi), ŞAHIN TEPESI (Falcon Crest), ŞAHSIYET (Persona), ÇARPISMA (Crash) and KUZGUN delighting viewers everywhere.

Ay Yapim owes its success to some of the most dynamic screenwriters and directors working anywhere in the world, not to mention many of Turkey’s most accomplished actors.  Thanks to their incredible talent, Ay Yapim is a prime time fixture in more than eighty countries.  Some Ay Yapim’s series have been re-adapted for Europe, Russia, America and South America including EZEL, ASK-I MEMNU, FATMAGUL, KUZEY GUNEY and SON. KARA SEVDA won Turkey’s first Int. Emmy in the Telenovela Category.
More than a decade after its founding—and dozens of hit series later—Ay Yapim remains a leading producer of Turkish drama.

Name: Financial IT
Description:
Innovation is the common feature of the companies that we work with. Some are FinTech disruptors, posing a direct challenge to established institutions. Others are technology companies, providing solutions that produce positive outcomes for institutions and their clients. 

Financial IT is a digital platform for multimedia and editorial content, rankings and overviews of major industry events. 

Financial IT magazine is published throughout the year in digital form. Financial IT magazine is available in print form at major trade events through our media partnerships.
We believe that our competitive edge comes from our established relationships with financial IT companies and institutions, the breadth of the solutions described and the quality of content. Financial IT provides a detailed map of the everchanging space where the IT provider sector meets the broadly defined financial services sector.

Name: Poultry World
Description:
Aimed at the international poultry industry, Poultry World is our
multimedia brand providing insight information on all aspects of
the poultry business. Poultry World provides the latest market
and scientific insights on poultry health, diseases, poultry nutrition,
hatchery practices and housing. It also keeps you informed on global
poultry meat market reports and disease outbreaks through
our interactive poultry health dossier.

Name: Sharjah Government Media Bureau - المكتب الإعلامي لحكومة الشارقة
Description:
Established under the direction, guidance, and patronage of His Highness Sheikh Dr Sultan bin Muhammad Al Qasimi, UAE Supreme Council Member and Ruler of Sharjah, it is the official conduit responsible for all media and communication activities related to Sharjah’s governing bodies and the emirate as a whole. 

An independent body, Sharjah Government Media Bureau empowers government communication and encourages the communication of uniform messages. It adopts a mature and responsible strategy inspired by the wisdom of His Highness, the Ruler of Sharjah, which is consistent with the UAE’s federal media policy and regulations, and adherent to the emirate’s authentic culture.

The ultimate function of Sharjah Government Media Bureau is to highlight the emirate’s ongoing progress and development as the region’s media and cultural hub. To achieve this end, Sharjah Government Media Bureau facilitates a dialogue for and with Sharjah’s government institutions and the media to elevate Sharjah’s status among the Arab and international media. In doing so, Sharjah Government Media Bureau provides a meeting point for media professionals to network with senior decision-makers in Sharjah and exchange valuable views on topical issues.
 
The idea of Sharjah Government Media Bureau was born out of the wise vision of His Highness Sheikh Dr Sultan bin Muhammad Al Qasimi, UAE Supreme Council Member and Ruler of Sharjah. The Bureau was established by an Amiri Decree, which states that Sharjah Government Media Bureau is an independent government body, created to reinforce Sharjah’s presence on the local, regional and global media landscapes while ensuring the accuracy of the information disseminated.

The Amiri Decree also stated that the bureau will be entirely responsible for all media related activities that involve the offices of His Highness the Ruler of Sharjah, His Highness the Crown Prince and Deputy Ruler of Sharjah and all of the emirate’s government authorities.

Name: Energy Connects
Description: Energy Connects is a global digital news platform, delivering up-to-the-minute information to the global energy community at a single click of a button.

Name: Lime Pictures
Description:
Lime Pictures is a multi-award-winning independent production company with more than 30 years’ experience in producing content for global audiences.  From network programming to streaming and digital content, allied social media and ground breaking commercial partnerships, Lime is at the forefront of some of today's most popular entertainment.  

Lime’s programming includes the double Emmy award-winning drama “Free Rein” for Netflix worldwide, MTV’s highest rated series outside of North America “Geordie Shore”, the multi award-winning “Hollyoaks” for C4 in the UK (now in its 25th year) and the BAFTA award-winning reality series “The Only Way Is Essex” for ITV as well as Celebs Go Dating for E4, MTV’s Geordie Shore and Gemma Collins: Diva Forever following the success of Gemma Collins: Diva Espana.  Previous credits include the Emmy award-winning “Singles Project” and “Relative Success with Tabatha Coffey” for Bravo, Disney’s “Evermoor” and Nickelodeon’s “House of Anubis”.

Name: All3Media
Description:
All3Media’s companies develop and produce award-winning, high quality and popular new and returning programming across all genres ranging from contemporary thrillers, detective series, soap operas, comedy, costume drama and true crime through to documentary, natural history, formatted entertainment, factual entertainment, features, children’s and reality programming.  Companies are based in the UK, US, Germany, the Netherlands, Belgium and New Zealand and produce more than 4,000 hours annually for linear broadcasters, VOD, social media and other digital platforms.

The Group, which has grown from 19 production companies and labels a decade ago to more than 40 today, is focused on innovation, creative excellence and entertaining all audiences with brilliant programming, from long-running series through to the launch of new formats, new talent and new business models.

Content includes global hit format The Traitors, sold to 25 territories to date; landmark natural history series Wild Isles, presented by Sir David Attenborough, and The Mating Game; multi-award winning format Gogglebox; BBC hit drama The Tourist; makeover series Sort Your Life Out; popular quiz show Lingo as well as Oscar award winning film 1917; cult comedy Fleabag; the UK’s top-selling drama series Midsomer Murders; and globally successful period drama Call the Midwife.

All3Media International exploits a distribution catalogue spanning 30,000 hours of content across scripted and non-scripted, including premium factual and natural history, as well as formats for 1,000 customers in 200 territories around the world. Little Dot Studios is All3Media’s market leading digital platform driving audience in social video, podcast, and branded content across social media platforms.

All3Media, which in 2022 had its biggest year ever with record revenue of £1,020.8million and EBITDA of £100.2million, is owned jointly between Warner Bros. Discovery and Liberty Global.

Name: Reliance Entertainment
Description:
India is standing on the threshold of an experience and entertainment economy. It is at the crossroads of an exciting phase that will shape its cultural and social framework forever. Reliance Big Entertainment has evolved out of the group's vision of meeting young India's aspirations and assuming a leadership position in communications, media, and entertainment.

It is geared to create a significant presence in businesses across various vectors of content, Internet, broadcast and retail services and platforms for distribution. The company strives to create converged services and platforms for the masses to help them access innovative, cutting-edge content.

Key content initiatives include production and strategic collaboration in areas such as gaming, movies, animation, music, broadcast, user-generated content, among others.

Name: Dirigeantes, leadership au féminin
Description:
Dirigeantes est un projet qui vise à valoriser et promouvoir les femmes cadres et cheffes d’entreprise. 

Pour ce projet, nous avons mis en place :

 1- Un site internet  www.lesdirigeantes.com qui reprend les portraits des femmes dans le but de  booster, d'impacter, de motiver d'autres femmes . 

2- Le magazine version papier : un trimestriel dont deux numéros déjà  disponibles (en version électronique). 

3- Les  Dîners/Déjeuners Débats Des Dirigeantes (4D) : le but ici est de réunir des femmes autour des sujets d’actualités afin d'apporter leur contribution  mais également pour leur permettre de resauter. 
4- L'émission Dirigeantes en vue 
5-L'Ecole du Leadership

Nos objectifs: 

 Valoriser et promouvoir les femmes cadres et dirigeantes dans la création de richesse,

 Mettre en réseau des cadres et dirigeantes.

 Valoriser les entreprises qui dans leur politique de Responsabilité Sociétale mettent un accent particulier sur l’emploi, la promotion du personnel féminin à des postes d’encadrement et l’autonomisation des femmes, 

 Récompenser des actions de référence des cadres et dirigeantes, des Etats, organisations et entreprises qui encouragent la promotion et l’autonomisation des femmes, 


Notre slogan: Avec #Dirigeantes# , les femmes comptent et compteront toujours .

Name: Milk
Description:
Milk is built to enable creative expression and collaboration. 

The Milk ecosystem is made up of seven divisions, which include an agency, studio spaces, production services, and a makeup line. As a full-service creative studio, Milk activates at every step of the creative process—from conceptualizing groundbreaking ideas and products, to producing and distributing them. 
With twenty years of experience nurturing and empowering new generations of creators, Milk serves as a connector between the established and the emerging.

Our seven divisions include: 

MILK AGENCY
Milk Agency operates as a creative agency, a production resource, and a brand partner to shape culture through compelling strategies, content, and experiences.

MILK STUDIOS
Milk Studios is a premier, full service photography and film studio.

MILK DGTL
Milk DGTL offers creative digital services including capture, edit, archiving, exhibition printing and digital equipment rental.

MILK EQ
Milk Equipment Rental is the most comprehensive source of photography and film equipment in New York and Los Angeles.

MILK EVENTS
Milk Events offers event production services to create industry leading live experiences for brands, organizations and individual clients worldwide.

VELEM
Velem is a post production studio specializing in high-end finishing for print, digital, and film.

MILK MAKEUP
Milk Makeup is an eco-conscious beauty line that believes it's not just about how you create your look; it's what you do in it that matters.

Name: DUNYA NEWS
Description:
Dunya News is a news media company owned and operated by the National Communication Services (SMC-Pvt) Limited incorporated in Pakistan under Companies Ordinance. Its head office is situated in Lahore, Pakistan and has bureau offices and satellite presence in several areas across the country and abroad.

Head Office Address: 8-A, Abbott Road, Lahore, Pakistan
News Bureaus in Islamabad, Lahore, Karachi, Peshawar, Quetta, Muzaffarabad, Multan, Sukkur & DI Khan.

Name: Forbes Africa
Description: Forbes Africa is the drama critic to business in Africa. The magazine helps readers connect the dots, form patterns and see beyond the obvious, giving them a completely different perspective. In doing this, it delivers sharp, in-depth and engaging stories by looking at global and domestic issues from an African prism.

Name: Rubber News
Description:
Rubber News (formerly Rubber & Plastics News) serves rubber product manufacturers primarily engaged in the production of tires and inner tubes, rubber footwear, reclaimed rubber, rubber hose and belting, fabricated rubber products, rubber adhesives and wire and cable products. 

Rubber News readers include executives, managers, engineers and chemists involved in research and development, quality control, operations and production, engineering testing and analysis, purchasing and sales and marketing. Also served are suppliers, consultants and independent laboratories and manufacturers that are not specified as primary rubber product producers as well as OEM users of rubber components and universities.

Rubber News is published every other Monday. In addition to domestic and international rubber industry news, the newspaper covers new technology and products, marketing and executive action. In-depth special reports are published regularly on Custom Mixing, Rubber Machinery, Molded Goods, Automotive Parts, the Global Tire Industry, Polyurethanes and Belting.

Rubber News also produces conferences and trade shows for specific segments of the rubber industry including: the International Tire Exhibition & Conference (ITEC), International Latex Conference, International Silicone Conference, Hose & Belt Manufacturers Conference, Rubber in Automotive Conference and Healthcare Elastomers Conference.

Name: Tamedia
Description: Tamedia dates back to 1893, when the newspaper Tages-Anzeiger was founded. Today, the national media house counts 1,800 employees in the German- and French-speaking regions of Switzerland and incorporates the country’s leading editorial network. Tamedia's daily and weekly newspapers, magazines and news platforms combine strong local roots with an international network. As well as raising public awareness, they provide information, guidance and entertainment. Tamedia’s well-known media brands include 24 heures, Basler Zeitung, Bilan, BZ Berner Zeitung, Das Magazin, Der Bund, Finanz und Wirtschaft, Le Matin Dimanche, Schweizer Familie, SonntagsZeitung, Tages-Anzeiger, Tribune de Genève as well as the Zurich regional newspapers (ZRZ). The portfolio also comprises the three largest newspaper printing facilities in Switzerland. Tamedia is part of the TX Group.

Name: Medinside
Description:
Medinside ist die Online-Plattform für das Gesundheitswesen: Unser Zielpublikum sind die 500'000 Health Care Professionals in der Schweiz. Ihnen bietet Medinside einen ständig aktualisierten Newsdienst, aber auch Hintergrundberichte aus Spitälern und Praxen, über Gesundheitspolitik oder E-Health, über Personelles und den Berufsalltag.

 Für medizinische Fachkräfte und Entscheidungsträger ist Medinside eine unverzichtbare Ressource, um stets auf dem Laufenden zu bleiben. Unsere gut recherchierten Artikel und Analysen helfen Ihnen dabei, fundierte Entscheidungen zu treffen und Ihre Praxis oder Einrichtung erfolgreich zu führen.

 Darüber hinaus bietet Medinside maßgeschneiderte Werbelösungen für Unternehmen im Gesundheitssektor. Nutzen Sie unsere Plattform, um Ihre Produkte und Dienstleistungen gezielt einer interessierten und fachkundigen Zielgruppe zu präsentieren. Ob Bannerwerbung, gesponserte Artikel oder andere Werbeformate – wir helfen Ihnen dabei, Ihre Marketingziele zu erreichen und Ihre Marke in der Gesundheitsbranche zu stärken.

 Interessiert an einer Zusammenarbeit oder möchten Sie mehr über unsere Angebote erfahren? Vereinbaren Sie ein Gespräch mit uns:

https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ0QcBUmkc52t3ktjNohoRnDmXsR3MIPbf9PlOVJMcaCZXoqcb4rJPHp9yHkA6hWSEcrir4XNF5T

Name: PA Media
Description:
PA Media is the leading multimedia content provider and national news agency offering unrivalled content and digital media services.

As home to the national news agency of the UK and Ireland, PA Media proudly takes its place at the heart of the UK media news providing a continuous feed of text, pictures, video and data into newsrooms around the country.

Alongside our core national news agency operation, PA Media also supplies a wide range of content and editorial services ranging from international sports data, comprehensive entertainment guides and photo syndication to editorial and media training. We work with customers across the media industry including national and regional newspapers, magazines, TV and radio broadcasters and digital platforms.

PA Media is also a key news supplier to non-media customers, assisting commercial, government and not-for-profit organisations to access information and communicate successfully.

Name: PSM (Payment Systems Magazine)
Description:
PSM – Türkiye’nin Ödeme Sistemleri ve FinTek Rehberi
2008 yılından bu yana yayın hayatına kesintisiz olarak devam eden PSM (Payment Systems Magazine), Türkiye’nin ödeme sistemleri, finansal teknolojiler ve dijital finans alanındaki ilk ve tek sektörel yayınıdır.

Bankalardan ödeme kuruluşlarına, FinTek girişimlerinden teknoloji devlerine, kart ve POS üreticilerinden ATM çözümlerine kadar sektörün tüm paydaşları, Türkiye’deki ve dünyadaki gelişmeleri PSM ile takip ediyor.

Her ay yayınlanan güncel içerikleriyle sektör profesyonellerinin başvuru kaynağı olan www.psmmag.com ve basılı dergimiz; analizler, söyleşiler, teknoloji dosyaları ve sektör etkinlikleriyle ödeme dünyasının nabzını tutuyor.

PSM ile dijital finansın geleceğine bugünden dokunun.

Name: Balkan Green Energy News
Description:
Balkan Green Energy News is the leading sustainable energy and green economy news portal in the Balkan/Southeast Europe region.  
It has been developed and managed by the Center for Promotion of Sustainable Development,  a civil society organization from Belgrade, Serbia.

Name: Crooked Media
Description:
In 2016, a sane conversation about politics was most needed but hardest to find. Cable news panels, you may have noticed, are not the best.

Twitter is a great place to slowly lose your mind. Everywhere, the work of excellent journalists competes with click-bait, fake news, and whatever Donald Trump is tweeting about. We need a better conversation about politics in this country. That’s why we launched Crooked Media—to talk about politics in a way that doesn’t make you want to throw your phone out the window – with shows and analysis and other forms of sweet, sweet content that inform, entertain, and inspire action. No, we’re not unbiased, we’re not always serious and we’re certainly not always right. But we promise a no-bullshit conversation about politics and culture where you can laugh, cry, scream, ridicule us daily, share your ideas, and hopefully decide that you want to help fix this mess too. That’s it. End of mission.

Check out Crooked's newsletter along with our slate of podcasts including: Pod Save America, Pod Save The World, Lovett or Leave It, Hysteria, Strict Scrutiny, Keep It, Work Appropriate, and What A Day.

Name: E-Mobility Engineering
Description:
E-Mobility Engineering is the world’s leading independent magazine for EV engineers. Reporting independently on the engineering at the heart of electric vehicles providing unbiased commentary on full vehicles, components and other innovations via interviews with leading EV engineers. 

No vehicle is too big or too small for us to cover, and working across all vehicle categories – from the road through to the sea and sky – enables our team of industry experts to consider every aspect of designing and building an electric vehicle. 

Why choose E-Mobility Engineering? 

Our readers come to www.emobility-engineering.com for many reasons, ranging from a cover story on a particular vehicle or a deep dive into the latest technological developments but over and above the articles it’s the way we write them. Clean, clear and concise and unbiased, we never run any sponsored content, enabling our readers to learn and explore the nuances of vehicle electrification.

Name: Ambitur
Description: Ambitur is a trade monthly paper magazine but also in touch with new technologies with permanent updatings on the web in www.ambitur.pt. We are also on Facebook with two pages: Ambitur Profissionais and Ambitur Travel & Lifestyle.

Name: ShanbeMag هفتهنامه شنبه
Description:
هفتهنامه شنبه رسانه اختصاصی در حوزه استارتآپها در ایران است.
اهداف هفتهنامه شنبه:
•	ترویج فرهنگ کارآفرینی و اشتغالزایی
•	معرفی استارتآپها و زمینههای دارای ظرفیت راهاندازی استارتآپ در ایران
•	آشنا کردن مخاطبان با نمونههای موفق و ناموفق خارجی
•	آموزش چگونگی راهاندازی یک استارتآپ
•	آموزش چگونگی ورود به بازارهای جهانی
•	گفتگو با صاحبان استارتآپهای بزرگ ایرانی و استارتآپهای نوپا
•	پوشش اخبار و رویدادهای خبری حوزه استارتآپ
•	ایجاد بحث از طریق طرح مسئله با مسئولان و فعالان استارتآپی و مسئولان بخش دولتی و راه کاریابی برای مشکلات و چالشهای موجود
هفتهنامه شنبه در بیش از ۳۰ شهر ایران توزیع میشود. همچنین در رویدادهای سراسر كشور و بیش از ٨٠٠ شركت استارتآپی بزرگ و كوچك، ویسیها، شتابدهندهها، بانكها، شركتهای مالی و سرمایهگذاری، هلدینگها، جلسات همفكر سرتاسر ایران، پاركهای علم و فناوری، اتاقهای بازرگانی نهادهای تصمیمگیر و تصمیمساز خصوصی و دولتی و... توزیع میشود.
در هفتهنامه شنبه بهترین و با سابقهترین روزنامهنگاران ایران و کارشناسان و مشاوران حوزه استارتآپ مینویسند و مشاوره میدهند.
ما برای دسترسی بیشتر جوانان سایت شنبه مگ را به دو زبان فارسی و انگلیسی راهاندازی کردهایم. همچنین مخاطبان میتوانند به صورت آنلاین پیدیاف مجله را در سایت شبنه مگ ببینند و اگر تمایل داشتند رایگان دانلود کنند. قیمت نسخه چاپی شنبه در ایران ٣هزار تومان است.
تمام تلاشمان را کردهایم از همه مدیاها برای گسترش و دیدهشدن شنبه استفاده کنیم. برای همین در همه شبکههای اجتماعی لینکدین، توییتر، فیس بوک، گوگل پلاس، اینستاگرام، تلگرام و... حضور جدی داریم.
هفته نامه شنبه به دلیل برخورداری از تیمهای حرفهای ژورنالیست و کارشناسان روابط عمومی و استارتآپی برای گسترش فرهنگ کارآفرینی به غیر از انتشار منظم هفتگی نشریه در حوزه روابط عمومی، استفاده از رسانه، کمپین رسانهای و تبلیغی و تبلیغات در فضای مجازی به استارتآپها و شرکتها مشاوره میدهد.

هفتهنامه شنبه به مدیر مسئولی و سردبیری اکبر هاشمی از روزنامهنگاران با تجربه و شناختهشده ایرانی و توسط بخش خصوصی منتشر میشود.

Name: Heise Medien GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Heise Medien steht für hochwertigen und unabhängigen Journalismus. Wir verlegen mit c't und iX zwei erfolgreiche Computertitel, das zukunftsweisende Technologiemagazin Technology Review sowie das mehrfach ausgezeichnete Online-Magazin Telepolis.
