Name: DPG Media Nederland
Description:
DPG Media is hét mediabedrijf van Nederland en België waar gedreven mediamakers werken aan onafhankelijke en vertrouwde media van eigen bodem. 

We informeren, inspireren en entertainen miljoenen mensen via kranten, magazines, radio, televisie, sites, apps en podcasts. Wij geloven dat vertrouwde en met passie gemaakte media het leven verrijken en bijdragen aan een sterke en verbonden samenleving.

Achter elk sterk mediamerk staat een peloton van sterke teams. Ben je benieuwd hoe het is om bij ons te werken? Ontdek het op www.dpgmedia.nl/werkenbij. 

Direct naar de vacatures? Ga dan naar www.dpgmedia.nl/vacatures.

Name: The EV Report
Description:
Welcome to The EV Report – your premier digital B2B hub dedicated to every pulse and current in the electric vehicle (EV) industry.

In an era where sustainability is not just a choice but a necessity, electric vehicles stand at the forefront, powering a green and efficient future. At The EV Report, we foster an environment where businesses, manufacturers, policy-makers, and enthusiasts converge to explore, understand, and advance the expanding horizons of the EV realm.

2020 marked the inception of The EV Report, a platform birthed from a profound passion for cleaner transportation and a sustainable future. Our journey is fueled by the commitment to delivering top-tier, tailored information and insights that cater to professionals and decision-makers within the EV industry.

Name: MPC Paris
Description: Our teams in Paris and Liège specialize in creating digital visual effects and managing post-production for feature films and TV series. Since April 2025, the MPC Paris and Liège studios form part of the TransPerfect family of companies.

Name: Immediate
Description: At Immediate, we’re home to some of the biggest and most loved consumer brands in the UK, including Radio Times, Good Food, Nutracheck, HistoryExtra and BBC Gardeners’ World Magazine. Our trusted, quality content reaches millions of people a month across digital, print, video, podcasts, apps, live events, tools and services. We’re the destination for people looking to get more joy from the things they love – helping to inspire them, deepen their knowledge, skills and fuel their passions.

Name: HR Portal Magyarország
Description: A HR Portal egy 2003 óta létező HR-szakmai híroldal. A munkaügy, személyügy, humánpolitika iránt érdeklődők a friss munkaügyi híreken, tanulmányokon és munkaerő-piaci információkon túl a humán erőforrás szakma gyakorlati üzleti világába is betekintést nyerhetnek.

Name: PASSION PICTURES
Description:
PASSION PICTURES is an independent production company founded in 1987.

We connect and inspire through the moving image. 

We nurture the world’s best animation talent. Our 30 years of innovation in motion results in memorable characters and Oscar winning stories.

Name: Egmont
Description:
Egmont er en ledende nordisk mediekoncern med et dobbelt formål. We bring stories to life gennem TV, film, games, bøger, magasiner og mere, ligesom vi støtter børn og unge i svære livsvilkår i at skabe et godt liv.

Vi er konstant på udkig efter nye måder at udkomme med historier, der har betydning for mennesker og samfund. Fra det underholdende til det dybdegående, fra papir til skærm og fra nyheder døgnet rundt til Oscarvindere. På tværs af mere end 50 virksomheder og brands oplyser, underholder, inspirerer, uddanner og skubber vi til samfundsforandring.
Som erhvervsdrivende fond bruger vi hvert år omkring 100 millioner kroner på at støtte børn og unge i at gennemføre en uddannelse og få et godt liv.


Egmont is a leading Nordic media group with a dual purpose. Every day we bring stories to life through TV, movies, games, books, magazines, and beyond just like we empower children and youth at risk to pursue a good life.

We are constantly looking for new ways to share stories that matter to people and society. From the lighthearted to the deep, from paper to screens, from 24/7 news to Oscar winners. Across our more than 50 companies and brands we enlighten, entertain, inspire, educate and push for change. 
As an enterprise foundation, we donate around 100 million DKK a year to support children and youth in completing an education and pursuing a good life. 

Egmont - We bring stories to life

Name: The Local Project
Description:
The Local Project celebrates extraordinary design across a range of platforms, championing the best from industry leaders and emerging designers alike. After launching in 2016 with a focus on Australian architecture and design, we broadened our scope in 2019 to include New Zealand, and again in 2023 to encompass North America. Our print periodical features three titles – The Local Project, The Commercial Project and The Local Marketplace – and we recently launched our first hardcover book, 10, compiling highlights from our first 10 issues in print. 

We are honoured to have been recognised twice at the Mumbrella Publish Awards; in 2022, we were awarded Best Use of Video for our video of James Stockwell Architect’s Bunkeren and in 2023, we were named Publication of the Year. Our hardcover book was also highly commended for Special Edition of the Year. 

Our audience is a genuine cross-section of the design community, encompassing design-lovers and industry professionals. As such, we aim to inform, educate and inspire, exploring current questions, ideas and conversations through compelling and informed content. As we continue to grow, cultivating authentic and engaged communities is a vision that remains at our very core.

Name: Film London
Description:
Film London is the capital's screen industries agency.

We connect ideas, talent and finance to develop a pioneering creative culture in the city that delivers success in film, television, animation, games and beyond.

We work to sustain, promote and develop London as a global content production hub, support the development of the city's new and emerging filmmaking talent and invest in a diverse and rich film culture.

We aim to ensure the capital is a thriving centre for creative industries sector that enrich the city's businesses and its people.

Funded by the Mayor of London and the National Lottery through the BFI, we also receive support from Arts Council England, Creative Skillset and the Heritage Lottery Fund.

Name: Business Insider Africa
Description:
The leading pan-African innovative business news provider.

For Ads/inquiries, email businessinsider@pulse.ng. 

Follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram and TikTok.

Visit our homepage for the day's top stories

Name: Norsk rikskringkasting (NRK)
Description:
Norsk rikskringkasting (NRK) er Norges største mediebedrift. NRK er en offentlig eid, lisensfinansiert allmennkringkaster. NRK byr på et bredt medietilbud med tre tv-kanaler, 16 radiokanaler og nettstedet NRK.no. Som offentlig eid kringkastingsselskap har NRK i oppgave å lage et bredt og vidt medietilbud for alle som bor i Norge tuftet på norsk språk og kultur. 
 
Totalt arbeider ca. 3 500 i NRK, rundt 2 000 ved hovedkontoret på Marienlyst i Oslo, mens de øvrige 1500 er fordelt på store og små NRK-avdelinger landet rundt. NRK sysselsetter en rekke yrkesgrupper. Journalister er den største gruppen, men det finnes også en rekke programingeniør- og tekniske jobber såvel som en rekke IT-jobber.

Name: The Music Network
Description: The Music Network means business. From Australia to the world, TMN is the #1 source for news, interviews, and jobs for industry pros.
Location: Moore Park, Sydney, New South Wales

Name: Dainik Jagran
Description:
Jagran Prakashan Ltd (JPL)is India’s leading media and communications group, with its main interests across Newspapers, Outdoor, Internet, Magazines, Below the Line marketing solutions, and Mobile Value Added Services.
In May 2006, Dainik Jagran was voted as the most credible source of news within the print media by a BBC-Reuters study. The readership and circulation numbers have grown exponentially over the last 6-7 years and Dainik Jagran has marked India’s presence on the international media map by becoming the largest read daily in the world.

Name: BNR Nieuwsradio
Description:
BNR is een baken voor professionals en beslissers. Het laatste nieuws op gebied van tech, werk, ondernemen, economie en zakendoen. Bas van Werven, Thomas van Zijl, Liesbeth Staats, Kees Dorresteijn, Diana Matroos en Art Rooijakkers hoor je dagelijks of elke week live op de zender via 100.1 FM of op bnr.nl/live.

BNR is als eerste mediaorganisatie actief geworden met podcasts en on demand audio. De podcasts van BNR gaan over onderwerpen die professionals nodig hebben om hun werk goed te kunnen uitvoeren. Een greep uit de populairste podcasts: De Technoloog, BNR Digitaal, BNR Cryptocast en Het Nieuwe Geld. 

Volg BNR Nieuwsradio en blijf op de hoogte van nieuws en tips voor jouw organisatie. Kom in contact met ondernemers en professionals en deel ervaringen. BNR biedt topjournalistiek en maakt intelligente programma’s vóór en dóór ondernemers en professionals op radio en online: bnr.nl en de BNR App. Of volg een podcast via iTunes of Spotify.

Name: BizBash
Description:
Founded in 2000, BizBash is the leading trade media for the event industry. BizBash publishes magazines and e-newsletters, hosts virtual events, and produces trade shows, conferences, and award shows for corporate event and meeting professionals, event marketers, and sales, PR, fund-raising, and human resource executives. We are committed to assisting our readers and show attendees uncover ideas, gather resources, find inspiration, enhance their careers, and most importantly, create effective meetings, events, promotions, and other face-to-face opportunities. 

BizBash.com complements our print magazines by offering the latest event news and information. The site provides users with access to comprehensive, searchable resource directories of thousands of vendors, photos and coverage of past event, archived magazine issues, and more.

Name: Modern Machine Shop
Description: Modern Machine Shop, published by Gardner Business Media Inc., is the leading business-to-business publication in North America focused on CNC machining. We reach an audience of manufacturing business owners, executives, managers, and engineers who oversee the facilities and processes that manufacture machined parts for industries such as automotive, aerospace, defense, oil and gas, medical, and heavy equipment. Our editorial approach emphasizes staff-written content, with editors routinely visiting industrial sites to see and report on successful applications of machining technology. The current editorial staff includes five members who have been with the publication for more than 10 years. Published monthly, Modern Machine Shop magazine has been in print since 1928. Our robust website, mmsonline.com, is a leading research destination for users and buyers of machining technology, with new content added to the site daily. Modern Machine Shop also serves our audience through digital editions, e-newsletters, webinars, and industry research, as well as live events, including the Precision Machining Technology Show, the Top Shops Conference, Amerimold, and the Additive Manufacturing Conference.

Name: private banking magazin
Description:
Das private banking magazin ist die führende Website und Publikation für Wealth Manager in Deutschland und Österreich. Das Magazin richtet sich an Private Banker, Family Offices, Vermögensverwalter und institutionelle Investoren. 

Neben exklusiven Personalien und News aus dem Private Banking und Wealth Management berichten wir ausführlich über Investment-Strategien oder Themen rund um Nachfolge- und Finanzplanung. Wir stellen Produktlösungen vor und wir führen Gespräche mit Experten aus dem Banken- und Beratungsgeschäft.

Wir sind Medienpartner der private banking kongresse und wir laden regelmäßig zu eigenen, exklusiven Gesprächsrunden ein.

Name: Dagens Medicin Sverige
Description: Dagens Medicin is the leading provider of news, analysis, and opinion for the Swedish health care community. With a weekly print product and daily coverage on our news site, Dagens Medicin offers investigative journalism and business intelligence for decision makers, clinic heads, doctors, nurses and policy makers within Swedish health care. Dagens Medicin Agenda connect people at events, training sessions and seminars on current events.

Name: DPG Media België
Description:
DPG Media is hét mediabedrijf van België en Nederland waar gedreven mediamakers 24/7 werken aan onafhankelijke en vertrouwde media van eigen bodem. 

We informeren, inspireren en entertainen miljoenen mensen via kranten, magazines, radio, televisie, sites, apps en podcasts. 

Achter elk sterk mediamerk staat een peloton van sterke teams. Ben jij benieuwd hoe het is om bij ons te werken? Ontdek het op https://www.dpgmediagroup.com/nl-BE/werken-bij-dpgmedia. 

Direct naar de vacatures? Ga dan naar https://www.werkenbij.dpgmedia.be/nl/vacatures

Name: Hürriyet
Description:
Hürriyet Dünyası, katma değer yaratan içerikleri, elektronik ticaret portalleri ve online platformlarıyla renkli bir dünyanın kapılarını aralıyor! 

Hürriyet ve Hürriyet Daily News gazetelerinin yanı sıra, Hürriyet Aile, Mahmure, Bigpara, Hürriyet TV, Boomads gibi Türkiye'nin en çok takip edilen içerik portallerini; Yenibiris.com ve Yakala.co gibi sektörlerinde lider E-Business kurumlarını ve Avrupa'nın en büyük baskı tesisi olan DPC'yi bünyesinde barındıran Hürriyet, yaptığı teknolojik yatırımlar ve inovasyon odaklı stratejisiyle küresel lider medya markası olma vizyonuna her geçen gün bir adım daha yaklaşıyor.

Name: zeta studios
Description:
ZETA STUDIOS nace con el objetivo de diseñar, crear y producir contenido de ficción para las principales plataformas y mercados de distribución y exhibición de contenidos. Nuestra área de desarrollo y producción propia encauza las inversiones dirigidas a proyectos audiovisuales con garantías de éxito, participando en todas las fases de gestión del proyecto. 
Zeta Studios cuenta con un amplio equipo multidisciplinar de profesionales especializados en la industria del entretenimiento que está presente desde la concepción de una idea hasta la exhibición del resultado.
Nuestra experiencia abarca tanto largometrajes de ficción como documentales, series de televisión y programas de entretenimiento.

Name: MeatEater, Inc.
Description:
MeatEater, Inc. is an outdoor lifestyle media and commerce company founded by renowned writer, TV, and podcast personality Steven Rinella. With the belief that a deeper understanding of the natural world enriches all of our lives, MeatEater, Inc. brings together leading influencers in the categories of fishing, hunting, wild foods, and conservation to create premium content and experiences and provide unique apparel and equipment. 

Check out our careers page: https://www.themeateater.com/about-us/careers

Follow our family of brands
www.themeateater.com
www.firstlite.com

www.davesmith.decoys.com

Name: Polka
Description: Polka was created when Adrián Suar and Fernando Blanco teamed up to make the pilot for their fist fiction Poliladron. Today, with more than 8 annual products, it has become in the best productions company in Argentina and one of the most important in Latin America.

Name: Ethiopian Business Review | EBR
Description:
The leading Ethiopian magazine published monthly with an emphasis on Ethiopian business and with society, art & life, and sport biz sections.

Access EBR via subscription or at supermarkets and bookstores.

Digitally active on our website and on Facebook, Twitter, Telegram & LinkedIn.

Name: Fairfest Media Limited
Description:
Fairfest is India’s leading trade show organiser, and offers those seeking to participate in trade events the best possible platform for doing business in one of the fastest growing markets in the world. Established in 1989, Fairfest organises the reputed TTF and OTM international travel fairs for the rapidly expanding tourism industry, as well as Municipalika, a leading event on municipal management and sustainability. 

Fairfest publishes market-supporting B2B publications Travel News Digest (TND), collating the world’s relevant news for the travel trade fraternity, and Urban News Digest (UND), summarising top news from the urban sector. Both TND and UND have dynamic top-ranking websites to support the printed publications. 

Through constant innovation and close observation of industry and global economic trends, Fairfest is able to provide cutting-edge service to both its professional clients and its consumer market.

Name: The CPG Guys
Description:
The CPG Guys is a media co. focused on all things omnichannel, education, analysis, events, awards, celebration of people, content and of course our podcast 'the CPG Guys'. With 20 + pieces of content weekly, our reach is far and scaled across the CPG industry, both brands and retailers. If you would like to feature on any of our content or interested in a partnership, please reach out via contact@cpgguys.com

DISCLAIMER: The content we provide is for general informational purposes only. By engaging with our content, you understand that no information contained in this episode should be construed as advice from CPGGUYS, LLC or the individual author, hosts, or guests, nor is it intended to be a substitute for research on any subject matter. Reference to any specific product or entity does not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by CPGGUYS, LLC. CPGGUYS LLC expressly disclaims any and all liability or responsibility for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential or other damages arising out of any individual’s use of, reference to, or inability to use this podcast or the information we presented in our content.

Name: Perfumer & Flavorist+
Description: A leading B2B media source, Perfumer & Flavorist+ supports global sensory excellence by providing in-depth, cutting-edge technical and business content for flavorists, perfumers and allied professionals to create winning profiles that build brands and connect with consumers.

Name: CNBC Indonesia
Description:
CNBC Indonesia is a digital and television media, that providing financial and business news stories in Indonesia and international.

We are part of Trans Media and our mission is to help the influential and aspirational to make astute decisions to get ahead.

We ensure no matter where you are you can keep up to date with the latest breaking business and financial news.

Name: Cocoa Post
Description: Cocoa & Chocolate News | Documentaries | Advocacy

Name: Featured Faces
Description: Featured Faces highlights remarkable individuals who are making a difference in their fields. From innovative leaders to inspiring achievers, we showcase their stories and accomplishments to inspire others. Discover the journeys of these outstanding people and celebrate their contributions to our world

Name: Insurance Business America
Description:
Insurance Business is the leading independent business magazine and website for commercial agents and advice professionals. A key business resource, Insurance Business provides daily breaking news, cutting-edge opinion and in-depth analysis affecting the industry. Insurance Business also offers a series of industry reports that recognise the achievements of key individuals and businesses such as Elite Brokers, Top Producers, Five Star MGAs and Brokers on Insurers, as well as providing the latest in business best practice in a continually evolving industry.
Part of the global Insurance Business suite of publications, IB reaches a wide readership in USA, Australia, New Zealand, Asia,  Canada and UK. 

Insurance Business is published by independent media company Key Media. Find out more about Key Media’s magazines, events and websites at www.keymedia.com.

Name: Warner Bros International Television Production
Description:
Founded in 2009, Warner Bros. International Television Production (WBITVP) produces scripted and non-scripted programming through its network of local production operations of 21 production companies, producing in 13 territories.

Across the UK - Wall To Wall, Twenty Twenty and Ricochet. In Europe - France, Germany, Switzerland, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, Netherlands, Finland, Denmark & Sweden, and in Australia and New Zealand.

WBITVP’s production operations develop and produce original programming, as well as local versions of formats owned and/or controlled by the Warner Bros. Television Group, such as  First Dates, The Bachelor,  The Repair Shop, FBoy Island, Who Do You Think You Are? and Glow Up. Scripted series include Gossip Girl, The Twelve, 30 Somethings, Love Me, The Mentalist and Pretty Little Liars.

Where WBITVP has no local production capability, it licenses Warner Bros. formats to third parties. WBITVP represents formats from third-party production companies and broadcasters such as North South Productions, Hungry Bear, Radio Karate and CBC Canada.

Name: Digital Health Africa - DHA
Description:
Digital Health Africa (DHA) aims to leverage media and publication strategies to drive positive change in the healthcare landscape across Africa. Recognizing the transformative potential of digital health solutions, DHA seeks to disseminate information, foster dialogue, and catalyse action to improve healthcare outcomes on the continent.

We are chronicling digital health activities , trends, data and opportunities across Africa

We also create opportunities for Young Africans to be a part of health innovation revolution

Youths : African Digital Health Student Network 

Podcast: African Digital Health Voices 

Substack : https://substack.com/@digitalhealthafrica

Name: w.media
Description:
w.media is a Technology Publisher & Community Hub.

We serve the cloud/IT, data centers and network infrastructure professionals through media solutions and business events.

Name: Business & Financial Times
Description:
Business & Financial Times is Africa's premier source of Business information. 

Our newspaper, B&FT, is one of Ghana's most read and is the most authoritative source of business news, analysis and features in the country. 

Our website, thebftonline.com, is the most popular source of all business-related content in Ghana and increasingly, Africa.

Name: Energetica India Magazine
Description:
Energetica India magazine is published 8 times in a year, of which energetica-india.net is the online website, preferred by the Industry Professional on a global scale.

We have a reputation for providing excellent market information and a unique focus on the relevant technical, scientific and business happenings; our publications are an appreciated tool for industry decision-makers from all over the world.

Omnimedia Group is an International Publishing Company with leading technical magazines in Energy, Construction, Tourism, Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences Industries, headquartered in Madrid, Spain with international activities for more than a decade.

The advanced media platforms of our company allow an overall presence through conventional channels as the printed magazines, and also alongside strong worldwide online distribution through our regularly updated databases.

It is a trade publication launched for the Renewable & Conventional Power Generation in January 2009 for India. Energetica is currently printed and distributed to 20,432 energy professionals after each issue. We are read online by more than 2,00,000 energy experts.

Energetica India concentrates on covering the Renewable & Conventional Power Generation news with its unique, technology-focused reporting, up to date technological trends and the worldwide market reach.

Energetica magazine India is the sister concern website to Energetica USA, Energetica Spain, and Energetica Latin America.

Name: Anadolu Ajansı
Description:
Welcome to Anadolu Ajansı (AA) on LinkedIn – a hub for global news; we cover world affairs under numerous categories and deliver news across the World in 13 languages for over a century. Through our newly started desks; green line, discrimination line and fact-check line, we focus and specialize in the news that will critically affect our future.

Learn about Anadolu Ajansı and special subscription offers:
Continue to read, watch and share at:
www.aa.com.tr/en
www.anadoluimages.com
www.youtube.com/anadoluajansi
www.instagram.com/anadoluagency
www.twitter.com/anadoluagency
www.facebook.com/anadoluagencyenglish

Name: PT Surya Citra Media, Tbk
Description:
PT Surya Citra Media, Tbk Emtek Media was formed on 29 January 1999 to operate as a holding company for multimedia services as well as consultancy services in the media and related business. The main purpose behind its creation, however, was to broaden the horizons of PT Surya Citra Televisi (SCTV), one of the largest TV broadcasting stations in Indonesia, today.

As a media broadcasting company, SCTV is restricted by law to operate solely and exclusively as a broadcasting company for which it was licensed for. Yet, the business prospects of an integrated multimedia services group are simply too promising to be ignored.

Hence, the establishment of SCM signified the emergence of a highly prospective multimedia group with long-term growth opportunities. SCM subsequently acquired 100% share of SCTV over a period of time between November 2001 and April 2002, and went public in July 2002.

Name: Magnolia S.p.A.
Description:
Magnolia is an independent production company leader in the creation and adaptation of television entertainment formats. Led by Paolo Bassetti, Magnolia produces a wide range of television products for all the main broadcasters: from the longest-running game show in Italian television history, L’Eredità, to Undressed, the original, made in Italy format with the highest level of international distribution (commissioned in 8 different countries). Some of the longest-running shows produced by Magnolia are: L’Eredità, L’Isola dei Famosi, Pechino Express, Piazza Pulita, Bake Off Italia. 
The company was founded in 2001 by Giorgio Gori, Ilaria Dallatana and Francesca Canetta, and in 2007 the De Agostini Group bought a controlling interest in the company, making Magnolia a strategic asset for its development in the Media market, through the creation of the Zodiak Media Group in June 2010. In 2016, the Banijay Group and Zodiak merged and under the direction of Marco Bassetti, became the largest independent production company in the world.

Name: AJ+
Description:
AJ+ is growing. 
Are you in?

Okay, you've made it to this page because you know exactly where you want to be next. 

Well, inventing the future of news media isn't easy and we need you to work with us. AJ+ is pretty simple: we're international, operating in three languages - English, Arabic and Spanish - and we want to tell compelling stories in innovative ways in a media landscape that is constantly changing. At AJ+, you not only get to work with journalists from around the world but you get the creative freedom to tell the stories that matter - to you and to the world.

Name: Untold Studios.
Description:
We are a creative studio with expertise in VFX, music, originals, motion design and advertising. Founded in 2018 and with studios in London, Los Angeles and Mumbai, we are led by values, driven by creativity and enabled by next-generation technology.

Experimental by nature, we collaborate with artists, brands and studios and have received BAFTA, Grammy, VES and Emmy recognitions for excellence in film and craft.

Name: Asian Legal Business
Description:
Asian Legal Business (ALB) is owned by Thomson Reuters, the world’s leading source of intelligent information for businesses and professionals.  With its portfolio of leading titles, online services, law awards and in-house legal summits, ALB provides authoritative and unbiased insights and unmatched networking and business development opportunities to legal professionals throughout the Asia-Pacific and the Middle East regions. 

ALB combines news and analysis from its team of professional legal journalists and the expert opinions of senior industry professionals with Reuters news and insights that power businesses across the globe. 

Every issue has a combination of articles contributed by ALB’s in-house editorial team as well as commentary from leading legal practitioners and business individuals, covering:

◙ The latest regulatory, commercial and legal developments across a range of practice areas
◙ Interviews with industry professionals making headlines throughout Asia-Pacific and the Middle East
◙ In-depth Q&As with senior in-house decision-makers at major financial institutions
◙ Exclusive surveys on leading firms and top practitioners
◙ Advice on the most effective ways of managing, developing and expanding practice, covering issues such as business development and client relationship management.
◙ Which firms are merging and which are parting company
◙ Who’s moving where and why
◙ Which firms are securing mandates and why
◙ What impact will the latest legislative changes have on the industry 

Covering the very latest job advertisements throughout the region, ALB helps its readers to be up-to-date on all the latest career opportunities, both in-house and in practice. Articles include surveys on salaries, training, further education, and overseas opportunities.

Subscribe to us at https://www.legalbusinessonline.com/form/subscription-form to receive timely legal news and updates

Name: Labels & Labeling
Description:
Labels & Labeling is the leading publication for the label and package printing industry. Founded in 1978, It was the first magazine to be aimed directly at the label industry and relevant information on trends and technologies, which was often difficult to find in the general printing and packaging media. Today, Labels & Labeling covers the gamut of package decoration techniques, from its core audience in self-adhesive labels, IML and shrink sleeves, to flexible packaging in all its forms, folding cartons and others which present opportunities for growth to our audience. 

The international focus of the publication was evident from the beginning and in the first couple of years there were subscribers from 20 countries. Today Labels & Labeling is read in 114 countries. Our global editorial team ensures the magazine and associated newsletters cover all geographies around the world.

Subscribe to our LinkedIn newsletters:
 - Weekend Read: https://www.linkedin.com/build-relation/newsletter-follow?entityUrn=7156211373142679553
 - Event Insider: https://www.linkedin.com/build-relation/newsletter-follow?entityUrn=7184068823669522432
 - Branding and Packaging Design: https://www.linkedin.com/build-relation/newsletter-follow?entityUrn=7175432378901811200

Name: Techrasa Farsi تکراسا فارسی
Description: رشد فردی و حرفهای رهبران و کارآفرینان آینده

Name: Hubert Burda Media
Description:
With around 10,500 employees and over 500 brands world-wide, Hubert Burda Media is one of Germany’s largest technology and media companies. 

We create media with people, for people. We use our social relevance to make a difference and offer our employees the freedom to be creative and to invent new things. That is why working at Burda means: working "...in good company". 

All our business activities focus on our consumers, offering them reliable information, helpful services and great entertainment. We have strong media and digital brands in the News, Tech, Food, Living, Gardening, Fashion, Lifestyle, Health and Entertainment segments. We are active in 13 markets across Europe, Asia, and the United States.

A family enterprise with a history spanning over 100 years, Burda combines traditional publishing with successful digital innovation and also invests in digital business models to ensure their long-term success. Examples include Xing, Nebenan.de and Vinted. Our digital activities also include journalism services such as Focus Online and Chip.de. We strive to actively shape the changes taking place in the media world.

Our employees are as diverse as our company, technologies and media. If you have an entrepreneurial mindset, can take responsibility, and enjoy working in a team to drive innovation, Burda is the right place for you.

Join us: https://www.burda.com/en/career/

Name: Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden
Description:
Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden (WBSL) is a purpose built, state-of-the-art film and TV studio offering one of the largest facilities in the UK, incorporating WB Set Lighting & Rigging, WB De Lane Lea and WB Leavesden Park.

The studio sits on a 200 acre secure site has a quarter of a million square feet of stage space, back-lot tank, one of the largest heated underwater filming tanks in Europe and an unrivalled, clear horizon, 100 acre back-lot. WBSL has a collection of some of the largest sound stages in the UK, ranging from 10,800 to 49,000 square feet. The fifteen sound stages can be adapted for any production need. In addition to the sound stages, WBSL has 115,000 square feet of covered multi-function area immediately adjacent to the stages ideal for costume, props, camera, grip and all support service requirements. Dressing rooms and hair and make up rooms are situated close to the multi-function area.

Warner Bros. Studios Leavesden has its own, on-site Set Lighting & Rigging division. WB Set Lighting & Rigging provide the film and television industry with state-of-the-art lighting , scaffolding and rigging equipment to suit all Studio and location requirements. With a large and extensive inventory, the departments are able to service a broad range of productions including feature films, TV, commercials and music videos. Set Lighting & Set Rigging also supply to productions internationally, facilitated by partnerships with Lighting Companies in regions outside the UK including Southern Ireland, Belfast, Hungary and Spain.

Name: Mathematic Studio
Description:
Mathematic is a Paris / Montreal post production and motion design studio. Fortified in Art Direction, CG Animation and VFX, our work is used for Advertising, TV, Print and Online Web content and branding.

We want to create a convergence between art direction, design and vfx.

We play in-house with our talents and partners, we blend traditional and new media to create a new visual alchemy.

Name: EmbalagemMarca
Description: A revista EmbalagemMarca é publicada pela Bloco de Comunicação, editora fundada em 1986 pelo jornalista Wilson Palhares. Lançada em junho de 1999, a publicação consolidou-se, rapidamente, como importante fonte de referência do setor de embalagens. Pautada pela ética, pela imparcialidade e pela alta qualidade gráfica e editorial, EmbalagemMarca é a revista que mais cresce no segmento.

Name: The Tech Capital
Description:
The Tech Capital, a Mondego Media Group brand, is a digital media platform providing valuable content, data and events covering investment and players in the global digital infrastructure sector.

As the focus of data centres evolves to land, property, digital parks and connected locations, site selection, investment, and power, we follow the story, but stray from the headlines, and engage with the real movers and shakers in this ever changing but continuously exciting landscape.

Our website provides daily editorial news coverage of markets and movements from across the globe, as well as easy to access features, in-depth articles and analysis, opinion, video and podcast interviews with business leaders, and all the attributes expected of a premier publication – focused on data centres, cloud, edge computing and digital infrastructure from fibre to towers, its investors, players, customers and the Greentech dynamic increasingly allied to the significant growth forecast for the industry over the next decade and beyond.

At The Tech Capital, we also strive to be a better company for our co-workers, customers and partners, foster and encourage diversity and inclusivity, as our mission to provide authentic content and a genuine online experience to our global readership generating insight and information for the complex world in which they are engaged.

Subscribing to The Tech Capital is free and this automatically gives you access to premium content. Learn more here.

The Tech Capital - You Lead. We report.

Name: Startup Daily
Description: Startup Daily is a trusted media source covering the Australian and New Zealand startup and tech ecosystems.

Name: Are Media Pty Ltd
Description:
Are Media is Australia’s leading omnichannel content company for women. Every day we influence, inform, inspire, and connect with six in 10 Australian women across magazine media, digital, video, social, e-commerce, customer review sites, podcasts, events and experiences. Our brands include The Australian Women’s Weekly, Better Homes & Gardens, Woman’s Day, Marie Claire, TV WEEK, New Idea, Now to Love, Australian Gourmet Traveller, BEAUTY/crew and ELLE that create content Australians love. 

Through our Change AREgenda we drive meaningful and positive change for women.

Name: Silicon Slopes
Description: Silicon Slopes is a nonprofit organization that exists to empower Utah’s tech community to learn, connect, and serve in order to make entrepreneurship open and accessible to all.

Name: HBS
Description:
Host Broadcast Services, fully owned by Infront Sports & Media, is a specialist host broadcast organisation, originally established with the core mandate of producing the television and radio signals for the 2002 and 2006 FIFA World Cups.
 
Based in Switzerland, but with its planning headquarters in Paris/Boulogne, the company has evolved since its formation in 1999 and built upon its unique capabilities by attracting expert personnel from the very top levels of the television industry to complement the experienced staff who have honed their skills over previous FIFA World Cups.

Name: Ringier
Description:
Ringier is a leading European media company headquartered in Switzerland with a history spanning more than 190 years. With around 6,000 employees, the group operates over 130 companies in 19 European and African countries. The Ringier portfolio comprises three main business areas: leading media brands, sports media platforms, and digital marketplaces. With a digital EBITDA share of 82 percent, Ringier is one of Europe's leading media companies. The group remains majority family-owned to this day.

Its best-known media brands include Blick, Bilanz, LandLiebe, L’illustré and Schweizer Illustrierte in Switzerland, Blikk in Hungary, Blic in Serbia, and Onet, Fakt, Forbes, and Business Insider in Poland. In the sports media sector, Ringier is present with platforms such as A Bola in Portugal, GSP.ro in Romania, sportal.bg in Bulgaria, and Sportal.rs in Serbia. The digital marketplaces are led by flagships such as JobCloud and SMG Swiss Marketplace Group in Switzerland, eJobs and imobiliare in Romania, CV Keskus in the Baltic states, and Profession in Hungary.

Name: EconomiaCircolare.com
Description:
Economiacircolare.com è una testata giornalistica di settore dedicata all'economia circolare, un web magazine che offre contenuti di analisi, approfondimento e divulgazione, destinata ad addetti ai lavori e appassionati di questioni ambientali, ma con l'ambizione di rappresentare uno spazio di informazione accreditata e di discussione allargata sulla tematica.

PERCHÉ UNA RIVISTA 
Il magazine risponde all’esigenza di analizzare e diffondere pratiche concrete di economia circolare, scelte imprenditoriali e industriali effettivamente orientate alla sostenibilità, accadimenti che a livello internazionale e nazionale influiscono sulle politiche energetiche e ambientali, con un occhio particolare agli studi e alle attività di ricerca legate in senso lato all’economia circolare e alle attività in materia delle istituzioni comunitarie. 

L’oggetto dell’analisi giornalistica non si ferma alla denuncia, ma prova a “fare cultura” e riflette sulle alternative possibili in un’ottica di giornalismo costruttivo: analizzare le dinamiche economiche, politiche e sociali nel raccontare le scelte imprenditoriali e le esigenze delle aziende del settore e, infine, nell’informare sulle risposte possibili alle criticità rilevate e sulle opportunità che l’economia circolare porta con sé. 

Un lavoro facilitato dalla possibilità di valorizzare e approfondire lo storytelling e l’analisi delle esperienze censite dall’Atlante Italiano dell’Economia Circolare e di orientare le scelte di consumo con il racconto rigoroso delle filiere produttive, grazie al filtro dei criteri di circolarità ambientale e sociale messi a punto dall’equipe di ricerca del progetto.

Description:
Inside Asian Gaming is Asia’s premier B2B print and digital gaming magazine. Founded in 2005, IAG is a monthly magazine with a broad business editorial focus on the Asian gaming industry. It is widely distributed to gaming industry executives throughout Macau and the rest of Asia.

IAG also produces IAG Breakfast Briefing – a daily Asian gaming industry email newsletter that arrives in around 20,000 inboxes at 8am Macau time each Macau business day. IAG Breakfast Briefing contains the latest breaking news and analysis including comprehensive coverage of both the land-based and online gaming industries.

IAG is renowned for publishing “The Asian Gaming Power 50”. Anxiously awaited each year, The Asian Gaming Power 50 is an annual ranking of the 50 most influential and prominent Asian Gaming industry leaders and executives. IAG also publishes special editions for G2E Asia in May and the Macao Gaming Show in October. Many exhibitors at these two trade shows advertise in these special IAG editions, which are widely distributed at the shows.

In addition to producing the special double thickness G2E Asia print edition, IAG also produces G2E Asia Daily on behalf of G2E Asia. This is a daily newspaper distributed to all show attendees and exhibitors each morning during the show. G2E Asia daily provides the latest news from G2E's conference and exhibition floor, showcases exhibitor products and provides information on everything from G2E Asia press conferences and media launches to various networking events.

IAG is also available for custom publishing of books and magazines. IAG’s parent company, O MEDIA, also produces Macau-based publications High Life, WGM and South China Elite.

Name: Vaga Design
Description:
O Vaga Design é uma iniciativa voluntária de divulgação de vagas de emprego para designers e ilustradores do Brasil.

Surgiu em vista da desordem que as vagas para designers são divulgadas nas redes. De um lado empresas com vagas ótimas mas mal divulgadas, e do outro designers com dificuldades para encontrar um emprego.

Desde 2020 estamos no Twitter e agora, no Linkedin. Postamos vagas novas todas as semanas e somos humanos: todas as vagas são analisadas manualmente.

-> Caso queira divulgar uma vaga, entre em contato com as informações da mesma.

--> Não fazemos contratações, apenas divulgamos as vagas. Você candidato, precisa enviar seu currículo individualmente para cada vaga postada.

Name: RTP
Description:
A RTP é o operador de serviço público de Rádio e Televisão de Portugal. 
 
Na sua missão de serviço público assume relevância pela qualidade e diversidade da oferta, tanto na rádio como na televisão, bem como nos conteúdos que disponibiliza online. É uma referência enquanto plataforma global de comunicação.
 
A RTP é séria e rigorosa. Informa, forma, entretém. É relevante e cria valor. Tem um património de confiança e único que se materializa num arquivo de inigualável riqueza e importância histórica. Chega às maiorias e às minorias, ao público com necessidades especiais e está próxima de todos os portugueses, onde quer que estejam. 
 
A RTP é de todos e para todos. 'Sempre Ligados’ é a assinatura da RTP e traduz a sua essência. Liga Portugal e os portugueses a si, entre si e ao mundo.
 
www.rtp.pt

Name: Agriculture Today Group
Description:
Agriculture Today stands as India's preeminent agriculture magazine/ periodical, offering a meticulous blend of news updates and insightful analyses on matters of national and international significance within the agricultural domain. The publication delves into a myriad of sectoral intricacies, spanning biotechnology, farm mechanization, seed science, fertilization techniques, agricultural finance, crop protection methodologies, horticultural practices, animal husbandry advancements, food processing innovations, agribusiness strategies, research and extension initiatives, marketing dynamics, and cutting-edge high-tech agricultural methodologies.

Distinguished by its content-rich nature and information-driven ethos, Agriculture Today adopts a distinctive presentation style, facilitating a comprehensive exploration of market trends, industrial landscapes, economic paradigms, policy formulations, scientific breakthroughs, emergent agri-input solutions, technological frontiers, and the latest developments reshaping the agricultural panorama.

Name: OncoDaily
Description:
Cancer doesn't take a day off – neither do we. OncoDaily.com – your go-to destination for the latest news, insights, and patient stories from the world of oncology! 

We gather content from various sources, including posts from renowned oncologists on social media, news from oncology societies and cancer centers, patient and survivor stories, and career-related information for professionals. 

Our mission is to empower patients, survivors, and professionals with the knowledge and inspiration they need to fight cancer. By joining our community today, you can stay informed, inspired, and connected.

Name: 30 Minutes to President's Club
Description: Quit memorizing BS lines, fumbling through LinkedIn and groveling for deals that never are going to close. Dramatically accelerate your career and earning potential by mastering your tech stack, stealing tactics from the best and clearing garbage from your calendar. Zero theory or mindset discussions here; just actionable sales tactics that will win you deals today.

Name: Cosmetics & Toiletries
Description: As a leading cosmetics R&D B2B media brand, Cosmetics & Toiletries delivers in-depth, peer-reviewed technical content, ingredient news, market trends and insights to enable and inspire cosmetic scientists in the creation of the next big ideas in beauty.

Name: Entrepreneur Georgia
Description:
Entrepreneur Magazine is a national business publication based in Irvine, California. For nearly 40 years, Entrepreneur has been the definitive guide to all the diverse challenges of business ownership.

Entrepreneur – ანტრეპრენერის ხმა მსოფლიოს გარშემო! 
უკვე საქართველოში!

Name: MAKERS Women
Description:
MAKERS is a media and community brand that exists to accelerate equity for women in the workplace and beyond by forging purposeful partnerships and sharing stories that ignite passion, drive action, and make change. 
 
With the largest video collection of women's profiles ever assembled, live events, Emmy-nominated documentaries, and award-winning digital content, MAKERS has been uniting change agents in every industry, at every level, around the issues that matter most, one story at a time. MAKERS also hosts a corporate partnership program to connect and galvanize leaders who are at the forefront of initiatives that impact real change at work and beyond. 

Get in touch at partners@makers.com and join our community: @MakersWomen on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram.

Name: Business Inspection BD
Description: Business Inspection BD is all about putting spotlight on the business and actions made by corporations that affects the Bangladeshi market.

Name: News Corp Australia
Description:
We are proud to be Australia's leading media company.

For over a century, News Corp Australia has been an integral part of Australian life, delivering the news and information Australians rely on daily. Telling the stories that matter drives every piece of journalism, campaign, project, and innovation.

With over 150 brands spanning news, sport, and lifestyle, we connect with 18 million Australians monthly - a testament to the trust we've built over generations. From text-based content to dynamic video, personalised apps, fantasy games, podcasts, and events, we continue to evolve to meet the changing needs of our audiences.

Our purpose inspires us, and our five values guide how we achieve it:

MAKE A DIFFERENCE - We are driven to create a positive, measurable impact.

BE PRINCIPLED - We uphold integrity, acting with honesty and purpose. 

GET IT DONE - We are accountable for delivering high-quality outcomes.

PUSH BOUNDARIES - We are courageous, bold, and forward-thinking.

WORK AS A TEAM - We are one team, with many voices and diverse strengths.

We are committed to telling the stories that matter, delivering value across every medium, moment, and minute Australians choose to spend with us.

Name: Travel Weekly UK
Description:
First published as Travel News in 1969, Travel Weekly boasts a 50-year heritage and is the undisputed market-leading travel trade media brand across all metrics.

In addition to the flagship weekly print magazine which is published 51 times a year and reaches more than 45,000 readers, Travel Weekly's multimedia portfolio includes print and digital publications, websites including travelweekly.co.uk, social media channels, jobs boards, email, video, podcasts and more.

It also runs the biggest and most highly-regarded events in the travel industry, and over the course of 2020 has developed a leading range of digital and virtual products and events to reflect changing demands.

Travel Weekly's core readership ranges from frontline travel sellers and suppliers to the chief executives of the world's leading travel firms, and it is the first choice for breaking news, award-winning features and the best analysis of the issues facing the industry at home and overseas.

The Travel Weekly editorial and commercial team boasts unrivalled experience and knowledge of the industry it serves and is led by editor-in-chief Lucy Huxley.

Travel Weekly is one of the flagship brands of Jacobs Media Group, Europe's largest B2B multimedia company for the travel and hospitality industries. 
Other brands within the Jacobs Media Group portfolio include The Caterer, Aspire, Connections and the Global Travel and Tourism Resilience Council.

In April 2020, Jacobs Media Group was awarded a Queen's Award for Enterprise, the UK's highest business accolade, in reflection of its global growth.

Name: Women's Executive Network (WXN)
Description:
In 2015, Sherri Stevens, Owner and CEO, embarked on a courageous journey to bring even greater value to the thousands of women of WXN. She knew that increasing WXN’s impact required a fresh perspective and a bold new vision – a vision borne from her own deep passion and unwavering belief in the potential of women of all ages and stages.

Through Sherri’s vision, a new era dawned for WXN. She transformed the community into a rich and diverse ecosystem where professional development, networking, thought leadership, belonging, and celebration take center stage. More than WXN’s leader, Sherri ignited a movement that will shape the future of leadership, leaving a legacy for generations to come.

This is a story about the bold women of WXN. Sherri and her team have transformed WXN into a one-of-a-kind community where women come together to multiply their influence and impact by inspiring each other to be bold explorers on their epic journeys. These women share stories that are raw, revealing dreams manifested through blood, sweat, and tears. Dreams that broke them and built them. Dreams that were sometimes too big to hold but too precious to let go.

This is a saga about epic journeys. Each woman fearlessly chooses her own path to the summit encouraged and uplifted by her allies. The summit differs for each woman, and the route to the top is etched with their unique footsteps. The trek is gritty and demanding, but the view from the top rewards every stumble.

This is a chronicle about tomorrow. These women are the future. Their stories are fearless strokes of ink on a blank page read by thousands of young girls. Their epic journeys are masterpieces that inspire every generation that follows.

The bold women of WXN don’t just light the way; they are the way.

Name: LiveMode
Description:
A LiveMode é a parceira das entidades esportivas para navegar o novo cenário da mídia, que mistura a importância secular da TV com os novos formatos e linguagens do digital.  Clubes, federações e ligas precisam de novas estratégias para esse novo mundo, enquanto marcas buscam formas eficazes de se conectar com o esporte.

Criamos e gerenciamos modelos de negócios que integram o melhor da TV e do digital, construindo um novo ecossistema que sustentará o esporte nas próximas décadas.

Durante nossa trajetória, nosso impacto vai além da simples geração de receita. Conectamos o esporte com o público jovem, criamos novos formatos e linguagens e  impulsionamos um novo ciclo de crescimento para diversas modalidades.

Nós Crescemos o Esporte.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveMode partners with sports entities to navigate the evolving media landscape, blending the longstanding importance of TV with new digital formats and languages. Clubs, federations, and leagues require fresh strategies for this new world, while brands seek effective ways to connect with sports.

We create and manage business models that integrate the best of TV and digital, constructing a new ecosystem to sustain sports in the coming decades.

Throughout our journey, our impact extends beyond mere revenue generation. We connect sports with young audiences, innovate new formats and languages, and drive a new cycle of growth across various disciplines.

We Grow Sports.

Name: Fintech News Singapore - part of Fintech News Network
Description: Fintech News Singapore covers stories about the Fintech Ecosystem – i.e. Mobile Payment, Personal Finance, Bitcoin, Blockchain, Robo Advisor and Lending - and Startups in Singapore and Southeast Asia. Fintech News Singapore also provides a monthly newsletter with the most important information about the Fintech industry in Southeast Asia.

Name: FOLKS
Description:
From the very beginning, we’ve been passionate about capturing the imagination. Based in Montreal, Toronto, Bogotá, Atlanta, Los Angeles, New York, Vancouver, Saguenay and Mumbai, the artists who bring their rich and diverse experiences to our team have been making larger-than-life visual effects for film and television for the past 13 years. 
FOLKS is a Pitch Black company!

Depuis notre création, notre passion est de captiver l’imaginaire. Basés à Montréal, Toronto, Bogotá, Atlanta, Los Angeles, New York, Vancouver, Saguenay, Mumbai et Londres, les artistes qui forment notre équipe, aux horizons riches et variés, réalisent depuis plus de 13 ans des effets visuels plus grands que nature pour le cinéma et la télévision.

Name: Água e Efluentes
Description:
O portal Água e Efluentes surgiu a partir de um aumento na demanda por profissionais na área de tratamento de água e efluentes, tanto na indústria quanto nas empresas de saneamento, devido a um crescimento neste mercado e também por haver um apelo cada vez maior da sociedade por uma melhora na qualidade ambiental.  

Nosso objetivo é transmitir o conhecimento adquirido na área, através da experiência prática e da literatura especializada, para profissionais e estudantes que tenham interesse em trabalhar com saneamento, ou tratamento de água e efluentes na indústria.

Compartilhamos conteúdo gratuito sobre o tema em nossos canais nas redes sociais, e oferecemos cursos online básicos e avançados, com certificado, para quem deseja aprimorar seus conhecimentos ou começar a aprender sobre o assunto.

Entre em contato conosco através do email contato@aguaeefluentes.com.br

Name: RED Digital Cinema
Description: RED Digital Cinema is a leading manufacturer of professional digital cameras and accessories. In 2006, RED began a revolution with the 4K RED ONE digital cinema camera. By 2008, RED had released the DSMC (Digital Stills and Motion Camera) system that allowed the same camera to be used on award-winning features, television, commercials, music videos and magazine covers like “Vogue” and “Harper's Bazaar.” Today, RED cameras are being used on some of the most lauded movies and episodics, including award winners “Mank,” “Squid Game,” “Hacks,” “Navalny,” “The Queen’s Gambit,” and “The Deepest Breath.” RED’s latest technology includes the highly advanced V-RAPTOR [X] and V-RAPTOR XL [X] systems, the flagship DSMC3 generation systems and the first available large format global shutter cinema cameras. The RED lineup also includes KOMODO-X and KOMODO, which features a global shutter sensor in a shockingly small and versatile form factor. Also available is RED Connect, a license-enabled feature that unlocks up to 8K 120FPS live cinematic streaming from the V-RAPTOR line of cameras. Find additional information at www.RED.com.

Name: Hotelier Maldives

Name: brutkasten
Description:
brutkasten ist der Dreh- und Angelpunkt der österreichischen  Startupszene. Jeden Tag produzieren wir mit Hingabe und Sorgfalt Content  mit und für Founder, Corporates, InvestorInnen und alle, die Interesse  an der heimischen Innovationswirtschaft haben. 

Selbst noch ein Startup, sind wir Österreichs Medium für Startups, die digitale Wirtschaft und Innovation. Von Unternehmern für Unternehmer gemacht. 

Redaktionell stehen bei uns sowohl die Startups im Fokus, als auch der Kontext, in dem sie sich bewegen. Es geht uns um das Thema Entrepreneurship, um die digitale und innovative Wirtschaft, Technologie, aber genauso um gesellschaftspolitische, zukunftsweisende Themen, die wir in diesem Zusammenhang zu lösen haben werden.

Die Vision von brutkasten war es von Beginn an, eine wachsende, innovationsgetriebene Community multimedial zu begleiten und  jene unternehmerisch tätigen Köpfe dabei zu unterstützen, die mit ihren innovativen Ideen, Geschäftsmodellen und Lösungen diese Welt weiter bringen wollen. Damit einhergehend war uns die Aufklärung und Orientierung zum Thema Digitalisierung von Beginn an sehr wichtig, wie auch die Vernetzung der „Innovationskräfte“ der jungen, agilen Startups mit jenen der etablierten Unternehmen. Wir glauben, dass in dieser wechselseitigen Befruchtung ein wesentlicher Hebel für unsere Wirtschaft liegt.

Das wollen wir fördern. Egal ob digital, via Social Media, in Videos, bei den Events oder in Print-Produkten – „Der Brutkasten“ will der lebendigen österreichischen Startup-Szene eine umfassende Plattform mit journalistischem Kern bieten und diese im ständigen Austausch mit ihr gestalten.

Ihr habt spannenden Input für uns? Für Geschichten & Interviews könnt ihr euch jederzeit an uns wenden: redaktion@derbrutkasten.com.

Name: BeerBiceps Media World Private Limited
Description:
BeerBiceps Media World Private Limited is a dynamic content and media company. We have around 7 YouTube channels with 13 Million+ subscribers.
Spearheaded by our visionary co-founder, Ranveer Allahbadia, who has been passionately crafting content for over seven years, we have garnered a loyal and ever-expanding community of viewers. Through our diverse range of content, we strive to inspire, entertain, and educate, making a positive impact on the lives of our audience. 

With creativity and innovation at our core, BeerBiceps Media World continues to push the boundaries of content creation and remains committed to shaping the digital media landscape. We even work on collaborating with brands like Netflix, Spotify, Prime Videos, etc.

Name: Капитал
Description:
"Капитал" е най-голямата бизнес медиа в България, чиято мисия е да предоставя достоверна и задълбочена информация

“Капитал” информира, свързва и вдъхновява активните хора в България, така че да вземат решения с увереност, че разбират ситуацията и не пропускат нищо важно. 

Мисията ни е да информираме задълбочено и обективно, да даваме грамотно обяснение на събитията, които влияят на качеството на живот и на бизнес средата. (Намираме и показваме връзките между новините, така че хората и компаниите да имат ясна картина на света, в който живеят и работят.)

С редакционната си позиция, вече 30 години “Капитал” подкрепя свободата на личния избор, предприемачеството и солидарността. Оценките ни се базират на това дали една политика, решение или постъпка е в полза на среда, която дава равен шанс на всички. 

С редакционната си позиция “Капитал” е медиата на инициативните, мислещи и независими хора в България, които се стремят да създават стойност за себе си и за околните.

Журналистите на “Капитал” поддържат високи професионални стандарти, спазват етичния кодекс на българските медии и се вълнуват от темите, по които пишат. Анализът и проверката на фактите, както и задълбоченото представяне на информацията, са в основата на работата на екипа. А ценностите, които се разпознават от всички в медията, са обективност, критично мислене, висок професионализъм, почтенност и толерантност. 

Абонирайте се и четете неограничено на: https://www.capital.bg/abonament

Name: Cannabis Business Times

Cannabis Business Times is owned by GIE Media Inc., based in Valley View, Ohio.

Name: Little Dot Studios
Description:
We are an award-winning multi-platform production company, social media agency, and digital media network, specialising in building and connecting with audiences, delivering exceptional results and long lasting organic growth for world famous brands. 

Founded in April 2013 and born for the digital entertainment era, we are made up of 500 digital experts across UK, USA, Germany & APAC. We work with the world’s most recognised TV, sports and consumer brands, creating content for more than 1000 digital channels globally and delivering over 11 billion organic views per month.

We run our own digital broadcast network of more than 135 distinct channels brands, operating across all major social video networks, including YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and Snap, as well as 7 FAST brands.

Name: SuperVarejo
Description:
A SuperVarejo é a mais popular e conhecida publicação de conteúdo sobre o setor supermercadista. Com endosso Associação Paulista de Supermercados (APAS), a publicação está circulando desde o ano 2000, anteriormente ela levava o nome de Revista APAS.

Pautada pela transparência e respeito ao leitor e a seus anunciantes, hoje com uma tiragem de 36 mil exemplares distribuídos nacionalmente com matérias que trazem as melhores práticas de gestão e operação de varejo.

Recentemente a SuperVarejo tem se dedicado a modernizar seu formato com um projeto de conteúdo digital. Com gráfico arrojado e abordando temas atuais como inovação e tecnologia a SuperVarejo é referência para os supermercadistas brasileiros. Além das matérias com foco nas tendências e análises do cenário varejista, a revista traz pesquisas anuais com renomadas empresas de pesquisa, como Kantar WorldPanel e Nielsen, entrevistas com personalidades e especialistas em diferentes ramos de atuação e, ainda, uma seção voltada para a qualidade de vida dos leitores.

Formada por equipe de experientes jornalistas, a SuperVarejo estende seus braços com profissionais free lancers que trazem informações de outros Estados brasileiros e também de outros países.

Esperamos que aproveite nosso conteúdo que o mesmo contribua com sua vida profissional e faça parte da sua fonte diária de informações sobre varejo. Boa leitura!

Name: Outlook Publishing (India) Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
The Outlook Group is one of India's leading publishing house with 5 mainstay titles.

Outlook is India’s most vibrant current affairs and news magazine launched in 1995. Known for its bold and aggressive reporting it continuously raises questions many had in their minds but never dared to ask.

Outlook Business is an insightful, thought-provoking, compelling, in-depth business magazine that delivers a fresh perspective, coupled with a holistic approach. 

Outlook Money, India’s No.1 personal finance magazine, gives in-depth analysis and sound advice on all facets of investing well, borrowing wisely and spending smartly.

Name: Freelancer
Description:
A freelancer or freelance worker is a term commonly used for a person who is self-employed and is not necessarily committed to a particular employer long-term. Freelance workers are sometimes represented by a company or a temporary agency that resells freelance labor to clients; others work independently or use professional associations or websites to get work.

While the term "independent contractor" would be used in a higher register of English to designate the tax and employment class of this type of worker, the term freelancing is most common in culture and creative industries and this term specifically motions to participation therein.

Fields, professions and industries where freelancing is predominant include music, writing, acting, computer programming, web design, translating and illustrating, and other forms of piece work which some cultural theorists consider as central to the cognitive-cultural economy.

Name: Rebel News Network Ltd
Description:
At Rebel News, we tell the other side of the story.

We follow the facts wherever they may lead — even if that conflicts with the official narrative of the establishment.

We see that the mainstream media pretends to be impartial, but they increasingly behave like political parties. They don't admit their own political bias, and they pretend to be neutral providers of the news when they are anything but.

At Rebel News we fearlessly take on that “Media Party”. We tell it like it is, and we examine the world from a different perspective — a side of the story you won't get anywhere else.

Unlike most of our competitors, we don't take money from any government. We depend on viewers like you to crowdfunded our journalism. It’s harder to run a company that way. But it’s the only way to be free from editorial interference behind the scenes.

Our world view is generally conservative — we believe in freedom, and judging people based on their individual merit, not the colour of their skin, religion, their sexual orientation, or where they come from.

We fight for freedom of speech both for ourselves and for those with whom we disagree — that’s how freedom of speech works. We believe any and every idea ought to be open to criticism and debate. And we're not afraid to champion people who have been forgotten by the establishment.

Rebel News is one of the few media outlets that has the power, freedom, and reach to challenge the views presented in the mainstream media. We wouldn't be where we are today without the support and participation of our audience.

Name: Globomedia
Description:
Globomedia S.A. is an independent media production company founded in 1993 by a group of professionals with the aim of producing quality television content.

Globomedia is Spain’s biggest production company, and one of the most important production companies in Europe as far as volume, export capacity and success rate. It is the undisputed leader in terms of fiction and topical comedy shows and has produced top-rated series such as Red Eagle, Aida and The Boat broadcasted on major TV channels in Spain. Globomedia has created 30 series and over 100 entertainment shows and has consistently produced the top-rated fiction shows in Spain in 14 of the last 16 seasons.
 
Globomedia’s productions are present, in their original or adapted versions, in over 120 countries.  Especially noteworthy is the success achieved in Italy, France and Germany with Il Cesaroni (a local version of The Serranos), One Step Forward and Countdown.
 
Globomedia is part of the Globomedia Group. Other companies in the Group include the Latin American production company Promofilm, the Globomedia Música record label (Pignoise, Pol 3.14), the media consultancy firm Geca, and Basque production company Hostoil, which has produced major hits for Basque regional television such as The Conqueror of the End of the World.
 
As far as film production is concerned, over the past few years the company has participated in some of the highest-grossing Spanish films, including 3 Meters above the Sky, Paper Birds, Red Eagle, The Movie, Brain Drain 2. 
In 2011, Globomedia reaches an agreement with Newen to join the Newen Network, the largest international European platform engaging in import and export of audiovisual products.

Name: The Daily Wire
Description:
Not every company kicks off in a converted garage and expands into one of America’s fastest-growing conservative media outlets for news, opinion, and entertainment - but then again, no other company is the Daily Wire. Built from the ground up by Ben Shapiro and Jeremy Boreing, the Daily Wire started as a side gig and morphed into a political news and commentary powerhouse in just 7 short years. Now, the Daily Wire is producing entertainment content, investigative journalism, multiple chart-topping podcasts, and - you guessed it - some fire memes. 

And we’re not stopping there. Our team is constantly moving, innovating and growing. We adapt to any and all obstacles with a team of creative geniuses that are all aligned in creating unparalleled content that provides a voice for facts and for freedom. We don't just echo whatever’s trending - we set trends. 

When you join the Daily Wire team, your finger isn’t just on the pulse. From The Ben Shapiro Show to the newsroom of some of America’s most influential writers, you are the pulse. And if that interests you, we’re all ears.

Name: dpa Deutsche Presse-Agentur GmbH
Description:
The German Press Agency (dpa) was founded in 1949 and is one of the world's leading independent news agencies. dpa supplies media groups, companies and organisations with editorial content. This includes texts, photos, videos, graphics, radio reports and other formats. As an internationally active agency, dpa reports in seven languages. Approximately 1,000 journalists work from around 140 locations in Germany and abroad. Around 170 German media companies are dpa shareholders. The central editorial office, headed by Editor-in-Chief Sven Gösmann, is located in Berlin. The executive board, headed by CEO Peter Kropsch, is based at the company's headquarters in Hamburg. The chairman of the supervisory board is Daniel Schöningh (Ippen Media Group, Munich).

At home and abroad, media with various editorial orientations place their trust in dpa's non-partisan, neutral and verified reporting. dpa works according to the principles laid down in its statutes: independent of world views, commercial enterprises or governments. dpa rejects financial contributions from government agencies, companies and private individuals. dpa only accepts project-related funding in a small number of selected cases and after careful consideration. A list of these projects can be found on our website.

Imprint: https://www.dpa.com/en/imprint/
Informacion Legal: https://www.dpa.com/es/informacion-legal/
Impressum: https://www.dpa.com/de/impressum/

Name: RPC
Description:
Olá, nós somos a RPC!

Somos a maior rede de televisão do Paraná, com oito emissoras de TV afiliadas à Globo. Há mais de 50 anos, temos o mesmo compromisso: conectar os paranaenses a uma programação de qualidade, que valoriza os assuntos do interesse da população e incentiva a participação da comunidade, e ajudar a desenvolver os negócios do Estado.

Oferecemos uma programação local e nacional da TV Globo a mais de 11,1 milhões de pessoas¹. Para isso, contamos com emissoras espalhadas por todo o Paraná (Curitiba, Ponta Grossa, Guarapuava, Londrina, Maringá, Paranavaí, Cascavel e Foz do Iguaçu), possuímos uma alta tecnologia de transmissão e cobertura, atingindo 92% dos telespectadores potenciais.

Somos apaixonados pela nossa gente, por isso investimos muito em pesquisa e conhecemos os hábitos e interesses de quase toda a população.

Levamos conteúdo e interatividade para a internet, com os sites G1 Paraná, Globo Esporte, Gshow e Home RPC. E temos os sites Negócios RPC e De Olho no Mercado, com informações sobre mídia e o mercado do Paraná.

Convidamos você para fazer participar dos nossos projetos. Acompanhe diariamente a nossa programação, na TV ou na internet, e os nossos posts aqui no LinkedIn. Com a sua confiança, construímos credibilidade.

Vamos juntos?

*Fonte: Atlas de Cobertura Rede Globo - 2022¹ e ²FONTE: Kantar Ibope Media - Instar Analytics – Curitiba – 2024 – Dia Inteiro - Total indivíduos - Cov% - Dados Extrapolados para a área de cobertura da RPC Paraná.

Name: Coatings World
Description:
The Global Coatings Market is valued at over $150 billion. From billion dollar coatings super-companies such as AkzoNobel, Sherwin-Williams, PPG and Axalta to the regional manufacturers and niche players operating across the world, the coatings marketplace remains one of the most competitive in the manufacturing world.

Coatings World is directed at industry personnel concerned with the development and manufacturing of paint, coatings, adhesives and sealants. Feature articles and industry news are directed at chemists, formulators and all levels of management that need to be on top of technological and market developments. In addition, our technical papers cover the latest in coatings science. CoatingsWorld is the leader in global coverage of the paint and coatings
industry. No other publication delivers the editorial content Coatings World does. In-depth reports cover major end markets for the global coatings market, as well as the latest developments in chemistry and manufacturing processes.

Along with our in-house editorial staff and contributing editors based in the U.S., Coatings World’s global correspondents have their fingers on the pulse of every market they cover–Europe, Latin America, Asia, Russia and India. This provides Coatings World with the only truly global coverage in the industry.

In addition, Coatings World’s web site, www.coatingsworld.com, offers all of this plus our breaking news updates while our e-mail newsletter provides
up-to-the-minute news to keep our readers up-to-date with current events.

With a following of more than 225M across social channels, Dear Media’s podcast slate consists of fan favorites like “The Toast” with Jackie & Claudia Oshry; “Not Skinny But Not Fat” with Amanda Hirsch; Tay & Taylor Lautner’s “The Squeeze”; and “Girls Gotta Eat” hosted by Ashley Hesseltine and Rayna Greenberg, among others.

Name: WorkingNation
Description:
WorkingNation is a storytelling organization that seeks to galvanize the public will and mobilize critical resources to mitigate the growing employability gap in America. Advancements in technology, globalization, and longevity are profoundly changing the way our society operates, leading both to enormous progress and to a disruption of the very nature of employment. 

Through original content and partnerships with a coalition of engaged stakeholders - including corporations, NPOs, thought leaders, philanthropists, policymakers and local governments - WorkingNation draws attention to the gravity of the current technological, economic, and demographic challenges being faced globally, and highlights the promise of solutions that will help create a world-ready U.S. workforce and a thriving economy. 

WorkingNation is producing high-quality, non-fiction, short- and long-form film programing and print articles that make vivid the underlying causes of the growing employability gap. Working with acclaimed directors and producers, we highlight the dramatic impact of these global forces on real people, as well as the organizations and visionary leaders that are leading the charge towards the new economic reality.

WorkingNation seeks to create a movement to help America build, restore, and shape sustainable pathways to prosperity and the middle class so that, as a nation, we are all ready for the inevitable challenges and opportunities of the future.
