Description: Newscape Studios is a media house located in Austin, Texas that creates animation & machinima videos. Creators of GameToons, SCP Animated, PrincessHana, Bronzo, NewScapePro among other brands!

Name: Mo-Sys
Description:
The Mo-Sys product range spans remote heads & motion control, broadcast robotics, mechanical and optical camera tracking for AR & VR, VP and on-set visualization.   
For the past 20+ years, visionary, inventor and technopreneur Michael Geissler has grown Mo-Sys into an industry leader, cultivated close ties to community of broadcast and production clients in 50+ countries including BBC, Netflix, Fox, ZDF, CNN and ESPN. 
Mo-Sys remote heads and robotics are used on many Hollywood blockbusters and HETV shows including Gravity, Life of Pi, Westworld, Birdman and Tron Legacy. We have also delivered boundary-pushing technology for broadcast projects like Red Bull Air Race and Strictly Come Dancing.

Name: Everything About Hydrogen
Description:
Everything About Hydrogen (EAH) is a podcast series built around the fervent belief that hydrogen is an essential energy vector and that it is at the core of a decarbonized energy future.  Each episode features an in-depth interview with a leading expert, practitioner, or investor in the hydrogen space and focuses on specific applications and use cases for hydrogen across energy intensive sectors.

The Everything About Hydrogen podcast is owned by Hydrogen Media Ltd.

Name: The Krazy Coupon Lady
Description:
The Krazy Coupon Lady (KCL) is a female-founder-owned media company on a mission to help shoppers beat MSRP, unapologetically maximize their money, and seize the deal. Our teams of shopping experts curate and hand-test nearly a thousand deals per week, so there is always something new to discover each time you visit our website, app, and your inbox. It's like having that one friend who always knows the best deals, guiding you on what to buy and where to find it, all through expertly curated content. Beyond discounts, KCL is trusted for its smart shopping strategies, time-saving tips, and opportunities to earn rewards. 

KCL helps CPG brands engage with savvy shoppers across moments of consideration, research, and purchase. Top brands like Unilever, P&G, and Kimberly-Clark trust us to amplify their offers and share their brand stories with highly engaged and purchase ready shoppers. Whether targeting a nationwide audience or specific retailers, KCL offers strategic planning, authentic content, and flawless execution across various tactics to foster meaningful connections with potential buyers and convert them into loyal customers. This holistic approach empowers brands to build a sustainable growth engine and generate demand seamlessly across the entire spectrum of influence, from awareness to sales- all within a single, powerful platform. 

https://info.thekrazycouponlady.com/partnerships

KCL takes great pride in it majority female executive team, its commitment to the local Boise, ID refugee population through our charitable organization (yes, we use coupons for good!), and its fully remote organization that offers some pretty cool benefits, including fully paid employee health care, 401k and match, family planning stipends, and sabbaticals, among other perks.

Name: Pyramedia Media Consultancy & Production
Description:
Pyramedia provides world class media services across a full spectrum of television/film production, events, public relations, marketing and advertising, making us the only company in the region with such a varied range of media services.

With an award-winning team from different disciplines, Pyramedia promotes a culture of variation, creativity and skill that adds exceptional value to the media experience. The company was founded in 1999 and has 4 subsidiaries; PyraStars, PyraDocs, PyraMovies, and PyraPublishing that manage talent in addition to producing state of the art documentaries, shows and movies.

With offices in Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Cairo, London, Riyadh and New York, our agile global structure enables us to provide our world renowned media services experience to local and international clients across various geographies

Name: Security Middle East Magazine
Description: Security Middle East magazine is the leading technology magazine for those working in the security industry in the Middle East. The magazine was established in 1995 and has a circulation of 14,000. Our readers are based in the UAE, GCC and Middle East countries and work in a variety of sectors from banking and finance, through to retail, property management, the power industry and airport/ port security. We also reach security professionals in the military, civil defence, police, fire and safety sectors.

Name: BizLawyer
Description:
BizLawyer is the largest Romanian publication specialising exclusively in the legal market and all its aspects. Launched in 2008, the publication is at the forefront of the Romanian business sector - from exclusive news on M&A deals to the latest moves and promotions within law firms. 

BizLawyer is recognised as a key tool for companies to identify market leading law firms and top tier lawyers in Romania and the region. At the same time, the publication has become an invaluable source for lawyers in understanding the market, the latest developments and the trends affecting their own business. 

BizLawyer is lead by George Stoica, with over 25 years of experience covering the business and legal market in Romania, with a fantastic team of experienced journalists who have cultivated a reputation for professionalism and market knowledge and pride themselves on their ability to constantly deliver top quality content.

Name: Monolith Multimedia Technologies
Description:
Monolith brings over 20 years of experience doing business in Asia, providing scalable audio-visual and multimedia production services as well as consulting to our clients.

What we do for clients: 
AV, Media and Event service in Asia

Media Support and Staffing: 
Monolith Asia sources, places and manages AV and multimedia staff in Asia. We provision AV and media content creation teams to large enterprise level companies. Our teams vet and manage system integration providers for cost containment and best in class technology to meet and exceed business demand. We provide consultation on media content creation that is focused on ROI.

Media Production: 
Need a video shoot in Japan, cameraman in Hong Kong, edit in Singapore, or an audio recording in Sydney all as a part of one project? Monolith specializes in ad-hoc productions across Asia Pacific from commercial to corp comms. Monolith provides Asia Pacific multimedia production services and creative content for business.

Event Management: 
Monolith is a full service event production, audio-visual management and consulting company for corporate meetings and events. We support conferences, seminars and roadshows, gala events, corporate parties and training sessions in Japan, Hong Kong and other locations throughout the Asia Pacific region. 

Media Jobs in Asia: 
Monolith Asia provides AV, cameraman, producer, audio engineer, motion graphics,  and event coordinator jobs in Japan, Hong Kong, Singapore, India and Australia. Japan jobs, Hong Kong jobs, Singapore jobs, Australia jobs; see our job board for positions currently available. Media production jobs in Japan, Hong Kong video jobs, media jobs in Singapore, video production jobs in Australia. See our Asia media jobs board for positions currently available - https://monolith.asia/jobs/

Name: EndemolShine Nederland
Description:
Endemol Shine Nederland is een toonaangevend multimediabedrijf, waar creativiteit en kwaliteit hand in hand gaan met innovatie en ondernemerschap.

Endemol Shine Nederland is afzender van een groot aantal nationale en internationale hit-formats, waaronder Miljoenenjacht, Eén tegen 100, All you need is love, Goede Tijden Slechte Tijden, Moordvrouw, Ik Vertrek, Het mooiste meisje van de Klas en Big Brother. Description:
Banijay Asia is a production company creating premium content for television, films and OTT platforms. Our expertise covers all genres including entertainment, factual, scripted and reality not only across all territories in India but also in Asia.

Banijay Asia is the most recent addition to the Banijay Group which already has production entities in 16 territories across the globe.The vision to engage in strategic partnerships with the best creative talent around the world resulted in the JV between the Banijay Group and Deepak Dhar for the Asia pacific region. Internationally the key programs and formats include Versailles, The secret life of 4 year olds, Temptation Island, Keeping up with the Kardashians, Wife Swap and Occupied among many others. Within a short span, Banijay Asia already has some notable additions to our bouquet of content like ARRived, Roar of The Lion, The Kapil Sharma Show, Master of Taste with Gary Mehigan, Hostages, The Voice India to name a few.
Banijay Asia is a joint venture between Banijay Group and Deepak Dhar with both owning an equal share of the company.

Name: SmarterMarkets
Description:
SmarterMarkets is a global community of industry leaders harnessing the power of markets and technology to redesign our systems to build a better, more connected world.

How do we build Smarter Markets? We’re starting with a media platform designed for people to talk to each other, not past each other, about the biggest challenges that we face as a society — including the energy transition.

The podcast, presented by Abaxx Technologies, brings together the entrepreneurs, icons, and executives of commodities, capital markets and technology to rant on the inadequacies of our systems and riff on ideas for how to improve them.

Name: TG4
Description:
TG4 | Súil Eile | Another View

Is é TG4 an cainéal náisiúnta teilifíse Gaeilge, ag cur ábhar clár Gaeilge ar fáil ar gach árdán in Éirinn, agus ar fud an Domhain ar an Seinnteoir.

Tá an cainéal ag craoladh ó Oíche Shamhna 1996. Cainéal saor go haer é TG4, atá ar fáil ar gach modh dáilithe teilifíse. Tá bonn láidir lucht féachana ag an gcainéal ar fud na hÉireann. Féachann 650,000 duine sa Phoblacht ar an meán ar an gcainéal agus sáraíonn an fhigiúir sin an milliún ar na mór-laethanta féilire – leithéidí Lá ‘le Pádraig agus Lá Nollag. 

TG4 is the National Irish language Public Service Broadcaster, bringing Irish language programming content to audiences in Ireland on all platforms and worldwide on our player.

TG4 is a free-to-air channel, available across all the viewing platforms, with a strong viewer base throughout the island of Ireland and overseas.
Location: Baile na hAbhann, Co. na Gaillimhe

Name: Alkemy X
Description:
Alkemy X is a premier global post-production company celebrated for best-in-class Editorial, Finishing, Design, Animation, and Visual Effects. As award-winning creative partners, we collaborate with the biggest names in advertising and entertainment to craft visually stunning, culturally resonant content. 

Since 1981, we’ve been at the forefront of an ever-evolving industry, earning countless honors and awards for groundbreaking work that sparks conversations and captivates audiences. But we don't want to brag. We just want to make great work with great people. Our team of post-production experts share a passion for creativity, collaboration, and shaping the future of media.

Name: Casual
Description:
Casual specialises in video content for business.

Over two decades, we have helped Fortune 500 companies:

 - Increase brand awareness and appeal
 - Attract and retain the best candidates
 - Explain complex products and services
 - Train and develop their staff

Casual are video consultants; expert filmmakers fluent in the language of corporate communications. Our proven ability to achieve business objectives with video is what makes us special. Our internal team use their vast experience to help our clients maximise the possibilities of video. We do it better than anyone else. 

We are flexible and surprisingly useful, priding ourselves on our client service. We match our processes to the unique requirements of our clients, delivering outstanding results through effective, efficient and remarkably enjoyable partnerships.

Casual. Making video. Round the world. Round the clock.

Name: Pixotope
Description:
Pixotope Technologies is an award-winning software company revolutionizing visual storytelling through real-time graphics and virtual production technology. 

Trusted by the world's most demanding live productions - from the Super Bowl to Eurovision - we empower broadcasters and content creators to push creative boundaries with immersive real-time visuals.

Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Oslo, Norway, we're a global team united by one vision: making the impossible possible through cutting-edge technology powered by Unreal Engine.

Our Solutions:

•  Graphics for Augmented Reality & Virtual Studios
•  Graphics for Extended Reality 
•  Pixotope C: Professional broadcast graphics with real-time rendering capabilities
• Pixotope Living Photo: Transform your 2D video into an immersive 3D experience
• Pixotope Reveal: AI-powered background segmentation tool

Camera Tracking Systems:
• Pixotope Fly: Drone camera tracking solution
• TalenTrack: AI-driven talent tracking without markers
• Pixotope Vision: Computer vision-based tracking
• Pixotope Marker: Traditional marker-based tracking

What sets us apart? 

Our broadcast-first philosophy, open platform architecture, and commitment to making advanced virtual production accessible to creators at every level. 

From news studios to esports arenas, from corporate events to sports productions, Pixotope delivers reliability when it matters most.

Join thousands of professionals worldwide who trust Pixotope to bring their creative visions to life.

Name: Hacker Valley Media
Description:
We are a cybersecurity creative media agency founded by cyber practitioners for cyber practitioners. We feature leaders in cybersecurity and their stories behind the tech.

Our passion for making cybersecurity accessible and entertaining has established Hacker Valley Media as an influential voice and partner in the industry. 

We're a small team looking to make a BIG impact! We have helped cybersecurity brands of all sizes accelerate content development, refine their messaging, and expand their audience in over 150 countries.

Name: Founders Connect
Description: Founders Connect is a 30-60 minute video chat between Peace Itimi (the host) and African Entrepreneurs & Senior Operators, where they share their stories on their journeys to entrepreneurship and insights into the current products/company they are building. The mission is to document the history of Africa’s startup evolution; the key players, their journeys, the obstacles the overcame, and the lessons they learnt along the way.

Description:
We are your trusted partner in the world of digital marketing! At Pipa Media, we specialize in crafting impactful digital marketing strategies, harnessing the power of influencers, and creating engaging live-streaming experiences on TikTok. With a deep understanding of the ever-evolving digital landscape, we take pride in helping businesses connect with their target audiences authentically and drive measurable results.
Let's connect!

Name: TechSavvy Media - leading Nordic innovation
Description:
TechSavvy er Danmarks største, digitale medie for startupøkosystemet. Vi dækker de allertidligste startups, de inkubator- og acceleratorklare, investorerne og følger innovationen i større virksomheder. 

Vi skriver om fremtidens udfordringer og portrætterer de mennesker, der løser dem. For vi tror på, at det er i krydsfeltet mellem teknologi og forretning - hos tech-iværksætterne - at vi allesammen kan blive klogere på fremtiden i dag.

Tilmeld dig vores nyhedsbrev og få de seneste nyheder og største historier om tech og startups direkte i indbakken hver torsdag!

Har du en interessant historie til os, så skriv til os her eller på editorial@techsavvy.media.

Name: Vårdfokus
Description:
Vårdfokus är Vårdförbundets självständiga medlemstidning och har legitimerade sjuksköterskor, röntgensjuksköterskor, barnmorskor och biomedicinska analytiker som målgrupp. 

Vårdfokus finns som papperstidning, webbtidning och i sociala medier. Vårt mål är att skapa kvalitetsjournalistik som berör dig som medlem. 

Vi bevakar bland annat lön, villkor, arbetsmiljö, forskning och mycket annat. Genom Vårdfokus får du också kunskap om andra kollegers verklighet för få inspiration till nya idéer och utveckling.

Papperstidningen kommer ut med tio nummer per år och har en TS-kontrollerad upplaga på 115200 (2019). 

Vill du tipsa oss om något du tycker att vi ska bevaka? Skicka ett mejl till info@vardfokus.se. Vårdfokus skyddar alltid sina källor.

Vi finns också på Facebook och Twitter, följ oss gärna där och prenumerera på nyhetsbrevet för de senaste nyhetsuppdateringarna.

Name: Economic.bg
Description:
Economic.bg е българска бизнес медия, която е на пазара от 2013 г. Онлайн изданието предлага проверена и задълбочена информация, като се фокусира върху икономика, финанси, бизнес и предприемачество.

Качеството на съдържанието се гарантира от журналистите в медията, които разполагат с богат опит в своите ресори.

Economic.bg е насочен към предприемачи, бизнес лидери и хора, които искат да са информирани за икономическите процеси в България – какво стои зад тях и какви ще са ефектите.

Издател на медията е юридическото лице „Бранд Медия България“ ЕООД.

Name: Pro Sound Effects
Description:
Sound brings our ideas, stories, memories, and emotions to life. The team at Pro Sound Effects (PSE) shares a passion for sound, a belief in creative freedom, and the tireless inspiration to develop world-class sound effects libraries and software for creators everywhere. 

Award-winning freelancers, teams, and media companies working in film, television, games, and beyond rely on our sound effects libraries and software to fuel creativity, finish projects faster, and deliver their best sound.

Based in Brooklyn since 2004, we’ve been on a mission to Empower All Creators to Quickly Find and Use the Right Sounds for Any Creation.  To achieve this mission, we have cultivated a culture that thrives on flexibility, autonomy, and transparency.  Every voice is heard, and every idea is considered.  We honor each employee’s passions - in and out of work - and work hard to provide a lifestyle that is balanced, and enjoyed to the fullest.  To that end, we offer competitive compensation, unlimited vacation days, and endless flexibility.

We pioneered the remote workforce in 2004, and allow employees to work from wherever they choose (in office, at home, or from a remote island), so long as they achieve their milestones, and contribute to our OKRs.  We are a results-driven organization, with humanity at the core.

Description:
Virginia Business is the only publication dedicated to covering economic activity in every sector and every region of the state. Since its creation, our magazine has won awards, attracted loyal readers and established a reputation as a “must read” for anybody who wants to stay abreast of commercial events in the commonwealth.
   
Founded in 1986, Virginia Business quickly gained a reputation for journalistic excellence. Readers soon discovered that our magazine featured lively writing, in-depth analysis and thought-provoking insights. These qualities continue to define our content.

Name: Socionomen
Description:
Socionomen är Sveriges ledande oberoende tidskrift för kvalificerat socialt arbete och psykoterapi. Socionomen ges ut av Akademikerförbundet SSR och produceras av A4. 

Som prenumerant får du tillgång till unika artiklar, granskningar och verktyg som ger dig inspiration i din yrkesvardag och stöd i din profession. Våra vetenskapliga artiklar följer internationella kriterier och utgör en brygga mellan teori och metod – forskning och praktik. 

Tidningen grundades 1987, har en fri och självständig ställning och bedrivs med tryckfrihetsförordningen som grund.

Name: BenefitsPRO

The site is designed to quickly provide benefits advisors/consultants, benefits managers and retirement advisors with the news, resources, and tools they need. Illuminating the complex and ever-changing benefits market, it is the roadmap to thriving in a disrupted environment. The site combines established resources and news reporting capabilities with proprietary market data and relevant content aggregated from across the web to create one distinct and vital information source. We celebrate those who are adapting and succeeding in new ways, translate the impact of regulations and technology into digestible, shareable information, and arm benefits professionals with the sales and prospecting tools and strategies needed to differentiate and grow their practices.

Name: Typelish
Description: Typelish is a completely free and voluntary platform. Typelish is a free platform that support freedom of thought and opinion. So, you can download your articles freely without any topic or word restrictions. Typelish saves the articles that you have written and you don’t need to be worry about your articles being deleted or not. Even after many years, you can reach your articles and easily observe the progress between your first and last articles. Typelish is a self-developed platform. While adding new features with each update, you do not need to think about technical mistakes and design trends thanks to the expert design team. Typelish strengthens your CV. The articles you have written means a new contribution that you can add to your CV. It also aims to contribute Typelish participants giving some features such as formal writing ability, research techniques, publishing and editing skills, responsibility awareness and fluent use of language.

Every year, The MPO Summit hosts industry professionals to discuss pertinent matters in the world of medtech, find more information at mposummit.com.

Description: Originally known for our groundbreaking week-long live festivals placing science at the cultural core of New York City, the World Science Festival (WSF) has grown into an innovative multi- media organization that produces original content straddling science, technology, the arts, media, performance, journalism and education, with formats ranging across vibrant discussions and debates, to inspired collaborative works of theatre, film and music. Featuring outstanding talent and novel production techniques, our programming brings the most far-reaching and transformative ideas, discoveries and perspectives to a broad general audience. WSFs live events in 13 countries have garnered an in-person audience of over three million and its digital, educational and broadcast programming has received over 200 million views.

Mindful of the media’s responsibility to inform the public and hold power to account, we advise newsrooms, share best practices, and provide reporting resources that help journalists ground their coverage in science while producing stories that resonate with audiences. 

Co-founded by the Columbia Journalism Review and The Nation in association with The Guardian and WNYC in 2019, CCNow’s 460-plus partners include some of the biggest names in news, and some of the smallest, because this story needs everyone. In addition to three of the world’s biggest news agencies — Reuters, Bloomberg, and Agence France Presse — each of which provides content to thousands of other newsrooms, our partners include CBS News, NBC and MSNBC News, Noticias Telemundo, PBS NewsHour, Univision, Al Jazeera; most of the biggest public radio stations in the US; many flagship newspapers and TV networks in the Americas, Europe, and Asia; and dozens of leading magazines and journals, including Nature, Scientific American, Rolling Stone, HuffPost, Teen Vogue, and Mother Jones.

Support Covering Climate Now’s mission of helping journalists improve and expand their climate coverage. Donate now: https://bit.ly/3SMIvUW

Name: Spektrum der Wissenschaft Verlagsgesellschaft mbH
Description:
Erkenntnisse aus der Forschung verständlich in die Öffentlichkeit zu bringen, ist wichtigstes Ziel des Verlags Spektrum der Wissenschaft in Heidelberg. 
In einer der größten Wissenschaftsredaktionen Deutschlands werden neben dem Verlagsflaggschiff "Spektrum der Wissenschaft" auch die Zeitschriften "Sterne und Weltraum", "Gehirn und Geist" sowie die wöchentliche Online-Wissenschaftszeitung "Spektrum – Die Woche" publiziert. Tagesaktuelle Nachrichten aus der Wissenschaft liefert das Onlinemagazin spektrum.de.
Das anspruchsvolle Wissenschaftsmagazin "Spektrum der Wissenschaft" informiert fundiert und dennoch allgemein verständlich über Physik, Biologie, Chemie, Geologie, Medizin, Archäologie, Mathematik, Astronomie und Ökologie. 
"Sterne und Weltraum", die 1962 gegründete Zeitschrift für Astronomie, berichtet umfassend und anschaulich über alle Bereiche der Himmelskunde, der Weltraumforschung und der Amateurastronomie. Fachleute präsentieren hier allgemein verständlich die aktuellen Ergebnisse ihrer Forschung , überdies geben Amateurastronomen Tipps zu spannenden Himmelsobjekten, zur Erkundung des Sternenhimmels und zur Astrofotografie.
In "Gehirn und Geist", dem Magazin für Psychologie und Hirnforschung, schreiben Forscher aus Neurowissenschaften, Psychologie, Medizin, Pädagogik und Philosophie über psychische Phänomene und deren zu Grund liegende Hirnprozesse. Außerdem stehen Ursachenforschung und Therapien bei Alzheimer, Depressionen oder ADHS im Fokus der Berichterstattung. 
Deutschlands erstes wissenschaftliches Onlinemagazin "Spektrum – Die Woche" sorgt für kompakte wissenschaftsjournalistische Information auf Computer, Tablet oder Smartphone.  Auf www.spektrum.de stellt der Verlag die Topthemen der Wissenschaft vor. Spezielle monothematische Digitalpublikationen ergänzen seit kurzem das Angebot.
Darüber hinaus betreibt Spektrum der Wissenschaft unter SciLogs.de und SciLogs.com Europas größte Plattform für Wissenschaftsblogs.

Name: The QHSE Standard
Description:
The Industrial Safety Paradigm is Broken. We Are Here to Engineer the Fix.
The QHSE industry is trapped in a "Paper Reality"—a world of ticking boxes and "Zero Accident" mirages. The QHSE Standard exists to dismantle this status quo by bridging the gap between Work-as-Imagined and Work-as-Done.

Our Identity: A Synthetic Media Lab Led by founder Dimitris Mitsios (Digital Strategist), this project is an experiment in Knowledge Democratization. We use AI and Synthetic Media to translate complex safety science (Safety II, Resilience Engineering) from academic journals into visual, actionable insights.

Note on Oversight: Our human oversight is strategic and curatorial—focused on selecting established theories—rather than providing certified technical review.

Transparency Statement We utilize AI across 100% of our activities to structure and scale safety knowledge. Disclaimer: While we curate content based on established scientific sources, we are not accredited HF/E specialists or Professional Engineers. We are digital architects making expert science accessible. Our content is a communication tool for established paradigms, not bespoke operational safety advice.

 Our Core Pillars

Pragmatism over Bureaucracy: We reject "Safety Theater." If a rule doesn't enhance safety, it’s an impediment.

Safety II & Resilience: Designing systems that absorb human error rather than punishing it.

The "Silent H": Treating mental health and burnout with the same technical rigor as physical hazards.

Operational Integrity: Moving beyond certificate-chasing to true process safety.

 Who This Is For For QHSE Managers, Engineers, and Leaders tired of the paperwork and ready to build resilient cultures grounded in reality.

Stop auditing the imagination. Start understanding the reality.

José Miguel Contreras acumula una larga experiencia en el terreno audiovisual en España. En los últimos años fue el creador y primer consejero delegado de Lasexta y, posteriormente, vicepresidente de Atresmedia. En la actualidad, sigue trabajando como productor ejecutivo de El Intermedio y colaborando como comentarista político en Lasexta. Es miembro del consejo de administración de eldiario.es y colabora con diversos medios digitales. Es catedrático de comunicación audiovisual y publicidad en la Universidad Rey Juan Carlos.

Contamos ya con un catálogo de una docena de series y formatos originales, los primeros de los cuáles verán la luz a lo largo de 2019 en diferentes cadenas televisivas. Además, ha comenzado a desarrollar diferentes líneas de negocios digitales. Cuez allows you to keep all information and media assets in one place and make changes to the script or rundown seconds before going LIVE. Easily add video, live interventions, graphics, prompter text, and other media pieces directly to the rundown, with a drag-and-drop function.

Cuez remains in constant sync with studio software and hardware devices, which means any changes to the text, media or other assets are reflected immediately across devices.

Cuez Automator connects to any hardware and software device in your production through an open API, allowing you to control light desks, PTZ cameras, play-out and other devices, media, graphics, and audio consoles directly through Cuez with a simple press of the space bar.

For more information visit https://cuez.app/

Name: Wall to Wall
Description:
Wall to Wall has been supplying innovative, hugely popular, award-winning programming around the world since 1987.

Our output spans scripted and non-scripted and has been recognised with BAFTA, Emmy, Grierson and RTS awards as well as an Academy Award.  Our customers include the BBC, ITV, Channel 4, Channel 5, Sky, Netflix, AppleTV+, Disney+, National Geographic, PBS, Discovery, HBO and many others.

Scripted productions include the acclaimed BAFTA and Golden Globe-nominated single The Girl starring Sienna Miller and Toby Jones for HBO and BBC, period drama The Scandalous Lady W starring Natalie Dormer for BBC and The Windermere Children for BBC and ZDF. For more than ten years we also made cop series New Tricks, which was consistently BBC One’s highest rated weekday drama.  January 2023 sees the return to the BBC of one its most popular drama brands – Waterloo Road.

Our non-scripted productions over the years include titles such as: Who Do You Think You Are? (BBC), Long Lost Family (ITV), Glow Up (BBC and Netflix), the acclaimed mini-series AIDS: The Unheard Tapes (BBC), Child Genius (Channel 4), multiple series of living history hit Back in Time for… (BBC), Little Big Shots (ITV) and five seasons of The Voice UK (BBC).  Recent series titles for Netflix include Earthstorm, Alien Worlds and Dope; for National Geographic we have made many series including Narco Wars and Underworld Inc. Meanwhile natural history series Growing Up Animal debuted on Disney+ in 2021 and Becoming You on Apple+ in 2020.   Our film Man on Wire (about French high-wire artist Philippe Petit’s illegal 1974 tightrope walk between the Twin Towers) won us our first Oscar.

Name: Grand Central.
Description:
Grand Central. is a world leading sound design and audio post production facility, creating award winning sound for TV, cinema, online, interactive audio and radio productions. For the past two decades, GC has trail blazed creativity in sound design, bringing an unparalleled passion for audio to some of the most powerful and memorable campaigns ever created. 

Since its inception in 1994 (previously Grand Central Recording Studios), Grand Central has been working with virtually every major innovative brand 
in the world, to passionately transform the industry both in the UK and internationally. Being at the forefront of the British sound industry and spearheading audio excellence, GC was the first sound facility in the UK to convert fully from analogue to digital, and worked with Dolby to create the first commercial in Dolby AtmosTM. 

Summer of 2015, GC unveiled THE LOFTS, an aspirational new studio space on the seventh floor of the facility, which transforms the audio experience for agencies and brands, wherever they happen to be within the space. Of particular note is the first ever installation of a revolutionary speaker technology, which eliminates the dreaded monitoring ‘Sweet Spot’ which previously meant you had to sit next to the engineer if you wanted to hear the mix the way it was meant to be. 

This new monitoring technology means that ‘all areas are sweet’ allowing you to hear a perfect mix wherever you sit, changing the creative dynamic of a post production session for the better by fostering a collaborative, all inclusive creative environment. GC' world - leading sound designers have been responsible for delivering audio excellence to some of the world’s most acclaimed ads, which work has been nominated for, or won, every major creativity award in the world including Cannes Lions, D&AD Pencils, Creative Circle Awards and British Television Advertising Awards.

Name: Ringier Serbia
Description:
Ringier Serbia je vodeća digitalna medijska kompanija sa tradicijom u Srbiji od 1996. godine. Naš portfolio obuhvata medije, sportske platforme, uslužno izdavaštvo i oglasne portale, a u digitalnom izdavaštvu ostvarujemo doseg od 76,78%. Sa timom od 500 zaposlenih, kompanija je u 2024. godini ostvarila prihod veći od 30 miliona evra, uz stopu profita od 17%.
U okviru Ringier Serbia posluju Blic.rs, apsolutni lider na medijskom tržištu od 2012. godine, sportski portal Sportal.rs, lifestyle platforma Žena.rs, kulinarski portal Superrecepti.rs, šoubiz sajt Pulsonline.rs, forum Ana.rs, kao i oglasni portal Mojauto.rs. Kompanija je prisutna i na tržištu Bosne i Hercegovine putem portala Srpskainfo.com i Bosnainfo.ba. Od 2022. godine, portfolio je proširen i kablovskom televizijom Blic TV.
Pored digitalnih platformi, Ringier Serbia izdaje i štampane medije – dnevni list Blic i ženski nedeljnik Blic žena. Kroz svoj prodajni sektor Media Impact, kompanija nudi inovativna rešenja u oblasti oglašavanja, kombinujući tehnologiju i podatke za maksimalni domet i efikasnost kampanja.
Društvena odgovornost je sastavni deo poslovanja Ringier Serbia – 2013. godine osnovana je Blic fondacija, koja pruža pomoć socijalno ugroženoj deci. Kompanija je takođe jedan od osnivača Inicijative "Digitalna Srbija" i Švajcarsko-srpske trgovinske komore, doprinoseći razvoju digitalnog ekosistema u regionu.

We are the world’s most trusted visual analytics platform for construction, transforming how infrastructure is monitored, managed, and optimized. From building construction and factories to mega-structures, roads, bridges, and offshore oil rigs, we empower developers, contractors, regulators, architects, designers, and financial institutions with real-time visual intelligence. To date, we have captured over 45 million visual records across 700+ construction projects worldwide, collectively monitoring $150B+ in project value. 

Our visual data repository is among the largest in the construction industry, surpassing even consumer platforms such as Airbnb in image scale. Deployments across landmark projects including Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), Dubai Holding, PIF Giga Projects, Prestige Group India, and Brigade Group demonstrate our proven ability to manage large, complex construction programs with reliability and precision.

Globally deployable and safety-certified, our teams and customized 4G camera systems are built for extreme environments, operating reliably from –6°C to +54°C. With secure 4G connectivity and a state-of-the-art timelapse platform, stakeholders gain real-time site visibility anytime, anywhere.

Name: Deutsche Wirtschafts Nachrichten
Description:
Die Deutschen Wirtschafts Nachrichten wurden 2012 gegründet und haben sich seither zum am schnellsten wachsenden Wirtschaftsmedium im deutschsprachigen Internet entwickelt. Die Seite ist die in sozialen Medien am häufigsten geteilte Wirtschafts-Nachrichtenwebsite.

Aktuell, unabhängig, exklusiv: Die Deutschen Wirtschafts Nachrichten berichten journalistisch unabhängig und verständlich über Entwicklungen in Politik, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft. Globale Zusammenhänge, die direkt oder indirekt Auswirkungen auf Deutschland haben, werden aufgezeigt. Europa-Themen und Fragen von Bürgerrechten, Bürgerbeteiligung und Demokratie sind Teil der Analysen, Interviews, Exklusiv-Berichte und aktuellen Nachrichten. Ein Team von Wirtschaftsjournalisten, Korrespondenten und Reportern recherchiert und analysiert die Ereignisse.

Die Deutschen Wirtschafts Nachrichten gehören zu 51 Prozent zur schwedischen Verlagsgruppe Bonnier Business Press. 49 Prozent hält die in Berlin ansässige Blogform Verlags Gesellschaft mbH. Bonnier Business Press zählt zu den führenden Wirtschaftsverlagen in Europa und gibt unter anderem die schwedische Zeitung Dagens Industri heraus. Zum Verlagshaus Bonnier AB gehören unter anderem die Zeitung Expressen und Dagens Nyheter. In Deutschland gehören unter anderem die Buchverlage Ullstein, Piper und Carlsen zu Bonnier.

Name: Talotekniikka-lehti
Description:
Talotekniikka-alan asiantuntija
Talotekniikka-lehti on alan tärkein ammattilehti. Kahdeksan kertaa vuodessa ilmestyvä lehti avaa uusia ja erilaisia näkökulmia talotekniikkaan sekä energiatehokkuuden ja sisäilmaolosuhteiden parantamiseen.

Koko vuoden kantavana teemana on ilmastonmuutoksen torjunta ja siihen kytkeytyvät tekijät. Nostamme esiin uusia ratkaisuja, ideoita ja lainsäädäntöä sekä käytännön toimia, joilla ilmastonmuutosta hillitään. Esittelemme energiatehokkuushankkeita, uusiutuvan ja/tai päästöttömän energian hyödyntämistä sekä parhaita, kustannustehokkaita ratkaisuja kiinteistöjen käyttöön ja rakentamiseen. Seuraamme myös koronapandemian vaikutuksia sekä uusia tutkimustuloksia pandemian torjumiseksi talotekniikan keinoin.

Jokaisesta lehdestä lukija löytää tietopaketin talotekniseen maailmaan. Kaikki keskeiset toimialat on nostetaan esiin: lämpö, vesi, ilma, kylmä, automaatio, sähkö ja IoT. Lehti tarjoaa tietoa ajankohtaisista asioista, teknisistä ratkaisuista, alan näkymistä, kehityksestä ja uusista tuotteista sekä yrityksistä ja ihmisistä.

Puhdas ilma, raikas vesi, miellyttävät sisäolosuhteet, uusiutuva energia sekä viihtyisä asuinympäristö yhdistävät lukijoitamme. Lehti kertoo parhaat ja kustannustehokkaat ratkaisut, olipa sitten kyse modernista toimitilasta, asumisesta, kaupasta tai teollisuudesta.

Talotekniikka-lehti, painetussa ja digitaalisessa muodossa kokoaa yhteen koko alan: niin opiskelijat kuin ammattilaiset – suunnittelun, urakoinnin, teollisuuden, teknisen tukkukaupan sekä kylmäsektorin aloilta.

Our audience consists of electrical contractor firm owners, engineers, estimators, purchasing agents, project managers, supervisors, journeymen and apprentice electricians. Vrij Nederland is opgericht om te waken over de grenzen van onze vrijheid. Door pal te staan voor de progressieve en democratische waarden die ons sinds 1945 zoveel vrijheid hebben opgeleverd.

De komende maanden gaan wij fors investeren in een nieuw digitaal platform, een herziening van het maandblad en een uitbreiding van de redactie. Vanaf de zomer van 2024 zal het vernieuwde Vrij Nederland geleidelijk zichtbaar worden. Wij hopen dat je ons nu al steunt in onze missie.

Vrij Nederland schrijft met grote betrokkenheid bij die verworven (en nog te verwerven) vrijheden. Belangrijk in deze tijd is dat we inhoudelijk volledig autonoom zijn. We gaan te rade bij onze lezers, maar blijven altijd onafhankelijk van adverteerders, geldschieters of andere belanghebbenden.

We bieden een vooruitstrevend, verhelderend en vrij perspectief in een wereld van verandering. Steun onafhankelijke journalistiek, steun Vrij Nederland.

Name: EPRAVO.CZ, a.s.
Description:
EPRAVO.CZ is an electronic online daily and a publishing house specializing in law and judiciary. Over more than ten years of its existence, EPRAVO.CZ has built a strong reputation among legal chambers, law firms and lawyers not only in the Czech Republic.
The company’s portfolio inherently includes the quarterly EPRAVO.CZ Magazine, which is published in the circulation of 25,000 printed copies and 35,000 electronic copies. The magazine is distributed free of charge to lawyers in various positions, public sector representatives and managers of top 1,000 Czech enterprises. In addition, it also participates in the preparation of other professional publications, such as the Czech notary magazine AdNotam or the special monthly Veřejné zakázky (Public Contracts). Specialist topics are also covered thanks to the support of roundtables and conferences. In 2014 it started publishing the digital tablet monthly EPRAVO.CZ Digital, a follow-up to the mobile application EPRAVO.CZ.
The number of titles published by EPRAVO.CZ increased in 2013 with Slovak EPRAVO.SK and the portal pojistenivpraxi.cz, specializing in insurance.
EPRAVO.CZ is the founder of the Právník roku (Lawyer of the Year) competition, which is organized in cooperation with the Czech Bar Association and under the auspices of the Ministry of Justice of the Czech Republic, the Union of Prosecutors of the Czech Republic, the Union of Judges of the Czech Republic, the Notary Chamber of the Czech Republic, the Chamber of Distrainors of the Czech Republic, and the Union of Corporate Lawyers of the Czech Republic.
EPRAVO.CZ is also the founder of the prestigious corporate awards Právnická firma roku / Czech Leading Law Firm, which is still the only competition of top law firms in the Czech Republic, with a strong media and commercial impact.

Name: Shanghai Media Group
Description:
Shanghai Media Group or SMG is one of China’s largest media and cultural conglomerates, with the most complete portfolio of media and related businesses. The Oriental Pearl Media Company under SMG was the first cultural and media company in China to realize a market capitalization totaling more than 100 Bln RMB ($15 Bln) on the Shanghai Stock Exchange in 2015. By June of 2015, SMG has more than RMB 61 Bln ($10 Bln) in assets and about 17,200 employees.
 
SMG’s businesses span operations of radio and TV networks, signal transmission, newspapers and magazines, drama and film production and distribution, OTT and streaming, IPTV, online and console gaming, digital advertising, home shopping and e-commerce, financial data and information services, children’s arts training, TV post-production services, live entertainment, tourism and cultural investments, etc.
 
SMG has 15 cable and satellite TV networks, 13 radio frequencies, 15 subscription-based digital pay TV channels, 8 newspapers and magazines and transmits signals via airwaves, cables, satellite and IPTV. On the content side, SMG is a leading powerhouse in China in the production of TV and films, animation and documentaries. New media is a top priority for SMG. It is poised to set up a new media eco-system with the operation of mobile TV, OTT, web portals, apps and cloud services. SMG is also a strong player in live entertainment, owning 9 top art troupes, one circus school, 8 theaters, a number of live entertainment companies. In addition, SMG possesses some of the most famous landmark properties in Shanghai including the Oriental Pearl TV Tower, the Mercedes Benz Arena and the International Convention Center. SMG is also setting foot in cultural investments. It holds 20% of the shares of the Shanghai Disney Resort and has invested in a number of cultural investment funds including the China Media Capital, Shanghai Culture Industrial Investment Fund and the LDVP Venture Capital Fund.

Name: Vlaams Audiovisueel Fonds
Description:
Het VAF is een instelling van de Vlaamse Gemeenschap en werkt in 
opdracht van de Vlaamse regering. Onder de koepel van het VAF vallen 
drie fondsen: het VAF/Filmfonds, het VAF/Mediafonds en het 
VAF/Gamefonds.

Wat doen we?

Het VAF vervult meerdere rollen. Als beleidsinstrument van de Vlaamse 
Gemeenschap is aandacht voor de volledige culturele en economische 
waardeketen, van idee tot beleving, onze kerntaak. Onze pijlers zijn steun 
aan creatie, talentontwikkeling, promotie en publiekswerking, steeds met 
oog voor thema’s als duurzaamheid en gender & inclusie. 

Daarnaast werkt het VAF als een actieve partner mee aan het behouden 
en vormgeven van een bloeiende sector. En verder is het VAF ook een 
gedreven ambassadeur van de Vlaamse audiovisuele en gamesector in 
binnen- en buitenland.

Het VAF heeft tot doel om de onafhankelijke creatie van audiovisueel werk
en games in Vlaanderen te stimuleren en te ondersteunen via een 
geïntegreerde aanpak. Daarnaast biedt het VAF de Vlaamse professionele 
sector de nodige omkadering. 

Het VAF voert het Vlaamse film- en gamebeleid niet enkel uit, maar speelt 
ook een rol in de voorbereiding van dit beleid voor de betrokken 
voogdijministers. Het VAF doet aan kennisopbouw over de sector, met het 
accent op dataverzameling en -analyse.

Our portfolio extends from our work in film trailer designing, fashion films, documentary films/web series to event coverage, digital commercials, corporate films and AVs.
Our design department has worked on numerous projects of both a social nature nature (Ottobock, Habitat for Humanity) and a commercial one (BNP Paribas, Condé Nast India). Our photography department too has a stellar reputation and a diverse background, having worked in sectors like wildlife and travel photography to fashion and product photography for brands like Verve, Vogue, GQ, ELLE, Jaipur Jewels and Nirav Modi. In terms of branding, our team works on the all round development of an entity’s brand; including its identity, design, management and corporate AVs.
Our work in Films includes Fashion Films for some of the top brands in the nation like Pantaloons, Pantene, Allen Solly, Being Human to name a few. Furthermore we produce Corporate AVs, Music Videos, Short Films and even Web Series. Film Trailer Designing is another of our expertise sectors with the last project being for a Feature film ‘Jia Aur Jia’.
At the end of the day, we’re a bunch of film-making geeks who love to dabble in bit of everything and our crew today is a varied mix of cultures and ethnicities from across the globe, giving us a broader perspective in all of our productions.

Name: International Journalism Festival
Description:
The International Journalism Festival, held every April in Perugia, Italy, is the biggest annual media event in Europe (188 sessions and 539 speakers in the 2023 programme). The festival is an open invitation to interact with the best of world journalism. All sessions are free entry for all attendees, without tickets and without registration. All venues are situated in the stunning setting of the historic town centre of Perugia. 2023 festival supporters included Craig Newmark Philanthropies, Google, McKinsey & Company and Open Society Foundations.

The next festival will take place in Perugia from 17 to 21 April 2024.

Name: Gerador
Description:
O Gerador, criado a 27 de maio de 2014, é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos. Acreditamos que temos a responsabilidade de abrir caminhos no acesso a jornalismo, cultura e educação de qualidade. Estamos convictos da importância dessas ferramentas para construir uma comunidade mais criativa, crítica e participativa. Não somos fãs do determinismo e confiamos na capacidade de reinvenção das pessoas para enfrentar os desafios futuros.
 
Desenhámos a nossa atividade em três pilares: ser um órgão de comunicação focado em temas pouco abordados, procurando novas perspetivas e consequências; criar e produzir atividades culturais para ampliar e incluir públicos; e desenvolver ações educativas que estimulem a criatividade e o pensamento crítico, através de investigação e ensino não formal. Damos prioridade a temáticas como juventude, causas sociais, sustentabilidade, interior, democracia e cultura.

Name: Digitalk.rs
Description:
Znate nas već dugo, samo smo sada sa vama u jednoj novoj formi, ali sa istim ciljem – da delimo znanje, pričamo dobre priče i potrudimo se da vam predstavimo što više sjajnih ljudi.

Digitalk pokreću tri prijatelja i domaćina, Vlada Kovač, Ivan Minić i Vitomir Ognjanović. Unazad više od decenije ugostili smo vas na više desetina događaja, konferencija, edukacija, predavanja, webinara, podkasta… Iskreno verujemo da možemo da budemo dobri domaćini i u isključivo online okruženju, a da bismo to i pokazali, DigiTalk ćemo graditi na takav način da će vam naši sadržaji biti dostupni kada vi to želite, moći ćete da ih konzumirate onako kako vama to najviše odgovara, i biće u potpunosti besplatni.

Želimo da učimo i rastemo zajedno sa vama, a kako budemo rasli, verujemo da će se otvarati nove mogućnosti da komuniciramo i družimo se i van digitalnog prostora. Svesni smo da su iskustvo događaja uživo i networking stvari koje teško možemo da vam ponudimo online, zato ćemo kada okolnosti dozvole organizovati najbolja druženja i konferencije kao i u prethodnih petnaest godina. Događaje na koje prvi put dolazimo kao kolege, a sa kojih odlazimo kao prijatelji i saborci. Događaje na kojima ćete se osećati dobrodošlim, i gde ćete imati svu našu pažnju. Naš autoritet i vaše poverenje smo gradili godinama unazad, i to ne želimo da prokockamo.  

Potekli smo iz zajednice i uvek joj se vraćamo kao glavnom izvoru energije, inspiracije, i najvažnijem motoru promena. Zajednica će nam pružiti osećaj pripadnosti i hrabrost da zajedno pokušamo ono što sami ne bismo. Jer čak i najteži zadaci budu lakši kada se rešavaju zajedno, a znanje je jedina stvar koja se deljenjem uvećava.

Dok to ne bude moguće, održavaćemo puls zajednice iz nedelje u nedelju kroz DigiTalk podcast u kome će Vlada ugostiti ljude koji predstavljaju vrednosti koje delimo - znanje, iskustvo i spremnost da pokažu inicijativu i zajedno sa svima nama grade bolji svet za sve.

Name: SCOPIC
Description:
Our Value Proposition to you:

Simply put, SCOPIC is video marketing, without the hassle.
 
Every business needs video, but finding the time, the people, and the equipment quickly becomes an insurmountable challenge.
 
Until you find SCOPIC.
 
We offer end-to-end content creation; from ideas and planning, scripting and project management, to filming across the UK, then editing and delivering high-end content ready for use.
 
Our service is built on a unique hassle-free process, managed by a dedicated project manager – your single point of contact, and creatively executed by our highly-skilled and experienced, regional video producers.
 
There’s more that sets us apart. Key to the SCOPIC process is our zero-hassle project management service: PIXEL.
 
With PIXEL, we work on your behalf to obtain access and permissions for shooting on sites; to request testimonials from your customers; to source locations, actors, and props; all to make your experience hassle-free.
 
That’s why our producers are strategically placed throughout the UK. It’s less hassle for you because matter where the shoot, we’re always local.
 
What’s more, we work to any scale in line with a transparent pricing structure. For new businesses putting their identity into the world and for industry-shakers building the next big Christmas ad – SCOPIC will bring your vision to reality.

Our content spans articles, comics, events, and books – the first one to be launched later this year. All of these are designed to equip our community with the tools they need to improve financial literacy, build financial resilience, and ultimately attain financial independence.

With a vision to help our community start financial independence young, we are currently building an EdTech platform focused on financial education for children and tweens with curriculum-based teaching and learning, and AI-enabled personalisation.

Name: POLO Women Powered Stories
Description:
What?

POLO Stories is a production platform that creates and disseminates documentaries about innovative women across the globe. It is our aim to create a documentary in every country on Earth, producing a rich archive of female ingenuity and entrepreneurship in the 21st century. Our first wave of films will prioritise narratives in low and middle-income countries. 

Who?

The producers of these documentaries come from a pool of well-established and accredited film schools and academies in low and middle-income countries. The productions will be overseen by female filmmakers and based on stories with a female protagonist. 

How?

There are two streams of films within POLO Stories: 

Education — shedding light on a specific innovation or phenomenon related to a woman’s life and work. 

Call for Support — raising awareness for new ideas to help drive them into fruition.

Our production style is shaped by: i. strong emphasis on powerful and inspiring narratives carefully curated with the support of a TED specialist; ii. collaboration with the subjects of our films to ensure that stories authentically reflect lived experiences; iii. focus on creative and expressive cinematography.

If you have a story you think deserves to be told, contact us at info@polostories.org.

World Fishing has been in print since 1952 and has been the leading voice in the international fishing and commercial fishing and aquaculture industry. World Fishing is the longest-established international title serving the commercial fishing
industry. It is aimed primarily at fishing companies, vessel operators, fleet managers and ships’ officers, as well as institutions, regulatory authorities, government departments. World Fishing also covers the processing and aquaculture sectors, with its coverage aimed at decision-makers in both sectors.

World Fishing Online
Worldfishing.net is a key source of the latest industry news with new content added every day. As a marketing platform, it can help your business stay ‘front of mind’ for an average of over 10,900 visitors a month. It is an effective way to make an impact and drive traffic to your website.

Each issue has one exclusive sponsorship opportunity, offering an extremely effective way for businesses to communicate announcements, events, product launches, and brand messaging.

Description:
LegalWiki is the first legal news platform that presents legal news under 100 words. We aim to make the legal community more aware of the latest legal developments happening around the world.

Law students and legal professionals—engrossed in work and studies—often overlook the importance of staying updated. 

With our website, you can stay informed in just 5 minutes a day. We have received an overwhelming response, and more than 16,000 users have visited our website in the last 6 months. 

We cover the latest Supreme Court and High Court judgments, legal appointments, and key regulatory changes. You can also read updates based on your area of interest, such as criminal law, corporate law, tech law, and more.

Whether you're a law student, legal professional, judiciary aspirant, or simply curious about legal developments, LegalWiki offers tailored content to match your interests and expertise. From simplifying court rulings to explaining emerging issues, we ensure every update is relevant, reliable, and easy to understand.

Our goal is to become “Inshorts” for the legal community.

Check out our Website: https://legalwiki.co/ for all the latest updates. 
Check out our blog: https://blog.legalwiki.co/ for everything law-related.

We’re now accepting collaboration and advertising opportunities with brands, law firms, educational institutions, and legal service providers.
Our audience includes thousands of lawyers, law students, and legal professionals across India.
For details: Legalwikilaw@gmail.com

The group lists more than 400 hours of programs produced and broadcasted with influence on all continents in over 80 countries. Even today, worried to meet the new expectations of its broadcast partners and audiences, Robin & Co and its subsidiaries are reinventing tomorrow's entertainment ...

- CALT Story, created by Hervé Bellech (La Dernière Partie, Or de Lui, Système de Ponte): television and film productions.

- Monkey Pack Films, of which Marc Stanimirovic is the executive producer (Espace Détente, Le Lion, Sympathie pour le diable): film productions.

- Hope Production, a subsidiary born from the meeting between director Yann Arthus-Bertrand and Jean-Yves Robin (Human, Woman, Legacy): film and documentary productions.

- Robin Production, of which Marion Gendron-Durand is the executive producer (Voilà-Voilà, Saturday Night Fever, Ahmed Sylla avec un grand A): shows productions.

- CALT Distribution: the group's distribution subsidiary

What do all those activities have in common ? A guenine desire to bring to the artists we love, and in whom we believe, the necessary tools to carry out their projects.

Description:
RAIL is the UK’s leading source of trusted news, analysis and commentary for Britain’s modern railway. We enable and support a successful, future-focused rail network by reporting on the industry’s most important issues with clarity, depth and authority.

Our journalism serves the leaders, managers and influencers who shape the direction of the rail sector — from train operating companies and freight operators to infrastructure owners, ROSCOs, government bodies and key industry groups. RAIL provides the insight this audience relies on to understand policy, procurement, strategy and operations, helping inform decisions that impact the whole network.

Through intelligent reporting, expert analysis and thought-provoking comment, we champion innovation, highlight the people driving progress, and foster informed debate across the industry. We also engage suppliers, sector stakeholders and the wider rail community — including early-career professionals and passionate rail enthusiasts — who look to RAIL as an essential source of knowledge.

Our flagship events, including Rail Live and the National Rail Awards, bring the sector together to connect, celebrate excellence and share progress. RAIL continues to hold organisations and policymakers to account while shining a light on the developments that strengthen Britain’s railway and build public understanding of its vital role.

Name: Mtoto News
Description:
A digital media company that is leveraging on technology to improve the lives of children by making them visible. Our vision is a world where children are seen as players and not as spectators.
We do this by

1.) Curating, Creating and Circulating content on children in different ways audio, video, written and graphics. We also train journalist on ethical reporting of children stories, taking into considerations Best Interest of the Child and safeguarding.
 
2.) Child participation, we train children to speak for themselves, we do this through 5 days in-person training followed by a 3 months mentorship program, where children learn how to write, make videos, interview and stay safe online. We also give them a platform where they can publish their content. 
 

3.) Data We believe there is a huge gap between data and actions as a result of data  We work towards making children visible in corporate, economic, development and social discourse. Our social media platforms are interactive to ensure that our community of child experts, government officials and private sector engage in improving the lives of children.

We produce relevant, timely and reliable content on children that aims at influencing attitude, perception, policy and programs.

We support advocacy campaigns that aim at improving the lives of children. for more about us visit our website mtotonews.com, follow us on Twitter, Facebook. Instagram and word press on @mtotonews. Subscribe to our online channel on  youtube.com/mtotonewstv

We build the capacity of children to be able to use digital technology to speak for themselves while staying safe. This is through our child-friendly storytelling trainings, mentorship and providing them with a platform to speak for themselves.
To increase children visibility, we train journalist on child-sensitive reporting both for mainstream and digital media.

Leveraging on technology, we are developing data-informed tools to solve challenges that face children everyday

1987 wurde die Veranstaltung als Treffen privater Rundfunkpioniere ins Leben gerufen. Heute gehören die MEDIENTAGE MÜNCHEN mit über 5.000 Teilnehmenden aus dem In- und Ausland, mehreren Hundert akkreditierten Journalist:innen, über 300 Speakern und mehr als 100 Sessions zu den wegweisenden Veranstaltungen für die Medien- und Kommunikationswelt. Das Programm umfasst diverse Keynotes, Diskussionsrunden und Masterclasses. Hinzu kommen zahlreiche Side-Events wie die bekannte "Nacht der Medien" sowie verschiedene Networking-Angebote.

Darüber hinaus organisiert das Team der MEDIENTAGE MÜNCHEN das #MTM SPECIAL Future Video mit Fokus auf die TV- und Streaming-Branche. Hinzu kommen die LOKALRUNDFUNKTAGE - der deutschlandweit größte Branchentreff für den lokalen und regionalen Rundfunk. 

Die MEDIENTAGE MÜNCHEN werden veranstaltet von der Medien.Bayern GmbH. Die Konferenz ist gefördert durch die Bayerische Staatskanzlei und die Bayerische Landeszentrale für neue Medien.

Connecting the maritime and offshore world for sustainable solutions.

By sharing our relevant online- and offline media expertise, Navingo brings together the world of maritime and offshore energy. As the global environment is changing our industry strives for sustainable solutions. We believe that innovation takes place when inspiring ideas, valuable information and the right people connect .

Connect
Innovation happens when complementing ideas and the right team fall in place. We see it as our responsibility to facilitate that process and that’s why we bring people together and provide them with the latest insights.


Maritime & Offshore
The world of maritime and offshore is dynamic and diverse. It is at the foundation of our lives as we know it, from transporting our products around the world to providing energy. The world depends on maritime and offshore and we want to help those companies move forward.

Sustainable solutions

Name: FOCUS
Description:
Bei allem, was wir tun, haben wir die Menschen im FOCUS.

Die Menschen, die neugierig werden, wenn sich die Welt verändert. Die Menschen, die die Zukunft gestalten wollen. Optimisten, die den Wandel als Chance sehen. 

Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass es diese Menschen sind, die unsere Gesellschaft in die Zukunft führen. Sie prägen die Art und Weise, wie wir leben werden. Weil Sie den Unterschied machen und sich mit dem Normalen und Standardisierten nicht zufriedengeben.

Unsere Aufgabe als modernes Nachrichtenmagazin ist es, genau für diese Menschen da zu sein. Wir hören ihnen zu, wir geben ihnen eine Stimme und sind Ihr Begleiter auf dem Weg in die Zukunft. Um ihnen in Zeiten des permanenten Umbruchs in allen Lebensbereichen Orientierung zu geben, sie weiterzubringen und zum Gewinner des Wandels zu machen. 

Wir müssen in Zeiten des permanenten Umbruchs immer wieder auf die einzige Konstante eingehen: den Menschen. Wir glauben, dass für die Menschen heute das Besondere zählt, nicht mehr das Gewöhnliche. Sie streben nicht das Standardisierte an, sondern das Einzigartige. Die herkömmlichen Milieus brechen auf. Mainstream ist tot. Dies gilt für alle Lebensbereiche: Wie man arbeitet, wie man Politik macht, wie man denkt, wie man isst, wie man Urlaub macht, wie man den eigenen Körper gestaltet, welche Werte man vertritt und wie man all dies öffentlich präsentiert. 

Für alle, die neugierig auf die Gegenwart und die Chancen der Zukunft schauen, sind wir Begleiter, Ratgeber und Gesprächspartner. Und deshalb handeln unsere Geschichten von individuellen, authentischen Persönlichkeiten aus Politik, Gesellschaft, Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft, Gesundheit und Kultur. 

Ohne Menschen gibt es keine Nachrichten. Menschen machen Nachrichten, und Menschen sind Nachrichten. Das ist, was ein modernes Nachrichtenmagazin ausmacht.
