Name: Kayhan Life
Description: Kayhan Life is an English-language digital magazine dedicated to the global Iranian community. With an exclusive focus on arts, culture, and lifestyle, Kayhan Life provides coverage of Iranian art, theater, film, music, photography, fashion, food and travel around the world. It is a unique showcase for the myriad of Iranians who have created extraordinary lives for themselves and their children outside Iran, yet who feel connected to their Persian heritage.

Name: Business Review Live
Description:
Welcome to Business Review Live, your gateway to insights, analysis, and stories driving India’s dynamic business ecosystem. 

As a growing platform, we specialise in uncovering trends and opportunities within the startup ecosystem, market analysis, and Indian business news. In 2025, we’re sharpening our focus on startups, delivering unparalleled coverage of entrepreneurial journeys, industry innovations, and emerging markets.

Our content spans specialities such as technology trends, finance and investment, corporate strategy, and venture capital, while also championing topics like women entrepreneurs, sustainability in business, and digital transformation. We are committed to empowering C-suite executives, SME leaders, and aspiring entrepreneurs with actionable insights to drive growth and innovation.

While startups take centre stage, our readers will continue to enjoy expert analysis on the global economy, economic policies, and the bigger business picture shaping India and beyond.

Name: Miss Tweed
Description:
What is Miss Tweed?
An independent Paris-based media specialized in the fashion and luxury goods sector. It is advertising-free to guarantee complete editorial freedom.

What will Miss Tweed give me?
Deeply reported news you will not read elsewhere: scoops, analysis, insight and commentary.

How to describe Miss Tweed?
Quality stories breed quality readers. Miss Tweed is not meant to be a mass media. It is a community of decision-makers, executives, managers, artists, artisans and consultants who wish to make informed decisions.

What is Miss Tweed’s raison d’être?
The luxury goods sector has become one of the main pillars of the global economy. It needs to be challenged and held accountable by a truly independent media that can discuss freely its bright sides as well as its dark sides.

Name: Fake It or Leave It | AI-studio
Description: Wij zijn een creatieve AI- en VFX-studio en maken impactvolle producties. Van virale social content tot primetime televisieproducties. We doen dit in samenwerking met toonaangevende studio’s, streamingdiensten en merken om visuele grenzen te verleggen. Voor aanvragen   info@fakeitorleaveit.com

Name: Shine TV
Description:
Shine TV has grown to become one of the UK’s most successful production companies. We make popular factual television in all its forms: from single documentaries to global factual entertainment formats. We work hard to make sure that everything we do is surprising, challenging, entertaining, witty and warm – and always supported by the highest production values.

We are proud to be the home of shows including MasterChef, Hunted, The Heist, The Island With Bear Grylls, Rick Stein's Cornwall, Mary Berry’s Country House Secrets, The Force, Council House Crackdown, All Change at Longleat, Idris Elba: King of Speed and The Secret Life of Prisons.

In July 2020 Endemol Shine Group was acquired by Banijay, creating the world’s largest international content producer and distributor.

Name: The Mercury News
Description:
The San Francisco-Oakland-San Jose DMA is fifth largest in the nation. The Mercury News delivers the most affluent and educated consumers in this key market. Founded in 1851, the Pulitzer Prize-winning Mercury News boasts the best reach and demographics in Silicon Valley, the economic powerhouse that drives the entire DMA. In addition, The Mercury News offers a comprehensive menu of additional marketing resources (targeted publications, direct and shared mail, online and more) to provide the greatest impact for your marketing dollar.

THE NEWS MISSION: We are passionate about serving readers in Silicon Valley and its global electronic community, reporting and writing accurately and fairly, shining a light on injustice and defending the public's right to know. We will reflect the changing demographics of the community in both coverage and hiring, recognizing that diversity is a core component of accuracy. Two stories are central to our mission: the impact of technology and the changing demographic landscape of America.

Name: The 444 Group
Description:
The 444 Group is a global production company built for the realities of modern content creation. Nimble, scalable, and relentlessly focused on quality, we produce premium interactive, cinematic, and commercial content for the world’s leading studios, brands, and platforms.

Operating across games, film, television, and high-end commercial production, we deliver full-spectrum production solutions under one roof. From original IP and co-development to trailers, broadcast content, branded campaigns, and live services, we lead projects from concept through delivery with clarity, precision, and creative intent.

With 444, you don’t just hire a vendor—you gain an embedded production partner. We integrate directly into your pipeline, owning execution, accountability, and outcomes, while scaling teams and capabilities exactly where they’re needed.

Name: Can Medya Grubu
Description:
Can Medya Grubu, Türkiye’nin önde gelen televizyon kanalları (Habertürk, Bloomberg HT, Show TV, HT Spor) dijital medya platformları (haberturk.com, bloomberght.com, showtv.com.tr) ve radyo kanalları (Habertürk Radyo, Bloomberg HT Radyo) ile medya sektöründe güçlü bir konuma sahiptir.

Stratejik vizyonu doğrultusunda, medya sektöründeki etkisini artırmayı, dijital dönüşümünü güçlendirmeyi ve haber, eğlence ile ekonomi gazeteciliği alanlarında içerik üretim yeteneklerini geliştirmeyi hedeflemektedir...

Name: Ondernemen in Limburg
Description:
Ondernemen in Limburg is het grootste zakelijke magazine van Limburg. Een magazine voor én door ondernemers. Ondernemen in Limburg biedt een unieke blik op ondernemen in de breedste zin van het woord. Onderwerpen als duurzaamheid, digitalisering, familiebedrijven, innovatie en arbeidsmarkt passeren onder andere de revue. 

Het ondernemersmagazine wordt twee keer per jaar geadresseerd verspreid door heel Limburg. Naast het magazine publiceren we iedere week op dinsdag een digitale nieuwsbrief met het laatste ondernemersnieuws. Wil je het magazine en/of de nieuwsbrief ontvangen? Stuur ons een bericht en we melden je kosteloos aan!

Name: ANP
Description:
The ANP is the largest independent B2B supplier of news and information to all Dutch media - internet, mobile, television, radio, newspapers, magazines - and to public and private organizations. In addition to news and information, ANP also offers integrated solutions and content to help clients set their agenda, analyse, monitor and produce content.
ANP was founded in 1934 by the daily newspapers in The Netherlands. In the last few decades market circumstances have changed rapidly and therefore the foundation was converted into a private company. Since May 2001 ANP operates independently in the media market, allowing the company to increase its commercial activities. Nowadays ANP produces some 160,000 news stories and 100,000 photographs a year, tailored to the various needs and styles of the news media. Out of this feedstock ANP develops marketable products that are being sold by its business lines. ANP meets the highest standards of quality and reliability in providing complete coverage of events. News stories are written by experienced ANP journalists, an extensive network of correspondents and journalists from international press agencies, such as Reuters, DPA and AFP. With a permanent staff of around 200, ANP is headquartered just outside The Hague in Rijswijk. In addition to a team of correspondents spread throughout the country, ANP operates bureaus in Amsterdam, Rotterdam, The Hague (government) and Brussels (EU).

Name: Money Marketing
Description: Since launch in 1985, Money Marketing has been the number one weekly newspaper for the independent financial adviser with the most respected journalists in the business. MM’s multi-award winning team of reporters work across our weekly newspaper and daily website, offering an unrivalled news service alongside in-depth analysis and comment on market issues.

Name: Fagbladet Folkeskolen
Description:
Fagbladet Folkeskolen er det skolenære, debatskabende og dagsordensættende fagmedie, som med uafhængig kvalitetsjournalistik gør en forskel for lærere og andre skoleprofessionelle, skolen og demokratiet.
Fagbladet Folkeskolen ejes af Danmarks Lærerforening og Stibo Complete. Mediet redigeres efter journalistiske kriterier og er uafhængigt af både foreningsmæssige, økonomiske og politiske interesser, også ejernes.

Name: Alibaba Pictures Group Limited
Description:
Alibaba Pictures Group Limited (“Alibaba Pictures”) is the flagship unit of Alibaba Group’s entertainment arm and its core businesses includes four segments: film and television production centered on IP (intellectual property); internet-based promotion and distribution combining internet technologies and traditional off-line distribution; the building and operation of e-commerce platforms for entertainment as an extension of the Alibaba Group ecosystem and international operations that consolidate global resources, technologies and talents in order to participate in the global entertainment industry.

Alibaba Group is the largest shareholder of Alibaba Pictures, its mission is to make it easy to do business anywhere. The company is the largest online and mobile commerce company in the world in terms of gross merchandise volume. The company provides the fundamental technology infrastructure and marketing reach to help businesses leverage the power of the Internet to establish an online presence and conduct commerce with hundreds of millions of consumers and other businesses.

Alibaba Pictures is well positioned to leverage and integrate its Alibaba Group’s resources and technology to carry on the mission of developing its cultural businesses. Focusing on innovation in the cultural industry, Alibaba Pictures bases its operations on the principle, “customer first” and its business development on the powers of the Internet and big data.  

Alibaba Pictures is a public company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKSE: 1060) and the Singapore Exchange (SGX:S91).

Name: Shine Group
Description:
Shine Group has built a global footprint producing some of the world’s most creative, ground-breaking, critically acclaimed and commercially successful programming.  

Now numbering 29, group companies include award-winning genre specialists such as UK-based Dragonfly (factual), Kudos (drama), Princess Productions (entertainment and multi-genre) and Shine TV (factual and factual entertainment), market-leading US producers Shine America plus Metronome Film & Television, the Nordic region’s pre-eminent production group. Shine International, the group’s international distribution arm is responsible for the distribution of over 3,000 hours of broadcast content annually. 

Over the last three years the group has established Shine Australia, Shine Germany, Shine France, and most recently Shine Iberia. The group has recently enhanced its digital and direct to consumer credentials with the additions of social gaming specialists Bossa Studios and market-leading online broadcaster and original content producers ChannelFlip.  

In May Shine moved into the children’s entertainment genre in a co-venture with Teletubbies and In The Night Garden co-creator Andrew Davenport. Shine Group became a wholly owned subsidiary of News Corporation in March 2011.

Name: Cut.com
Description:
Cut.com, Inc is a media and entertainment company, building community one awkward conversation at a time. Our videos and games are for real people; sometimes awkward, often funny, and always thought-provoking. We aspire to create content that is both viral and smart, highly produced and scalable, mainstream and cool.

Interested in our work? Want to be in a video? We post calls on our feeds all the time. Follow us at:

https://youtube.com/cut
https://facebook.com/watchcut
https://www.instagram.com/cut/
https://www.tiktok.com/@cut

Please send business and press inquiries to video@cut.com

Name: PowerDrift
Description:
Founded in October 2012, erstwhile PTR (Power To the Rider), PowerDrift was founded by a bunch of passionate motoring enthusiasts with a view to become a catalyst in the Indian Motoring scenario. Car and Bike reviews need not be boring! 

With the conventional automotive journalism industry churning out boring, biased, lackluster reviews, PowerDrift aspires to change the scenario with its only mantra in mind - 

"Showcasing Indian motoring in a way its deserved to be seen."


It's time for MORE! MORE Intensity - MORE Speed - MORE POWER.
POWER as never seen before. Watch out!

Come, be part of the revolution! Click on our url to know more about PowerDrift, and do check careers to know how you can be part of this change!

Name: GAİN
Description: GAİN, yeni nesil içerik platformu olarak izleyicilere farklı ve kaliteli içerik deneyimi sunuyor. Özgün yapımları ve uluslararası içerikleri ile dikkat çeken platform, dizi, film, belgesel ve programlarla geniş bir içerik yelpazesi sunarak izleyicilerine her an her yerde erişim imkânı sağlıyor. Yenilikçi vizyonuyla içerik yatırımlarını artırmaya devam eden GAİN, izleyicileri için zengin ve özgün hikâyeleri bir araya getirmeye devam ediyor.

Name: Stargate Studios
Description: Founded in 1989 by Sam Nicholson, ASC, cinematographer and visual effects supervisor, Stargate Studios is an international production company providing concept development, advanced production services and state-of-the-art postproduction.  Stargate has a well established, award-winning history of producing high concept production and visual effects in feature films, television, and commercials.

Name: Light Metal Age
Description:
Light Metal Age (LMA) magazine has a long legacy in the aluminum industry with over 77 years of experience covering primary and secondary production, extrusion, and rolling. The magazine provides vital technical, industrial, and market information to aluminum producers and processors around the world. 

Available in both print and digital format, LMA covers the entire value chain of the aluminum industry, from primary production to extrusion and rolling and associated downstream fabrication, such as finishing, machining, and joining. The integration and optimization of aluminum products in final applications, such as automotive, aerospace, and building and construction, are also major topics. LMA delivers valuable technology and industry news, industry research, technical knowledge, and case studies to executives, general managers, plant managers, technicians, metallurgists, and engineers responsible for fabrication, production, and operations in manufacturing facilities around the world.

Name: Forever Audio
Description:
Amplifying brands and captivating audiences through great sound is our thing. 

We help bring ideas to life in audio, from global advertising campaigns, digital and immersive experiences, to film and TV post production, music, sonic branding, long-form audio, and podcasts. Based in the UK and the US, our specialist in-house team of creatives, sound engineers and production wizards make beautiful audio for some of the biggest companies in the world. 

And along the way we’ve won Campaign’s Best Audio Agency, Cinema Audio Society, Music & Sound, Promax UK and Vox Awards.

Whatever you need in audio, we’re here to make your life easy.

Name: Producciones del Barrio
Description:
En Producciones del Barrio nos dedicamos al audiovisual. Hacemos de la originalidad de nuestros contenidos, la diferenciación en los planteamientos y la estética cinematográfica nuestro sello de identidad. 

Nuestro equipo multidisciplinar, liderado por Jordi Évole y Ramón Lara,  comprende las áreas de redacción, guión, producción, realización, ambientación, postproducción, documentación y comunicación, siendo capaces de gestionar toda la cadena de producción de nuestros contenidos. 

De entre nuestros programas, destacan formatos como "Salvados" y "Lo de Évole" en La Sexta, "La Maldición del Windsor" en HBO Max, "La Liga de los Hombres Extraordinarios" en Movistar+, "AMÉN: Francisco responde" en Disney+, o "Eso que tú me das", documental estrenado en cines.

Name: Turizm Güncel
Description: Turizm sektörüne ilişkin anlık gelişmeler, araştırmalar, raporlar ve hedef pazarlada yaşanan gelişmelerin turzm sektörüne duyurulduğu sayfa

Name: S Productions
Description:
S Productions is a leading organization specialized in producing entertainment and media content in different aspects of entertainment, from TV Series, TV Programs, Movies and Advertisements.  

S Productions was founded by Ms. Sally Waly and acts as the Executive Producer and CEO. 

The production house stand out by using an adapted technique and full cinematic crew to produce diverse entertainment content. 

After S Production’s notable success in TV production, the organization then proved itself in the cinematic field by producing several movies, which were among esteemed selections in film festivals and gained positive feedback from both audience and critics.

Name: عبسان
Description:
وكالة تسويق بالمحتوى متخصصون في :
تحويل أفكارك إلى محتوى قيادي يتردد صداه لدى جمهورك المستهدف

←الناس تثق بالناس لا بالشركات
←الجمهور العربي ينقصه الوصول للمعرفة من متخصصين يتحدثون لغته

Name: World's Leaders Magazine
Description:
World’s Leaders Magazine is a Media Company that covers stories of business leaders around the globe. It inspires its readers to think beyond traditional boundaries, lead conversations and create the future of business.

Everyone wants to know the journey of successful business leaders, CEOs, entrepreneurs, personalities, or ventures. They want to know more about the establishment, the path that led them to the pinnacle, the obstacles to overcome, and all the hard work for success. World’s Leaders Magazine is the platform where we are unwinding the untold stories of business leaders, entrepreneurs and the stories of startups turning into ventures. We are a trustworthy and honestly acquiring acknowledgment from business pioneers universally.

What Makes Us Unique? 

Today, outdated business ideas and methods are no longer useful. Every aspect of life, from consumer demand to the supply chain, is changing, so it’s important to be adaptable. World’s Leaders is aware that growing a business is just as essential as starting one. We think that a lot of business owners only pay attention to capacity building and ignore other factors. We have a team of editors and analysts who create all kinds of business-related content with a singular focus on modern business operations while introducing emerging entrepreneurs to pasts successful business transformations.

World’s Leaders is also a leading provider of business and technology data as well as leading news in the twenty-first century. We are a multinational information and technology magazine that creates insightful content to address the issues that face business leaders on a daily basis. We are trusted by our clients all over the world to provide accurate, timely business and market information so they can make critical financial decisions.

Name: CineRelay
Description: CineRelay is a social distribution platform where creators earn by sharing licensed movie and TV scenes, helping studios amplify reach while getting paid for cultural moments they already love.

Name: Research Live
Description: Research Live is the leading international website for the research, insight and data analytics industry, delivering daily news, analysis, and comment. Published by the Market Research Society, all editorial content on Research Live is independent.

Name: The Integrator
Description:
The Integrator is a renowned publisher and media solutions provider headquartered in the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Originating as a Technology publishing company, we have expanded our expertise to include the Hospitality, Financial, and Automotive sectors. With a Foundation dating back to 2005, our mission is to empower businesses by offering exceptional media solutions, organizing impactful events, and executing effective campaigns for clients. 
 
Throughout the years, we have facilitated numerous successful ventures, enabling businesses to establish, sustain, and expand their sales channels across the EMEA region. Through our insightful communication channels and thoughtfully curated business events, our publications serve as a vital link, connecting industries with the latest products, services, and opportunities.

Name: Movimenti Production
Description:
Founded in 2004 by Davide Rosio and Giorgio Scorza, Movimenti Production is one of the leading Animation Production Companies in Italy, with over 40 national and international productions under its belt, including television series, video clips, live-shows and multi-platform projects.  
 
Since 2018, with offices in Milan, Florence, Rome and Paris, Movimenti Production has been able to support Made in Italy creativity and talent at a European and international level by producing some of the most important entertainment titles for families and teenagers such as the new animated series of “Topo Gigio” and “Lupo” (Rai Kids), and both Zerocalcare series “Tear Along the Dotted Line” and “This World Can’t Tear Me Down” (Netflix). 
 
Since September 2022 Movimenti Production is part of Banijay, the largest independent content producer and distributor that includes over 120 production companies across 23 territories, and a multi-genre catalogue boasting over 130,000 hours of original standout programming.

Name: BUILDER Magazine
Description: BUILDER helps home builders manage their operations more efficiently and profitably by providing news, market analysis, home plans, design ideas, building product information, and more.

Name: Food For Mzansi
Description:
This is the new face of South African agriculture.
Everybody deserves to know where their food comes from. In South Africa this means getting to know a very diverse group of men and women who work the land, and turn the harvest into the nutritious products we buy at our local shops. Food For Mzansi’s mission is to tell the untold stories of the people work hard every day to put food on your plate.
The Farmer’s Inside Track channel publishes information exclusively for farmers and agriculturalists. On this channel we provide insight, advice and information to give South Africa’s growers the knowledge and opportunities they need to scale their businesses.
Related website AgriCareers.co.za informs, supports and inspires South Africa’s youth, proving that agriculture is more than just farming. The platform offers career guidance and introduces ordinary people to the many career opportunities available within the agriculture space.

Name: BOL News
Description:
BOL News is Pakistan’s # 1 News Channel. Having the largest and most trusted news team which comprises of learned media professionals and news analysts, BOL News aims to revolutionize the news media industry of Pakistan. With Ultra HD picture quality, 33+ studios, 200+ DSNGs, Pakistan’s largest data center and the best media management system, BOL News brings you the unique viewing experience. 
BOL News has network of bureaus and dedicated news reporters in more than 180 countries, complemented by news management system and archiving facilities to deliver you the latest news from around the world.

Name: Law.asia
Description:
Law.asia Limited is an independent B2B media company based in Hong Kong. Through our websites, videos, social media and print publications, we specialise in the provision of high-quality business law information, analysis and intelligence to Asia-focused in-house counsel, lawyers in private practice and senior business managers.

Our flagship products include Law.asia, a multilingual, multimedia platform that provides news, features and analysis on business law and legal services across the Asia-Pacific region. We also publish three market-leading magazines: Asia Business Law Journal (ABLJ), China Business Law Journal (CBLJ) and India Business Law Journal (IBLJ). With insightful reports, rankings and research data, the latest news on legal developments, law firm directories, videos and much more, we provide the intelligence that empowers business leaders to overcome legal challenges and implement best-practice risk management and compliance.

Name: Ciner Yayin Holding
Description:
Ciner Yayın Holding, grubun yazılı, görsel, işitsel ve dijital yayın alanlarındaki tüm stratejik kararlarını verir, hedeflerini belirler, yapılanma ve politikalarını planlar. 14 Eylül 2007 tarihinde kurulmuş olan şirket, Türk Medya sektörüne önemli katkılar sağlamaya ve her alanda öncü kuruluş olma fonksiyonlarını yerine getirmeye devam etmektedir. 

Medya ve yayıncılıkla ilgili her türlü gelişmenin ve yeniliğin takip ve kontrol edildiği ve gerektiğinde güncelleştirildiği, grubun yönetim fonksiyonlarının bütününü yerine getiren bir şirkettir. 

Türk medya sektörüne yeni bir ses ve rekabet ruhu kazandıran Ciner Yayın Holding, grubun genç, aktif ve yenilikçi anlayışını yansıtmaktadır. Holding kısa zamanda medya sektöründe çekim merkezi olmayı başarmıştır.

Name: GovCIO Media & Research
Description: GovCIO Media & Research is the preeminent digital publication covering federal technology. Headquartered in the Fairfax, VA, our team of journalists will ensure you stay informed on the latest trends and developments in government IT.

Name: DataLEADS
Description: DataLEADS is a globally recognized New Delhi-based award-winning digital media and tech company with a worldwide focus on information ecosystem, data research, media literacy, fact-checking, health literacy, infodemic management, and digital transformation

Name: Bonnier Publications A/S
Description:
Bonnier Publications creates media that help you make the most of your interests. Most of your lifestyle. Your DIY project. Your decor.

Our special interest media cover all that and much more. And they are always with you. On the go, on holiday and on the sofa. Every day.

That is why our media brands are some of the most beloved in the Nordics. You probably know some of them. Perhaps you have subscribed to Illustreret Videnskab, Costume, I FORM, Gør Det Selv, Scandinavian Living or Historie? 

We are driven by a journalistic ambition to create media that suit our customers' interests. Both today and tomorrow. As well as a commercial ambition to give our advertisers the opportunity to get their messages out in relevant contexts. The right contexts.

We have actually done this since 1959, when we started out in Denmark. We still have a base here, but many of our media brands can also be found in Norway, Sweden, Finland, the Netherlands and Germany. Some have traveled even further. Most are also published on many different platforms.

We are quite proud of that. But we are not done. Because we think everyone deserves to give their interests more space in life.

That is why we constantly strive to enrich our customers' lives and everyday life through special interest media in a league of their own. The very best in the Nordics!

So our media embrace many interests - and our media house gathers even more expertises. New talent is constantly being added in line with our digital transformation and the ambition to create the media of the future.

Name: Energynomics
Description:
Energynomics communication line is the most complex editorial project exclusively dedicated to the energy industry in Romania and in the region. It comprises the website, the printed Magazine, and the concept-events (Energy Breakfast Club, Spring Cocktail, Energy Strategy Summit, Energynomics Awards), as well as the special online projects like #Minutul de Energie, EnergynomicsTalks and #5ToKnow.

energynomics.ro is the sole online platform dedicated to the energy sector in Romania that serves both as news channel and business to business gateway. Updated hourly by our editors, energynomics.ro selects responsibly the daily news on the economic, political and legislative environment. By accessing the business profile link, you will find the perfect business partner suitable for your company’s needs.

energynomics.ro Magazine is the publication for the Romanian energy industry. Our mission is to offer information, perspective, profiles and networking to managers, specialists and engineers in Romanian energy industry, as they strive to make profit in a monthly-changing business environment. energynomics.ro Magazine is printed in 1.000 copies every three months and individually delivered to the managers and specialists in the Romanian energy industry.

Wing Media Energy Consulting is the publisher of energynomics.ro.

Name: girişimup
Description: Girişimcilerin bilgi anahtarı: Tavsiyeler, güncel haberler ve ilham verici içeriklerle dolu bir kaynak!

Name: Security Weekly Productions
Description:
Security Weekly Productions, A CyberRisk Alliance Resource, is the home of informative podcasts on information security, hacking, data breaches, and more! 

Shows include Paul's Security Weekly, Security Weekly News, Enterprise Security Weekly, Business Security Weekly, Application Security Weekly, Security & Compliance Weekly, Tradecraft Security Weekly and Secure Digital Life!

Name: Spandex
Description:
Spandex is one of the world’s leading suppliers of signage and digital materials, sign systems, displays, tools and equipment to the sign making, graphics, wrapping, textiles and architectural markets.
Since 1976, it’s been our business to provide complete solutions for businesses that produce signs and displays, digital prints, speciality graphics, vehicle wraps and many other forms of visual communication. With offices in 20 countries* and a broad product portfolio from industry leading brands, we offer our customers outstanding service, delivered by a team of experts. 
Spandex serves over 40,000 customers that rely on our broad range of solutions, professional advice and service.
For more information, please visit www.spandex.com

Name: ALYAUM Holding Group for Press, Printing & Publishing
Description:
ALYAUM is a Saudi group specialized in Press, Printing & Publishing. Offering Readers a combined content of editorial and advertising materials, and providing Advertisers with optimal advertising solutions, and presenting attractive mix to every reader by variety collections of our publications
such as:
- Daily newspaper (ALYAUM Newspaper)
- Weekly classified publication (ALMOBAWABAH)
- Seasonal issue, magazines & books.
Owning grand complex for press printing, and many branches around the Kingdom and all over the World.

Name: Bandish Studios
Description:
Bandish is a full-service creative, media agency and a production house, based in Pune, dedicated to producing outstanding content that engages, entertains and inspires. With years of experience in the industry, we have built a reputation for delivering high-quality work that surpasses expectations. We specialize in a wide range of creative services, including brand strategy, content creation, digital marketing, social media management and event production. Our team consists of writers, designers, producers, strategists and technicians, all working together to create exceptional content that tells compelling stories, sparks emotions and drives results. As a production house, we have the expertise and resources to handle all aspects of video production, from pre-production to post-production. We have state-of-the-art equipment and facilities that allow us to produce high-quality videos that captivate and engage. Our team of experienced producers, directors, editors, and cinematographers work together to bring your vision to life, ensuring that every aspect of your video is crafted to perfection.
At Bandish, we understand the power of storytelling, and we use our creativity and expertise to help our clients tell their unique stories in a way that resonates with their target audience. We think outside the box, come up with innovative ideas and execute them flawlessly. We are passionate about every project we take on and we approach each one with a fresh perspective, a keen eye for detail, and a deep understanding of our clients' goals and objectives. We value collaboration, communication, and creativity, and we work closely with our clients to ensure that every project we undertake is a success. Whether you are a small start-up or a large corporation, we have the skills and expertise to help you achieve your goals and stand out from the competition. At Bandish, we are committed to providing our clients with exceptional service and delivering outstanding result.

Name: The Bottle Yard Studios
Description:
The Bottle Yard Studios is the largest film and TV studio in the West of England.

11 stages are available for hire; eight at our main site and three at TBY2, our premium facility which opened in 2022 offering fully sound-proofed shooting space, powered by what is believed to be the largest community-owned solar rooftop array in the UK.

Floor areas of up to 22,000 sq ft and heights of up to 34ft provide endless opportunities for set builds. With a 5,000 sq ft green screen studio, 35,000 sq ft of furnished production offices and ample ancillary workspaces – plus 20 on-site companies delivering specialist industry services – we’ve got everything required for a fully supported shoot.

Recent productions to film at The Bottle Yard Studios include: The Outlaws (BBC/Amazon Prime Video), The Undertaker (RRB Films/DC Releasing), The Killing Kind (Paramount+), Rain Dogs (BBC/HBO), The Flatshare (Paramount+), Am I Being Unreasonable? (BBC), Dodger (Universal international Studios/BBC), McDonald & Dodds (ITV), The Beaker Girls (CBBC), Tipping Point (ITV), Andy’s Global Adventures (CBBC), Dino Club (Sky Kids), Chloe (BBC/Amazon), The Girl Before (BBC/HBO), Showtrial (BBC/HBO), The Last Bus (Netflix), Becoming Elizabeth (Starz), The Pursuit of Love (BBC/Amazon), The Salisbury Poisonings (BBC), The Trial of Christine Keeler (BBC), The Pale Horse (BBC).

Name: D+C Development and Cooperation
Description:
D+C. The global magazine on international cooperation

D+C is for everyone who wants to go beyond the news cycle. We tell the stories others overlook and amplify the voices that are too often missing: authors from the Global South, including experts from civil society, academia and politics. Because we believe that only by listening to the world’s full diversity can we shape its future.

Our journalism is fact-based and solutions-oriented. We don’t just analyse what has gone wrong – we explore how things can be made better. We show that sustainability and global development are about real change and aren’t just empty words.

D+C has a worldwide reach, yet we connect directly with our audience on the ground. With daily updates, newsletters, an e-paper, an app and a strong social media presence, we ensure our stories reach the people and places where they matter most.

From youth movements in East Africa to research institutes in Central America, from village communities in South Asia to the boardrooms of the World Bank: with contributions from more than 400 authors spanning all continents, D+C brings together voices from every corner of the globe. Our editorial team works closely with these contributors, ensuring that their voices are presented authentically and with the necessary cultural sensitivity and nuance.

THE EDITORIAL TEAM

Eva-Maria Verfürth, editor-in-chief
Jörg Döbereiner, managing editor
Dr Katharina Wilhelm Otieno, editor
Maren van Treel, social media editor
Dagmar Wolf, assistant
Isah Shafiq, student assistant


PUBLISHER AND FINANCING

D+C is funded by Germany’s Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development and published on behalf of ENGAGEMENT GLOBAL. The editorial team is tasked with covering the topics of global development and sustainability in a comprehensive, critical and thought-provoking manner and with providing a credible forum for debate for international contributors from diverse backgrounds.

Name: Indesign Media Asia Pacific
Description:
Indesign Media Asia Pacific is the first and only media company dedicated to architecture and design in the Asia Pacific region. Founded by Raj Nandan in Sydney in 1999, we launched with Indesign magazine, envisioned as an architectural publication that would be at once world class and local. The company has since grown to become a pillar of the region’s design industry, from our national emerging design competition Launch Pad to our international commercial design fair Indesign: The Event.

Today, Indesign magazine circulates in over 40 countries. CEO Raj Nandan sits on the Strategic Advisory Board of the International Federation of Interior Architects/Designers, the Advisory Board of Emergency Architects Australia, the Jury Panel of the red dot design award in both Europe and Asia, and is an Ambassador for Unlimited: Designing for the Asia Pacific.

Our stable of respected and popular architecture and design titles includes Indesign (2009 Folio Mag Award, Best Redesign), Habitus, Design Quarterly (DQ) (2011 Folio Mag Award, Best Overall Design, Best Redesign), Cubes, Lookbox Living and The Collection. Our online platforms include Indesignlive.com, Habitusliving.com, Careersindesign.com.au, Indesignlive.sg, Indesignlive.hk, Lookboxliving.com.sg and TheCollectionOnline.com.au. Our digital newsstand is Binder (2013 Australian Mobile Award), available from the App store.

Our experiential platforms include Indesign: The Event, formerly named Saturday in Design, held biannually in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Singapore and Hong Kong since 2003. We founded Launch Pad, national emerging design competition and mentorship program, held annually since 2004. Launch Pad Asia premieres in 2014.

We have partnered with every major architecture and design industry body and product supplier to curate unique content, and in our fifteenth year continue to represent, serve and celebrate the strong architecture and design network between Australia, Asia, and the Asia Pacific.

Description:
TurDef is committed to providing the most up-to-date, accurate, and independent insights into the global defence and aerospace sectors. While our expertise lies in Türkiye’s defence and aerospace industries, our reporting extends well beyond national borders, analysing the technologies, strategies, and market dynamics that shape the future of security worldwide.

Founded on the principles of impartiality, depth, and professionalism, TurDef delivers daily news, in-depth analyses, and exclusive interviews with leading decision-makers, industry executives, and defence experts. Our coverage spans the full spectrum of the sector — from land, air, and naval systems to space technologies, cyber security, and emerging domains such as artificial intelligence and hypersonic weapons.

TurDef also serves as a platform for connecting Türkiye’s growing defence industry with the global community. We highlight indigenous capabilities, export achievements, international partnerships, and research and development programmes, ensuring that our readers stay informed about the latest milestones and challenges in this fast-moving sector.

By combining journalistic rigour with industry expertise, TurDef has become a trusted source for policymakers, defence professionals, and academic researchers. Our editorial team actively follows international exhibitions, NATO and EU developments, and bilateral cooperation initiatives, providing context that links Türkiye’s achievements to the broader global security architecture.

Our mission is not only to report the news but also to contribute to informed debate about defence and aerospace. With this commitment, TurDef continues to strengthen its role as a reliable reference point for anyone seeking a deeper understanding of the defence ecosystem — in Türkiye, in its region, and across the world.

If in-Camera is involved, we plan and polish the virtual set to be ready for a seamless LED screen shoot.

- Producers & Production: Providing techvis that helps plan how you are going to shoot the project, and that takes into consideration the directors, production designers, and cinematographers vision.

- Studios: Introducing game workflows and IP to film, and vice-versa. Streamlining the integration of in-Camera VFX and other modern technologies.

Join us at Narwhal Studios as we explore the dynamic blend of traditional and interactive media. Reach out at hello@narwhalstudios.com if you're ready to create new stories or dive into virtual production, we're here to support and collaborate closely on your vision.

Name: UFA FICTION
Description:
Die UFA FICTION GmbH, mit Sitz in Potsdam, wurde im August 2013 gegründet. Hier werden die Top-Kreativen der deutschen Fernsehbranche unter einem Dach vereint und seit Jahren liefert die UFA FICTION dauerhaft Quotenerfolge und herausragende fiktionale Programme. Entstanden ist die UFA FICTION durch die Zusammenführung der UFA-Tochtergesellschaften teamWorx, Phoenix Film und UFA Fernsehproduktion im Rahmen des OneUFA-Prozesses mit dem strategischen Ziel, alle fiktionalen Produktionsaktivitäten im Bereich Reihe & Serie, TV-Movies, Events und High End Drama zu bündeln. Die Wurzeln der UFA FICTION erstrecken sich somit bis in die 1960er Jahre zurück, in denen die ehemalige UFA Fernsehproduktion gegründet wurde.

Die UFA FICTION verfügt über ein bemerkenswertes Portfolio an Produktionen, die die deutsche Fernsehlandschaft nachhaltig geprägt haben. Viele Produktionen waren nicht nur große Publikumserfolge, sondern wurden vielfach mit deutschen und internationalen TV- und Filmpreisen ausgezeichnet und ins Ausland verkauft. Dazu gehören unter anderem „Deutschland86“ (Amazon Prime Video), „Ku’damm 59“ (ZDF), „Der Junge muss an die frische Luft“ (Kino), „Nackt unter Wölfen“ (Das Erste), „Danni Lowinski“ (Sat.1), „Unsere Mütter, unsere Väter“ (ZDF), „Der Medicus“ (Kino) und „Ich bin dann mal weg“ (Kino). Die UFA FICTION steht für hochwertige TV-Events, darüber hinaus ist sie eines der führenden Unternehmen in der Entwicklung und Realisierung von quotenstarken und langlaufenden Krimi-Reihen und -Serien wie „Ein starkes Team“ (ZDF), „Donna Leon“ (Das Erste), „SOKO Leipzig“ (ZDF) und die seit über 40 Jahren erfolgreiche „SOKO München“ (ZDF).

Mit Standorten in Berlin, Köln, Leipzig, Ludwigsburg, München und Potsdam ist die UFA FICTION innerhalb Deutschlands weitreichend vertreten.

Â With extensive coverage on political and social issues, and neutral analysis on current affairs, Aaj News has always managed to be fair.

Building on the fair news reporting experience of the Business Recorder, AAJ News provides round the clock news coverage from around the world in collaboration with our partner news sources in more than 100 countries.

Aaj News has offices, studios and bureau across the country with state of the art studios, creative teams, technical and production facilities and news gathering.

Name: The Artists of Data Science
Description:
In his book Linchpin, Seth Godin says that "“Artists are people with a genius for finding a new answer, a new connection, or a new way of getting things done. That would be you.”

This is a podcast about data scientists, not so much about data science.

But more importantly, it's a podcast to help data scientists develop, grow, and flourish.

To help data scientists develop in their professional lives by talking to leaders about how to become leaders.

To help them in grow in their personal lives by talking to authors of books which are geared towards personal growth and development.

To help data scientists keep abreast of new happenings in the industry by interviewing authors of data science books.

To understand how data science affects industries by interviewing people in various domains and gaining their perspective on how our methods are helping or hurting.

To see the implications of ethics in our field, by interviewing philosophers and ethicists who write and speak on the intersection of AI, ML and ethics.

This is a podcast that will help break you, the data scientist, "out of the matrix”

Are you up for that?

Hit play on any episode, and let's turn you into an Artist of Data Science.

Name: Whakaata Māori
Description:
He kōrero mō Whakaata Māori. 
He wāhi motuhake tō Whakaata Māori hei tautoko i te whakarauoratanga o te reo me ngā tikanga Māori. I rewa i te tau 2004, he hua nō te whakaū a te Karauna i ōna haepapa hei tautoko i te rāngai pāpāho Māori hei whakatairanga i te reo me ngā tikanga Māori, he mārama ngā mahi a Whakaata Māori hei tautoko i ngā mahi whakarauora a te motu, e whakatinanatia ana i tēnei wā i raro i te Maihi Karauna (te rautaki whakarauora reo a te Karauna). Ka orua mai ko ngā mahi a Whakaata Māri i ngā hapori hei whakarauora i te reo Māori hei reo ora e kōrerotia ana e ngā whānau, ngā iwi, ngā hapū, ngā hapori reo Māori, ngā āpiti hoki puta noa i te motu. Ko ngā mahi ā-hapori nei ka whakatinanatia i raro i te Maihi Māori (te rautaki reo Māori a ngāi Māori, ngā iwi me ngā hapū). 

About Whakaata Māori
Whakaata Māori plays a unique role in supporting the revitalisation of te reo me ngā tikanga Māori. Launched in 2004, as a result of the Crown recognising its responsibility to support Māori broadcasting to promote te reo me ngā tikanga Māori, Māori Television plays a clear founding role in supporting national efforts in revitalisation, which today is captured in the Maihi Karauna (Crown strategy for te reo revitalisation). At the same time, Māori Television plays an important role supporting community-level efforts to revitalise te reo Māori as a thriving language used by whānau, iwi, hapū and te reo speaker communities and stakeholders across the country. These community-level efforts are expressed in the Maihi Māori (the Māori, iwi and hapū strategy for te reo revitalisation).

To see our Community Guidelines, please head here: https://www.whakaatamaori.co.nz/community-guidelines

The production catalogue includes almost 80 short classics as Obras, Flesh, Carlitopolis, Babioles, A Town Called Panic : The Christmas Log, Peripheria, Decorado and Logorama. Autour de Minuit is also increasingly working on features.

Heartbeats Studio er heartbeats.dk’s kommercielle hjerne og en del af Aller Media A/S. Vi udvikler og skaber in-house podcast- og videoproduktioner samt artikler til kunder, der vil formidle vigtige og originale budskaber. Og vi har gjort det siden 2014!

www.heartbeatsstudio.dk

Heartbeats.dk er et online livsstils- og kulturmagasin. Heartbeats skaber indhold med mening, mod og hjerte

Heartbeats møder alle mennesker fordomsfrit, og vi ønsker at nedbryde de mure, der i disse tider opbygges med så stor hast i både den fysiske og den digitale verden. 

Visse medier dyrker konflikt og problemer. Men Heartbeats har et positivt livssyn, og det er ud fra det, vi finder og videreformidler de historier, vi mener er vigtige – for den enkelte og for samfundet. Ikke fordi vi ønsker at forskønne verden. Tværtimod. 

Vi ser det som vores pligt at prikke hul på tabuer og putte ord på de fortielser, der ligger mellem mennesker. Vi hylder de modige mennesker, der vil dele deres personlige fortællinger med os og vores publikum, og vi går hele vejen for at give plads til de nuancer, deres historier fortjener.

Name: Bioneers
Description:
Bioneers is a fertile hub of social and scientific innovators with practical and visionary solutions for the world's most pressing environmental and social challenges. 

The shift is hitting the fan. In this time, we’re all called upon to be leaders. Bioneers connects people with solutions and each other to create a revolution from the heart of nature.

Our acclaimed national and local conferences are complemented by media outreach, including our award-winning radio series, The Bioneers: Revolution From the Heart of Nature. We serve as a source for media makers such as Leonardo DiCaprio’s film The 11th Hour and Michael Pollan’s best-selling book The Omnivore’s Dilemma. Our media materials are used in schools and curricula.

As a community of leadership, Bioneers acts as a media amplifier for many respected leaders, a hatchery for young and emerging leaders, and a connection point for engaged citizens dedicated to making a difference. As an interdisciplinary network of networks, we span the arc of the human endeavor to reconcile the interdependence of human and natural systems.

Our programs are:

·  Changing the Mindscape: Public Education & Media Outreach

·  Education for Action

·  Everywoman’s Leadership

·  Resilient Communities

·  Indigenous Wisdom

·  The Bioneers Community of Mentors

Bioneers illuminates the leading edges of transformational change and “the greatest people you’ve never heard of.” We provide a platform for communities of color, indigenous peoples and women leaders whose voices may seldom be heard elsewhere.

Now in its 28th year, the Bioneers conference (c. 3,000 people annually) is a perennial wellspring of cutting-edge content and dynamic, diverse voices that supply the primary source for our public education and media outreach a focal point to build community and collaboration.

Through research and development, we have found proprietary methodologies that allow for the capture, measurement and conversion of real-world material properties -resulting in hyper-realistic 3D models that are indistinguishable from reality. 

Our award winning team is comprised of creatives, engineers and academics, working together to solve the biggest technical challenges in the world of 3D production.

1920 is a visual effects post production facility based in central London and Bristol.

The London office has a boutique, home from home feel to it, whilst the Bristol office is a much larger, creative space.  The creative work will be shared between the two sites allowing us to take on more work through either location while keeping that intimate feeling in London.  Our aim is to be more cost effective and therefore better value, with the combined capacity of both offices no job is too big (or too small)

nineteentwenty was formed by producer Scott Griffin and Visual Effect Supervisor Ludo Fealy in 2013, with doors to the London office opening on the 6th of November 2013. You really are in safe hands.

Name: CXNet Official
Description:
CXNet Official is the definitive platform dedicated to advancing the art and science of Customer Experience (CX). As a comprehensive online hub, CXNet is committed to empowering CX professionals, business leaders, and organizations with the insights, tools, and strategies they need to create exceptional customer experiences that drive business success.
Our Mission
At CXNet, our mission is to be the leading resource and community for Customer Experience practitioners, enabling them to stay ahead of industry trends, innovate with the latest technologies, and implement best practices that elevate customer satisfaction and loyalty.
What We Offer
1.	Industry Insights & Analysis:
	CXNet provides in-depth analysis, research, and thought leadership on the latest trends and developments in Customer Experience. From the impact of AI and machine learning to the evolution of omnichannel strategies, our content helps professionals understand and navigate the ever-changing CX landscape.
2.	Expert Interviews & Case Studies:
	We bring you exclusive interviews with top CX leaders and influencers who share their experiences, challenges, and success stories. Our case studies offer practical insights into how leading organizations are transforming their customer experiences to achieve competitive advantage.
3.	Webinars & Events:
	CXNet hosts a series of webinars, virtual events, and live conferences that connect the CX community with industry experts and innovators. These events provide opportunities for networking, knowledge sharing, and learning from the best in the field.
4.	Resources & Tools:
	Our platform offers a wide array of resources, Whether you are looking to enhance customer journey mapping, improve CX metrics, or explore the latest CX technologies, CXNet has you covered.
5.	Community Engagement:
	CXNet fosters a vibrant and engaged community of CX professionals. Through our forums, social media channels, and interactive content, members can share their experiences.

At Forum Communications Company, our legacy is deeply rooted in harnessing the power of communication to connect and inform people in the communities we serve. Since 1917, everything we do is driven by creating and sharing information, ideas and insights.

Today, we’re a leading media and technology company that’s home to a family of people whose passion and purpose is fueled by collaboration and innovation. We believe in supporting each other, working hard toward common goals, and having fun.

Come for the perks: Excellent employee culture, competitive pay, comprehensive benefits package, generous paid time off (PTO), paid holidays and paid time off for your birthday, 401(k), company-paid volunteer time, health and wellness initiatives as well as paid parental and pregnancy disability leaves.

Stay for the people: Family-owned and operated since 1917. At Forum Communications Company you'll find development and growth opportunities, an inclusive and creative culture, and a safe working environment. You'll also work alongside employees of all ages and backgrounds, and engage in positive collaboration.

Arabian World Magazine bridges cultures and amplifies Arab narratives, reaching an impressive readership of over 700,000 engaged readers worldwide. With a strong presence in both the US and Dubai, we provide a platform that celebrates modernism, heritage, and the versatile stories of the Arab world.

Our expertise spans public relations, digital marketing solutions, and corporate events, making us a comprehensive partner for businesses looking to expand their footprint in the Arab region and beyond. Our tailored strategies not only enhance visibility but also adopt significant connections between brands and their audiences.

We believe that in this day and age, authentic storytelling is what matters most, and that is why we strive to promote the richness of Arab culture and the talented leaders and organizations that push forward and create. Through compelling content and strategic campaigns, Arabian World Magazine is dedicated to placing Arab voices at the forefront of global conversations.

What You will Get:
    • Amplified Brand Presence: A platform that amplifies your brand's story to a global audience, thus increasing visibility and recognition.
    • Cultural Impact: Connect with over 450 million Arabic speakers across the MENA region, showcasing your brand’s alignment with Arab heritage and innovation.
    • Tailored Marketing Strategies: Benefit from targeted strategies, with the UAE and Saudi Arabia leading the Middle East in digital adoption, offering high ROI.
    • Exclusive Industry Insights: Stay ahead with market trends, as 65% of Arab businesses are investing in digital transformation and innovation to drive growth.

Name: Strix Television
Description:
Strix Television is one of the leading TV production companies in Scandinavia, and is a respected international provider of original TV formats. The company has offices in Stockholm, Oslo and Amsterdam. 

Strix is a Fremantle company.
The company was established in 1988, shortly after the launch of TV3 Scandinavia, MTG:s first TV channel. Strix was then one of the first production companies in the market. 

Strix has a strong track record and a long list of merits. The company was in 1997 the first in the world to produce the format Survivor, thus paving ground for the establishment of the reality TV genre around the world. The company has since produced or co-produced the format for more than 20 countries. 

Furthermore, Strix has developed and sold original formats to over 80 countries, such as The Bar, Camp Molloy, Floor Filler and The Farm.

Name: Changement-Magazin
Description:
Die Veränderung ist zum Dauerzustand geworden und betrifft mittlerweile alle Bereiche im Unternehmen. Doch mit zunehmender Geschwindigkeit und der steigenden Komplexität fällt die Umsetzung in der Organisation immer schwerer. 70% aller Veränderungsprozesse scheitern – an starren Prozessen, an mangelnder Kommunikation oder an fehlendem Know-how für die Umsetzung von Change Management-Projekten.

Unser Fachmagazin changement! setzt genau da an: seit 2016 unterstützen wir mit fundiertem Wissen all diejenigen, die Veränderungsprozesse im Unternehmen begleiten, gestalten und managen. Denn Wissen und Erfahrungen zu teilen, ist in komplexen Zeiten wichtiger denn je.

Årsagen til at Mastiff deler navn med en trofast, romersk vagthund fortaber sig lidt i fortiden, men i dag er Mastiff er et af de førende produktionsselskaber i Danmark. Hvert år producerer vi mere end 200 timers indhold indenfor genrene; underholdning, lifestyle, reality, factual entertainment, reportage, børn og unge, og scripted comedy. 

Vi er kendt for både vores egenudviklede programmer og for vores særlige talent for at forfine udenlandske formater og gøre dem til danske seerhits. Vi gør en dyd ud af at levere store følelser og smukke billeder, hvad enten det gælder stor studieunderholdning med shiny floors eller spektakulær reality.

Mastiff er en del af Banijay Group; et globalt produktions- og distributionsselskab, der skaber indhold til alle platforme indenfor alle genre. Banijay har produktionsselskaber i 16 territorier og strategiske partnerskaber med kreativ talent i hele verden.

Name: 7iber حبر
Description:
حبر مؤسسة إعلامية ومجلّة إلكترونية، انطلقت من الأردن في عام 2007 كمساحة لإعلام المواطن تدار بشكل تطوعي، وتحولّت في عام 2012 إلى مجلة صحفية احترافية تنتج صحافة معمّقة متعددة الوسائط، وتحليلات نقدية، وحوارات عامّة، حول قضايا سياسية واقتصادية واجتماعية وثقافية وفكرية.

نؤمن في حبر بحرية التعبير وحق الوصول إلى المعلومة. ونسعى في عملنا لتكريس مبادئ المساواة والعدالة والحرية والتعددية وحقوق الإنسان، وتكريس دور الصحافة في مساءلة السلطة والخطاب السائد.

عندما انطلقت حبر في عام 2007 كمنصة لإعلام المواطن، تمت تغطية التكلفة الأولية للموقع من قبل المؤسسين. 
في 2009، تم تسجيل حبر كشركة ذات مسؤولية محدودة في الأردن باسم «شركة حبر للتدريب والتكنولوجيا»، وبدأت بتنفيذ مشاريع صغيرة مموّلة في مجال التدريب الإعلامي. في عام 2012، حصلت حبر على منحة دعم مؤسسي من مؤسسة المجتمع المفتوح، ساعدت في التحوّل إلى مؤسسة صحفية احترافية ذات فريق متفرّغ من المحررين والصحفيين ومنتجي الملتيميديا. منذ ذلك الحين، تعتمد حبر في دخلها على المنح والمشاريع، إضافة إلى مصادر دخل من تقديم الاستشارات والخدمات الإعلامية وخدمات التدريب. في عامي 2013 و2014، حجبت الحكومة الأردنية موقع حبر عدّة مرّات لكونه غير مرخّص وفق تعديلات قانون المطبوعات والنشر لعام 2012. نتيجة لذلك، ومع معارضتنا المبدأية لقانون المطبوعات والنشر ولشرط الترخيص الذي يشكل تقييدًا لحرية التعبير وحرية الصحافة سواء كانت ورقية أو إلكترونية، اضطررنا أن نقوم بترخيص الموقع من هيئة الإعلام الأردنية في نهاية 2014.

في 2019 و2020، داعمونا الأساسيون لغاية الآن هم مؤسسة دعم الإعلام العالمي IMS، ومؤسسة المجتمع المفتوح Open Society Foundations. نقوم كذلك بتنفيذ مشاريع بدعم من السّفارة الهولندية في الأردن، مؤسسة هيفوس Hivos الهولندية، أكاديمية دويتشه فيله الألمانية، والسفارة النرويجية في الأردن، كما ننفّذ مشروعًا بالتعاون مع مجموعة مواقع تعنى بالمنطقة العربية مع موقع مجلة أوريان 21 الفرنسية، بدعم من الوكالة الفرنسية للتنمية.

A Primetalk acredita no poder transformador da comunicação. O poder de cativar, engajar, informar, emocionar, conectar. Mas para isso a comunicação precisa ser surpreendente. Diferente.

Somos uma produtora de conteúdo audiovisual especializada em trazer vida à comunicação corporativa, tanto em iniciativas recorrentes (Canais no YouTube, Treinamentos e Cursos) quanto pontuais (Institucionais, Lives e Promocionais).

Somos aliados das empresas que querem inovar na forma como se comunicam, e entendem que pra isso é preciso fazer diferente. É fácil? Claro que não! Por isso somos diferentes. Nosso objetivo não é entregar um projeto. É FAZER HISTÓRIA.

نعمل مع فريق من الخبراء المتطوعين في عدة مجالات الذين يجيبون على استفسارات الطلاب والشباب الجزائري والعربي بصفة عامة من خلال "بورصة الأفكار". 

نتطلع إلى دعمكم ومساعدتكم لنا من خلال مشاركة قصصكم وانشغالاتكم لتقديم محتوى ملهم، أو التبرع لنا من خلال حساب بايبال أو رعاية برامجنا التي تقدم تدريبات مجانية للشباب والطلاب في مختلف المجالات. 

لا تترددوا في مراسلتنا والمساهمة معنا في تقديم المزيد من المحتوى الملهم.

Name: Bygge- & Anlægsavisen
Description:
Bygge- & Anlægsavisen har i over 30 år skrevet om det nyeste i bygge- og anlægsbranchen – hvem er med at til præge udviklingen, og hvilken nytænkning sker der i virksomhederne? 

Vi ser nærmere på de interessante byggeprojekter, og med fokus på byggeprocessen ønsker vi som medie at inspirere de udførende til at løse de enkelte opgaver bedre, optimere deres processer uden at give køb på kvaliteten samt at kunne rådgive sine kunder bedre om nye muligheder eller nye krav i bygge- og anlægsbranchen.

Vi skriver om de  løsninger til bygge- og anlægsprojekter, som er med til at sikre en effektiv byggeproces og et højt kvalitetsniveau, hvor alle krav er opfyldt. Hvilke nye lovgivningskrav er undervejs, hvilke certificeringsmuligheder er efterspurgte, og hvilken rolle kommer det til at spille for den enkelte virksomhed i byggeriet?

I Bygge- & Anlægsavisen ser vi på de mange bestanddele i en velfungerende byggeplads, hvor et godt arbejdsmiljø sikrer høj effektivitet samt et smukt og langtidsholdbart resultat. I den forbindelse tester vi sammen med vores håndværkerpanel nye varevogne, værktøj og udstyr, så man altid er opdateret med de vigtigste nyheder.

I dag er det at kunne rådgive sine kunder om forskellige muligheder og løsninger lige så vigtigt som at udføre selve arbejdet. Der er værdifuld inspiration at hente på tværs af fag og byggeriets gængse rollefordeling, og som udførende er det vigtigt at have en forståelse for ens egen rolle og potentiale.

Bygge- & Anlægsavisens mål er at levere ny indsigt – både på produkt- og brancheniveau.

Past Preservers is your Gateway to the World of Factual TV. 
Founded by archaeologists Nigel J. Hetherington & Kelly L. Krause, we provide expert consultancy and connect the media industry with a vast network of specialists across all areas of factual programming.
Our team includes leading anthropologists, archaeologists, art historians, biologists, historians, scientists, and many more, ensuring accuracy and captivating storytelling across a diverse range of subjects.
Through Past Preservers People, our boutique talent agency, we represent a comprehensive roster of on-screen experts and consultants. 
Whatever the factual topic, we have the specialist you need.

Name: SchreinerZeitung
Description:
Als wöchentlich erscheinende Fachzeitschrift zeigt die SchreinerZeitung alle neuen Entwicklungen in der Branche auf. Darüber hinaus bietet sie ihren Lesern zentrale Informationen für den beruflichen Alltag: Etwa Angaben zu Lieferanten und deren Produkten, wichtige Schreinertermine oder einen grossen Stellenmarkt.

Die Inhalte erscheinen auf zwei Kanälen, in der gedruckten Fachzeitschrift sowie auf www.schreinerzeitung.ch, wo die aktuellsten Fakten aus der Branche zu finden sind.

Die gedruckte Zeitung gilt als wichtigste Fachzeitschrift im Holzbereich. Die Hauptzielgruppe der SchreinerZeitung bilden alle Angehörigen der Schreinerbranche in der deutsch- sowie in der italienischsprachigen Schweiz. Dazu kommen die in der Holzindustrie tätigen Berufsgruppen.

Name: BusinessNow.mt
Description:
BusinessNow.mt is a full-blown business news portal backed by a large group of business editors, journalists, writers, digital marketing strategists, business development executives and a fully fledged creative studio. 

This pro-business news portal sees the world from the business perspective and strives to push a pro-business agenda. There are over a dozen local portals that target mainstream news, but BusinessNow.mt chooses to deliver constant business news, follow-up stories, exclusive business interviews, analyses, and debates on a daily basis. 

BusinessNow as a brand also incorporates a high-end quarterly business magazine. The BusinessNow brand is owned by Content House Group, one of Malta’s leading media players owning and managing over 20 successful media brands in online and print sectors.

Prisa Revistas edita algunos de los medios de estilo de vida más influyentes en España y Latinoamérica, como S Moda, Icon, BuenaVida o Tentaciones, tanto en sus versiones digitales como en papel, que acumulan una audiencia de 5,6 millones de contactos mensuales (Fuente: ARI 360º)
Su división de Branded Content, La Factoría, produce y gestiona contenidos para una treintena de clientes, entre otros Renfe, Acciona, BBVA, Caser Seguros, Eroski, El Corte Inglés, Altadis, Gas Natural, Transmediterránea, Cruz Roja, Mutua Madrileña, Amadeus, Renault, A.M.A y Correos.

Name: News Not Noise
Description: News Not Noise is a Webby winning, female-founded independent news outlet started by Peabody and Emmy award winning journalist Jessica Yellin. The growing brand is featured in InStyle’s Badass 50 2021 and Glamour magazine. The company is building a news brand across social media, dedicated to making the credible fact-based news accessible to a busy, digital audience. Exactly as the name states, we bring #NewsNotNoise.

Name: Ideas United
Description: We are a creative studio that works differently. Our in house team leads a global collective, providing our partners with work that is scalable, diverse, and uncommonly good. Together, we're changing the way stories are told.

Name: Connect India Japan -The Indo-Japan Collaborative Platform
Description:
Connect India Japan: The first-ever exclusive media house dedicated to India and Japan, featuring the bilingual magazine, the daily news portal CIJ Today, and the podcast (Yogannanupur), bridging the two nations.

Connect India Japan is both an emotion and a mission, aiming to connect these two beautiful countries—India and Japan—across 360 degrees, from spirituality to business.

Connect India Japan was born out of a deep emotion, reflecting the shared values and mutual respect between these nations. It’s a heartfelt journey to unite cultures, foster understanding, and celebrate the unique and enduring bond between India and Japan.

Name: Motor Presse Stuttgart GmbH & Co. KG

In addition to the successful print media core of the business, the Motor Presse has invested in and developed many additional multimedia offerings. Die Federführung für die laufenden Geschäfte des Kinderkanals von ARD und ZDF obliegt dem Mitteldeutschen Rundfunk (MDR).

Name: Rogue
Description:

Because we care passionately about everything we make.

We are creators and makers. We make the best, better. We believe in the transcendent magic of great film-making and we find, nurture and support our global talent in creating unique and powerful work.

Mvision c'est une équipe d'hyperspécialistes techniques qui a grandi au fil des années.  A ses débuts spécialiste en vidéo, Mvision propose aujourd'hui une offre globale de prestations audiovisuelles pour l'événementiel.

Location de studios de tournage  |  Location de matériel technique  | Prestation technique  |  Intégration sur mesure

Name: Collider
Description:
Collider is a creative collective based in Sydney, Melbourne, New Zealand and New York. 

We are a film production company and design studio that collaborates with artists, musicians and image makers to continually produce work that is authentic and raw, conceptual and thoughtful. 

We collaborate with brands big and small to inform, engage and inspire audiences.

Name: JOY FILMS
Description:
Joy Films was established in 1995 in London by the internationally acclaimed Director Mehdi Norowzian. It soon rose to great heights and attracted Ridley Scott whose company RSA took an interest and Joy@ RSA was formed.
In 2008 Joy Films started its operations in Dubai and Beirut. 
Today Joy Films is one the most creatively driven productions houses with the highest standards and ethics, delivering great result with great efficiency and economy. Our international standards and local knowledge combined with a highly experienced team are our greatest assets.

Name: Erasmus Magazine

Name: The Executive Magazine
Description:
The Executive Magazine is the quintessential news brand for the modern HNW & UHNW business executive, offering an exquisite blend of business news and luxury lifestyle content. Through its distinctive and elegant design, contributions from prolific business figures, and a collective of top-tier writers, The Executive Magazine captivates an audience of over 470,000 distinguished subscribers. 

Created as a singular resource that addresses the diverse interests of today's busy professional, The Executive Magazine is refined and insightful. This comprehensive approach eliminates the need for juggling between multiple sources, offering a curated blend of topics such as business news, automotive reviews, finance, fashion, ICT & cyber security, luxury travel, marketing & communications, fine dining, technology, and health & well-being, plus much more. 

The Executive Magazine stands as a beacon of style and sophistication, and by intertwining the essence of B2B news with luxury lifestyle content, we enable our audience to save precious time and resources, allowing a concentrated focus on what truly matters.

Through its pages, the magazine transcends conventional content, offering a sophisticated narrative that caters to both the professional and personal interests of modern leaders, embodying a narrative that's both astute and affluent.

Subscriptions are reserved for Directors and C-Suite Executives, and all applications are subject to a verification process. This allows us to maintain the highest level of exclusivity.

Name: Select VFX Studio
Description:
Select VFX brings world-class visual effects to Episodic TV, Films, and Commercials. It is owned and run based on the three core values that guide everything we do: Client, People, and Society. 


Our goal is to provide greater opportunities to every qualified person.

Select VFX consistently provides the highest-quality experience to all our clients for any VFX outsourcing needs, including Tracking, Matchmove, Rotomation, Rotoanim, Comp, Roto, Paint/Prep/Clean-up, and Beauty Fixes, at the best discounted budget by meeting client deadlines and scope expectations on any volume of work.

At Select VFX, we have successfully delivered many of the best projects for International clients on feature films, episodes and TV commercials. Our studio is certified by TPN Gold, Warner Bros, Paramount Pictures, Lionsgate and Amazon Studios.

For more details, please visit our company website www.selectvfx.studio

To experience an amazing career with growth and respect, write to us at careers@selectvfx.studio

For VFX outsourcing needs, please write to us at business@selectvfx.studio

Name: Marketing thinking
Description:
Somos una media company con una misión clara: ayudar a marketers y CEOs de empresas tech & startups en Hispanoamérica a hacer marketing B2B más efectivo.
