Name: PS 260
Description:
PS260 Since 2002, the visual storytellers at PS260 have provided best-in-class and award-winning Creative Content Development, Production, Editorial, Post-Production, Visual Effects, Graphic and Audio solutions across all viewable platforms. 

WE ARE A TEAM of directors, editors, producers, designers, animators, musicians, martial artists, and friends. We are masters of our individual disciplines, blending knowledge, technique, science, data, and artistic acumen to create emotional connections with audiences.

Our work has been seen on televisions, in theaters, hung on walls, and played through speakers. We’ve edited Netflix series, SNL shorts, music videos, documentaries, and commercials for brands big and small. 

We have offices in New York, Los Angeles, and Boston as well as work remotely all over the world.

Our diverse, specialized and seasoned team collaborates with clients to create stories that are thought provoking, inspirational and timeless. This dedication to our craft has been recognized year after year by top tier industry accolades and honors, including Sundance, Cannes, Ciclope Grand Prix, Clios, AICP Best of Show, Effies, the London International Awards, as well as by platforms like YouTube and its prestigious Ad of the Year award.

Name: Australian Traveller Media
Description:
Founded in 2005, Australian Traveller Media began with a simple idea: to inspire Australians to see their own country. 

Australian Traveller magazine quickly became the country’s best-selling travel title; followed by the launch of sister title International Traveller in 2012 to cater to the outbound Australian traveller, covering every corner of the globe.

We have a reputation for excellence in travel writing and photography and a fierce dedication to sound and independent advice. 

Our vision is a world where every journey is an incredible one. Our mission is to connect people to their incredible experiences through our outstanding and inspirational content.

Name: Manufacturing Today
Description:
Now more than ever, manufacturing companies and suppliers need to keep abreast of all the key trends that are shaping the manufacturing world. Global supply chains, disruptive technology, lean manufacturing and outsourcing are just a few of the new management approaches helping make manufacturing and its extended supply chains more competitive and easier to communicate with.  

Manufacturing Today magazine offers senior executives a unique combination of successful business change case studies and real-world management advice, put together in a non-technical, management based, well-designed format – making it useful, practical and easy to read.

Name: Bulgarian National Television
Description:
Bulgarian National Television (BNT) is Bulgaria's public TV.
It was founded in 1959. Its official launch was on December 26 of the same year.

Presently BNT operates on the basis of the Law for Radio and Television from 1998. It is a national public broadcasting station. It has four regional centers situated in the cities of Blagoevgrad, Varna, Plovdiv and Russe. Since July 19, 2001 BNT has been a licensed nationwide communication operator and TV broadcaster with its Channel 1 as well as the regional stations’ programs – “Pirin”, “More”, “Plovdiv” and “Sever”.

During the past several years BNT programs won prestigious awards at Prix Danube Festival (Slovakia), the Golden Vityaz (Russia), Prix Nike (Portugal), Prix Jeunesse (Germany), Prix CIRCOM, Golden Albena (Bulgaria), Bar (Montenegro), Golden Cairo Film Festival (Egypt), Golden Rose (Switzerland), etc. BNT also regularly participates with own programs in numerous international festivals such as Japan Prize, Monte Carlo International TV Festival, Thessaloniki International Festival for TV Documentaries, International TV Festival for short-feature films in Oberheim (Germany), the International Documentary TV Festival in Cracow (Poland), the FIAT International Festival for archive materials, The Golden Prague International Festival, PRIX Italia, etc.

BNT is an active member of the European Broadcasting Union. It is also a member of the following international organizations: EGTA, IMZ, CIRCOM Regional, FIAT and BBLF.

Name: DJIBLIVE TV
Description:
La société  Djib live avance chaque  jour un peu plus pour s'équiper et répondre  aux besoins de ses abonnés en informations fiables, de source sûre  et instantanée. Dans un monde où  les technologies de l'information et de la communication  permettent  l'info de circuler à grande vitesse, notre  priorité  est de  vous satisfaire. 

#DjibLive est une société de production audiovisuelle et de communication et  couvre l’événement national et Internationale. #Djiblive a été invite à couvrir l’événement de la conférence Internationale sur le développement de l’Afrique (Ticad7) qui a eu lieu à yokohama du 28 au 30 Aout 2019. - Nous assurons la couverture de votre événement en temps réels, avant et après sa durée sur les réseaux sociaux. Constituée des meilleurs jeunes créatifs actuellement sur le marché. Valoriser la communication de  son  événement, sa marque ou de son entreprise par des photos, vidéos et publications de qualité est une démarche à ne pas négliger.
                                            

Avec #Djiblive  suivez l'actualité  du pays partout  où  vous êtes.

Name: F+W Media, Inc.
Description:
F+W, A Content + eCommerce Company 

Connecting passionate, like-minded groups of people to share an ongoing exchange of information, ideas, and inspiration. We strive to offer the most complete--online, offline, anytime--customer experience for enthusiasts in all our communities including art, craft, writing, design, outdoors and more. And to offer the most targeted products and services--books, eBooks, magazines, digital magazines, events, ecommerce, online education, streaming video / DVDs, eBook subscription sites--for those who are as passionate as we are about our hobbies and special interests. 

We are committed to providing the very best experience for our consumers across our niche categories – craft, art, writing, design, outdoors, and lifestyle. We offer exclusive programs and products, Best-in-Industry Customer Service (100% Guaranteed), Curated Kit Flash Sales, Rewards and VIP programs, personalized 1-to-1 marketing, and more. 

It’s a spirit of innovation, digital-first mindset, and dedication to our consumers which allows us to continually reinvent our Company--and our legacy product portfolio--to meet the needs and wants of today’s consumer. The greatest asset of any organization is its people. And the talents, energy, and creativity of our employees are unrivaled. We reward and foster innovation and entrepreneurship focused on a singular mission: to serve our Consumers and our Communities. Our passion shines through in what we do.

Name: Eureka Productions
Description:
Eureka Productions is a leading global production company specialising in unscripted entertainment across broadcast, streaming, and digital platforms. Established in 2016, Eureka has developed a diverse portfolio of original formats and adaptations that have resonated with audiences worldwide.
Original formats include Holey Moley (ABC), Luxe Listings (Amazon Prime), Dating Around (Netflix), Stars on Mars (FOX), Full Bloom (HBO Max), and soon to be released Wonka’s The Golden Ticket (Netflix) and the international music competition KPOPPED (Apple TV+). Eureka has also adapted and produced popular franchises incl The Floor (FOX and Nine Network) The Mole (Netflix), Farmer Wants a Wife (FOX and Seven Network), The Amazing Race Australia (Network Ten), and Australian Idol (Seven Network). 
With headquarters in Los Angeles and Sydney, Eureka Productions continues to expand its global footprint by weaving engaging stories that captivate audiences and meets the evolving demands of the entertainment industry.

Name: Aerospace Global News
Description:
Aerospace Global News exists to support and connect the international aerospace, defence and space sectors – providing essential news, knowledge and insight to propel industry globally.

We act as a catalyst of change and believe in the power of connecting people through events and partnerships that inspire the pioneers of today and tomorrow.

Aerospace Global News is one of the fasting growing media outlets in aerospace and gives voice to the thought leaders, business disruptors and influencers that will manifestly shape our future.

Name: ZT Production
Description:
ZT Production est une société basée à Montpellier (34) spécialisée dans la production de contenu multimédia et ayant notamment une expertise dans le domaine des WebTV et Vidéos Gaming. contact : dach@zerator.tv

Elle développe et édite des jeux vidéo indépendants depuis Janvier 2016.

Elle produit également la WebTV "ZeratoR" qui diffuse du gaming en direct sur Twitch et des replays sur Youtube.

Name: ICON Media Communications Inc.
Description:
ICON Media, a division of ICON Digital Productions Inc, is a display media consulting agency with a design-build consultative approach specializing in customized digital signage solutions. Our in-house team of creative multimedia designers, digital integration strategists, audio visual specialists, IT consultants, and field technicians provide full end-to-end solutions including consulting, content design and development, hardware and software procurement, project management, and network management. 

Since our inception in 2005, we have evolved into one of the leading display media consulting agencies in North America. Through continuous research and development, we have been able to utilize the newest forms of technology to help transform spaces and bring our clients’ messages to life in the most unique ways imaginable. We are supported by our 80,000 square foot technology facility based out of Toronto, Canada, which features a state-of-the-art innovation center and a 24/7 Network Operations Centre providing content scheduling, monitoring, and support services to our client installations across North America. Our impact on the visual communications industry can be seen through our wide array of corporate and retail clients. Boasting one of the best client rosters in our industry, we continue to push the limits of digital and interactive technologies giving us a strong foundation for developing effective digital content strategies.

Name: HubSite 365
Description:
HubSite 365 - All about Microsoft 365, Microsoft Azure and other IT related news.

Focussing on  News,  Events,  Knowledge - Building and maintaining modern portal solutions.

Name: ANSATA - Professional Audio
Description:
We are a technology company providing products and solutions in the field of Professional Audio. The transition of audio technologies from analog to digital about a decade ago, presented a unique opportunity for growth, both for our customers and the industry as a whole paving way for world’s leading Digital Audio brands and technologies to enter India, helping to shape our presence here.

Our on-going efforts in education and training along with world class service delivery made it possible for most of our customers to get familiar with industry trends & technologies, and upgrade the quality of their productions to global standards.

Headquartered in Bengaluru, our company has branch offices in all major cities around India.

Name: TBNR Productions
Description:
TBNR (The Best Never Rest) was founded by the trailblazing Content Creator, Preston Arsement (known widely as PrestonPlayz) in 2012 with his first YouTube channel and has been growing nonstop ever since. As a result, in 2023 TBNR was approved by YouTube as the first Creator-owned MCN (multi channel network). Today, this MCN - “Fire MCN” - gets an average of 40 million views per day. In the past 18 months TBNR has evolved from an explicitly YouTube content production house to a global disruptor in social content and human communication. 

We at TBNR are a group of skilled CREATORS coming from a variety of backgrounds including content creation, music, theater, coding, architectural design, movie and television set construction, tech and VC startups, professional gaming, video game development, and beyond! 

We believe in RADICAL CANDOR which means honest and constructive feedback towards ourselves and others, even if it might be uncomfortable or critical. We foster an environment where open and honest feedback is not only accepted, but encouraged for our employees and leadership to achieve their highest potential. We believe challenging each other is the only way to be the BEST. 

TBNR has an innate desire to spread positive messaging and cares deeply about the kind of content and products that we popularize with our videos, merchandise, and game development. We are seeking passionate CREATORS with a love for human collaboration through supportive competition to join us in the FIRE movement revolution - we will not REST in our efforts to push the needle of humanity forward in a meaningfully, positive direction!

Name: Večernji list
Description:
Večernji list je medijska kuća osnovana 1959. godine, a danas je dio austrijske medijske kuće Styria Medien AG.

Novinska redakcija od prvog dana ulaže maksimalne napore kako bi svojim čitateljima dostavila najnovije i najtočnije informacije, stoga je davne 1999. godine pokrenula prvi news portal u Hrvatskoj, Vecernji.hr.

Konstantan razvoj kroz godine učinio je Vecernji.hr multimedijskim portalom, a 2010. godine pokreće Vecernji.ba te time brend Večernji list postaje relevantno mjesto informacija na području Balkana.

Redizajnom portala 2023. godine Večernji list dobio je modernizirani izgled koji je uz jednostavno korištenje omgućio bolje iskustvo u pronalasku najvažnijih i najnovijih vijesti.

Pridružite nam se na našem putu da vijesti učinimo dostupnima svima posvuda!
Constant development through years made Vecernji.hr a multimedia portal and in 2010. Vecernji.ba started and with that the brand Večernji list became relevant place of information in the Balkan region.

By the end of 2013. the big redesign of Vecernji.hr happened and it become first news portal in responsive design available on all platforms: desktop, mobile and tablet. 
Join us on our journey of making news available to everyone everywhere!

Name: Netfarma
Description:
O NETFARMA é um portal destinado a todos os profissionais do setor farmacêutico e estudantes de Ciências Farmacêuticas. Pretendemos ser um instrumento de trabalho e formação, assim como um ponto de encontro para todos aqueles que desenvolvem a sua atividade neste setor.

Aqui encontra ATUALIDADE nacional e internacional; as ENTREVISTAS mais pertinentes; a OPINIÃO de quem pensa o setor, assim como alguns artigos técnicos e profissionais.

Através do MyNetfarma, damos “voz” aos profissionais do setor, pois estes podem publicar os seus próprios conteúdos: Notícias, Artigos de Opinião, Eventos/Iniciativas, Investigação e ainda Oferta ou Procura de Emprego.

Temos ainda à sua disposição uma AGENDA sempre atualizada com toda a informação sobre os eventos mais importantes da área da saúde e da farmácia, informação sobre as nossas revistas FARMÁCIA DISTRIBUIÇÃO e MARKETING FARMACÊUTICO, FARMÁCIA CLÍNICA, LIVROS e todas as nossas INICIATIVAS.

Qualquer conteúdo deste Portal é facilmente partilhado e comentado, permitindo uma maior interação entre os seus utilizadores.

Através do NETFARMA pode registar-se na nossa E-Newsletter FARMANEWS e receber, semanalmente, a informação mais relevante do setor na sua caixa de correio eletrónico.
Para além destas edições, a Hollyfar dedica-se também à edição de E-newsletters e Portais (Portal Netfarma em www.netfarma.pt, Portal Viver Saudável em www.viversaudavel.pt e as E-Newsletters semanais Farmanews e VSnews) dirigidos aos vários profissionais de saúde, bem como à organização de eventos e iniciativas como os Prémios Almofariz e o jogo de gestão Game of Farma; ações de formação para farmacêuticos como as Farma Sessions e eventos como as Conferências MF Talks dirigidas aos profissionais da Indústria Farmacêutica. A edição de livros para profissionais de saúde é outra das áreas desta empresa.

Name: Digital Brew
Description:
Digital Brew is a multi-Emmy motion graphics design studio that believes in forming connections through visual storytelling.

Inspired by your ideas and goals, we craft explainer videos, commercials, documentaries and just about any type of video your company needs.

From small business brand development to the most cutting-edge motion graphics and design, we form valuable partnerships and achieve real results.

Visit us at www.digitalbrew.com.

Name: Africa Mining & Engineering Review
Description:
Welcome to Africa Mining and Engineering Review, your reliable source of trending insights into cutting-edge technologies, innovative practices, and transformative developments shaping the continent's mining and engineering landscape.

With a keen focus on delivering authoritative analysis and comprehensive coverage, our magazine serves as a vital resource for industry professionals, researchers, and enthusiasts alike. From the latest advancements in mining machinery to sustainable engineering solutions, we offer a diverse array of articles, features, and interviews crafted to inform, inspire, and provoke thought.

Name: The Hechinger Report
Description: The Hechinger Report is an independent, nonprofit newsroom. We publish stories and documentaries about inequality and innovation in education. Our in-depth journalism uses research, data and stories from classrooms and campuses to show the public how education can be improved and why it matters. You will find many of our stories in the pages of the nation’s biggest newspapers, magazines and websites and on the air of its most prominent broadcasters. That’s because we provide our work to them for free, to increase awareness about the important stories our journalists are reporting. You can also find all of our stories at our website, a deep repository of some of the best journalism about education.

Name: JAMM
Description:
JAMM is an independently owned, artist-driven visual effects studio known for delivering exceptional creative. Founded in 2014 by established industry veterans Asher Edwards, Jake Montgomery, and Andy Boyd, the studio offers a powerful combination of innovative artistry and advanced technology, collaborating on complex productions that come to life with 2D and 3D visuals, and precise color finishing. The JAMM team builds and maintains trusted long-term relationships by providing nimble strategic guidance at every turn, and an unwavering commitment to quality. Over the years, the team’s work has earned notable industry accolades, including the Grand Prix (Cannes Film Festival), VES Awards, Emmy Awards, D&AD Pencils, AICP Honors, Clio Awards, and ADDY Awards, among others.

Name: Fremantle Netherlands
Description:
Fremantle Nederland is onderdeel van Fremantle, één van ’s werelds grootste televisieproducenten. Per jaar creëert, ontwikkelt, produceert en distribueert Fremantle ruim 12.000 uur aan programma’s, en meer dan 70 formats in meer dan 30 landen. Er worden wereldwijd meer dan 400 door Fremantle ontwikkelde en geproduceerde programma’s uitgezonden. Ook is Fremantle een wereldleider in digital en branded entertainment, met meer dan 370 miljoen abonnees op 1500 socialmediakanalen en meer dan 100 miljard views op alle platformen.

Fremantle Nederland bestaat uit producenten Blue Circle en No Pictures Please, die zich richten op televisie en online content, en dramaproducent Fiction Valley.

Name: MarketOpen
Description:
MarketOpen is a digital media and events business supporting ASX-listed and growth companies in communicating effectively with investors and market participants.
Founded in Perth during the pandemic by experienced Western Australian investors with backgrounds across the Australian, British, Canadian and US markets, MarketOpen is led by Managing Director Stewart Walters. The business was established to address the gap between formal market disclosure and sustained investor awareness.
Through its flagship platform MarketOpen.com.au and an expanding digital distribution network, MarketOpen provides coverage of ASX-listed and global mining, energy, technology and biotech companies. Content is designed to extend the life of company announcements, ensuring key messages remain visible beyond the initial market release.
MarketOpen produces original written, video and podcast content, including interviews with Managing Directors, CEOs and board members. These are complemented by in-person Investor Sundowner events and online Direct Connect webinars, facilitating structured engagement between company leadership, brokers and investors.
MarketOpen’s core capability lies in amplifying market-sensitive information through coordinated, multi-channel campaigns that are controlled, compliant and aligned with listed company communication standards. We work closely with management teams to ensure messaging accuracy while improving consistency, reach and long-term investor visibility.

Name: kompas gramedia group of magazine
Description:
Gramedia Majalah (also known as Kompas Gramedia Group of Magazine) always keeps up with the trend. Thus, we enter the digital world in 2019 with our new name, Grid Network. Grid Network is now the hub for all news, entertainment, and lifestyle enthusiasts from every corner of Indonesia.

We have a goal to inspiring and entertain 270+ million people in Indonesia through our media products. From children to adults, from employees to stay-at-home moms, and from automotive to food enthusiasts, all can find their favorite content on our sites.

Almost 60 years later, we still thrive to hold our position as the leading multi-platform digital media covering news, entertainment, and lifestyle for 85 millions of enthusiast readers in Indonesia per month. Also, we want to keep inspiring enthusiast people and become their homebase media in Indonesia. We are The Enthusiast Hub.

Name: Universal Media Co
Description:
Universal Magazines is now Universal Media Co. 

Universal Media Co is home to more than 15 industry-leading media brands, which reach an audience of more than 5 million people across Australia. Every day, our expert teams produce and publish high-quality content across print, online, social, video, mobile and email platforms to attract millions of customers, users and readers in markets including home renovating, women’s health, natural health and living, craft, action sports, pets and more. Our extensive portfolio of more than 40 magazines proudly contains some of Australia’s highest-selling and most-loved titles including Grand Designs Australia, WellBeing, Home Design, Australian Country and Outdoor Design Source. 

Universal Media Co is a leader in digital innovation and the company’s newest division, UM Labs, was launched in 2016 to develop exciting new online-only businesses at the intersection of technology and media.  

Our busy teams are filled with talented and creative individuals who are experts in their fields, which include journalism, creative writing, social media, design, technology, sales, marketing and support roles. This ensures we meet our daily mission of connecting audiences with world-class content, whenever and wherever they want it. 

To find out more, visit umco.com.au

Name: Catorce Comunicación S.L.
Description: Catorce Comunicación es una productora audiovisual independiente fundada en 2006 por Nico García, especializada en entretenimiento para televisión, medio ambiente, acción social y cultura. Catorce ha recibido entre otros el premio Ondas, la Antena de Oro, el premio Zapping, el Canal+ o el FesTVal. En algunos de ellos tiene que ver el programa Aquí la tierra, una mirada divertida y pedagógica sobre nuestro planeta que lleva una década en la televisión pública con una gran aceptación. Televisión Española, Cuatro, Telemadrid, Aragón Televisión o À punt son algunas de las cadenas con las que la productora ha trabajado.

'The Brand Called You’ is a Media Tech global platform that brings you Leadership Lessons, Knowledge, Experience, and Wisdom from leading personalities from diverse backgrounds, who have contributed significantly to making the world a better place.

If you are a school student, a fresh graduate, an aspiring entrepreneur, or anyone who wishes to make a difference in the world using their expertise and passion, this podcast is for you. 

'The Brand Called you' will help you broaden your perspective, and provide you with insights and experiences that you can learn from and apply to your own mission.

Converse with the brightest minds from the world of business, technology, professionals, and, the social sector. Stay in the know as we talk to entrepreneurs, thought leaders, and high achievers worldwide. 

Listen to the individuals who are moving and shaking the World with their words, thoughts, deeds, and actions.

Our podcast is now available across all digital platforms.

TBCY Digital Pvt Ltd is a company promoted by Ashutosh Garg, who brings 4 decades of experience as a successful corporate professional and an entrepreneur. Ashutosh is also the Founder of Guardian Pharmacy and eQuation Coaching. He is supported by a strong and committed team of young technology professionals.

2d animation studio based in La Cartoucherie (Valence France)
Skills: Graphic research, storyboard, 2D layout, 2D digital animation (Toonboom and TV paint), coloring, 2D special effects, compositing
Pipeline: Harmony, TV Paint

Doing beautiful things and doing them well:
Making children's eyes shine is a vocation but it's also our job. At Ooolala we are proud to make beautiful pictures and to realize beautiful projects.

Art and manner:
Thanks to our great team, we control the whole production chain. We assure you a tailor-made accompaniment and a realization in the rules of art, from the beginning to the end. Unbelievable but true: we deliver on time and on budget.
Far away from the hustle and bustle but in the heart of the animation.

Name: African Climate Stories
Description:
African Climate Stories is reimagining how Africa thinks, talks, and acts about climate change. 

We use storytelling, art, and interactive media to turn eco-apathy into action. Through our Fellowship, Festival, and Flip Campaign, we bring together storytellers, creatives, and communities to “flip” harmful habits into desirable sustainable behaviours.

We believe culture drives behaviour, and stories shape culture. Join us as we transform climate concern and environmental sustainability into collective action, one powerful story at a time.

Name: Irresistible Studios
Description: Irresistible Studios is home to three specialist, award-winning, production studios, covering the full spectrum of film and image requirements for brands and record labels.

Name: Tourism News Africa
Description: Welcome to Tourism News Africa, your premier destination for critical insights and captivating features within the Tourism, Travel, Aviation, and Hospitality industry across the vibrant African continent.

Name: Food On Demand
Description:
Food On Demand’s mission is to cover information and news at the intersection of Food, Technology & Mobility. Topics include restaurant meal delivery, prepared meals in supermarkets, food trucks, subscription meal kits, institutional dining, plus the industries that support all these different businesses, from packaging to technology, legal matters to financial issues. 

In addition to a monthly e-newsletter, Food On Demand maintains an online blog, hosts webinars and produces an annual conference. All of this is designed to bring together key players in the industry and promote education, growth and business deals from within the mobile ordering and delivery community. 

The Food On Demand team has 30 years of experience hosting successful events. We have built long-term relationships with restaurant operators, technology companies and industry experts from all over the country. We specialize in putting together events that educate our attendees, plus help to facilitate our sponsors in generating business at the events.

Name: Open Planet
Description:
Open Planet is an ever-growing, free visual library for creating impact on a global scale. Bringing together powerful footage and world-class science to enable everyone, everywhere, to tell the story of our changing planet. 

We’re working with a global network of collaborators, filmmakers, organisations, scientists and local experts to share the major environmental issues facing our world, and the game-changing solutions and innovators aiding its recovery.

All content featured in the Open Planet library is free to use for educational, environmental and impact storytelling.    

Open Planet is an independent Community Interest Company, also known as a social enterprise. It was created by Studio Silverback, award-winning filmmakers for impact, in partnership with Carnegie Mellon University’s CREATE Lab, creators of interactive, data-driven stories about our planet using the EarthTime platform.

Name: Good Vibes Entertainment LLP
Description: Good Vibes Entertainment LLP is a young video and film communication house with a vision to evolve with an exclusive and smooth process of planning and flawless execution. Revolving around its philosophy of producing a perfect package from conceptualising scenarios, script writing, and storyboards to finally executing with sound creative abilities and technical skills, Good Vibes aims at thinking out of the Box.

Name: The Global Recruiter - The independent voice of the staffing industry
Description:
The Global Recruiter is an independent innovative Media Company providing our clients with creative business solutions through publishing services, sales partnerships, digital solutions and engaging events. 

Established in 2002, The Global Recruiter formerly known as Recruitment Consultant Magazine prides itself on providing balanced journalism, accuracy and news and features for all involved in the business of recruitment from around the world. We are a leading monthly title across the Recruitment sector, distributing to the UK and Europe, Asia-Pacific, Australia and New Zealand, Dubai, India, and Pakistan.

Our contributors vary from the CEOs of the largest global staffing organisations to the leaders of industry bodies, the relevant government departments, and expert business commentators.
Editorial policy is keenly focused on promoting positive aspects of the industry, first-hand involvement in raising standards and perceptions of the staffing sector and providing insightful and entertaining news and features. The mercurial nature of the sector means the constantly shifting landscape needs more than passing editorial attention, especially on the international stage.

News in the magazine is supplemented by our news by email service, sent directly to subscribers’ desktops three times a week to keep them abreast of the latest market developments.

The Global Recruiter is essential reading for everyone who is serious about the business of recruitment. 

The Global Recruiter also hosts large-scale summits and industry awards in the UK and Asia Pacific.

There are many ways you can contribute editorial to the magazine and website and we publish articles from all sizes of business. If you have a news story you think would be of interest to our readers or have written a letter for our consideration then please contact the editor at editorial@theglobalrecruiter.com stating 'News' in the email title.

Name: eKapija
Description:
eKapija je vodeći poslovni portal u Srbiji, Bosni i Hercegovini i Crnoj Gori. Pored pregleda najnovijih vesti i izveštaja, eKapija pruža i ekonomske analize, berzanske izveštaje, najave novih investicija, pregled najnovijih tendera i pobednika tendera, kao i sveobuhvatan registar poslovnih i pravnih lica.

Sve informacije korisnicima su dostupne putem sajtova www.ekapija.com (www.ekapija.rs) - sa kojeg se vesti prevode i na engleski i na nemački jezik, ba.ekapija.com, me.ekapija.com, kao i putem elektronskih biltena koji se dostavljaju na e-mail adrese pretplatnika. Dnevni poslovni bilten eKapija prilagođen je specifičnim zahtevima svakog korisnika i sadrži informacije koje se izdvajaju kao relevantne za poslovanje korisnika. Zamišljen kao B2B servis, portal eKapija predstavlja efikasnu platformu za razmenu informacija među poslovnim subjektima.


Šta smo postigli od 2005. godine?

* Više od 20.000 korisnika sistema (najuticajniji ekonomski internet portal u regionu).
* Kontinuiran rast broja pretplatnika iz godine u godinu.
* Prosečna čitanost – više od 1.150.000 pregledanih dokumenata na mesečnom nivou.
* Korisnici nam veruju, jer je koeficijent obnove pretplate veći od 87%.
* Prosečna godišnja produkcija dokumenata: 46.000 vesti i izveštaja, 190.000 tendera.
* Broj privrednih i pravnih subjekata u našoj bazi: više od 430.000.
* Regionalno prisustvo vidimo kao bitnu odrednicu daljeg razvoja: osim poslovanja u Srbiji, u BiH i u Crnoj Gori, pripremamo nastupe i u drugim zemljama regiona.

Name: 365247 Sports

Name: @FoodClicks
Description:
FoodClicks, het cross mediale platform voor de out-of-homemarkt
 
FoodClicks zorgt dat voor u relevant nieuws en marktontwikkelingen tot u komen via verschillende media. Hierbij wil FoodClicks, met hulp van een groep experts, het nieuws voor u duiden zodat duidelijk wordt wat het voor u kan betekenen.
 
Hiermee helpen wij u om makkelijker keuzes te maken welke bijdragen aan uw succesvolle bedrijfsvoering.
 
FoodClicks werkt met Focus Velden, zodat de verschillende categorieën binnen de out-of-homemarkt, gericht worden besproken en u de voor u relevante handvatten kunt destilleren.
 
Centraal uitgangspunt voor FoodClicks is welke toegevoegde waarde de informatie levert voor ondernemers of managers in foodservice. Nieuws wordt vertaald naar kansen of aanbevelingen om u van allerhande informatie te voorzien die binnen uw bedrijf voor meer omzet kunnen zorgen.
 
FoodClicks geeft bewust ruimte aan duiding van nieuws en ontwikkelingen, vanuit de relevantie voor haar lezers. Hierbij maakt zij gebruik van experts die in staat zijn het nieuws op relevantie te toetsen en die de (sectoren binnen) out-of-homemarkt snappen en kennen.

The digital media landscape is constantly evolving and so is RUN Studios. With deep expertise in motion graphics, design, video production, and live-event coverage, we create compelling 2D, 3D, and digital content that engages audiences and elevates brands.

We also provide creative staffing, connecting top-tier editors, designers, animators, and producers with companies looking for project-based or long-term talent.

From social-first storytelling to corporate content, we blend artistry with strategy to deliver high-quality, on-brand work, that fits with your schedule and budget. Name: Finance World Magazine
Description:
The Finance World is a leading finance magazine of MENA that provides all the latest updates happening across all the business sectors of the Middle East and worldwide. manufacturing & retail, mergers & acquisitions, healthcare, education, travel and so on.

Name: Miss Moneypenny
Description: Miss Moneypenny ist die führende Fachzeitschrift für Assistenzen und Personen im Office Management in der Schweiz. Bei uns finden Sie Checklisten, Fachartikel, Blogbeiträge, Weiterbildungen, Stelleninserate, Branchen-News, und Meinungs-Beiträge rund ums Thema Office Management.

Name: bauelemente bau
Description:
Mit der Fachzeitschrift "bauelemente bau" stellen wir als Verlag für Fachpublizistik GmbH all denjenigen ein umfangreiches Informationsmedium zur Verfügung, die beruflich mit Fenstern und Türen, Fassaden, Toren, Rollläden und Sonnenschutz sowie den dafür notwendigen Komponenten (Holz-, Kunstsoff- und Aluminium-Profile, Beschläge, Isolierglas, Produkte zur Montage und Abdichtung, etc.), und Maschinen beruflich zu tun haben. Darüber hinaus berichten wir über die Aktivitäten der relevaten Branchenverbände.

Und das nicht erst seit gestern: Die Betrachtung der Branche entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette im Fenster- und Türenbau findet sich in unserer Fachzeitschrift schon seit der ersten Ausgabe im Januar 1976 wieder.

Die langjährige Erfahrung der Redaktion in Verbindung mit dem engen Kontakt zu den wichtigen Unternehmen der Branche sowie den Verbänden und das dabei aufgebaute Vertrauensverhältnis sind die Basis für ein Hintergrundwissen, das nötig ist, um die Themen aufzugreifen, die für die Leserschaft von Bedeutung sind.

Name: MigogAalborg
Description:
MigogAalborg blev lanceret i maj 2016 som Aalborgs første bymedie.

I dag tæller vi +96.000 følgere på Facebook, hvilket er vores primære medie for eksponering, over 35.000 følgere på Instagram samt 1.000.000 besøg på vores website om måneden, hvoraf 510.000 er unikke.

Vores målgruppe spænder bredt i hele Nordjylland og er primært mellem 25 og 45 år. Vi har altså en bred rækkevidde, som med fordel kan anvendes til at hjælpe din virksomhed til eksponering for den rette målgruppe. Både i Aalborg, men også resten af Nordjylland.

Vores organisation er sammensat af en stærk redaktion med kompetente og dygtige skribenter, som hver især har deres fokuspunkter og en professionel forståelse for, hvordan den enkelte virksomheds historie skal fortælles. 

Udover MigogAalborg har vi MigogAarhus, MigogOdense og MigogKBH.

Vi forstår at kommunikere i øjenhøjde med læseren og har, siden vores opstart i maj 2016, haft stor succes og fremgang med vores moderne og innovative tilgang til journalistik.

Vi mener, at Aalborg fortjener fokus. Dette på både events, spisestider, samt alle de ildsjæle, som skubber byen i den rigtige retning. Vores mission er at skabe dette fokus med et stort overblik, gennemsigtighed, og et resultat, der efterlader os og kunden med følelsen af stor værdiskabelse.

Description:
The Knowledge Review is committed to changing the face of education through innovative media solutions. Our tagline, "Education. Innovation. Success," empowers educational leaders & institutions by shining a light on their successes & valuable insights that shape the future of education.
As one of the top media houses, we focus on popularizing leading figures & organizations in the education sector. Our flagship magazine is an important reference source for professionals & enthusiasts in the education sector. Every edition showcases the inspiring stories of education leaders and institutions which demonstrate excellence & innovation. We dig into their success stories, providing actionable insights & best practices that inspire & inform businesses engaged with or impacted by the education sector.
With a growing community of more than 2,50,000 print subscribers & 3,50,000+ professionals from the education sector, The Knowledge Review is at the forefront in being placed as a true thought leader & industry-updating medium. Our goal of achieving high-quality content not only engages our readers but provides a collaborative platform where ideas blossom.
In addition, we are committed to providing our experience & expertise in public relations, so leaders and institutions of learning may better speak & communicate their mission, making them better reach out into this sector. We look into analyzing unique challenges and opportunities that education encounters & make our approach cater to what they require best. We deliver effective brand-building and audience engagement strategies, as well as the means of amplifying impact within a community, through strategic communication & targeted outreach to educators and institutions.
Join us for this noble pursuit of celebrating visionaries in the education sector. This bright future that everyone dreams of will only be powered by education, innovation & shared success.
Let's connect and find out how we can contribute to education!

With a focus on innovation, clarity, and effectiveness, RedNovius is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of medical education and communication. 

Join us on our journey to illuminate the medical world, one visual at a time.

Name: Blockchain News (EST 2015)
Description:
Blockchain News is building a must-read, premiere news brand focusing not just on blockchain technology and cryptocurrency markets—but also on the culture and personalities of the industry.

Name: HrTurizam.hr
Description:
HrTurizam.hr is Croatia’s leading professional tourism portal, founded and edited by Goran Rihelj, one of the most influential voices in regional tourism media; it is a trusted source for tourism professionals, policy makers and industry leaders seeking insights into global tourism trends, sustainable destination development and tourism strategy. 

The platform has received numerous industry recognitions, including the Anton Štifanić Award for outstanding contribution to Croatian tourism, inclusion among the 75 Most Innovative Organisations in Tourism Policy by UNWTO and apolitical, the Marko Polo Award, Simply the Best Award, and recognition as one of Croatia’s Top 50 most followed LinkedIn users in 2022. HrTurizam also initiated the Croatian Tourism Days in Slavonia, is a signatory of the Glasgow Declaration on Climate Action in Tourism, and a member of both the Smart Destination network and FIJET Croatia. More than a media outlet, HrTurizam is a strategic tool, compass, and community dedicated to shaping a sustainable and meaningful future for tourism.

Description:
The Bundesliga, Germany's top football league, fascinates millions of fans every week. Recognizing the importance of a strong digital presence, the Deutsche Fußball Liga GmbH has established its subsidiary, DFL Digital Sports GmbH (DFL DS). Located in the bustling city of Cologne, this subsidiary boasts a team of over 80 employees and a network of talented freelancers, all working together to create and distribute digital content across owned & operated platforms.

At DFL DS, innovation and excellence are at the forefront of everything we do. The company is divided into four key departments: Product & Technology, Content & Media Production, Business Operations and Design & Branding. These departments work in harmony to bring fans an unparalleled digital Bundesliga experience, connecting them to their favorite teams like never before.

Name: 6AM City
Description:
6AM City is the fastest-growing local media company in the U.S., reaching millions daily with the most relevant, need-to-know news and events through newsletters, social media, and more. It has become a trusted, brand-safe platform delivering uplifting, hyper-local coverage of events, development, culture, and city life. Unlike traditional outlets, 6AM City prioritizes positivity and engagement, strengthening communities by helping people understand how they can invest their time, talent, and treasure locally.

6AM City is redefining local media with its newsletter-first approach designed for the next generation of news consumption, powered by a game changing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) distribution model.

6AM City’s expertise in process automation, audience development, content curation, distribution, and monetization has also fueled the launch of 6AM City’s Newsletter Studio—an end-to-end platform now powering brands, publishers, and niche communities across the country.

What sets us apart is our team. We’re a fully remote group of passionate, curious, and committed individuals with backgrounds spanning legacy media, tech startups, and everything in between. We thrive on pace, performance, and impact — and we’re just getting started.

At 6AM City, we're building communities driven by conversation and designed to activate and inspire. If you’re energized by a fast-moving environment and want to help shape the future of media, we’d love to meet you.

Notre modèle élimine les étapes et la lourdeur structurelle des modèles traditionnels en rapprochant l’idée de la réalisation. En d’autres termes, nous exécutons chaque mandat de A à Z, sans intermédiaires avec tous les spécialistes assis à la même table. 

Pas de détours, pas de pertes de temps, on réunit tous les services sous un même toit.

Attraction, c'est créer, produire et rejoindre.

Name: Great British Chefs
Description:
Great British Chefs is the UK’s leading premium food website, combining online content with e-commerce and publishing of recipe books for a global audience of aspirational home cooks and professional chefs. Our community of epicureans is super niche, enabling our brand partners to connect with their core target audience in a compelling and precisely targeted way.

Our mission is to create an ever deeper, more dynamic and better connected community of the world’s most aspirational food lovers, best-in-class brands, and our unrivalled network of premium chef talent.

We have a loyal and core following as evidenced by our recently launched Great British Chefs Club that is creative, competitive, engaged, aspirational and hungry to learn new skills, techniques and explore new products, kitchen gadgetry and world cuisines.

To cater for such an aspirational audience we create distinctive premium content including best in class recipes, chef-fronted video content, cooking guides, in-depth editorial and the latest chef and restaurant news. Our branded editorial digs deeper to find a compelling truth and a connection between our chefs and our brand partners’ products.

Our platform is viewed by over 20 million users per year and has a highly engaged social media following in excess of 1m. We proudly attract a diverse, multi-cultural and gender-balanced audience across the UK and English speaking world. 

Great British Chefs partners with over 200 of the most passionate and progressive chefs working in the UK, building meaningful partnerships with brands that deliver continuously against their objectives.

Name: Farmers Guide
Description:
A total of 30,721 farms have requested to receive Farmers Guide.
 
Farmers Guide’s in-depth and topical arable pages are written by our expert contributors and editor, Rachel Hicks. They cover a vast range of technical news, on-farm experiences and agronomic advice – including weed, disease and pest control, soil management, sustainable farming practices, innovations in plant breeding, and other areas of interest to the arable farmer.

Our respected livestock section reaches an impressive number of farms and covers a diverse range of topics – from animal health and nutrition, to shows and events, to machinery and more.

Our livestock editor Sarah Kidby covers livestock shows, conferences and on-farm visits, and works with a team of experts to bring livestock farmers the latest advice each month.
Each issue includes extensive technical coverage of agricultural machinery and equipment, written by our machinery team including award-winning machinery contributor, David Williams and machinery reporter, Daniel Hodge. National and international machinery launches, exclusive on-farm user stories, auctions and open day reports are included every month.

The magazine also contains the UK’s largest agricultural classified section.
Farmers Guide is proven to be a trusted technical publication, having been in print since 1979. The magazine is sent free and direct to named decision makers – farmers or farm managers – who have requested to receive the magazine, with a minimum of 40ha of farmed land and/or 50 head of livestock, or 10,000 poultry. On average, our readers have 228ha of land.

Our circulation of 30,721 is audited by the Audit Bureau of Circulations (ABC), giving our advertising clients peace of mind that the magazine is delivered directly into the hands of the right people.

Name: COOL HUNTING
Description:
SINCE 2003 OUR ORIGINAL CONTENT HAS INFORMED AND INSPIRED THE CREATIVE COMMUNITY THAT’S DESIGNING THE FUTURE

COOL HUNTING is an award-winning independent publication that uncovers the latest intersections of design, culture and technology. We are a team of writers and editors whose curiosity fuels an ongoing quest for the discovery of true inspiration. We leverage our access, insights and knowledge not only to find this, but also to share it with you.

We believe:
- in quality over quantity
- in showing, not telling
- in being trusted, yet unpredictable
- there are no new ideas, just great executions
- we can be an authority, but still remain curious
- we know a lot, but it’s a-ok to say “I don’t know”
- creativity and innovation most often exist at both the high end and the low end
there’s enough negativity on the internet, so if we don’t like something we simply don’t write about it
- coolness comes in three forms: surprising, sustainable and superficial; we only care about two of those
 -“cool” is subjective
- if we are paid for presenting content on behalf of a partner that we not only try it out first, but we ALWAYS label it as sponsored. If you don’t see that label it’s editorial

Name: PRX
Description:
Celebrating more than 20 years as a nonprofit public media company, PRX works in partnership with leading independent creators, organizations, and stations to bring meaningful audio storytelling into millions of listeners’ lives. PRX is one of the world’s top podcast publishers, public radio distributors, and audio producers, serving as an engine of innovation for public media and podcasting to help shape a vibrant future for creative and journalistic audio. Shows across PRX’s portfolio of broadcast productions, podcast partners, and its Radiotopia podcast network have received recognition from the Peabody Awards, the Tribeca Festival, the International Documentary Association, and more, including in 2022 when Futuro Media and PRX won a Pulitzer Prize. Visit PRX.org for more.

Our values drive us forward and are instilled in the work of PRX every day: 
Courage - We believe in risk. 
Humanity - We believe in respect. 
Opportunity - We believe in access. 
Purpose - We believe in a better world. 
Equity - We believe in diversity. 

We are also committed to creating an anti-racist organization, one where all employees can be their true authentic selves, are treated fairly and with dignity, and where diverse perspectives and voices are valued and respected.

Mit mehr als 10 Millionen Besucher:innen / Monat ist Utopia.de (https://utopia.de/ ) das führende Online-Angebot in diesem Bereich.

Mit UTOPIA: values (https://utopia-values.de/) richten wir den Blick mit unserer Expertise auf Unternehmen. UTOPIA: values ist die Beratung für Nachhaltigkeitskommunikation von Utopia. Wir unterstützen nachhaltige Marken und verantwortungsbewusste Unternehmen, ihr Nachhaltigkeitsengagement glaubwürdig zu kommunizieren. Wir stehen für ganzheitliche Nachhaltigkeitskommunikation, die Marken positioniert und Transformation vorantreibt.

UTOPIA: content (https://utopia-content.de/ ) ist die Manufaktur für Nachhaltigkeitsinhalte. Wir haben langjährige Erfahrung, wie man mit zielgerichteten Inhalten Reichweite schafft. Auf dieser Basis konzipieren, kreieren und distribuieren wir maßgeschneiderte Nachhaltigkeitsinhalte für Unternehmen und Marken.

Um auch den internationalen Markt thematisch zielgerichtet abzuholen, kümmert sich unser Team um UTOPIA.org (https://utopia.org/), um Nachhaltigkeitsthemen in englischer Sprache.

Grupa ZPR Media to jedna z najdynamiczniej rozwijających się grup medialnych w Polsce. Obecnie jest jednym z największych wydawców prasowych, nadawców radiowych i telewizyjnych oraz właścicieli serwisów internetowych.

Do Grupy ZPR Media należą magazyny o tematyce budowlanej, wnętrzarskiej, podróżniczej, żeglarskiej i zdrowotnej, a także gazeta codzienna „Super Express”. Miesięcznik „Murator”, będący jednym ze sztandarowych magazynów Grupy, od ponad 30 lat jest niekwestionowanym liderem na rynku prasy budowlanej. Do Grupy należą także tytuły o tematyce zdrowotnej: „Zdrowie”, „M jak mama”, oraz miesięczniki hobbystyczne: „Żagle”, „Podróże”, a także wydawnictwa customowe i publikacje książkowe.
Grupa ZPR Media inwestuje w rozwój nowych technologii. Zarządza 45 serwisami internetowymi skierowanymi do odbiorców indywidualnych i profesjonalistów, a także prowadzi projekty e-commerce.
W skład Grupy ZPR Media wchodzą także stacje radiowe: Radio ESKA, Radio Eska ROCK, Radio VOX FM, Radio WAWA i Radio Plus. Radio ESKA to największa sieć lokalnych rozgłośni radiowych, od wielu lat bezsprzeczny lider pod względem słuchalności wśród młodzieży. 
Od kilku lat Grupa ZPR Media konsekwentnie inwestuje w projekty telewizyjne i fonograficzne. Kanały muzyczne Polo TV i Eska TV są liderami w swoich grupach docelowych, skutecznie walcząc na polskim rynku z zagraniczną konkurencją. W 2014 roku uruchomiono pierwszy polski kanał edukacyjno-poznawczy FOKUS TV, a także kolejną telewizję muzyczną VOX Music TV.
Do Grupy ZPR Media należy IDMnet – internetowy dom mediowy, specjalizujący się w realizacji kompleksowych działań z zakresu marketingu internetowego. Jest pionierem w tej dziedzinie i skutecznie działa na rynku mediów interaktywnych już od 1997 roku. 
Grupa ZPR Media prowadzi także działalność eventową w zakresie organizacji imprez, koncertów, festiwali, a także targów i szkoleń.

Name: NTB
Description:
NTB er et uavhengig, norsk nyhetsbyrå. Våre redaksjoner følger nasjonale og internasjonale nyheter døgnet rundt. Hver dag leverer våre journalister og fotografer redaksjonelt innhold til nærmere 200 medier. Vi har i over 150 år vært en sentral aktør i norsk offentlighet.

Samfunnsoppdraget vårt er å gi kundene rask og pålitelig oversikt over de viktigste nyhetene. Vår journalistikk er underlagt Vær Varsom-plakaten.

NTB er i front med innovativ teknologiutvikling for mediemarkedet, som robotjournalistikk og digitale tjenester.

Bildearkivet vårt inneholder historiske bilder tilbake til 1800-tallet og representerer Norges visuelle nyhetshukommelse. Med 400 millioner bilder, videoer og nyhetsgrafikker er vi Nordens største bildebyrå.

Vi tilbyr mange ulike språk- og kommunikasjonstjenester til organisasjoner, offentlig sektor og næringslivet, som distribusjon av pressemeldinger, oppdragsfoto og skrivekurs.

Name: Rendair
Description:
Rendair AI is an all-in-one AI rendering platform built for architects and designers.
Create high-quality images, edit renders, upscale outputs, and generate videos, all from a simple user friendly interface.

We help professionals move from idea to final visuals in minutes, not days.
No complicated setup. No external tools. Just fast, reliable results.

Used daily by thousands of architects, studios, and creators around the world.

Name: Advance Local
Description:
Advance Local Media is one of the largest media groups in the United States, which operates the leading news and information companies in more than 20 cities, reaching 52+ million people monthly with our quality, real-time journalism and community engagement. 

As home to some of the nation’s top local media groups, software and data platforms, and marketing agencies, Advance Local strives to make a positive and lasting impact in the communities we serve. A company grounded with rich history and driven by creative innovation, Advance Local’s mission is to strengthen and empower the communities we serve. Our media groups include Advance Ohio, Alabama Media Group, Advance Media New York, MassLive Media, MLive Media Group, NJ Advance Media, PA Media Group, and Staten Island Media Group.

We believe in our brands, our values, and each other and are united by our shared goals, culture of creative innovation and commitment to our communities we’ve been serving for more than a century. 

We're part of Advance, a private, family-owned business that owns, operates and invests in companies spanning media, entertainment, technology, communications, education and other promising growth sectors. Their mission is to build the value of the company over the long-term by fostering growth and innovation across their diversified portfolio. Advance’s portfolio of exceptional companies includes Condé Nast, Advance Local, Stage Entertainment, The IRONMAN Group, American City Business Journals, Leaders Group, Turnitin, and POP. Advance is also among the largest shareholders in Charter Communications, Warner Bros. Discovery and Reddit.

For more details, please visit AdvanceLocal.com.

Description:
80six is a leading video technology rental company providing high end equipment and world-class technical solutions for live entertainment & concert touring, virtual production, film & TV drama, broadcast, (e)sports and corporate events.

Our team is comprised of some of the best industry professionals, from project managers to video system engineers, producers, visual effects artists and creatives. 80six drives technical innovation and leads from the front.

From LED screens to cameras, video control systems to real-time video content creation, we invest time and resources into the R&D of emerging technologies which enables our team to deliver complex and stunning creations time and time again.

Introducing Virtual Production Studios by 80six (VPS) ➜ www.virtualproductionstudios.com   

 VPS is an 11,743 sq ft. multi-purpose black box studio with bespoke LED stages and the latest real-time technologies (camera tracking, game engines, media servers) for delivering in-camera VFX (ICVFX) or xR (extended reality).

Whether you're a visionary filmmaker, a creative director, or a tour manager, our versatile and flexible studio model has got you covered. Even if you don't need real-time workflows, the studio can be used for various productions that use LED Technology.

•	Production Rehearsals 
•	Commercial 
•	Music Videos 
•	Film & TV drama

Name: Nerd For Tech
Description:
Who are we?

Nerd For Tech is an Educational Media House.  Our mission is to bring the invaluable knowledge and experiences of experts from all over the world to the novice.

It's an ecosystem in which people connect and share ideas and thoughts.
We're attempting to reinvent the learning process because we firmly believe in and actively promote collaboration.

Our Story

We began as a Medium publication to empower writers by allowing everyone to share their knowledge and experiences through articles.

Then we created a podcast series called "The Tech Ketchup Show." Where professionals around the world share their expertise and work experiences with the rest of the world. Listen to our podcast collection on YouTube and Spotify.

We're currently developing a new set of processes that will allow professionals and novices all around the world to participate and get the most out of it.

Name: Mighty Media Studios
Description:
Creative videos and live event broadcasts for leading technology-based brands and those that want to be. Our services include:

MIGHTY LIVE VIDEO PRODUCTION
Microsoft, CES and Xbox trust Mighty with their global, enterprise-level live broadcast video productions–year after year. We produce mission-critical shows for featuring: guest panels, video roll-ins, live gaming, live demos, keynotes, remote interviews, interactive Q&A...and engineered success.

MIGHTY CREATIVE SERVICES
Harness our mastery of 3D visualizations, augmented reality (AR), and art direction to create digital sets and  immersive experiences that captivate and engage. Elevate your content with visual innovation that leaves a lasting impression and sets you apart in the high-tech landscape.

MIGHTY MARKETING VIDEO PRODUCTION
Masters in the art of the promotional  mini-documentary, our business is advancing your business. Promos, demos, campaigns, fundraisers, culture-changers, keynotes, testimonials, BTS, explainers--and thought leadership videos. Because we like to lead with thought.

MIGHTY ACCESSIBILITY
 Expand your audience with American Sign Language (ASL) and Foreign Language Interpretation (FLI). With care and sensitivity, we coordinate up to 100 ASL pros and simultaneous FLI in multiple languages.

MIGHTY  MANAGED STAFFING
Expand your video production capacity with our talented professionals. We've been sourcing and managing top talent for LinkedIn, Xbox, and Microsoft for over a decade.
 
Let’s create Mighty Experiences together.

A world-class content creator specializing in formats and character-driven programming, High Noon Entertainment develops, sells and produces across all unscripted genres for broadcast and cable networks, both domestically and internationally.  With offices in Denver and Los Angeles, High Noon's busy production slate includes Fixer Upper (HGTV), Good Bones (HGTV), Cake Boss (TLC), Dude You're Screwed (Discovery), and Trip Flip (Travel).  In the last year, the company partnered with fifteen networks, produced more than 30 series, pilots and specials and delivered over 200 hours of programming. 

High Noon Entertainment is part of ITV Studios, a world leader in television production and distribution. In the UK, ITV is the leading commercial broadcaster and producer. ITV Studios has international production centers in the UK, Germany, France, the Nordics and Australia as well as America. The distribution business, ITV Studios Global Entertainment, sells programs and formats to all regions worldwide. ITV Studios Global Entertainment’s consumer products division covers home entertainment, publishing, merchandise and licensing.

Name: Editora JBC
Description:
A Editora JBC celebra seus 30 anos de história no Brasil como uma das principais referências no mercado de mangás. 
 
Com a missão de estreitar a distância entre Brasil e Japão por meio da leitura, a JBC foi fundada pelo empresário Masakazu Shoji, que tinha como objetivo informar e acolher os brasileiros que se mudavam para o Japão, no início do movimento dekassegui. Inicialmente com a publicação do Jornal Tudo Bem e mais tarde com o lançamento da revista Made in Japan.
 
A empresa firmou-se no Brasil a partir de 1995 dedicando-se à difusão da cultura japonesa com a publicação de livros e mangás, que podem ser encontrados nas principais livrarias e lojas especializadas de todo o Brasil. Em 2022, a JBC passou a fazer parte do Grupo Companhia das Letras, atuando como o selo de publicações de mangás e cultura japonesa do maior grupo editorial do Brasil.

Name: ARD-Hauptstadtstudio
Description: Das ARD-Hauptstadtstudio in Berlin ist die erste Adresse in Deutschland für Nachrichten zur Bundespolitik. Rund 70 Korrespondentinnen und Korrespondenten aus allen Landesrundfunkanstalten beliefern aus dem ARD-Hauptstadtstudio täglich die Redaktionen der ARD in Fernsehen, Hörfunk und Online mit Nachrichten, Interviews, Hintergrundinformationen und Kommentaren zu bundespolitischen Themen aus der Hauptstadt. Das ARD-Hauptstadtstudio ist eine Gemeinschaftseinrichtung der neun Landesrundfunkanstalten der ARD.

Name: After Party Studios
Description:
We started AFTER PARTY STUDIOS in 2016 as an excuse to put a bunch of people with good ideas in a room together. Not much has changed since then, except that room has grown from a windowless basement under a coffee shop in East London, to a studio bursting at the seams with talented folk who love making stuff the world has never seen before.

We sit at the rendezvous of mainstream-meets-digital. Ask around AFTER PARTY STUDIOS and you’ll find a lot of our inspiration draws on traditional media and the golden era of advertising. To us, a job well done means a simple concept, work that permeates into mainstream culture, and making stuff that gets clipped up and turned into a meme or sent in a Whatsapp group chat.

Name: Blur
Description:
CONTRARIO is born from an almost instinctive way of understanding creativity: an obsession with what is different, what challenges, what breaks expectations and moves deliberately against the standard.

It is a rebellious attitude — the drive to push boundaries and swim against the current, not for provocation, but because we don’t know, and don’t want, to do it any other way.

With Latin roots and a global ambition, CONTRARIO is more than a name: it is a statement of identity, character, and creative intent to the world.

Name: Women In Journalism
Description:
For 30 years Women in Journalism has been supporting, inspiring and campaigning for women in our industry. We are a not for profit organisation that also provides guidance and support for our members. Our committee and members are from diverse social and ethnic backgrounds, at different careers stages, working across all platforms around the UK and overseas.

• The UK’s leading networking, training and campaigning organisation for women journalists
• More than 900 active members, 1,400 on our database and 17,000 Twitter followers
• Committee members are some of the UK’s most high-profile women in media
• Busy online and real life events programme with top industry talent at seminars, talks and parties
• Mentoring scheme for 100+ women every year
• Venues include House of Commons, City and Westminster universities
• Annual £4k award for innovative digital projects

Amid a rapidly evolving techscape, ON&T is dedicated to connecting readers, contributors, and advertising partners with what’s next.

Name: TNZPV Productions & Studio
Description:
Tu Nous ZA Pas Vus est une société de production audiovisuelle implantée à Arles, en région PACA. Elle a été créée en 2010 par quatre associés aux parcours professionnels complémentaires, issus à la fois du cinéma dit "classique" et du film d'animation. Tu Nous ZA Pas Vus possède d'ailleurs son propre studio d'animation 3D.

La réunion de ces compétences permet à Tu Nous ZA Pas Vus de produire des projets variés, aussi bien en prise de vue réelle qu'en images de synthèse : courts et longs métrages, séries, films publicitaires ou institutionnels, documentaires, clips etc.

Aussi bien portés sur l’artistique que la technique, ces regards croisés assurent un suivi attentif et complet de toutes les étapes de création, du scénario à la postproduction. Cette richesse permet l’émergence de projets originaux, favorise l’échange, l’ébullition et l’enthousiasme nécessaires à tout film en devenir.

Convaincue que la création, aussi périlleuse soit-elle, reste une grande et belle aventure humaine, l’équipe de Tu Nous ZA Pas Vus a pour principe fondateur de toujours travailler dans le partage, le plaisir et la passion. C’est peut-être là sa seule ligne éditoriale : des projets «coups de cœur» et l’envie toujours intacte de les porter jusqu’au bout...

Name: TT Nyhetsbyrån
Description:
TT Nyhetsbyrån (TT News Agency) is the national wire service in Sweden with a history dating back to the 1920's. TT Nyhetsbyrån delivers text, images, video, graphics and finished pages to Sweden’s media outlets, companies and public authorities.

The agency's mission has always been to convey fast, impartial and reliable news to the media market. A wide range of services have been added over time: images feature packages, news graphics, news video TV clips, design services and a 24/7 news update-service for digital platforms.
Credible, creative and curious are important values for the company. Our mission is to help our customers become better.

Du kan läsa mer om våra tjänster om du har valt svenska som språk i inställningarna.

Name: Beet.TV
Description:
Beet.TV is the intelligence and networking engine fueling the community of business leaders across the advertising and media ecosystem. 

A unique catalyst of content, conversation, and community for decision-makers and industry professionals, Beet.TV is the forum for the ideas and companies shaping the future of ad agencies, CTV, Retail Media/Commerce Media, content creation/distribution, and the business of digital communications generally. 

Since its launch in 2006, Beet’s industry coverage has evolved constantly, matching the swift pace of  advance in ad-supported digital media. While its coverage has focused on the evolution of converged television and video, it has simultaneously expanded to cover emerging sectors including social networks, programmatic, streaming, identity, commerce, artificial intelligence, media measurement, audio, out-of-home, the creator economy, and contextual advertising. 

That’s why Beet.TV is the root of all that’s next to come.

The Essential Intelligence and Networking Hub

Beet.TV’s platform is the essential intelligence and networking hub by — and for — leaders of the advertising and media community. Through one-on-one video interviews and in-person private events, Beet.TV’s global salon combines compelling insights, delivered with plainspoken directness, by the industry professionals shaping the growth of ad tech, martech, media, CTV, Retail Media, and more.

The content produced by Beet.TV reaches tens of thousands of visitors and event attendees each month, creating a place where audiences gain knowledge, and where sponsors find value from the depth and breadth of our content and conversations. 

Outcomes for sponsors are grounded in the credible thought leadership Beet.TV is widely regarded for; which is why they generate incomparable brand awareness and direct business development.

Name: Cucina Botanica
Description:
Cucina Botanica è il simbolo della cucina vegetale e dello stile di vita sostenibile in Italia.

Carlotta Perego, fondatrice e volto del progetto, ha saputo normalizzare e rendere pop un argomento di nicchia e carico di stereotipi come la cucina vegetale.

Ad oggi, Cucina Botanica accoglie sui vari social una community affiatata e fedele di oltre un milione di utenti.

Nel 2020 Carlotta pubblica il suo primo libro "Cucina Botanica: vegetale, buona e consapevole", che in soli 6 mesi supera le 100.000 copie vendute, rimanendo ai vertici delle classifiche di vendita per mesi, diventando così un vero e proprio case study editoriale.

Questo successo senza precedenti nel settore è stato possibile grazie alla comunicazione inclusiva, positiva e accogliente di Carlotta che avvicina e riunisce - oltre che vegani e vegetariani - moltissime persone che intendono adottare, anche solo in parte, a questo stile di vita (87%).

Nel 2021 Carlotta viene nominata dalla rivista Forbes tra i giovani Under 30 leader del futuro. Nello stesso periodo la rivista Fortune inserisce Carlotta con Cucina Botanica nella lista "40 under 40", l'elenco dei giovani leader più influenti dell'anno.

L'8 novembre è uscito in tutte le librerie il terzo libro di Carlotta: "Vegetale Insieme, le ricette di Cucina Botanica da condividere"

Name: Digital Age
Description:
Hayatımıza her geçen gün yeni kavramlar giriyor, yeni çağda eski iş modelleri geçerliliğini yitiriyor. 

Henüz 20’li yaşlardaki gençlerin yeni iş fikirleri ile birkaç yıl içinde dolar milyarderi oldukları bir dünya bu. Google’ın, Facebook’un, Yahoo’nun marka değeri olarak asırlık global endüstri şirketlerini geride bıraktıkları bir çağ. 

Digital Age teknik bir bilgisayar dergisi ya da dijital araç - gereç dergisi değil. Digital Age kravatlı, resmi bir iş ve ekonomi dergisi de değil. Bütünüyle dijital dönüşüme, yeni dijital paralel evrenin gerçeklerine, fırsatlarına, dinamiklerine odaklanan 'casual' bir dergi.

Sizi, dijital çağı bizimle izlemeye davet ediyoruz.

Description:
Our mission is very simple; to encourage and support the growth of all things digital and to keep digital technology at the forefront of people’s minds.

Name: Roadtrip Nation
Description:
Roadtrip Nation creates and distributes best-in-class career exploration content, products, and experiences to help individuals pursue fulfilling careers based on what’s important to them. We’re one part media company, one part career education platform, and one hundred percent mission-driven.

We believe there’s power in doing work that’s true to who you are. That’s why we’ve dedicated ourselves to helping people explore career possibilities that connect to their interests. We seek out inspiring individuals who’ve built lives around what they love, then share their stories in award-winning documentaries on public television and an online archive featuring thousands of conversations about struggle and success. We also provide a process for how to navigate the career journey, with curriculums, career discovery resources, live events, and our New York Times best-selling career guide, Roadmap. Along the way, we have benefited from world-class partnerships with great brands, foundations, and people who are passionate about making change in the world. 

We took our first road trip in 2001, driven by the question of how to build a life doing what you love. The answers we found showed us that this was bigger than our journey alone. Since then, we’ve been driven by one mission: to create a movement of people empowered to define their own roads in life.

Name: Gaon Connection
Description:
Gaon Connection (GC) is India’s biggest rural media platform. It was founded in January 2012 with its first printed newspaper version out on December 2, 2012 along with the creation of rural distribution channels. It has since expanded to several other verticals, including audio, video, digital and an extensive ground activation.
Our footprint is across remote rural areas in Uttar Pradesh, Bihar, Jharkhand and soon expanding to other Hindi speaking states. In its print and digital avatars, Gaon Connection takes information and knowledge to rural communities. showcases governance challenges, chronicles  the rural role
Models and inspiring stories from rural areas.
VISION-MISSION-VALUES

Our vision is to work across states and languages, creating a “connection” between urban-rural and rural-urban India in an unprecedented way thereby redefining the media mainstream. Along with riding the digital revolution to amplify our reach, we stick to the principles and values of well-intentioned, old-fashioned rigour of journalism.

WHAT WE DO

Gaon Connection is actively involved and runs ground activation through a massive community outreach programme ("Swayam Project") which creates community journalists. It works with schools, self-help groups, farmers clubs and other community bodies in remote, media-dark areas across Bihar, UP and Jharkhand to help rural citizens become powerful voices for their communities as community journalists.
Our aim is also to build the Swayam Project into a global case study – the largest communication programme of its kind in the world, across states and multiple languages which has demonstrated implementable solution, resolving issues and bridging the knowledge gap which is currently a visible issue faced by rural India.
Gaon Connection is supported financially by THE INDEPENDENT AND PUBLIC SPIRITED MEDIA FOUNDATION (IPSMF), backed by Mr Azim Premji and other notable philanthropists. IPSMF promotes excellence in independent, public-spirited and socially impactful journalism and has been supporting Gaon Connection Private Limited for the purpose of reporting and publishing stories of public interest.

With over 50 million YouTube subscribers and a 1 million-strong following on Instagram, we produce and distribute content ranging from reels to web series to OTT shows.

First Show, our award-winning film marketing agency, has worked with over 200 films since 2012, primarily in the Telugu film industry. We are now expanding into other languages, offering end-to-end marketing solutions.

5. Mutiny Talent: Influencer Marketing + Talent Management
Mutiny Talent connects talent and brands, fostering growth and collaboration. Backed by Chai Bisket’s content expertise, we manage talent and create regional influencer-driven content for brands.

6. Chai Shots (Dropping soon)

Our strong verticals create a unified ecosystem, driving innovation, creativity, and growth across entertainment and technology.

Name: The Daily Swile
Description:
Décrypter, échanger, apprendre : The Daily Swile, c’est le média libre et engagé qui fait évoluer la culture du travail.

On interroge les salariés, managers, RH, indépendants et dirigeants avec une question en toile de fond : si le travail a pris une place importante dans notre vie, pourquoi notre vie ne prendrait-elle pas une place importante dans notre travail ?

Pourquoi Swile a un média ?

Depuis le début, chez Swile, on croit à cette révolution. C’est de là qu’est née l’envie de créer un média avec une promesse forte : vous donner les clés pour comprendre ce monde du travail qui change, et apprendre à vivre en osmose avec.

Parfois, cette transformation ne se fera pas chez Swile, mais peut-être chez d’autres. Et c’est ok. Le monde du travail n’a pas une seule bonne réponse, ni un seul mode d’emploi. L’essentiel, c'est d’échanger, de discuter et d’écouter pour mieux travailler ensemble.

Une question, suggestion ou déclaration d'amour ?
 Contactez-nous : thedaily@swile.co

منظومة أفكار وتجارب ومعلومات وأكثر، اخترنا أن يكون الصوت وسيلتنا لنشرها عبر الإنترنت؛ لنصنع بذلك أكبر شبكة تدوين صوتي في العالم العربي، تُنتج محتوى متنوع من سلاسل البودكاست أو التدوينات الصوتية؛ نلامس بها أذواق شرائح متعددة من
المستمعين، ونثري من خلالها المحتوى العربي على الإنترنت، فضلاً عن نشر ثقافة البودكاست التي أصبحت ركيزة أساسية في سوق صناعة المحتوى حول العالم، وأسلوب الحياة الحديث. 

 

ما بين اختلاف المحتوى، واحتراف التنفيذ، تمكنا في شبكة مايكس للبودكاست من إنتاج أكثر من 200 حلقة مسموعة، ضمن أكثر من 25 برنامج عملنا عليها منذ الانطلاقة في نوفمبر 2018، ضمن قائمة برامجنا الداخلية في مايكس، وأخرى مع نخبة شركائنا وعملائنا المميزين. ونفخر كثيراً في مايكس بأننا خلال هذه الفترة، صنعنا ما يزيد عن 36 مليون صديق ما بين مستمع ومشاهد ... يتابع، ينتظر، يستمع ويستمتع.

 

شغفنا في مايكس أن نعقد صداقاتٍ أكثر في مزيدٍ من الدول العربية، فقط عبر المايكروفون وسماعة الأذن، من خلال إنتاج محتوى صوتي نوعي ومختلف، ينقل المفيد ويتنقل بين المستمعين.

Saskia Smith (1969) en Martine de Vente (1968) zijn beiden docenten, journalisten en ouders van pubers. Zij zijn ook de oprichters van het succesvolle tishiergeenhotel.nl (2017), het platform voor iedereen met een puber in huis. Ze leiden je langs de hoogte- en dieptepunten van het puberouderschap en delen hun kennis over leven en óverleven met pubers met liefde. Elke dag schrijven ze op Tis Hier Geen Hotel over de leuke en ingewikkelde kanten van pubers en laten zien hoe je hen én jezelf zonder al te veel kleerscheuren door die puberteit loodst. Ze bereiken hiermee ruim een miljoen mensen per maand. 

Tis Hier Geen Hotel is een 360-graden mediamerk met een website, social media-kanalen, boeken, scheurkalender en een theatervoorstelling. Als eersten in Nederland brachten Saskia en Martine een online platform naar het theater. Met succes, ze wonnen er een Mercur Innovatie van het jaar 2020 voor. In 2020 en 2021 en 2022 werden zij tot Website van het Jaar gekozen in beide categorieën: populairste website en beste website. Regelmatig worden ze gevraagd als deskundigen in radio- en televisieprogramma's en podcasts en geven ze inspirerende lezingen over pubers en de puberteit op, onder meer, scholen en (jeugd)instellingen. 

Wil je samenwerken of een lezing boeken, mail dan naar: info@tishiergeenhotel.nl.
