Name: Nutopia
Description:
Founded in 2008 by Jane Root, former President of Discovery Networks US, Controller of BBC2 and co-founder of Wall to Wall, Nutopia is known for creating ground-breaking factual shows on a global scale.

From the company’s inception Nutopia was at the forefront of the industry, creating a new genre of television – the ‘megadoc’ – which combines epic cinematography and action-driven drama with high-end documentary and A list talent. The first of these was the Emmy Award-winning America: Story of US, which gained critical plaudits and record-breaking ratings success. The Story of Us format has sold globally in many international markets.

Nutopia has a proven track record of critical achievement including the extraordinary 12-part series Mankind The Story of All of Us for History Channel; landmark Emmy Award-winning series How We Got to Now; and two series of the ratings smash Finding Jesus. Fact. Faith. Forgery for CNN.

Recent broadcast successes include The World According to Jeff Goldblum, quirky host-led social history for Disney+; lavish drama-doc The Last Czars for Netflix, which vividly re-tells the story of the downfall of the Romanov dynasty; and epic One Strange Rock for National Geographic, natural history/science collaboration with director Darren Aronofsky, hosted by Will Smith.

Currently in production we’re working on Limitless with Chris Hemsworth and season 2 of One Strange Rock for National Geographic, season 2 of The World According to Jeff Goldblum for Disney+, and unannounced premium series for History Channel and Amazon.

Other recent credits include Unmasking Jihadi John: Anatomy of a Terrorist (HBO, Channel 4),  Jesus: His Life (History), Civilisations (BBC, PBS), The Great American Read (PBS), America: Promised Land (History US), Beyond Reasonable Doubt (CNN), and Africa’s Great Civilisations (PBS).

Name: The Policy Times
Description:
The Policy Times aims to unfold social, economic, business, policy and practical issues that matter to India and the world especially the youth and women who would require to develop practical understanding about long-term developmental issues.

“If Politics is an Alternative to War, Policy is an Alternative to Chaos.”

Welcome to The Policy Times, a platform to understand, educate, brainstorm and interact with experts on public policy and practice issues.

Public Policy Making is a very dynamic, complex, and interactive process which involves all stakeholders in order to address social problems or achieve social objectives.

The Policy Times will apply the theoretical and analytical tools of economics, social science, politics, philosophy, religion, technology and regulations to develop real-world policy understanding.

Name: 7amleh - The Arab Center for the Advancement of Social Media
Description: 7amleh -The Arab Center for Social Media Advancement is a non-profit organization that was awarded the Index on Censorship Freedom of Expression Award in 2020.  In 2022 7amleh received consultative status at the United Nations Economic and Social Affairs Council (ECOSOC) and became a member of The Global Network Initiative (GNI). 7amleh’s work aims to create a safe, fair and free digital space through building the capacity of civil society organizations in digital advocacy, digital safety and activism, monitoring and documenting digital rights violations against Palestinians carried out by various perpetrators in online spaces, including technology companies and different governments. 7amleh’s work involves preparing and publishing studies, reports and papers regarding digital policies and regulations that affect Palestinian digital rights, as well as organizing and leading evidence-based, multi-layered advocacy campaigns on the local, regional and international level to hold tech companies accountable and push them to comply with international human rights law as well as human rights and business principles.

The company has 29 years experience in production and has a solid reputation as a creative innovator in the industry. The company was established in 1993 – first as Weekly Mail Television, then Mail and Guardian Television. In 1999 it separated from the Mail and Guardian and was renamed Curious Pictures and in 2012 changed names to Quizzical Pictures.

The Quizzical signature is defined by quality, rigorous research methods, uncompromising attention to detail and a commitment to telling resonant and relevant stories. This is evident across the range of our work which spans every genre; Drama, Film, Documentary, Reality, Branded Content and Live Activations.

We are black owned company (level 2 BBBEE) with twenty-six years experience, we enjoy a solid reputation as a creative innovator in the industry and have won countless awards over the years, including a prestigious Peabody Award for Intersexions, and a Rose D’Or for Hopeville.

Description:

In addition, the company runs a digital marketing business which serves advertising clients throughout the Southeast, a film production group Advance Originals, and the national brands Reckon and It’s a Southern Thing.

We have more than 100 journalists who are dedicated to telling stories that change lives, laws and minds across our digital brands right here in Alabama. And our work continues to earn national recognition for its impact and innovation.

In the past 5 years, AL.com journalists have been awarded two Pulitzer Prizes and been a finalist for another, won 21 regional Emmys for documentary work, an Edward R. Murrow award for podcasting and a Webby Award for short-form comedy.

According to ComScore, AL.com is regularly in the top 10 of local news websites across the country and reaches an average of 11 million monthly users. Alabama Media Group brands also have more than 3.4 million followers across social media platforms and produce more than two dozen newsletters and podcasts.

Alabama Media Group is part of Advance Local Media and owned by Advance, owners of Conde’ Nast; and shareholders in Reddit, Warner Bros. Discovery and Charter Communications.

One of the largest media groups in the United States, Advance operates the leading news and information companies in more than 20 cities, reaching 58+ million people, including MLive Media Group, Advance Ohio, NJ Advance Media, Advance Media NY, MassLive Media, Oregonian Media Group, PA Media Group and Staten Island Media Group.

Name: Your Undivided Attention
Description: Technology companies are locked in an arms race to seize your attention, and that race is tearing apart our shared social fabric. In this inaugural podcast from the Center for Humane Technology, hosts Tristan Harris and Aza Raskin will expose the hidden designs that have the power to hijack our attention, manipulate our choices and destabilize our real world communities. They’ll explore what it means to become sophisticated about human nature, by interviewing hypnotists, magicians, experts on the dynamics of cults and election hacking and the powers of persuasion. How can we escape this unrelenting race to the bottom of the brain stem? Learn more with our new podcast, Your Undivided Attention.

Name: Next Nature
Description:
Virtual worlds, printed food, living cities and wild robots; we’re so surrounded by technology that it’s becoming our next nature. It may sound abstract, but it’s closer than you think; cars will drive themselves and heart valves are 3D printed.

How not to lose sight of the human factor? Next Nature is the international network for anyone interested to join the debate on our future – in which nature and technology are fusing.

In a landscape of traditional nature organizations, we are the only group that approaches the concept of nature in a new manner. Preserving nature is of great importance, but we must also dare to look ahead. Did you ever consider eating cultured meat? Are robots threatening our jobs? Why doesn’t a tree in the jungle represent ecological value?

Name: TEDxRíodelaPlata
Description:
TED es una organización sin  fines de lucro cuya misión es difundir ideas que valen la pena. TED comenzó como una conferencia de cuatro días en California en 1984 y ha crecido para apoyar a aquellas ideas que intentan cambiar el mundo por medio de distintas iniciativas. En el mismo espíritu de difundir ideas, TED ha creado un programa llamado TEDx. TEDx es un programa de eventos locales que reúnen a una audiencia en una experiencia similar a TED.

Nuestro evento es TEDxRíodelaPlata, donde x=evento TED organizado de forma independiente. En TEDxRíodelaPlata, combinamos videos de charlas de TED y oradores en vivo para disparar una conversación y conexión profunda entre los asistentes. TED da lineamientos generales para el programa TEDx, pero cada TEDx individual es organizado de manera autónoma (sujeto a ciertas directrices). Las charlas de TEDxRíodelaPlata tienen un promedio de 12 minutos de duración y abarcan las temáticas más diversas, incluyendo: ciencia, tecnología, arte, diseño, cultura, educación, acción social y sociedad.

Los eventos son gratuitos y convocan a participantes de todas las edades, que dedican 1 a 2 días a compartir ideas transformadoras. Desde el primer evento en 2010, ya tenemos más de 200 videos de la charlas. Están todos disponibles gratuitamente en nuestro sitio web: www.tedxriodelaplata.org. Nuestro objetivo de compartir “ideas que te transforman” va más allá de los eventos y las charlas e incluye una serie de proyectos e iniciativas que apalancan el poder de las ideas (por ejemplo TEDxperiments, Educación, Lecturas, Clubes de Ideas, etc.)

Name: MICT - Media in Cooperation and Transition
Description:
MICT - Media in Cooperation and Transition is a German media development organization that implements projects in the Middle East and Northern Africa. Activities focus on the interplay between conflict, media coverage and reconciliation in crisis regions.

MICT's services comprise the training of journalists and media producers, program and content development, production of radio programs, films and books, as well as media research and monitoring in conflict zones-. At MICT headquarters in Berlin an international team of 15 full-time staff members directs the smooth operation of all activities. All projects are realized in closed cooperation with our partners on site.

Through its activities MICT is aiming to foster the transformation of conflict towards reconciliation and encourage dialogue among conflicting factions within society. Focal point is the interaction and interdependence of media and conflict. Supporting media cooperation, media networking and media development, as well as capacity building in the field of journalism is presumed to be key factor in conflict transition.

MICT is financed and supported by the Belgian Foreign Ministry, the German Foreign Office, the Friedrich Ebert Foundation, UNESCO, UNIFEM, UNAMI, the Government of Canada, and the Amman Centre for Human Rights Studies.

Name: Proximity Media
Description:
Proximity is a multi-media company founded by Ryan Coogler, Zinzi Coogler and Sev Ohanian with a mission to create event-driven feature films, television, soundtracks and podcasts that look to bring audiences closer together through stories involving often-overlooked subject matters. They were the team behind the critically acclaimed 2025 box-office smash SINNERS, starring Michael B. Jordan, which has grossed over $365M globally to date. Past film projects include the two-time Academy Award-winning JUDAS AND THE BLACK MESSIAH, SPACE JAM: A NEW LEGACY, and CREED III, which grossed over $275M theatrically. Recent releases include Marvel Studios’ IRONHEART series on Disney+, the National Geographic docuseries HURRICANE KATRINA: A RACE AGAINST TIME, which reached #1 on Hulu, and the animated series EYES OF WAKANDA on Disney+.

Proximity also produced the documentary HOMEROOM with Hulu, co-produced STEPHEN CURRY: UNDERRATED with Apple Original Films, A24 and Unanimous Media, as well as ANTHEM, with Onyx Collective as part of the company’s overall deal with Disney Television. Proximity Music produced the soundtracks for SINNERS, JUDAS AND THE BLACK MESSIAH, SPACE JAM: A NEW LEGACY, and the official soundtrack and score for BLACK PANTHER: WAKANDA FOREVER and CREED III. Proximity Audio produces the Webby Honoree podcast IN PROXIMITY and created and produced WAKANDA FOREVER: THE OFFICIAL BLACK PANTHER PODCAST, written and hosted by Ta-Nehisi Coates and winner of the 2024 NAACP Image Award and Webby Award.

Name: Bulgarian News Agency (BTA)
Description:
The Bulgarian News Agency (BTA) is the national news agency of Bulgaria.
It was established by a decree issued by Prince Ferdinand I in 1898.

The BTA is now a major and reliable source of information to the print and electronic media, the state bodies and NGOs in Bulgaria and abroad.
The Agency's Statute guarantees its independent editorial policy and protects it from any economic and political influence.

BTA's operation is financed from the sale of its information services and products, through advertisements, and through action allocations from the national budget.
BTA is a member of the European Alliance of News Agencies (EANA), whose statute stipulates that only one news agency per country is admitted.

It is also a founder member of the Association of Balkan News Agencies (ABNA).

Moderatorin Maja Göpel spricht mit führenden Stimmen aus Wissenschaft, Zivilgesellschaft und Wirtschaft über große Themen unserer Zeit – von Wachstum und Demokratie über Innovation und Sicherheit bis zu Vermögen und Marktwirtschaft. Gemeinsam suchen wir nach Ideen, die verbinden statt spalten, und zeigen, wie Veränderung konkret und konstruktiv gelingen kann. Im Zentrum steht dabei eine Haltung: Wer Demokratie stärken will, muss die Sorgen der Menschen ernst nehmen – und neue Perspektiven anbieten statt zu polarisieren.

De FD Mediagroep (FDMG) is getransformeerd van een traditioneel krantenbedrijf naar een innovatief technologie bedrijf. 

We dagen onze collega’s uit ideeën verder te ontwikkelen en bieden een innovatieve omgeving waar ruimte is voor initiatief, vrijheid en verantwoordelijkheid in een informele, professionele en pragmatische sfeer.

Onze merken:
Het FD weet dagelijks met topjournalistiek en ‘need to know’ content een krachtige groep van professionals, zakelijke beslissers en welstandigen aan zich te binden. Hierbij worden zij 24/7 gevoed door een netwerk van topondernemers, politici, opiniemakers en vakspecialisten.

Name: Art Attack Animation
Description:
Animation is more than just movement, it's the art of breathing soul into stories, transforming abstract ideas into vibrant, moving worlds. It's poetry in motion, a visual symphony where characters become relatable, emotions come alive, and stories resonate far beyond the screen. At Art Attack Animation, we turn this magical process into an everyday reality.

Founded in 2018 by two dreamers with boundless imagination and a shared passion for storytelling, Art Attack Animation began as a spark—fueled by creative hunger and the courage to do things differently. What started as a small venture soon blossomed into a closely-knit team of animation specialists, united by a love for visual storytelling and a relentless drive to push boundaries.

We’re not just animators—we're storytellers, world-shapers, and dream-weavers. From charming Infographics to cinematic CGI & VFX, our work is where technique meets narrative to form a powerful storytelling tool. Every project is an adventure: a chance to explore new ideas, dive into rich character universes and keep your audience interactively engaged and emotionally invested.

Armed with the latest tools, technologies, and a wildly creative spirit, we’ve helped brands, creators, and visionaries skyrocket their big ideas into compelling visual experiences. With every frame we create, our mission stays the same: to captivate, to connect, and to leave a lasting impression.

Because at Art Attack Animation, we believe your story deserves not just to be told—but to be felt, remembered, and celebrated!

Description:

STUDIO BUMMENS konzipiert, produziert und bringt neue Podcasts auf sämtliche Plattformen. 

Gleichzeitig sind wir 24/7 auf der Suche nach Freaks, Talenten, Journalist*innen, Forscher*innen, Comedians, Kreativen, Autor*innen und allen anderen, die Geschichten in einem auditiven Format erzählen wollen. Vom Konzeptpapier über den Plattform-Pitch, bis hin zur Produktion – wir sind für alles zu haben. Und wer auf namhafte Persönlichkeiten steht, wird bei uns genauso fündig. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit Seidenstücker Management entwickeln wir auch Podcasts für und mit prominenten Menschen.

STUDIO BUMMENS steht allen zur Seite, die ein Format entwickeln oder eine schon fertige Idee umsetzen wollen. Dabei geht’s uns nicht um Zahlen und den schnellen Erfolg. Wir wollen richtig gute, inhaltsstarke Podcasts produzieren. Ob für den Mainstream oder die Nische. Spannendes Story-Telling und meinungsstarke Charaktere liegen uns am Herzen. Wir lieben Talk, Dokus, Features und narrative Formate.

Bei uns arbeitet ein gut vernetzter Haufen von Medienschaffenden, die es lieben Dinge anders und besser zu machen. Unser Team hat jahrelange Erfahrung im Bereich Journalismus, Radio, Audioproduktion, Formatentwicklung, Kommunikation und Distribution.

Name: Lisual | Software de control y marketing para obras en construcción
Description:
¿Quiénes somos? 

Somos Lisual, una productora audiovisual joven dedicada específicamente al seguimiento audiovisual de obras de construcción, damos la posibilidad a los inversores o stake-holders de ver en tiempo real el avance de la obra, de una forma original, creativa y única mediante diferentes tecnologías que permiten capturar cada etapa y evolución de la misma. 

¿Qué ofrecemos? 
Para lograr un buen seguimiento de obra, estipulamos una periodicidad, fijamos los hitos de la obra que deben ser cubiertos de forma indispensable, luego en la obra, capturamos en foto y video cada rincón de la misma, utilizando drones, diferentes cámaras, grúas y cámaras de time-lapse para poder lograr una cobertura integral. A las 24 horas del registro todo el material se encontrará en una nube, a la cual se podrá acceder desde cualquier dispositivo: computadora, tablet o celular. 
Luego con un simple click compartirlo directamente con tus inversores o clientes para que sepan que la obra tuvo una gestión transparente. Al poseer el registro de cada etapa de la obra, al finalizar podemos crea un compilado del material donde en pocos minutos se ve la historia del proyecto. 
En Lisual somos especialistas para encontrar la mejor estrategia a un muy bajo costo. 
-Registro fotográfico: Documentación del avance de obra, deteniéndose en los sectores y momentos más importantes, combinando la técnica con la estética. 
-Registro audiovisual: Mediante el video logramos una presentación dinámica y atractiva de cada etapa de la obra, para demostrar la transparencia en la gestión de la misma 
-Drones de última tecnología: Utilizamos las tomas aéreas para demostrar la dimensión del proyecto, buscando innovadoras perspectivas. 
-Time-Lapse de larga duración: Con esta herramienta mostramos el progreso de la obra, dispositivo de grabación con capacidad ilimitada, el cual función con o sin electricidad, vinculado directamente con nuestro portal online.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Diplomacy&Commerce is monthly magazine in English, dedicated to quality analysis and commentary on events occurring in Serbia, in diplomatic and business community in Belgrade and Serbia.
The readers of Diplomacy&Commerce have the exclusive opportunity to read integral articles from The Economist written by its prominent foreign-affairs, industry, business and finance columnists in every issue of D&C.
Diplomacy&Commerce aims and serves as a reliable and efficient information platform offering diverse useful information about local, regional and foreign investment opportunities, trends, legislation updates and researches and Magazine will have following sections:
DIPLOMACY: News, Interviews, Events, National Days
ECONOMY: News, Interviews, Surveys, Forecasts, Analyses
BUSINESS SECTORS: Telecommunication, Finance, Energy, Tourism, Trade, Agriculture, Real estate, Transportation, Hospitality, IT, Food Industry , Tobacco Industry, Automotive Industry, Education and Science, Media Industry.
CULTURE/SPORT/GASTRONOMY/TOURISM&TRAVEL variety of life style information interesting to the diplomats, business people and their families in Belgrade

In every issue of Diplomacy&Commerce will be published the special supplement dedicated to the investors groups, under the title – In Focus, which will cover  bilateral relations, economy, culture, tourism, companies overviews, endorsed by business associations and foreign Chambers of Commerce in Serbia.
On our website www.diplomacyandcommerces.rs will be posted news and events occurring in Serbia, in diplomatic and business community.

Diplomacy&commerce organizing of numerous number of round-tables, conferences, and business forums which gathering Government, diplomatic, economic and political leaders from Serbia and region

Name: Heckler HQ

Heckler has built its name collaborating with principal agencies and filmmakers from all over the world to tell stories, focusing on one goal - to make the best visual content.

Having picked up a swag of awards along the way, Heckler specialises in visual effects with an exceptional team of talent covering disciplines such as CGI, Design, Compositing, Animation, Edit and Colour. Both the Sydney and Singapore studios feature state of the art post-production suites and are home to some of the best in the business.

Name: UFA SERIAL DRAMA
Description:
Die UFA SERIAL DRAMA ist Spezialist für langlaufende, tägliche und wöchentliche Programm-Marken. Die Langlebigkeit der Serien und die Innovationskraft des Unternehmens macht UFA SERIAL DRAMA seit fast drei Jahrzehnten zum Marktführer in diesem Segment.

Mit „Gute Zeiten, Schlechte Zeiten“, der erfolgreichsten täglichen Serie, etablierte UFA SERIAL DRAMA im Jahr 1992 ein neues Genre für den deutschen TV-Markt. Mit gesellschaftsrelevanten und alltagsnahen Themen zieht „GZSZ“ seitdem montags bis freitags Millionen Zuschauer in den Bann.

Seit 24 Jahren wird „Unter uns“ auf RTL ausgestrahlt – mit Themen, die sich rund um Liebe, Intrigen, Familiendramen und Freundschaft drehen. Mit mehr als 6.000 Folgen gehört „Unter uns“ zu den Vorzeige-Serien des Senders.

„Alles was zählt“ startete am 4. September 2006 als dritte tägliche Serie bei RTL. Selbst nach 12 Jahren und mehr als 3.000 Folgen gehört die einzige Daily, die sich um Sport dreht, mit starken Quoten zu den täglichen Stützpfeilern des RTL-Programms.

UFA SERIAL DRAMA produzierte drei Staffeln der crossmedialen Kinderserie „Spotlight“ für Nickelodeon, eine vierte Staffel wurde im April 2019 in Auftrag gegeben. „Spotlight“ begleitet eine Gruppe Teenager bei ihren Abenteuern an der „Berlin School of Arts“, einer fiktiven Schule, die künstlerische Ausbildung mit normaler Schulausbildung koppelt.

Am 30. April 2019 startete die zehnteilige Medical-Serie „Nachtschwestern“ bei RTL, die in der Domstadt spielt und jede Woche in den Alltag einer Nachtschicht  eintaucht – mit dramatischen Ereignissen, schrägen Fällen und toller Teamdynamik.

Formate wie „Verbotene Liebe“, „Hinter Gittern“, „Verliebt in Berlin“ und „Wege zum Glück“ haben bis heute – obwohl nicht mehr in der Ausstrahlung – eine starke aktive Fangemeinschaft.

Geschäftsführer sind Markus Brunnemann und Joachim Kosack.

Impressum: https://www.ufa.de/impressum
Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.ufa.de/datenschutzerklaerung

Name: Scienseed
Description:
Scienseed is a multifunctional agency for the dissemination of scientific findings. Its founding goal is to promote public engagement in science through all available tools in the Era of Information Technologies.
We are specialized in the translation of scientific data into different accessible products and activities, aimed at either the scientific community (peers) or the general public (society).
We provide support to academic laboratories, research institutes, universities and private institutions to raise public awareness and increase the repercussion of their contribution to science.

Name: Sound & Vision Studios
Description:
Sound & Vision Studios is an internationally known group based in India. 

Having dubbed hundreds of movies and thousands of hours of TV content for leading multinational channels.

Name: Banijay Germany
Description:
Banijay Germany ist die größte und erfolgreichste deutsche Produktionsfirma, deren Unterhaltungsprogramme im Fernsehen, im Internet und auf der Bühne täglich ein Millionenpublikum erreicht. Als Teil der internationalen Banijay-Gruppe, dem weltweit führenden Content-Haus, ist Banijay Germany hervorragend aufgestellt, um den Wandel der Unterhaltungsindustrie durch Digitalisierung und neue Streaming-Anbieter erfolgreich zu gestalten. CEO und Mitgründer von Banijay Germany ist Marcus Wolter. In Deutschland vereint die Banijay-Gruppe über 25 Firmen und Labels. Unter ihnen befinden sich viele der bekanntesten deutschen Produktionshäuser, darunter EndemolShine, Good Times, Banijay Productions, MadeFor und Brainpool samt Tochterfirmen wie Cape Cross und Brainpool Live. Die Künstlermanagements SR, MTS und OGP sowie die Influencer- und Brandexperten influence.vision und Banijay Media ergänzen das Portfolio. Die über 1000 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter von Banijay Germany produzieren jedes Jahr über 3000 Stunden Programm und erreichen damit täglich digital und im linearen TV ein Millionenpublikum und mehr Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer als jedes andere deutsche Unterhaltungsunternehmen. 

Banijay investiert in Kreativität und künstlerische Freiheit. Zu den bekanntesten deutschen Marken gehören Sendungen wie „The Masked Singer“, “Schlag den Star“, „Promi Big Brother“, "Kampf der Realitystars" oder “Tatort Dresden“ sowie zahllose namenhafte Künstlerinnen und Künstler. 

Banijay Germany profitiert von der starken Marktposition der globalen Banijay-Gruppe mit Sitz in Paris, die mit über 130 Tochterfirmen in über 20 Ländern vertreten ist. Banijay bietet beste Geschichten und zahllose der erfolgreichsten Unterhaltungsshows der Welt – erzählt in lokalen Formaten und in einer Sprache, die die Zuschauer verstehen.

Name: Voyzapp
Description:
Voyzapp is a technology-powered platform that offers quick, efficient, cost-effective and most reliable voice recording services through professional voice-over artists. We have a team of over 30000 professional voice artists who work in 60+ languages and can get started on your project right at the click of a button.

Simply search for your preferred voice through our search matrix and browse hundreds of voice samples to find your perfect voice! Name: ARN Media

Vem com a gente!

Description:

In addition, we reach our readers and users via magazines, newsletters, podcasts and SoMe channels. We are proud to be the farmer's preferred media house in this way. 

Read more at www.landbrugsmedierne.dk 

*Kantar Gallup, 2023

Name: Paradiso Media
Description:
Paradiso Media est un studio international de podcasts spécialisé dans la fiction, le documentaire et les programmes jeunesse fondé par Lorenzo Benedetti (fondateur Studio Bagel), Louis Daboussy (ex-DGA Konbini) et Benoit Dunaigre (ex co-fondateur & Head of sound HRCLS / Havas) basé à Paris. Les membres de l’équipe viennent de parcours variés, nous voulons tou.te.s créer des univers audio créatifs, en collaboration avec des studios de productions et des diffuseurs, français et internationaux.

Le pôle agence de Paradiso Media accompagne les médias et les marques dans la déclinaison de leurs univers en podcasts. Notre double expertise publicité et création audio nous permet de proposer un accompagnement à la carte sur toutes les étapes de la création : fabrication éditoriale, production, communication et diffusion des contenus.

Fort d’un réseau de plus de 200 auteur.ices, musicien.nes, technicien.nes, graphistes, studios en France et à l’international, nous créons, depuis Paris, des formats multi-lingues et utilisons les outils les plus innovants du marché afin d’offrir des expériences de marque innovantes et impactantes : son binaural dynamique, ambisonic, IA synthèse vocale...

Nous avons déjà produit près de 450 épisodes pour Brut., LinkedIn, Canal+, Facebook, NRJ, Welcome to the Jungle, Because Music, etc.

Vous êtes une marque ou un média et voulez créer votre podcast ? Contactez nous : mathilde@paradisomedia.io

Name: Web Stars Channel
Description:
Questa storia nasce da un’intuizione di Luca Casadei che, nel 2008, per primo studia e capisce un fondamentale cambiamento del linguaggio nell’era del web: i creator diventeranno un media e le star della nuova generazione.

Sono anni di ricerca, sperimentazione, costruzione e aggiornamento costante.
Nel 2012 tutto questo diventa Web Stars Channel, un’azienda verticale capace di creare un’industria intorno al fenomeno dei creativi della nuova generazione.

La definizione “web star” entra così nel vocabolario della comunicazione creando le prime operazioni in cui il brand incontra il linguaggio dei creator per parlare a un’audience: il branded content prende vita.

Dopo l’awareness, Web Stars Channel ha, inutile negarlo, con prudenza affrontato il mondo della conversione al consumo. E’ stato declinato il linguaggio creativo per creare properties che potessero rappresentare ogni generazione, come ad esempio Favij e Mates, con i quali vengono fatte operazioni di licensing capaci di generare enormi volumi di sell out.

Quelli che inizialmente venivano definiti “calamite della fruizione gratuita”, si sono invece rivelati uno strumento che ha fatto vendere alle aziende milioni di prodotti.

Abbiamo creato uno strumento di comunicazione potente che funziona e usiamo queste righe per raccontarvi che potete usarlo anche voi.

Talking points are one thing. Truly connecting with your audience is another. Together, we will work with you to create a comprehensive strategy to develop and deliver a winning message.

In today’s cluttered media landscape, traditional, one-size fits all media buys won’t cut it. You need to consider the range of mediums available, determine which will best reach your target audience, how to use them, and when to use them. Our firm’s media-buying operation is one of the best, with over 20 years of media placement experience. So how can we help? Victory begins with BIG AL Analytics, our proprietary system that identifies the people we need to persuade and reaches them across TV, desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile phone screens. We place millions of dollars each year, and as a result, we’ve built strong relationships with stations in every market, guaranteeing that our clients have the competitive edge when it comes to ad placement at affordable rates. On the digital side, we use real-time bidding and third party data to ensure that we are reaching the right audience online at the lowest possible price. Using the latest tools to analyze the trends of your target audience, we will provide you with the most effective and efficient media buy options based on your budget.

Our in-house post-production facility operates 24-7, which allows us to respond immediately to any new developments, guarantees a quick turnaround time, and keeps our costs low. We work extensively with local cinematographers, producers, and talent to ensure the best raw material possible for each campaign.

The Daily Californian is an independent, student-run newspaper serving the UC Berkeley campus and the Berkeley, CA community. It publishes Monday, Tuesday, Thursday and Friday during the academic year and once a week during the summer. 

Established in 1871, The Daily Californian is one of the oldest newspapers on the West Coast and one of the oldest college newspapers in the country. 

Daily Cal staffers have the unique opportunity of gaining daily metro news experience in the city of Berkeley, and is one of the few campus newspapers in the country that is completely independent from the university it covers. The Daily Cal supports itself entirely from advertising revenue and does not receive any form of financial support from the university or the Associated Students of the University of California. 

The Daily Cal is run entirely by current or recently-graduated UC Berkeley students, and the majority of the business division of the newspaper is student-operated as well. It is published by the Independent Berkeley Students Publishing Company, Inc.

Name: Impulse Medien GmbH
Description:
Wir helfen Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmern zu wachsen – persönlich und mit der Firma.

Wie das funktioniert? 
Mit den zwei Komponenten, die jeder braucht, um ein Unternehmen zum Erfolg zu führen: 

1. Know-how 
2. Ein richtig starkes Netzwerk

Das Know-how liefert unsere Redaktion. Sie legt sich ins Zeug, um die besten Expertinnen und Experten zu interviewen und die Strategien herausragender Unternehmen zu beschreiben. Ihr Spezialgebiet: Alles so verständlich zu erklären, dass man sofort selbst mit der Umsetzung anfangen kann. 

Das Netzwerk besteht aus 4.000 ambitionierten Unternehmerinnen und Unternehmern, die eine sehr kluge Entscheidung getroffen haben: bei Problemen nicht irgendwen zu fragen, sondern Menschen, die ähnliche Situationen bereits gemeistert haben. Und damit man im impulse-Netzwerk garantiert auf die richtigen Leute trifft, kann nur Mitglied, wer über unternehmerische Erfahrung verfügt. 

Klingt nach einer genialen Idee – wer hatte sie?
Unser Chef, Nikolaus Förster. Er war Chefredakteur des impulse-Magazins, als es noch zu Gruner + Jahr gehörte. 2012 wollte der Verlag impulse loswerden. Doch Nikolaus wollte nicht in die Mühlen eines anderen Eigentümers geraten. Also fasste er einen kühnen Entschluss: impulse selbst zu kaufen. 
Als Mitgesellschafter gewann er den Hamburger Kaufmann Dirk Möhrle. Kaum war der Kaufvertrag unterschrieben, sprach Nikolaus davon, aus dem Unternehmer-Magazin ein Unternehmer-Netzwerk machen zu wollen. Um ehrlich zu sein: Wir haben lange nicht verstanden, was er damit meinte. 
Doch heute, elf Jahre und viele Ups and Downs später, sind aus Magazinlesern aktive Mitglieder geworden. Aus 15 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern ein Team mit 55 Köpfen. Und aus unserem wagemutigen Chefredakteur ein (zum Glück immer noch wagemutiger) Unternehmer. 

https://www.impulse.de/datenschutz
https://www.impulse.de/impressum

Strategy – Should I hire, buy or outbuild my competitor?

… plus many more topics for the truly Modern CTO.

If you see a comment that gives you particular concern, you can report it to us via email at newsroom@guernseypress.com or calling 240220 and we will address it as soon as possible.

Name: Trends Media Group
Description:
时尚集团成立于1993年，总部位于北京，至今已发展成为覆盖期刊出版、网络传媒、广告、印刷、发行、数字出版等多项领域的全媒体多平台的时尚集团，并在上海和广州设立分公司、办事处，为传媒产业、时尚领域和公益事业做出了里程碑式的贡献。
        凭借“国际视野、本土意识”的办刊理念，时尚集团率先与世界一流出版集团强强联手，采取版权合作的形式，已成为高品质生活的缔造者。“时尚”品牌连续多年被世界品牌实验室评为中国最具价值的500个品牌之一。现时尚集团旗下包括《时尚COSMO》、《时尚先生》、《时尚家居》、《时尚芭莎》、《芭莎男士》、《芭莎珠宝》、《时尚健康•女士》、《时尚健康•男士》、《华夏地理》、《男人装》、《时尚新娘》、《时尚时间》、《座驾》、《罗博报告》等精品刊物。
        在2014年，为继续实现“时尚生活的领导者、时尚文化的创造者、时尚产业的推动者”的战略目标，顺应传媒业与时尚业的发展趋势，时尚集团将在原有业务的基础上，大胆创新，跨界发展，除了坚持核心的传媒业务之外，启动传媒、教育、投资和产业四位一体的发展战略，实现从期刊出版到多元化经营的全方位升级，以突破性的“二次创业”，将品牌媒体价值延伸到新媒体价值链上，打造出崭新的时尚传媒新纪元。

Im Jahre 1999 wurde die Granada Produktion für Film und Fernsehen GmbH als deutsche Tochter der britischen Granada Productions in Berlin gegründet. 2007 wurde der Hauptsitz nach Köln verlagert, während in Berlin eine Dependance blieb. 

Seit 2011 firmiert Granada unter ITV Studios Germany. Geschäftsführerin des Unternehmens ist seit Juli 2014 Christiane Ruff.

Produktionen
Zum Portfolio der Firma zählen unter anderem „Ich bin ein Star – Holt mich hier raus!“ (RTL), „Das perfekte Dinner“ (VOX), „Grill den Profi“ (VOX), „4 Hochzeiten und eine Traumreise“ (VOX) und „Kessler ist…“ (ZDFneo).

Ende 2013 sicherte sich ITV Studios Germany die Rechte an der TV-Version der erfolgreichen App „Quizduell“. Im Mai 2014 ging die Quizshow, bei der es dem Zuschauer zum ersten Mal mittels App möglich war, live gegen die Studiokandidaten zu spielen, im Ersten für erstmals auf Sendung.

Name: Medische Oncologie
Description:

Het verenigingstijdschrift, dat wordt gepubliceerd door uitgeverij BPM Medica en in juni 1998 voor het eerst verscheen, heeft als uitgangspunt de leden (internist-oncologen) op de hoogte te houden van het laatste NVMO-nieuws, de laatste klinisch-wetenschappelijke ontwikkelingen binnen het vakgebied en over aan de (medische) oncologie gerelateerde beleidsmatige, politieke, economische en maatschappelijke ontwikkelingen. Medische Oncologie draagt bij aan de kennis- en meningsvorming van de internist-oncoloog op deze gebieden.

Name: The Middle East Leaders
Description:
The Middle East Leaders is a leading media and PR outlet and magazine dedicated to identifying influential movers and shakers who drive change in the Middle East. Dealing with deep levels of analysis, exclusive interviews, and sector insights makes it one of the most trusted outlets for professionals and leaders working to do better.
The Middle East Leaders focuses more on business achievements, strategic innovation, and regional success stories, revealing the significant contributions of entrepreneurs, industry leaders, and changemakers who make a tremendous difference in progress in the Middle East. It is a comprehensive platform for professional aspirants and established professionals to achieve goals.
How The Middle East Leaders Adds Value:
    • Success Stories in Focus: This site comes alive with impressive leadership success stories and the history of milestones made by innovators and leaders, inspiring those who follow such success. Strategic PR and Industry Insights: Middle East Leaders consolidate the brand presence and credibility of businesses and people by providing them with expert content and campaigns for this requirement.

    • Access of Insight: This website communicates strategies influencing regional industries by sharing interviews with top executives and deep analysis.

    • Reaching a Wider Audience: Reaching over 180,000+ professional C-suite readers and 450,000+ digital magazine subscribers, the Middle East leaders ensures that the feature profiles connect with a diverse, global audience through both print and digital editions.

    • Platform of Development and Innovation: The medium explores the opportunities and brings awareness among experts and organizations through practical insights highlighting frontier strategies and initiatives.

The Middle East Leaders is a union of media acumen and PR savvy, a platform for individuals and organizations to win, lead, and give back to the region's continuous march.

Name: Clean Energy Wire | CLEW
Description:
Clean Energy Wire CLEW produces & facilitates quality journalism about Europe's move to climate neutrality. Drawing from 10 years of expertise in covering all relevant topics of Germany's Energiewende, we collaborate with our global network to create the media sphere to support evidence-based, fair, democratic and globally connected climate action.

Nearly 6,000 subscribers have signed up for a CLEW newsletter, 2,700 of them get the daily briefing. 

Our user survey showed the journalists who use our website are experienced professionals from all types of media, mostly focusing on energy and climate topics. Our other users work for a wide range of employers, from companies and business associations to NGOs  and government agencies and diplomats.

Clean Energy Wire CLEW covers the big stories and news on Germany's Energiewende and provides regular updates on the EU and key member states with well-researched, fact-based and nuanced reporting and background information. As a foundation-funded non-profit outfit, we are independent of business, political or other special interests. 

We help with research, dig out data, and establish contacts with relevant players in governments, businesses and civil society. We offer research tours and workshops that put international journalists right at the heart of the key energy transition stories.

The CLEW Journalism Network is a platform run by and for journalists for the exchange of knowledge and ideas, and for collaborative projects on climate and energy.   

CLEW can offer its services free of charge to journalists thanks to its funders, Stiftung Mercator and the European Climate Foundation. The CLEW team also runs award-winning German-language climate science communication site klimafakten.de.

Name: Ardmore Studios
Description:
Ardmore Studios has been home to international TV and film productions in Ireland for over 50 years. It is located in Bray, Co. Wicklow and was founded by Louis Elliman and Emmet Dalton in 1958.

Featuring Ireland's only four walled studio and a host of on-site production and post-production facilities. Ardmore has hosted an array of Irish and International productions over its history including 'The Tudors', 'Camelot', 'Braveheart' and 'Reign of Fire' to name but a few. Today Ardmore offers 5 large sound stages, including a water tank facility with a camera pit.

Ranging in area from 3,000 to 15,000 square feet, our five sound stages are at the core of Ardmore's activities and capable of accommodating productions of all sizes and budgets.

Facilities Include:
5 Stages
Water Tank Facility
Digital Sound Facilities - Ardmore Sound
Lighting Facilities
Art Departments
Workshops and prop stores
Production offices
Make-up, hair and wardrobe department.
Fully Equipped Restaurant and Bar

The Studios have since played host to over 100 films; attracting international directors, actors and producers who have created films that reached audiences far beyond their Irish birthplace.

Name: TV JOJ
Description:
Už dávno nie sme „len“ televízia.
Sme tvorcami najväčšieho lokálneho obsahu v tejto krajine.
Sme tiež veľkým koproducentom a tvorcom filmovej produkcie .
Rovnako sme silnou obchodnou video platformou najvýznamnejších domácich publisherov na webe.
Sme najväčšia mediálna skupina s najširším pokrytím na Slovensku.
A ako najväčšia slovenská mediálna skupina máme najširší zásah, a to až s 15 televíznymi stanicami, s viac ako 40 webovými portálmi a s takmer 1 300 000 fanúšikmi na sociálnych sieťach (Facebook + Instagram + YouTube).
S našim najširším pokrytím na Slovensku nás vie sledovať 100 % obyvateľstva, naše stanice a weby sú voľne dostupné, tematické a vyskladané tak, aby pokryli každú vekovú a sociálnu skupinu. V čase meniacich sa potrebiteľských návykov si stále dokážeme udržať pozornosť televízneho i online publika, ako aj dominantný trhový podiel na sledovanosti. Našou misiou je kráčať spolu s divákom a poskytnúť mu relevantný obsah tam, kde sa práve nachádza a kde ho očakáva. Tým sa nám darí vytvoriť aj pre klientov bezkonkurenčnú obchodnú ponuku.
Čas sledovania televíznej aj online produkcie medziročne rastie, čomu sa priebežne prispôsobujeme a neustále skvalitňujeme náš obsah. Zamestnávame najviac producentov v tejto krajine, pretože chápeme, že lokálna produkcia je v časoch otvoreného medzinárodného trhu kľúčová.
Rodina, zábava, talenty, filmy, seriály, nápady, emócie, investigatíva, regióny, pomoc, spoločenská zodpovednosť a odvaha... To všetko nás definuje.
Pracujeme s najlepšími a pre najlepších na tomto trhu. 
Buďte pri tom s nami!
Iba S VAMI máme zmysel.

At DN Media Group, we are at the forefront of the publishing industry, driving excellence in sectors such as business, shipping, seafood, and energy. We are dedicated to enriching the knowledge of our readers and elevating their businesses.

Name: Theorist Media
Description:
Theorist is a Raleigh and Los Angeles based digital production studio that owns and operates five of the world's largest and most influential YouTube shows. With a combined 45 Million subscribers and 8+ Billion total views, the network of Theory channels are a modern-day Mythbusters, educating viewers while unearthing the secrets behind gaming, food, film, and fashion. Theorist has been nominated for 15 Streamy Awards and won 9 across various categories. It has developed multiple YouTube Originals productions and created groundbreaking events in the creator space including Creators In Fashion (2024), the first creator-led runway show, and massive charity collaborations that included 50+ of the world's biggest YouTube creators (2019-2022). Theorist is also producing high-quality fandom apparel with its fashion brand Lumen and is producing lore-filled music with its LoreFi mystery-meets-music channel.

Theorist Inc. is a thought-leader in the creator economy whose founders (Matthew Patrick and Stephanie Patrick) have been ambassadors to dignitaries and world leaders from the White House to the Pope, and whose leaders have spoken across the world as advocates for the future of the Creator Economy.

Name: Sallys Welt
Description: Sally, die gebürtige Badenerin erblickte als eines von fünf Geschwistern im Jahr 1988 in Bruchsal das Licht der Welt. Schon als Kind interessierte sie sich für das Kochen, Backen und die Kunst. Als Kind einer türkischen Familie genoss sie den Einblick in zwei unterschiedliche Kulturen und vereinte diese in ihren Werken, seien es Bilder oder kulinarische Genüsse.Noch vor dem Abitur im Jahr 2008 heiratete sie ihren Mann Murat, einen gebürtigen Schwaben mit türkischen Wurzeln. Er ist neben der gemeinsamen Tochter Samira auch ein Bestandteil der Youtube-Videos und trägt – auf seine schwäbische Art und Weise – der Unterhaltung bei.

Name: Roquette Pinto Comunicação Educativa
Description:
Educação e Comunicação. Somos uma organização social pioneira no campo da comunicação especializada em educação. Produzimos soluções transformadoras, de alta qualidade e economicamente viáveis, gerando valor social para o país.

Tudo começa com uma equipe de especialistas das áreas da educação e da comunicação, que gera conteúdos criativos, acessíveis e direcionados às necessidades, desafios e desejos de educadores e alunos, bem como de surdos e ouvintes.

Além disso, dispomos de uma infraestrutura que oferece produções em alta definição (FHD), com distribuição satelital e multiplataforma (TV, computador, tablet, celular e smart TV) por streaming e vídeos sob demanda (VoD), gestão de acervo, entre outros serviços que permeiam toda a cadeia produtiva audiovisual.

Projetos:

TV Escola - A ACERP é parceira da TV Escola desde a sua criação. Idealizada pelo Ministério da Educação (MEC), em 1995, oferece apoio à melhoria das práticas pedagógicas no país por meio da atualização de professores e da ampliação dos recursos para a aprendizagem de alunos.

TV INES - Nasceu em 2013, resultado da parceria entre o Instituto Nacional de Educação de Surdos (INES) e a ACERP, para disponibilizar conteúdo audiovisual acessível aos surdos. Iniciativa pioneira no Brasil, sua programação prioriza a Língua Brasileira de Sinais (Libras) e conta também com legendas e locução –  integrando os públicos surdo e ouvinte.

•Strategic content partnerships and thought leadership campaigns
•Curated executive events and knowledge partner programs
•Media placement and amplification in major outlets including The Wall Street Journal, The New York Times, and Bloomberg

He has directed documentaries for National Geographic, CBC, and other major broadcasters, and has helped guide companies to billion-dollar valuations through strategic brand and communications work.

Name: Interface Media Group

Interface Media Group (IMG) is Washington DC’s premier creative media agency. IMG develops, creates, and manages all aspects of media, across every platform and in all mediums. 

Our team is comprised of inspired producers, artists, and technicians. These highly talented professionals work in tandem - providing a seamless range of media services designed to meet the evolving needs of our clients.

Our clients and portfolio span a broad range of markets: broadcast; corporate; museum and fine arts; political; government; agency; and independent production. 

IMG thrives on developing unique solutions and delivering excellence. From producing feature films that touch the heart; creating interactive museum exhibits that expand the mind; designing and coding original, branded websites; to executing viral marketing campaigns, IMG operates in a 360° production environment. 

IMG has been in business for more than 40 years, evolving with this dynamic industry. Change is not something to fear or be wary of – at IMG we incorporate it into our ethos, as change is the one true constant in our field.

Description:
urbanuncut. stands as a forward-thinking film production and service production company, dedicated to turning your creative aspirations into cinematic reality.

Our unmatched on-the-ground local knowledge, combined with an extensive international network, means that we know precisely where to source everything you require. Description:

Het is onderdeel van FD Media Groep en biedt duizenden beleggingsprofessionals al ruim een decennium lang dagelijks relevant nieuws en achtergrondinformatie over actuele ontwikkelingen in de beleggingsindustrie. Daarnaast is Investment Officer Nederland gelieerd aan haar zusterplatformen in België en Luxemburg. 

De onafhankelijk redactie bestaat uit ervaren journalisten die beschikken over een brede inhoudelijke expertise. Bovendien hebben zij toegang tot een omvangrijk netwerk van beslissers, die werkzaam zijn in de beleggingsindustrie in de Benelux. Onze onafhankelijke redactie zich op drie pijlers: 
• Ontwikkelingen in de sector 
• Verdiepende inzichten over beleggingen 
• Opinies van onafhankelijke experts 

Daarnaast biedt het platform ook dagelijks inzicht en opinies van meer dan 70 asset managers, fondsanalyse, modelportefeuilles, webinars en nog veel meer. 

www.investmentofficer.nl | m: info@investmentofficer.com

Description:
Zavzemamo se za podjetnejšo Slovenijo. Slogan Podjetna Slovenija zajema vrednote podjetnosti, ambicioznosti, inovativnosti, entuziastičnosti, zagnanosti, inovativnosti, kreativnosti, energičnosti, samozavestnosti, vizionarstva, angažiranosti, perspektivnosti …, pa tudi odgovornosti, svobodomiselnosti in konstruktivnosti.

Poslanstvo podjetja Izziv X, d. o. o., je prispevati k osveščanju slovenske javnostjo o pomenu vrednote podjetnosti za blaginjo in boljše življenje vseh prebivalk in prebivalcev Slovenije. Zato Izziv X, d. o. o., z revijo in s spletnimi pogovori Podjetna Slovenija želi okrepiti vrhunsko in odgovorno podjetništvo v Sloveniji.

Naš izziv je torej tesno povezan z izzivi naše domovine.

Name: Pro Shop
Description:
Pro Shop is a media and commerce company connecting golf with mainstream culture. Founded in 2023 by veteran media executives Chad Mumm and Mark Olsen (Vox Media), Joe Purzycki (Puck), and David Miller (PGA TOUR), Pro Shop brings together world-class storytelling, premium content, and innovative commerce.

The company’s portfolio includes Pro Shop Studios, its entertainment division and the PGA TOUR’s preferred production partner in Hollywood, producing Netflix hits Full Swing and Happy Gilmore 2; Skratch, a leading digital media brand at the intersection of golf and culture; Sugarloaf Social Club, a bespoke golf commerce brand; and GolfWRX, the internet’s most trusted destination for golf news, gear reviews, and community.

Pro Shop has offices across Los Angeles, Ponte Vedra Beach, New York City, and Washington, DC.

Name: eTrends Magazin
Description:
eTrends ist das junge Schweizer Fachmagazin, das den Trends in den Bereichen Elektrotechnik, Smart Building, Gebäudeautomation, Smart Home, Multimedia, ICT, Energie, Licht, IoT, eMobility, BIM/VDC, Normen und Weiterbildungen nachspürt. Es liefert vertiefte Grundlagen, Hintergrund-Stories, Studien und Marktanalysen und illustriert sie mit hochwertigen Bildern und Grafiken. eTrends setzt Massstäbe und hat den Anspruch, die führende Fachzeitschrift für elektrische Energiefragen und Lösungen in der Schweiz zu sein.

Die Zeitschrift richtet sich einerseits an Firmeninhaber, Entscheider sowie das höhere Kader auf den Ebenen Planung und Installation, andererseits an Fachplaner, Ingenieure, Installateure, den Multimedia- Fachhandel und die Forschung.

Ziel ist die gesamtheitliche Betrachtung der vernetzten elektrischen Energieszene in der Schweiz. Wir berichten darüber, was heute Trend und morgen State of the Art ist, und worauf die Branche vorbereitet sein sollte. eTrends-Leser erhalten einen Mehrwert, sie sind am Puls der Zeit.

Name: The Jacky Winter Group
Description:
The Jacky Winter Group represents the best commercial talent in the contemporary applied arts.

We connect a hand-picked selection of artists and image-makers from a diversity of disciplines with the world's biggest brands and most exciting projects. 

Our roster is backed by a crack team of professionals in our specialty branches, where we keep things running like an elegant (but not too showy) Swiss watch.

As fellow creators, we love to tackle the oddest of challenges. From the simplest illustration or animation to sell-out events or a twenty-four-hour photo shoot, we've wrestled it all. And won.

The creative industry needs healthy, well-fed artists. That's where we come in — we build careers, keep the money flowing, and shepherd hundreds of commissions every year through to joyful fruition.

Our favourite recipe? Take a challenging brief, something we've never seen before, and add a brilliant team. Smoosh them together, strap in, and set everything in motion. That thing that happens? It's the tastiest.

To view our artists and more of our recent work, head on over to http:///www.jackywinter.com/

Name: Early Learning Nation
Description:
Early Learning Nation is an independent magazine devoted to early learning (0-5 years), reporting on groundbreaking research, early learning policy and best practices in the field.

Our mission

Early Learning Nation magazine creates journalism from, and for, the early learning field. Our journalists have unique access and insights to the challenges and successes of all-things-early-childhood, and we publish stories that support policymakers, researchers, scientists, advocates and families in creating equitable and groundbreaking work in their communities and lives.

With the shuttering of independent news providers over the last five years, and the loss of so many education and early childhood beats in the outlets that do remain, our communities are hungry for information—and connection.

Early Learning Nation magazine publishes work from all over this complex landscape, including:

* Groundbreaking research from the science of the developing brain
* Case studies in policy and advocacy that demonstrate winning strategies
* Interviews and deep dives with authors, practitioners and innovators

And so much more.

You can follow along with our work by signing up for our monthly newsletter, joining us on Substack, following us on LinkedIn and other social media, or viewing our interviews from our pop-up Early Learning Nation Studio on our YouTube channel. We’re glad you’re here.

Name: HRmedia | اچآرمدیا
Description:
اچآر مدیا بر اساس ایده مشترک جمعی از فعالین منابع انسانی، روزنامهنگاری و روابط عمومی شکل گرفته است.
 این گروه معتقد است که ظرفیتهای رسانهای موجود در حوزه سرمایههای انسانی و محیطهای کار ایران مغفول مانده و ادامه مسیر تعالی منابع انسانی بدون وجود یک رسانه مستقل و تخصصی سخت خواهد بود.

اچآر مدیا زیرنظر شورای سردبیری فعالیت میکند و در تلاش است تا رسانه تخصصی و ویژهای باشد که با دیدهبانی و آگاهیبخشی، عملکرد این حوزه مهم از کالبد کسبوکارها را برای حرکت در مسیر بهبود مستمر تسهیل کند. همچنین این رسانه میکوشد تا در کنار هویتبخشی به جامعه منابع انسانی ایران، مبنای شناخت موجودیتهای جامعه از یکدیگر و به تبع آن، همافزا نیز باشد.

فلسفه شکلگیری اچآرمدیا استقلال رسانهای است و از همین رو در زمینه فعالیتهای خود تنها به اصول حرفهای روزنامهنگاری، قوانین موجود و منافع کلی جامعه منابع انسانی ایران مقید است.

اچآر مدیا رسانهای برای تمامی دغدغهمندان، فعالان و علاقمندان است تا نقش محوری انسان در کسبوکارها را بیش از پیش تحکیم بخشیده و نسبت به شانیت و جایگاه آن حساس باشد. چرا که رشد سرزمینی ایران فقط از مسیر توجه به سرمایههای انسانی میگذرد.

Name: Macguffin Co.
Description:
The Macguffin Company is a multimedia franchise development company based in Seattle, Washington. We curate promising concepts to develop into books, films, games, and merchandise.

If a Concept is greenlit, we create a Pilot. That is, we assemble creative teams to storyboard, illustrate, write, and strategize about turning the concept into a multimedia franchise - and develop a prototype. 

If the Pilot is greenlit, it means we think we have something - a character, a storyline, a world - worth investing time, energy and money to fully develop. So we’ll work with an SEC registered intermediary to launch an investment offering. An Offering is an invitation to invest in a share of the future revenue of the franchise. 

With the capital raised, we’ll fully develop the franchise and license the intellectual property rights to media partners, generating returns for creatives and investors.

Description: Everyone looks like they’ve got it all -  the success, the confidence, the perfect life. But that’s not the full story. I ask the questions that usually end with… “NO COMMENT.”

For Companies:

Browse over 50,000 creative profiles by location, skillset, experience and rates or post a project to receive quotes from freelance talent in minutes. 

There is no cost to source talent and we don't take commission so you can engage with high-end content creators whilst keeping costs down. 

Freelancer Club promotes Ethical Hiring with a focus on fair payment, inclusion and diversity. 

Past clients include 100s of new startups and established brands such as John Lewis, BBC, Virgin, ASOS, M&S, and Vivienne Westwood.

Name: The Student Radio Association
Description:
We are the representative body which supports and acts on behalf of the UK student radio community. Representing any radio station which is linked to a place of eduction - such as universities and colleges.


We exist to encourage and facilitate communication between student stations, to assist in their development, and to offer support and advice to new stations just setting up.

The SRA also runs the national Student Radio Awards every November - celebrating the best in student radio in the UK as well as an annual conference and training days throughout the year. See our website for more details!

Name: Acumen
Description:
Acumen Media is one of the world's biggest Film producers focused specifically on B2B storytelling. We create award-winning documentaries, executive interviews, and films, telling global stories on a global level. With our highly skilled creatives, producers, marketers, distributors, and journalists, we inspire discussions about the future of business and our communities.

Acumen Media is an innovative media production group built on 5 pillars:
-Stories
-Crew
-Engage
-Film
-Lounge

Founded in 2015, we work with organisations in both the public and private sector to share the right stories, using the right content at the right time, showcasing their impact through the power of filmmaking.

Our award-winning team of filmmakers and storytellers partner closely with organisations worldwide covering key issues in sustainability, healthcare, technology, and more. We immerse ourselves in understanding each film vision, mission and values to develop scripts and visual narratives tailored specifically for their goals and audience.

Some highlights of our work:

- Produce over 400 documentaries and interviews globally annually.
- Original series on business leadership and innovation acquired millions of views.
- Work regularly with organisations such as the UN, WHO, WEF as well Hitachi, Siemens, L’Oreal, Intel, Microsoft and many more.
- Present in 4 continents with offices around the world.

At Acumen Media, we leverage the power of storytelling to amplify purposeful missions.

Name: Creamer Media
Description:
Creamer Media was founded by Martin Creamer in 1981. On 13 March 1981, the first edition of Engineering News was published.

Today, Creamer Media’s stable has grown to include Mining Weekly, Engineering News Online, MiningWeekly.com, Polity.org.za and online business databases the Research Channel Africa and MiningWeekly.com Research.

News is generated from the main newsroom in Johannesburg with bureaus in Toronto and Perth as well as contributors in a number of African Countries.

Name: CPi worldwide
Description:
CPi worldwide journals are trade journals for the concrete and precast concrete industry that are published in 10 different language editions in more than 170 countries. These trade journals feature practical editorial on production and applications, and research and development for the concrete products industry. 

All issues show a comprehensive categorization of topics addressed in separate sections. The editorials include product information and case stories as well as technical and scientific articles about concrete technology, concrete products/cast stone, concrete pipes, precast concrete, readymix concrete and international events.

No matter where in the world you are located, more than likely, CPI has an edition to meet your language requirements.  And no matter where in the world you are located, CPI will deliver up-to-date technical information that will assist you in your concrete profession.

Visit our website and read selected articles, browse the buyers' guide, and subscribe.

Aujourd’hui basée à Bordeaux, Saint-Emilion et à Poitiers, elle est experte dans les domaines de la publicité, la réalisation de vidéos, l’image, la production, le montage, la création sonore, l’incrustation numérique, le motion design, l’intégration d’effets spéciaux comme dans la gestion de ces contenus.

Nous élaborons, en accompagnement étroit, des contenus créatifs, chartés et stratégiques pertinents (messages, formats, durées…) en haute définition. 

Grenouilles Productions a été fondée en 2012 à Poitiers par Gildas Nivet et Tristan Guerlotté,

Name: Go Pyrate!
Description:
Tired of a dehumanizing workplace and a low impact job?
No one will come to save you: you will have to improve your situation yourself.

Fortunately, you are not alone! Go Pyrate! is here to teach you how to be a progressive change agent, how to experiment without permission, how to make a constructive mess, without losing your job!

Join us via our podcast, our videos or our blog to benefit from our expertise and our experience, with intelligence and humor, without costing you a penny.

Do you want more? We offer other services:

- Transform your team into a happy bunch of engaged, motivated and resourceful pyrates

- Get coached to learn how to lead creative, rebellious and rampaging people

Constructive trouble is our expertise!

Name: Australian Children’s Television Foundation (ACTF)
Description:
The ACTF is committed to providing Australian children with entertaining media made especially for them, which makes an enduring contribution to their cultural and educational experience.

Formed in March 1982, we are a national children’s media production and policy hub that performs a wide range of functions in children’s media: as a voice in policy matters; as a distributor of and investor in Australian children’s television series; as an instigator of new, innovative and entertaining children’s media and as a developer of valuable screen resources for the education sector. 

Our vision is to continually raise the stakes in children’s media production, driving higher standards of creativity and innovation, based on the assumption that we should never underestimate children’s desire to be informed and challenged as well as entertained. 

Learn more at actf.com.au. 

Connect with us on our socials:
Facebook: http://fb.me/OzKidsTV
Instagram: http://instagram.com/actf_oz

Name: FX Agency
Description:
Wij zijn FX Agency. 
The digital experience agency. 

Onze kracht is het vertalen van verhalen in spraakmakende ervaringen. Ervaringen die je raken. Ervaringen die je bij blijven. Keer op keer weer.

Onze 40+ FX'ers begrijpen wat er nodig is om een digitale beleving te creëren. Door goed te luisteren en te doorgronden wat je wilt overbrengen. Samen zoeken wij naar manieren om verhalen tot leven te brengen en onvergetelijk te maken. Manieren waarbij mensen onderdeel van je verhaal worden en zich verbonden voelen met je boodschap. 

Met slimme strategie, creatieve storytelling, digital design en de toepassing van innovatieve technieken brengen we verhalen tot leven en creëren we nieuwe werelden. Altijd met een sterk concept als fundament. Door uit te dagen, nieuwe dingen te proberen en door oog te hebben voor onze impact op onze aarde, komen we tot onverwachte digitale creaties. 

Creaties die mensen helpen samen te komen, op andere manieren te kijken en kennis met elkaar te delen. Samen maken we verhalen die je raken en bijblijven.

FX Agency
Where stories come to life
Part of Daymakers.group -> https://daymakers.group/

Description:
Bottle Rocket Media is a Chicago-based, nationally serving video production company specializing in traditional video production, motion graphics, video marketing, SEO, and everything in between. 

We partner with brands, agencies, and businesses, ranging from startups to large corporations, to make an impact through video. With numerous awards, Bottle Rocket Media has proven to be the top video production company in Chicago.

We've created content for United Airlines, Kenmore, Digitas, Glidden, Dyson, American Girl, Chase, MetLife, McDonalds, WeWork, Starbucks, PayPal, Hilton, William Blair, Tempus, TD-Ameritrade, Skywalker Ranch, Walgreens, American Marketing Association, Boston Scientific, Aon Hewitt, American Dental Association, Discover Card, Nabisco, Morton Salt, ADIDAS, Chicago Cubs, Centro, The Second City, National Restaurant Association, S.O.S Pads, The First Years, Pabst Brewing Co, and Epsilon to name just a few.

Name: LandbasedAQ.no
Description:
LandbasedAQ: Nytt magasin og nettside om landbasert fiskeoppdrett.

På nettsiden vil vi presentere innsikt og nyheter primært om landbasert produksjon av laksefisk, men også andre arter, som for eksempel torsk, kveite og rensefisk dekkes. Lukkede (RAS) og semilukkede systemer i sjø dekkes også når det er teknologisk i randsonen til det landbaserte.
Vi dekker det som skjer innenfor fagfeltet landbasert oppdrett både i Norge, men også i resten av verden når det er relevant. Vi kommer til å følge tradisjonen fra Norsk Fiskeoppdrett/Kyst.no med å samarbeide tett med forskningsinstitusjonene for å spre det siste nye innenfor den forskningsbaserte kunnskapsutviklingen. Og vi vil være i tett dialog med næringsaktørerne, både de som produserer fisken og de som produserer utstyr og andre innsatsfaktorer, for å gi både inn- og oversikt.

- LandbasedAQ er eid av Oceanspace Media AS.
- Innholdet i LandbasedAQ er styrt av redaksjonen, og er tilknyttet og underlagt norske medieorganisasjoner og deres presseetiske regelverk som «Vær varsom plakaten» og «Redaktørplakaten».
- LandbasedAQ er gjennom Norsk Fiskeoppdrett AS medlem av Norsk Redaktørforening og Mediebedriftenes landsforening

Name: Chin-wag
Description:
Chin-Wag harnesses the power of conversation to build influence, shape narratives and amplify voices. We create high-impact video campaigns ranging from long-format broadcasts and YouTube documentaries to agile social media content, all grounded in data-driven strategy and creative discipline.

We work with leading brands, founders and public figures to navigate complex reputational landscapes. Our team combines editorial expertise, creative production and strategic insight to help clients take control of their story — shifting public perception, reframing narratives and building trust in moments that matter.

Whether repositioning after controversy, shaping a mission-led brand, or launching a documentary that sparks debate, Chin-wag delivers thoughtful, end-to-end storytelling that changes how audiences see, think and feel.

Name: Poultry Times
Description:
Poultry Times is a leading trade publication dedicated to providing the most up-to-date news and information for the U.S. poultry industry. In addition to our bi-weekly print publication, we also publish fresh, daily content to our website PoultryTimes.com. We provide a free exclusive e-newsletter, The Poultry Report, directly to our subscribers’ inboxes three times per week. 

Poultry Times has been the nation's leading poultry industry publication since 1954. Based in Gainesville, Ga., the heart of poultry country, readers know the publication for providing accurate, concise, and timely content.

Poultry Times reports and writes about research, editorials, features and career insights to give readers a comprehensive picture about poultry as a business. The newspaper and magazine products have shifted online — now offering digital marketing solutions for poultry companies and professionals.

Name: Atlantis Télévision
Description:
Premier fabricant de programmes audiovisuels en France.

Voici plus de dix ans, quinze exactement depuis sa création en 2002, qu’Atlantis évolue dans l’industrie de la télévision.

Atlantis c’est un outil, un conseil, un savoir-faire, une équipe structurée et performante qui aide les producteurs à créer et à fabriquer dans les meilleures conditions, les programmes phares qui vont leur permettre de construire leur présence sur les grilles de programmes ou sur le digital.

Structuré autour de 7 sociétés, toutes complémentaires, le groupe a comme raison d’être la fabrication de programme pour la télévision, la publicité et le e-cinéma.

LEURS MISSIONS ÉTANT :

DANS LE SECTEUR DE LA TÉLÉVISION

Pour ATLANTIS TÉLÉVISION, des prestations de post-production dans nos studios
Pour ATLANTIS ACTIVE, des prestations de post-production « sur mesure » chez nos clients
Pour ATLANTIS TOURNAGE, des prestations de tournage et de location de matériels pour tous types de tournages.

DANS LE SECTEUR DE LA PUBLICITÉ

Pour BACK-UP, des services de conseil et des prestations de post-production à destination du secteur publicitaire.
Pour THE MIXMEN, des services d’audio et de sound editing, de voice over et de mixage.
Pour BLACKBOX, de la production audiovisuelle de contenus publicitaires.

DANS LE SECTEUR DU CINÉMA

Pour DIGITAL FACTORY , la post-production et la localisation de longs-métrages de fictions.

Au cours de ces quinze premières années, avec un chiffre d’affaires croissant de plus de 25% par an,
la marque s’est imposée et a su se faire apprécier de l’ensemble des principaux groupes, pour devenir aujourd’hui leur premier fabricant de programmes.

Name: Internationale Politik
Description:
Die Internationale Politik (IP), herausgegeben von der DGAP, fängt dort an, wo Nachrichten aufhören: Sie liefert klare Analysen und detaillierte Hintergründe zu den komplexen Themen der auswärtigen Politik. Die IP erscheint alle zwei Monate und ist sowohl im Abonnement als auch bundesweit im Bahnhofs- und Flughafenbuchhandel erhältlich.

Seit 2015 hat die IP ein digitales, englischsprachiges Pendant: Mit Internationale Politik Quarterly (vormals Berlin Policy Journal) trägt die DGAP zur Vermittlung deutscher außenpolitischer Perspektiven im Ausland bei.

Die IP richtet sich an Entscheidungsträger:innen und Meinungsführer:innen aus der operativen Politik, der Wirtschaft und den politischen Thinktanks sowie an Medienschaffende, Studierende und die außenpolitisch interessierte Öffentlichkeit.

The project was born as a worldwide philanthropic initiative as advocated by the United Nations and the European Commission to promote worldwide, free of charge, tourism companies and tourism press.

UN PlaneTravelMagazine is supported by the World Peace Wealth Fund Inc legally accredited by United Nation Intergovernmental Organization and United Nation Police IGO, International Special Court of Arbitration and Human Right, UN IGC an the United Nations IGO (Inter-Governmental Organization). Headquarter is based at the United Nations IGO - United Nations Plaza - New York 10017 - USA

The work carried out by the Director of UN PlaneTravelMagazine and his collaborators around the world is on a totally voluntary and philanthropic basis, without any compensation or / and reimbursement of expenses.

The most interesting travel industry posts published on Linkedin will be featured in the magazine to spread business and peace among different people and cultures worldwide. 

The post are published in several languages to allow all companies in the world travel industry to posts their articles.

For more information and to collaborate as voluntarily work to increase and improve this free service to the Linkedin travel industry community please contact the following email: info@planetravelmagazine.com

We would like to thank you very much the World Peace Wealth Fund, colleagues and friends for their fundamental support.

Riccardo Celani
Director
UN PlaneTravelMagazine
Nonprofit Online Media Production Agency

New York 10017 
USA

Name: Media Borne
Description:
Media Borne exists for one reason: building audiences into communities and communities into loyal fanbases. We do that through bold, story-driven video and social content engineered for impact, not just impressions.

Based in the North East, with national coverage, we’ve built the first dedicated green-screen virtual production studio, @Borne studios, with a clear focus: turning original ideas into real, measurable audiences across social media. Our virtual sets aren’t just “cool tech”; they let us design, shoot and iterate video content at the click of a button. That means brands and creators can test ideas, refine what works and scale winning content far faster and more efficiently than traditional video production ever allowed.

Behind the screens is a team of ambitious content strategists, producers and creatives who live and breathe online attention. We’ve helped channels grow past 8.5 million subscribers and driven more than 800 million views across platforms. More importantly, we understand how to turn that attention into genuine communities and long-term fanbases, not just fleeting spikes in views.

We believe IP is the new gold rush. Our job is to help you find the right ideas, shape them into repeatable, ownable formats, and then build the audience that makes them revenue machines. 

Don’t just show up on social. Own the channel. Own the format. Own the audience, Be more Borne.

Name: VPS Verlag Personalvorsorge und Sozialversicherung AG
Description:
Durch eine praxisorientierte und allgemeinverständliche, Interessen und Partei unabhängige Publizistik möchte vps.epas einen Beitrag zum besseren Verständnis für das komplexe Gebiet der beruflichen Vorsorge und der Sozialversicherungen in möglichst breiten Kreisen leisten. vps.epas setzt sich für das bestehende Drei-Säulen-System der sozialen Sicherheit der Schweiz ein. Dabei wird die Vielfalt der Träger, deren Unabhängigkeit und Selbstverwaltung unterstützt.

Wir sind ein kleines familiäres Unternehmen, das in Luzern zuhause ist. Zu unserem Team zählen rund 20 engagierte und fleissige Mitarbeiter und Mitarbeiterinnen. Zudem unterstützen uns rund 100 Fachleute, die mit ihrem Expertenwissen Artikel verfassen und publizieren und gleichzeitig in verschiedenen Fachgruppen tätig sind.

vps.epas ist Herausgeber der monatlich erscheinenden Fachzeitschrift «Schweizer Personalvorsorge» und des wöchentlichen Newsletters «aktuell» sowie der Quartalszeitschrift «Schweizer Sozialversicherung» und dem zweiwöchigen Newsletter «Sozialversicherung aktuell».

Zusätzlich führen wir themenbezogene Tagungen durch und engagieren uns in der Ausbildung von Stiftungsräten und Personen, die mit der beruflichen Vorsorge und den Sozialversicherungen verbunden sind. Ausserdem organisiert vps.epas jedes Jahr eine Fachmesse 2. Säule mit Vorsorge-Symposium, abwechselnd in Zürich und Lausanne.

Aktionäre des vps.epas sind ausschliesslich natürliche Personen, die in der Geschäftsleitung oder als redaktionelle Mitarbeiter und Mitarbeiterinnen tätig sind. So steht vps.epas ein Netzwerk von profilierten Fachleuten als kompetente Autoren, Referentinnen und Dozenten für seine vielfältigen Aktivitäten zur Verfügung.

It all started 28 years ago. Outsider was born with a simple mission: to tell unforgettable stories, make people laugh, and create work that cuts through. Nearly three decades later, that mission still drives us—only now with even more experience, even bigger ideas, and a team that’s stronger than ever.
Since day one, we’ve grown into one of the most respected names in the commercials and production world. Along the way, we’ve built a reputation for high-quality work, creative excellence, and a culture that values fun just as much as craft. That balance hasn’t always been easy to strike, but with our incredible roster of directors, producers, and creatives, we’ve made it look easy—and had a blast doing it.

We’ve collaborated with top creative agencies, media agencies, clients, and brands across the globe, always seeking out new ways to showcase our talent and bring bold ideas to life. Whether it’s a high-concept campaign or a fast-moving shoot, we approach every project with the same energy, curiosity, and love for what we do.

We’re proud of the recognition we’ve received—Production Company of the Year (three times), a shelf full of British Arrows, Cannes Lions, D&AD Pencils, and more—but our real pride is the team behind it all. Name: Middle East News Agency (MENA)  وكالة أنباء الشرق الأوسط
Description:
Historical Background:

The Middle East News Agency was established on 15 December 1955. 

MENA is now one of strongest regional news agencies and the biggest Arab and African agency as it rated 11th on the list of international news agencies (according to UNESCO's report). 

At the beginning, MENA's service was available in Arabic only with a daily transmission estimated in dozens. Yet, MENA subscribers now receive an average of 1000 items daily, with an around-the-clock transmission of quarter of a million words in Arabic, English and French, covering all parts of the world, a matter which prompted the UNESCO to place MENA 11th on the list of world agencies.


MENA transmits now 250,000 words round the clock in Arabic, English, and French and its news services reach the four corners of the world.
