Name: CIO Bulletin
Description:
CIO Bulletin is an interactive, preeminent leadership platform serving as a central resource for information on Business & Information Technology (IT) leaders and their entrepreneurial ventures. From celebrating innovation to identifying best practices and providing a forum for today’s CIOs and other technology decision makers, CIO Bulletin aspires to keep its readers informed about how the techie giants, governments and consumers are unfurling organizational innovation in the Business & IT world.

Tailored to meet different ends of services, our highly customizable advertisements, promotional portfolios and editorial work for the print as well as online community generates successful marketing and branding strategies for one and all. The CIO Bulletin platform rightly serves all leading Biz Leaders as well as the technologically advanced ecosystem that surrounds and interacts with them. Through our peer-based and solutions-oriented approach, we successfully provide our readers with a better understanding of the role IT Management plays in shaping corporate strategies and achieving corporate goals.
Leveraging the efficient use of IT Resources and coming closer to
bridge the technology gap between the creator and the user.
Because we know and understand you!

VISION:
CIO Bulletin seeks to promote a bright and promising future for the Biz leaders through strategic use of IT awareness and Management skills. We seek to drive efficiency and accelerate gcol-sm-12th across Entrepreneurial ventures, Government bodies and the public at large, urging innovation yet protecting market resources and more effectually, sharing resources amongst the various market stakeholders.

MISSION
CIO Bulletin is the right forum for exchanging and sharing thoughts on IT management. Our mission is to assist Biz leaders in practices related to the creation, liberalization, usage and sharing of products and resources. We also aspire to help decision-makers make the ‘right choice’ in restructuring their enterprises and venture out for achieving their targets through a more organized and better informed approach.

OBJECTIVES:
CIO Bulletin serves the following key objectives:

1) Achieve, establish and coordinate ‘mutually beneficial relationships’ between IT Management leaders, governments and their customers.

2) Carry out ‘Effective Research, and Develop Recommendations’ on information technology policies and their implementation, through a well-informed and expert in-house team of researchers.

3) Deliver innovative editorial content that keeps readers, CIOs and other decision makers ‘hooked’.

4) ‘Facilitate free flow of information’ by sharing experiences of various leaders, their ideas behind successful ventures, best practices, and innovative approaches related to IT management.

5) ‘Promote and collaborate community building’ among CIOs and other management officials for purposes of sharing knowledge about best practices, and developing a unified approach for addressing future IT challenges, if any.

Name: Medical Channel Asia
Description:
Medical Channel Asia (MCA) was started with the mission of helping information-seekers cut through the clutter online and provide credible, researched and useful health information. Consumers often need to wade through a deluge of information that appears with every search result and determine the credibility, usefulness, and potential inaccuracies and misinformation. MCA was created in 2020 to fill the critical need of helping consumers access medical information from trustworthy sources and healthcare professionals.

Our commitment is to provide timely and regular health information and news specifically catered to the global Asian audience. The content provided in MCA is designed to be most suited for the Asian context and body-type. All content is developed by a medically-trained editorial team in consultation with licensed healthcare practitioners from around the world. All content provided on MCA is meant for informational purposes only and not as a substitute for personal health and medical advice from a healthcare professional. 

If you have a question or comment for the editorial team, please feel free to contact us at editor@medicalchannelasia.com.

Depuis sa création, Coyote n’a eu de cesse de se renouveler et de s’adapter aux évolutions du marché en s’adressant continuellement à l’ensemble de ses acteurs. En produisant autant pour les grandes chaines nationales que pour toutes les chaines de la TNT, les grandes marques et les nouveaux médias, Coyote s’impose comme l’un des principaux producteurs indépendants français.

Aujourd’hui la société se développe autour de 4 grands pôles : le flux (Talk Show, Jeux, Factual Entertainment), le digital (Brand content, Web serie, Chaîne Youtube), la fiction et le documentaire.

Name: Lux Stage
Description:
The Lux Stage at Trilith located in Atlanta, Georgia USA is one of the world's most advanced virtual production facilities.

By leveraging the latest in technology combined with best-in-class services and talent, we enable storytellers to deploy immersive backdrops and realistic lighting reflections to achieve dynamic In-Camera-VFX.

Whether Film/Episodic, Commercial, Broadcast or Live Event, the Lux Stage offers an industry-proven solution to support your creative endeavors.

For over a decade our team has amassed thousands of hours on set implementing in-camera solutions, establishing ourselves as industry leaders in both creative and technical implementation. The Lux Stage team is supported by a larger ecosystem of engineers, technical artists, color scientists, and production experts, facilitating projects across the globe.

The Lux Stage at Trilith is one of the world's most advanced virtual production facilities, featuring a fully enclosed 80’ x 90’ x 30’ virtual production volume within an 18,000 sqft purpose-built sound stage. The volume includes an LED ceiling that can be split and moved into independent units to allow for flexible lighting setups. The panels are integrated into a first-of-its-kind structure that enables creatives to 'punch out' portions of the LED screen and replace them with lights, cameras, or even stunt rigging.

Lux Stage is powered by our production tested and industry approved ARCA media servers, capable of deploying both video playback for plates and 3D game engine-driven environments.

Trilith Studios is the largest purpose-built movie studio in North America with an emphasis on world-class facilities, state-of-the-art technology and premium content. Set across 700 acres, Trilith Studios has more than one and a half million square feet of production facilities, including 32 premium sound stages, construction workshops, costume shops, virtual production technologies, and an extensive 400-acre backlot.

Name: T24
Description:
Hiçbir kişi, kurum, kuruluş ve oluşumla doğrudan, dolaylı ya da rastlantısal bir ilişkisi bulunmayan bağımsız internet gazetesi T24, 1 Eylül 2009’da yayına başladı.

T24; çalışmaları Türkiye’deki başlıca gazetecilik ödüllerine değer görülen Doğan Akın’ın yönetiminde kurucu editörler Metin Yener, Belde Bozkurt Oral ve Selin Ongun tarafından yayına hazırlandı, kurucu yazarlar Aydın Engin ve Oya Baydar ile yola koyuldu. Kurucu ekibe editör olarak katılan Hazal Özvarış, yazı işleri müdürlüğünü üstlendi.

Finansal dayatma ve ideolojik takıntılardan bağımsız gazetecilikte Türkiye’de önemli bir dönemeci ifade eden T24, yayına başladıktan kısa bir süre sonra, 2010 yılında, Türkiye Gazeteciler Cemiyeti’nin çalışmalarını ödüle değer gördüğü tek internet gazetesi oldu. T24 yazarlarından Hasan Cemal, Harvard Üniversitesi Nieman Gazetecilik Vakfı'nın "Dürüstlük ve Vicdan Ödülü"nü Türkiye'den alan (2015) ilk ve tek gazeteci oldu.

T24; hiçbir görüş ve inancı haberciliğin önüne koymayan, insanları, inançları, görüşleri dışlamayan yayın politikası, haberciliği, dosyaları ve söyleşileri ile Türkiye’de bütün kesimlerin güvendiği bir mecra olarak öne çıktı.

Kısa bir zamanda medyada en çok referans gösterilen az sayıda mecra arasına giren T24, bağımsız gazeteciliğin kurumlaşması yolunda Türkiye’de gerçekleştirilen en ciddi projelerden biri olarak yayınlarını sürdürüyor.

Name: LEF Media
Description:
Jij en je collega’s verdienen het om gezien te worden. Door je publiek, klanten en trouwste fans. Maar, hoe zichtbaar zijn jullie nu? Het is tijd om lef te tonen om je doelgroep écht aan te spreken en te raken.

Als energieke lefhebbers gaan we samen met jullie aan de slag om het bedrijf een gezicht te geven en jullie pure verhaal vol vertrouwen vast te leggen op camera. Dit doen we door middel van vlogs, video’s, vodcasts, shorts, Reels en workshops. 

Hierin zetten we jouw collega’s centraal. Als lefhebbers voor, en van, je business. Niet omdat het moet, maar omdat ze dat willen.

We treden samen buiten de gebaande paden om originaliteit, creativiteit en lef samen te vatten in elk frame wat we voor je uitdenken en maken. We maken er een feest van, zwengelen de boel aan en zorgen dat de menselijke kant van het bedrijf eraf spat, vliegt en druipt.

Dikke resultaten, blijvende trots en waardering in elke vezel is wat jullie ervoor terug krijgen. 

En jullie aantrekkingskracht als bedrijf? Die was nog nooit zo groot.

Want wij zorgen dat jullie van ongezien naar onvergetelijk gaan.

Name: Printed Electronics Now
Description:
Printed Electronics Now is an online and printed publication devoted to the fast growing field of flexible and printed electronic products, an emerging industry that promises to revolutionize the methods in which electronic components and systems are manufactured.

As our name indicates, printed electronics is happening now, and will continue to be a major force in electronics now and into the future. Printed electronics means that electronic circuits and components – even the intelligent chips themselves – can literally be printed in place on a variety of substrates, over areas both large and small. They can be flexible and they can be inexpensive, which opens up many new opportunities in a wealth of markets.

Printed electronics covers solar cells, batteries, displays, sensors, medical devices, military equipment, and much more. In the near future, the world will be treated to displays on packages, on pharmaceuticals that remind users when to take the drugs, more advanced electronic readers, flexible dashboard displays in vehicles, printed solar panels, and disposable devices that promise to revolutionize medical testing.

Because the industry is embryonic, the need for the timely dissemination of information is critical. That’s the role of Printed Electronics Now.

Printed Electronics Now is your resource for a wealth of information about the industry:

* Breaking News
* Feature Articles
* White Papers
* Industry Events
* Glossary of Industry Terms
* Directory of Companies
* Calendar of Events

Printed Electronics Now chronicles the emergence and growth of this thrilling industry through in-depth articles, research papers, news of the moment, and detailed references that help bring printed electronics professionals closer together.

As one of only a handful of companies that deliver expertise in merging virtual scenery, branding and live film, Myreze holds a great advantage in the broadcast industry as we possess the passion and resources necessary to not only operate advanced technologies, but to push the boundaries of their creative limits.

From virtual production, 3D animation and 3D design to motion graphics, brand identities and website design - Our passion and expertise reaches all areas of creative production. We believe that every brand deserves a strong identity and that technology can be leveraged to achieve almost anything.

Name: REPREZENT
Description: Reprezent Radio is the UK’s leading youth-led radio station, broadcasting on 107.3FM and online. Founded to provide a platform for young creatives, we empower the next generation of broadcasters, DJs, and media professionals by giving them hands-on industry experience. Known for championing emerging talent and underground sounds, we showcase the best in hip-hop, grime, electronic, and alternative music while tackling important social issues through conversation and debate. Many of our alumni have gone on to shape the music and media industries, making Reprezent a launchpad for fresh voices and future stars. More than just a radio station, we are a movement dedicated to amplifying young voices and culture.

Name: RTV Oost
Description:
Oost is dé regionale omroep voor Overijssel. De veelzijdigheid van onze provincie, met haar eigenzinnige dorpen, authentieke steden en haar rijke culturele historie, maken Overijssel tot een kleurrijke provincie.
 
Oost brengt je het nieuws en reportages en verhalen die jou boeien, verbinden en raken. Wij luisteren naar jouw stem en willen die met de wereld delen, wanneer het er toe doet. Met een scherp oog voor wat er speelt, zijn we kritisch en onafhankelijk.
 
Oost verkent en verlegt grenzen en brengt het verhaal vanuit verschillende perspectieven, ook voor ondernemend Overijssel. Bij Oost draait het vooral om jou: wij inspireren en activeren je om deel te nemen aan het versterken van onze samenleving. Je bent thuis bij Oost, thuis in Overijssel.
 
Volg jij ons al? Op radio, televisie, online, via YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok of gewoon hier, op Linkedin?

Name: CISO community Nederland
Description:
CISO community Nederland provides a platform for Chief Information Security Officers (CISOs) and cybersecurity professionals in the Netherlands. By bringing together the top talents in the sector, we will be able to share knowledge, exchange experiences, and work together with the ultimate goal of increasing cyber awareness and cyber resilience in a quick-moving digital world.

The community aims to increase cybersecurity maturity in The Netherlands, reposition cybersecurity in the boardroom, contribute to knowledge development, stimulate the conversation between relevant stakeholders, and create a cybersecurity domain ecosystem that helps security providers shape their roadmaps.

Dimitri van Zantvliet, Director of Cybersecurity and CISO at Dutch Railways, and Rob Beijleveld, CEO of ICT Media are the founders of CISO community Nederland. They noticed the CISO role has matured fast. Increasingly, CISOs report directly to the board. Cybersecurity has become Chefsache and CISOs deserve their own place. Therefore it makes sense that they are represented by an independent community that can act as a separate stakeholder. 

With support from ICT Media, workshops, roundtables, and events will be organized, like the annual CISODAY, held every Spring, where a CISO of the Year will be chosen. There will be a public content platform, cisocommunity.nl, and a member-only environment to exchange tips and knowledge securely.

Name: Malaysian National News Agency (BERNAMA)
Description:
The Malaysian National News Agency or BERNAMA, a statutory body, was set up by an Act of Parliament in 1967 and began operations in May 1968.

A five-member Supervisory Council appointed by the Yang di-Pertuan Agong is created to ensure that BERNAMA is always guided by the provisions of the Act in implementing its objectives.

BERNAMA is managed by a Board of Governors appointed by the Yang di-Pertuan Agong. The Board comprises a Chairman and six representatives each from the Federal Government and Newspapers that are subscribers of BERNAMA. They each have alternate members who are also appointed by the Yang di-Pertuan Agong.

The BERNAMA management is headed by a General Manager who is assisted by a Management Committee that implements all programmes and activities as well as decisions of the Board of Governors.

The agency has its offices in all the states in Malaysia and correspondents in Singapore and Jakarta and stringers or retainers in Washington, London, Manila, New Delhi, Dhaka, Melbourne and Vancouver.

Equipped with fully computerised operations, it provides general and economic news services and screen-based real time financial information services to subscribers in Malaysia and Singapore.

BERNAMA’s role as a source of reliable and latest news is well known among local & international media including government agencies, corporations, universities and individuals nationwide.

Most Malaysian newspapers and electronic media and other international news agencies are BERNAMA subscribers. BERNAMA is operating in the information industry, which is competitive but has tremendous growth potential.

Mission
We transform real people’s stories into creative work that inspires and delivers results. 

From strategy and design to production and live experience, we partner end-to-end to craft memorable stories, build community, and grow impact — all with heart, craft, and measurable purpose.

Culture
At our core, we’re a people-first studio — built on curiosity, collaboration, and care. We create with empathy, lead with purpose, and grow through learning. From our clients to our communities, we believe great work begins with genuine connection — because creativity means more when it uplifts the people behind it.

Beyond client work, we invest in the next generation of storytellers. Through masterclasses, open learning journeys, and career starter programs, we provide at-risk youths and aspiring youths with skills, mentorship, and pathways into the creative industry. Our goal? To unlock potential and build futures through creativity.

Name: TPF-ThePlatform
Description:
Considerata troppo a lungo un fenomeno legato all’effimero, la moda è una industria che crea Pil e posti di lavoro. Promuove e traina cambiamenti. Contribuisce all’immagine dei Paesi. 
Ma anche la moda è da tempo alla prese con una profonda trasformazione e con una complessità crescenti. Le interconnessioni tra i mercati, la corsa frenetica della tecnologia, l’impatto della (giusta) necessità di conservazione dell’ambiente fisico e sociale, l’avvicendarsi delle generazioni, la concorrenza che arriva da settori che apparivano distanti. C’è tanta velocità, tanta pressione. 
TPF-ThePlatform è una nuova iniziativa giornalistica, diretta da Maria Silvia Sacchi, giornalista di lunga esperienza, che si propone di raccontare questi cambiamenti, mettendo in luce le buone pratiche, facendo analisi in proprio, cercando il nuovo che sta emergendo senza dimenticare chi ha già costruito, viaggiando molto per vedere in prima persona. Con una mentalità internazionale e un occhio italiano. In profondità, senza fretta.

Name: Vicinity Studio
Description:
VICINITY is Southeast Asia’s one-stop creative ecosystem – combining the strategy of an Agency, the craft of a Studio, the vision of Design, and the experience of Events. We help brands tell human stories that move markets and make a difference. From strategy to storytelling, we create purposeful work that drives real results – while empowering the next generation of creators through mentorship, learning, and opportunity.

Our Vision, Mission, and Culture
Vision
To become an end-to-end creative ecosystem in Southeast Asia where human stories spark social change — empowering people and youth through purpose-driven content that scales attention, drives action, and grows impact.

Mission
We transform real people’s stories into creative work that inspires and delivers results. 

From strategy and design to production and live experience, we partner end-to-end to craft memorable stories, build community, and grow impact — all with heart, craft, and measurable purpose.

Culture
At our core, we’re a people-first studio — built on curiosity, collaboration, and care. We create with empathy, lead with purpose, and grow through learning. From our clients to our communities, we believe great work begins with genuine connection — because creativity means more when it uplifts the people behind it.

Social Impact
Beyond client work, we invest in the next generation of storytellers. Through masterclasses, open learning journeys, and career starter programs, we provide at-risk youths and aspiring youths with skills, mentorship, and pathways into the creative industry. Our goal? To unlock potential and build futures through creativity.

Name: The Podcast Guys
Description:
Since 2020, The Podcast Guys have elevated brand voices through expertly produced podcasts. We handle every part of the process, from concept and strategy to recording, editing, distribution, and promotion.

Products and Services

- Podcast Development: Complete launch services from concept to distribution, designed to captivate your audience from day one. Includes planning, technical setup, recording, editing, branding, format development, and distribution with tailored strategy and expert support.

- Podcast Production: End-to-end podcast production delivering professional, engaging content that elevates brands. Includes concepting, recording, editing, video, branding, distribution, and marketing support focused on quality, efficiency, and audience growth.

- Video Production: Full-service video production for podcasts, corporate videos, live streams, and promotional content. Includes planning, filming, expert editing, and targeted promotion across social media and platforms like YouTube to boost brand visibility.

- Live Event Podcasting: On-site or remote podcast production capturing key event moments - live recording, real-time editing, audience interaction, and highlight videos. Includes post-event production and multi-platform distribution to extend reach and create lasting content.

- Podcast Growth Marketing: Audience growth and amplification services that connects podcasts with the right listeners through optimised distribution, social media campaigns, guest spotlights, advertising, and SEO to maximise reach and impact.

- Podcast Guesting: Help clients get featured on the right podcasts to reach their ideal audience and build authority. Includes pitch development, scheduling, audience research, interview prep, and post-interview amplification.

Name: Jungle Entertainment
Description:
Jungle Entertainment produces premium drama and comedy for a worldwide audience. We collaborate with the very best creators and work tirelessly to champion their unique vision. We are known for a signature comedic tone, through which we explore the light and the dark in every story.

2021 will see four Jungle productions on air in the US, including the first season of Wakefield (Showtime/ ABC Australia/ BBC Studios), the fourth season of No Activity (CBSAA), the third season of Mr Inbetween (FX) and the second season of A Moody Christmas (Fox).

We drive innovative models of production and we like to be first. We produced Australia’s first ever SVOD commission, the original No Activity for Stan Australia, BBC2 and Hulu, as well as the first scripted comedy developed and commissioned by an Australian commercial network in 15 years, Here Come The Habibs. The creative team at Jungle were also behind Review With Miles Barlow which was ABC2’s first commission and was remade by Comedy Central into three seasons of Review.

Other productions include Bad Mothers for Nine Network Australia and Sundance Now, as well the original A Moody Christmas for ABC in Australia, which sold to BBC2, Hulu and total of 108 other territories worldwide.

The fourth season of No Activity USA went to air in 2021. It is a co-production with Gary Sanchez Productions, and is co-created, directed and co-written by Jungle partner Trent O’Donnell. The series stars Will Ferrell, Bob Odenkirk, Amy Sedaris, JK Simmons, Jessica Alba, Jason Mantzoukas, Sunita Mani and our very own Patrick Brammall.

No Activity is currently one of the highest selling formats around the world having been remade in the US, Holland, Germany, Denmark and Dubai with another four foreign remakes soon to be announced.

Jungle also operates as a production services company that provides end to end support for international partners in producing world class content anywhere in Australia.

Name: The Love Story Media, Inc.
Description:
The Love Story is a new media non-profit organization. Through courage, connection, and contribution we stand to help individuals transform their pain into passion, self-destructive behaviors into self-expressive ones, and love loss into a love story.

Our mission is to take away the stigma of depression and lower suicidal thoughts for the bereaved and brokenhearted. We believe that the key to overcoming pain is to first embrace it, and to let it fuel creativity and passion.

By focusing on three areas of social impact, we journal, educate, and inspire people as they embark on a journey of self-awareness, acceptance, and divine pursuit of meaning by taking on the Call to Adventure, discovering the purpose behind the pain.

1. As an artist collective, we produce educational programs and workshops to guide individuals in transforming their pain into passion and then into purpose through creative journaling practices.
2. As a publisher, we publish interactive notebooks containing the journal entries of our Journal-Artists who have turned their personal pain into stories of fiction, based on a true story, designed to reveal duality, so the power of choice may hopefully choose true passion. 
3. As a production company, we produce intimate and interactive artist showcases that bring journal-artist & artists together through live performance-inspired journaling & spoken word-open mic nights. 
It all starts with pain. 
Like fire, it can destroy villages or illuminate entire cities. 

Discover the duality of desire, design, and destiny so the power of choice is revealed for your choosing. 

The Love Story inspires you to choose the path of Love defined in 1 Corinthians 13, in hopes that in the critical scenes of your life story, you may choose the path of your true desire, design, and destiny.

Begin Act One:
DIY Digital: www.thelovestory.org
Journal Together Online:
https://bit.ly/3hpwVLf 
Journal Together with Live Artist Performances:
https://community.thelovestory.org

Name: The Story Watch
Description:
The world is such a diverse place full of exceptional people with awe-inspiring stories to tell. We at The Story Watch aim to bring such stories to light and give our readers something to be excited about.

We are an independent media outlet, with the aim of promoting inspiring stories from all over the globe. The mainstream media tends to focus only on the negative aspects of the society, driving political agendas and creating disharmony for the purpose of user engagement.

We report stories that matter to create some positive impact in our society. We also hope to inspire people to take inspiration from such stories and take action. Although, you should not worry, we do not aim to share preachy or disingenuous content.

Join us on the wonderful journey of changing the world, one story at a time.

If you wish to share an inspiring story of someone you know, feel free to drop a mail at editorial@thestorywatch.com

Name: Global Times
Description:
The debut of the English edition of Global Times on April 20, 2009 establishes a new reliable channel for Chinese people and the rest of the world to understand one another.

The Chinese edition of Global Times has been devoting itself to the same mission by showing Chinese readers how they are tightly connected to global affairs and introducing an exuberant and intricate China to the world as well. 

Global Times particularly focuses on expressing Chinese people’s real feelings, sharing their opinions and standpoints on significant international issues and promoting their understanding of the global views on China.

Global Times (English edition) is a comprehensive newspaper distributed nationally, featuring 24 pages from Monday to Friday. Our readers include foreigners in China and English-reading Chinese. Readers both abroad and in China may also access the newspaper at www.globaltimes.cn . 

Having inherited the sharp style of the Chinese edition, the English edition does not avoid reporting sensitive issues and it is exploring a broader range of topics for coverage. In our pages you’ll find a dynamic China with the sincere and explicit voices of the public. 


Global Times (English edition) is printed in Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Xi’an and Wuhan. Please refers to the “How to subscribe” part for subscription information and “Contact us” part for our contact information.

Globaltimes.cn (also en.huanqiu.com)is the website of Global Times. Following the newspaper version, Global Times.cn focuses on expressing Chinese people’s thoughts and feelings, sharing their opinions and views on significant international issues, and promoting their understanding of global views on China.

Global Times has more than 500 special correspondents and contributors posted around the world. Their first-hand interviews and reports help establish the unique and comprehensive voice of the Chinese-language Global Times and their stories will be featured on this website

All3Media America is the US studio of All3Media, one of the world’s leading independent television, film, digital production and distribution groups. 
All3Media America’s production companies deliver hundreds of hours of quality entertaining and thought-provoking content for broadcast, cable, and streaming partners. Among the group’s hits are the Emmy Award-winning Undercover Boss (CBS), the Emmy Award-winning United Shades of America (CNN), 24 Hours to Hell and Back with Gordon Ramsay (FOX), the Emmy Award-winning Cash Cab (Discovery), The Circle (Netflix), Top Elf (Nickelodeon), Gordon Ramsay’s Uncharted (National Geographic), Flirty Dancing (FOX), Bad Chad Customs (Discovery), Dating No Filter (E!), Worst Cooks in America (Food Network), Betrayed (Investigation Discovery) and many more. 
The studio is made up of 12 production companies and partnerships, some of whom also have UK-based operations: Best Production Company, Lime Pictures, Lion Television, Main Event Media, Maverick TV USA, Nexiko, Objective Media Group America, Optomen Productions, Relevé Entertainment, Studio Lambert, Studio Ramsay, and Woodman Park Productions. It also has established an original content development fund in partnership with independent film leader Cinetic Media.
Talent is at the heart of All3Media’s success. Each production company in the studio has its own development and production slate and, at the same time, benefits from the support, resources, and access to global reach in sales and distribution through the All3Media America’s team of over 100 people and its distribution business, All3Media International. The group’s state-of-the-art studio is located in Los Angeles’ Playa District, with additional offices in New York City.

Name: 10am Podcast
Description:
پادکست 10 صبح، پرشنوندهترین پادکست حوزهی مدیریت، کارآفرینی و استارتاپها به زبان فارسی است که در آن امید اخوان و میثم زرگرپور در قالب یک گپ و گفت بداهه، تجربیات عملی خود از دنیای استارتآپها را با مخاطبانشان به اشتراک میگذارند. زمان پادکست ده صبح به گونهای است که میتوانید به سادگی آنها را حین استراحت و کار یا در مسیر رفت و آمد به محل کار در اتوبوس و تاکسی گوش کنید!
این پادکست را میتوانید با جستجوی عبارت "پادکست 10 صبح" یا "10am podcast" در اپلیکیشنهای پخشکنندهی پادکست بیابید. در سایت ما به نشانی 10ampodcast.ir نیز محتوای تکمیلی مربوط به پادکست (از جمله متنهای پیادهسازی شدهی قسمتهای پخش شده) قابل دسترسی است.

Name: The Better India - Hindi
Description: द बेटर इंडिया' भारत में समाधान-आधारित पत्रकारिता के ज़रिए बदलाव लाने के लिए शुरू किया गया एक डिजिटल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म है। यह बदलाव हम अपनी कहानियों के ज़रिए ला रहे हैं। ये उन लोगों की सच्ची कहानियां हैं, जो किसी हीरो का इंतज़ार किए बगैर खुद ही चल पड़ते हैं हर मुश्किल का हल ढूंढने। इन कहानियों को बदलाव की शक्ल देते हैं आप, याने की हमारे पाठक, जो इन्हें शेयर करके एक कड़ी को दूसरे से मिलाते हैं। धीरे-धीरे अच्छाई का एक कारवाँ बन जाता है, जिसके प्रभाव से हर बुराई को हटना पड़ता है, झुकना पड़ता है!

Name: Dental24 Sverige
Description:
Dental24 grundades 2008 och är idag den ledande digitala publikationen för tandvårdsnyheter och kunskap i Sverige. Plattformen erbjuder en samlad plats för nyheter, kliniska artiklar, utbildningar och produktinformation för yrkesverksamma inom dentalbranschen. Varje månad besöker ungefär hälften av branschens yrkesverksamma dental24.se och 9.000 prenumererar på vårt populära veckovisa nyhetsbrev för att hålla sig uppdaterade. 

Besök oss på www.dental24.se och få tillgång till allt innehåll – helt kostnadsfritt.

Name: AT WILL MEDIA
Description: With several decades of combined experience in storytelling and sound design, At Will Media sets the pace for the audio industry as a partner for branded content and hub for successful and critically acclaimed originals. Partners and clients include Some of their partners and clients include The New York Times, Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Apple TV+, Marriott Bonvoy Traveler, Verizon, Entertainment Weekly, GQ, Morgan Stanley, Bleacher Report, and Viacom/CBS.

Name: LGBT Equality
Description: Our role is to bring together organisations, who employ and share good practice around the LGBT agenda. Together we seek to engage and empower the industry to drive change, and understand the business case for wider representation. Our LGBT Media campaign is going from strength to strength and we encourage employers to get involved and to use LGBT media as part of their recruitment strategy.

Name: Pupkin
Description:
Pupkin is een toonaangevende Amsterdamse producent, gespecialiseerd in speelfilms en high end drama met een sterke focus op (true) crime. Pupkin produceert voor de Nederlandse Publieke Omroep, RTL/Videoland en voor internationale streamers, met titels als Van God Los (NPO), Riphagen (NPO), Ares (Netflix), Nemesis (Disney+), De Jacht (Viaplay) en Amsterdam Empire (Netflix). Pupkin en de labels Juliet at Pupkin en DOCS by Pupkin zijn onderdeel van Newen Studios, één van de grootste Europese spelers op het gebied van audiovisuele productie en distributie.

voor meer informatie zie www.pupkin.com
Pupkin is a leading Amsterdam-based producer, specialized in feature films and high-end drama with a strong focus on (true) crime. Pupkin produces for the Dutch Public Broadcaster, RTL/Videoland and for international streamers, with titles such as Godforsaken (NPO), Riphagen (NPO), Ares (Netflix), Nemesis (Disney+), The Hunt (Viaplay) and Amsterdam Empire (Netflix). Pupkin and the labels Juliet at Pupkin and DOCS by Pupkin are part of Newen Studios, one of the largest European players in audiovisual production and distribution.

see www.pupkin.com for more

Name: Creativera Digital Asia, PT
Description:
At our core, we’re a team of creative minds who bring businesses to life through captivating visual content. We’re driven by curiosity and eager to uncover what makes your business unique, your “what,” “why,” and “how.” Then, we turn those insights into compelling digital visuals.

For the past eight years, we’ve been working with businesses of all sizes, whether small startups or big brands, local or global. Our passion is taking what we learn and turning it into creative work that speaks.

Name: The Videographers
Description: Introduced in 2013, The Videographers - a luxury wedding and event coverage company  is present in Karachi, Lahore, Dubai & Chicago. A team of over 60 filmmakers; photographers, artists and creatives TVG continues to define new methods of modern filmmaking for our clients presenting the marriage between your moments & artisanship.

Name: NXTVFX
Description:
NXTVFX is a premier VFX studio, founded by a team of exceptionally talented artists, supervisors, and producers who have made their mark in the Telugu film industry. Drawing on their extensive experience working in various studios over the past decade, they recognised the need for a more artist-friendly studio that prioritises creativity and innovation.

At NXTVFX, the team believes in fostering a healthy work-life balance, recognising that a happy and fulfilled team is essential to delivering exceptional work. With three out of five partners having completed the Unreal Fellowship, NXTVFX is at the forefront of cutting-edge technology and techniques, ensuring that every project is of the highest quality.

Name: Voetbal International
Description: Voetbal International is een mediabedrijf geheel en al gericht op voetbal. Er is aandacht voor de absolute top tot en met de eerste dribbels van een jong talent en alles wat er tussen zit.

Name: MEMEC
Description: MEMEC is a Saudi production studio crafting cinematic documentaries and premium content for global audiences. Through bold storytelling and world class cinematography, we bring Saudi narratives to life with depth, authenticity, and international appeal.

Name: cityCURRENT
Description:
cityCURRENT connects businesses with community to power the GOOD and to foster purpose-driven relationships that lead to new opportunities for collaboration and growth through events, media, and philanthropy.

A team of more than 120 partner businesses, comprised of some of the largest and most influential employers in the world to mid-size and smaller firms, come together to align resources and to host and underwrite the costs of more than 300 events each year and an array of media to impact Memphis, Nashville, Fort Worth and beyond.

Since the organization's establishment in 2005, cityCURRENT has served the community by hosting seminars and workshops, bringing in national guest speakers with our Signature Breakfast Series, hosting weekly lunches, and a variety of other events to provide valuable content and foster teamwork and collaboration among business and community leaders. These events are underwritten by our corporate partners, so they are free for the community to attend.

cityCURRENT then provides easy, turnkey opportunities for organizations and individuals to become more engaged in the community and leverages its collective resources to make an impact through volunteer days, action projects, nonprofit tours, charitable contributions and more. Examples include tutoring after school, mentoring, washing the feet of over 3,000 kids and providing them with new shoes and socks, and providing a wounded Veteran Hero a mortgage free home.

cityCURRENT produces television and radio shows, along with a podcast, and weekly newspaper columns. The company has two books that focus on achieving success in life and business while helping others in the process; and both books give back to support youth literacy programs. cityCURRENT also contributes to national media outlets, like Forbes Magazine. All efforts are focused on spotlighting positive news, lessons learned, and tips and ways people and companies can become an even greater force for good.

Name: Transport – Die Zeitung für den Güterverkehr
Description:
Die Fachzeitung Transport richtet sich alle zwei Wochen konsequent an Transportunternehmer und Spediteure, die im Auftrag von Handel, Industrie oder Logistikdienstleistern Transporte mit eigenem Fuhrpark durchführen.

Damit ist Transport die unabhängige Zeitung, die sich ausschließlich auf diese Zielgruppe konzentriert und aktuell, kritisch und fundiert einen Überblick über die gesamte Branche vermittelt.

Eine kompetente Redaktion beobachtet Trends und Märkte und arbeitet dazu Themen plakativ, nutzen orientiert, verständlich und leser freundlich auf. Namhafte Experten diskutieren Chancen und Risiken der Transport- und Logistikbranche.

Name: Jornal das Oficinas
Description: O Jornal das Oficinas, com uma tiragem de 10.000 exemplares, é distribuído pela totalidade do mercado profissional. Alcança as oficinas independentes e todas as Redes Oficinais, fazendo assim a ligação entre os fabricantes, importadores, distribuidores e as oficinas automóveis por todo o país.

Name: HvanA
Description: HvanA is het onafhankelijke journalistieke medium voor studenten en medewerkers van de Hogeschool van Amsterdam (HvA).

Name: Tuin en Landschap
Description:
Tuin en Landschap is hét vakblad voor de hovenier en groenvoorziener in Nederland. Het blad richt zich op hoveniers, groenvoorzieners, boomverzorgers, tuin- en landschapsarchitecten, ontwerpers en gemeentelijk groenbeheerders.

In Tuin en Landschap vindt u het laatste nieuws uit de groensector, zowel in print als digitaal via onze nieuwsbrief en website.

U leest er artikelen over nieuw sortiment, over tuinaanleg en -onderhoud, over ontwerp en inrichting van de groene ruimte. Maar ook artikelen over vakgenoten en over inspirerende projecten.

Vijf keer per jaar verschijnt een themanummer waarin de redactie dieper op één bepaald onderwerp ingaat, zoals Groen en Gezondheid of Onderhoudsarm Sortiment.

Daarnaast besteedt Tuin en Landschap ruim aandacht aan praktische zaken zoals het aanleggen van een vijver of keramische tegels leggen. Deze artikelen bundelen we op de website in het Dossier Vakmanschap.

Tuin en Landschap verschijnt in print 1x per 2 weken op de donderdag. Op de website vindt u dagelijks nieuws, fotoreportages en aanvullende achtergrondinformatie bij artikelen uit het blad. Op de website worden actualiteiten/nieuws gegeven en aanvullende achtergrondinformatie bij artikelen uit de magazines.

Tuin en Landschap is een uitgave van Hortipoint. Hortipoint is specialist in vakinformatie. Naast Tuin en Landschap geeft de media-organisatie de titels  Vakblad voor de Bloemisterij, De Boomkwekerij, Tuinwerk, Bloem&Blad en Floribusiness uit.

Name: Solid Productions
Description:
Solid is a one-stop production company with a nordic DNA.

We operate in Europe, Africa, Asia, and Polynesia. 

We offer local first-tier production services with up to 40% discount.

Name: ReWild Africa
Description:
We are specialists in harnessing the art of storytelling to effectively communicate solutions at the forefront of ecological restoration, sustainable innovation, climate mitigation and adaptation, community upliftment, and social development.

Our multidisciplinary team has expertise in creating short documentaries, brand and campaign films, wildlife and conservation films, interviews, marketing videos, fundraising films, educational content, and more. 

Our Overarching Mission:

At our core, ReWild exists to find and share solutions that address biodiversity loss and restore ecological balance, while promoting community development and social equity. We do this by raising awareness, amplifying impact, and creating powerful educational content.

Through creative and immersive storytelling, we've had the privilege of collaborating with visionary partners such as BBC StoryWorks, WWF, Google Maps, NASA, Restor, SANParks, the African Climate Reality project, Power Shift Africa, The Global Evergreening Alliance, The Sun Exchange, Endangered Wildlife Trust, the African Think Tank Initiative, the IDRC, and many more remarkable organisations.

Name: Little Dot Studios Americas
Description:
Little Dot Studios Americas is an award-winning full service studio that specializes in digital content, audience development services and paid media. 

Established in 2013, Little Dot Studios Americas exists to realize potential in every story through creating meaningful connections between premium content and digital communities. LDS Americas engages, grows, optimizes, and monetizes social and digital audiences across all social platforms throughout various mediums. 

Made up of over 100 of the best platform, media, content, and strategist specialists across the US, UK, Germany and APAC, Little Dot Studios Americas works with the world’s most recognized entertainment and consumer brands providing premium social video services across over 600 social channels globally and responsible for six billion organic views per month.

Little Dot Studios Americas is an All3Media company.

Name: PPMG
Description:
CONTENT
Experts in creating high-quality content and exquisite design, PPMG produces luxury media titles, as well as content for brands across a growing roster of diverse e-commerce channels. 

BRANDING & DESIGN
Six is an award-winning brand and design consultancy working with clients around the world. Six creates intelligent and striking design, positioning brands with clarity and impact. 

DIGITAL DEVELOPMENT
Leading digital development agency Digital&Code creates innovative online platforms, underpinned by sophisticated technology and in-depth analysis. Digital&Code can deliver an end-to-end solution for ecommerce brands across the globe.

ECOMMRCE
The digital platform KMMRCE blends a number of cutting-edge ecommerce tools, making it an invaluable resource for developers and business owners. Its integrated components can be combined in different interpretations to create a unique digital brand identity. Brands benefit from a scalable smart solution that supports their growth while enabling them to stay agile. 

FMCG MARKETING
Citrus offers a fresh approach to FMCG marketing and retail support. 

FINTECH
FinTech interests include WLTH, a new digital challenger bank designed to suit modern finance habits and the banking needs of millennials. Its digital-only systems and processes promote greater freedom to do business and spend like a local wherever customers are in the world. Also in the digital finance sphere, is an online payment solution that brings in disruptive technologies and revolutionary solutions for merchants from around the world. 

EDTECH
GLU is an innovative web-based app that bridges the gap between schools, teachers and parents for a collaborative learning experience. It provides 24/7 access to resources, and practical solutions to resolve any issues, while pushing for the best learning outcomes. 

FITTECH
Corefit is a global health and lifestyle app that allows users to access virtual workout sessions.

Description: We are a creative production company. We have recognised one of india's "10 best video production startups in 2021" by silicon india. Our aim is to bridge the gap between business and their users through creatives and design solutions.

Name: FAVORIZ Production
Description: FAVORIZ is a motion pictures and film company based out of 82 IMPASSE DE LA GRANDE CHANTOURNE, ST NAZAIRE LES EYMES, France.

Name: STOP & GO
Description:
PRODUCTION TV ET COMMUNICATION AUDIOVISUELLE

- Communication audiovisuelle
Stop & Go a développé une expertise spécifique dans la réalisation de supports de communication interne et externe : spots publicitaires, animations 2D/3D, films institutionnels/corporate, etc.
A Paris comme à Toulouse, les locaux sont dotés de studios intégrés pour rester réactifs, autonomes et efficaces.

- Le Live TV ou Internet
Stop & Go réalise des captations en live ou en différé, à travers des dispositifs « clés en main » (car régie, équipes de tournage, drone, fibre ...) destinés à être diffusés sur des outils Web ou TV.
Le car régie (HD) de Stop & Go a été conçu pour répondre à tout type de demande. Suivant les besoins, il peut être accompagné du second car media de Stop & Go proposant ainsi plus de postes de travail (montage, commentaires, streaming/VOD) et permettant de stocker plus de matériel technique.

- La Production TV 
Stop & Go produit des magazines, des documentaires et des émissions à destination des chaînes TV. La société réalise près de 350 programmes/an.

Name: DigitalRev
Description:
At DigitalRev we believe that photography is a fundamental human skill that helps people from all walks of life communicate without a language barrier. 

DigitalRev produces DigitalRev TV, the most viewed and most subscribed photography show on YouTube with more than 1.6 million subscribers and 300 million video views. At DigitalRev.com the editorial team keeps millions of readers up-to-date with the latest photography news. 

DigitalRev also operates an online store that sells camera equipment to customers around the world.

Name: DIR.BG
Description: Dir.bg is the first online media as well as the most popular internet brand and web portal in Bulgaria. It's informational sources reach monthly audience over 1.3 million real visitors, making www.dir.bg a leading Bulgarian independent online media.

Name: EnergyWatch
Description:
EnergyWatch delivers independent, critical and fair journalism about the energy and utilities industry.  

We keep you updated on the Nordic energy sector in English and issue newsletters on a daily basis. Our articles are produced by a permanent staff of journalists, managed by Editor Claus Berger Skovholm. Our sister sites in Denmark and Norway - EnergiWatch.dk and EnergiWatch.no - contribute to our coverage.

Name: Nieuwetijds
Description:
Nieuwetijds biedt inspiratie en tools om bewust, liefdevol en vervullend te leven. 

Ontdek inspirerende artikelen & video's, podcasts, online workshops, trainingen, retraites en andere live events. Allemaal ontworpen om je te helpen een diepere verbinding met jezelf te vinden. Onze benadering is geworteld in authenticiteit, diepgang en de overtuiging dat ware transformatie begint van binnenuit.

Name: Nine Lives Media
Description: Nine Lives Media is a multi-award winning television production company.  We make fact ent formats, documentaries and drama documentaries for UK and US broadcasters.  Nine Lives has been commissioned to make hundreds of programmes since the company was launched in September 2007.  We are based in MediaCity in Salford, Greater Manchester, in the UK.  Our programmes have won two BAFTAS, an International Emmy, a national RTS award, a Rocky Award and many RTS NW awards.

Name: Les Tontons Truqueurs
Description:
LTT a été créée début 2016 par trois anciens pionniers reconnus des effets spéciaux en France. 
En parallèle d’une activité historique dans les effets visuels, l’objectif de LTT est de déployer une nouvelle offre de service pour la production cinéma et audio-visuelle : la Previsualisation On Set. 
L’équipe LTT est aguerrie à l’environnement, elle est composée d’opérateurs formés spécialement à la previz on set, mais ayant tous plusieurs années d’expérience sur les tournages, en tant que DIT, datas managers, assistants opérateurs, cadreurs, ou superviseurs VFX .
Ces années de pratiques du plateau leur permettent d’anticiper et de s’adapter.

Name: Going Green Media
Description:
We film green projects from around the world and share them online with an audience of over 500,000 people across social media. Going Green Media is a planet-first, solution-driven media brand that films and shares sustainable projects and innovations, as well as encourages everyone to get involved in taking action for both our planet and all who live on it.

In a time where news media often focuses on climate doom, Going Green Media's primary goal is to inspire hope, action and amplify the voices, stories, and innovations that are providing solutions to the environmental issues we face.

Get in touch if you have a sustainable initiative you'd like to share.

Name: Sign Benelux / Sign.NL
Description:
SIGN BENELUX HELPT CREATIEVE ONDERNEMERS IN DE SIGNBRANCHE SUCCESVOL TE ZIJN

Sign Benelux is het platform dat creatieve ondernemers in de sign- en grootformaat printbranche verbindt en verdieping biedt op het gebied van Vaktechniek en Ondernemerschap, zodat deze bedrijven zich verder kunnen professionaliseren.

VERBINDEND - VAKKUNDIG - BETROUWBAAR

contact:
www.sign.nl
redactiesign@eisma.nl

Sign Benelux / Sign.NL is in 2024 ontstaan uit de samenvoeging van de activiteiten van Sign+ Magazine (sinds 1989) en SignPro Benelux (sinds 2000). Daarmee is het een vaste waarde in de signbranche in Nederland en België.

* 8x per jaar wordt het onafhankelijk vakblad Sign Benelux uitgegeven

Name: Adresseavisen
Description:
Adresseavisen er Norges eldste nåværende avis og utkom første gang 3. juli 1767. Adresseavisen er det dominerende nyhets- og annonseorgan i Midt-Norge. Adresseavisen hadde i 2014 et opplag på 63 981 eksemplarer. Vi hadde i 2014 170 000 daglige lesere på papir, 160 000 daglige brukere på nett og 90 000 daglige brukere på mobil.

Adresseavisen Gruppen består av morselskapet Adresseavisen Gruppen som er et holdingselskap. Adresseavisens viktigste datterselskap er Adresseavisen. Adresseavisen er den dominerende nyhets- og annonseformidler i Midt-Norge. Selskapet utgir regionavisen Adresseavisen seks dager i uken med nedslagsfelt i Midt-Norge og har dessuten betydelig satsning på internett/digitale tjenester gjennom adressa.no.

Name: Studio Skwer
Description: An artist collective, with a vision to enable and articulate value for the art of colorgrading and finishing through next-generation visual experience!

Name: Greenpoint Pictures
Description: Founded in a loft in historic North Brooklyn in 2002, Greenpoint Pictures has since evolved into an award-winning independent production and post-production company. Our staff and team of creative talent work one on one with clients from ideation through final delivery. We work with advertising agencies, innovative brands, media and tech companies, major non-profits, record labels, visionaries and you.

Name: Odyssey
Description:
We're a fast-growing video production agency that creates videos for businesses that want to turn into extraordinary online brands 

We do this by taking small businesses that are just getting started with video, to global brands trying to get a competitive edge, on a video journey that they will never forget.

To find out more information, check out our website (www.theodysseyagency.co.uk) and get in contact with mission control at hello@theodysseyagency.co.uk

Name: Via Storia
Description:
Via Storia est un acteur majeur dans la communication audiovisuelle pour les entreprises et collectivités.

Nous proposons des solutions créatives de films, de la conception à la réalisation sur tous supports de diffusion : web, tablettes, TV, cinéma.

Via Storia fournit également des solutions mobiles techniques Broadcast aux chaines de télévision en France et en Europe : captation multicaméras, transmission satellite KA et KU.

Name: Women in Film & Video (WIFV)
Description:
Women in Film & Video (WIFV) of Washington, DC is dedicated to advancing the professional development and achievement for women working in all areas of film, television, video, multimedia and related disciplines. WIFV supports women in the industry by promoting equal opportunities, encouraging professional development, serving as an information network, and educating the public about women’s creative and technical achievements.  WIFV, a 501(c)(3) non-profit community benefit organization founded in 1979, is the premier professional resource for women who want successful media production careers in Washington, DC. Our resources, connections and advocates support a vibrant, creative media industry
 
 WIFV is an affiliate of Women in Film and Television International (WIFTI), a global network of nearly 40 chapters whose total membership includes more than 10,000 media professionals worldwide. Representing one of the country’s leading non-fiction film production centers and being located at the center of federal, non-profit and non-governmental agencies, WIFV is uniquely positioned to offer its members unsurpassed continuing education offerings and connect them to professional opportunities across the globe.

Name: Blocknews
Description:
O Blocknews é hub líder de conteúdo e relacionamento sobre #blockchain , #Web3  #ativosdigitais , #tokenizacao e #criptomoedas. Nosso objetivo é ajudar empresas, instituições de impacto social e governos a definirem #estratégicas de #negocios e gerarem resultados positivos. 

Queremos mostrar como essa tecnologia revolucionária pode trazer
ganhos para a sociedade por meio de novos modelos de negócios, metodologias,
processos e mentalidades.

Esse é o nosso grande diferencial.

O Blocknews tem a missão de contribuir para que a inovação se espalhe em ritmo acelerado pelo Brasil, contribua para desenvolver o país e traga bem-estar aos brasileiros. 

Por isso, publicamos o que é relevante, aquele dado que depois de lido, será compartilhado ou gravado para ser usado mais tarde. 

Além de relevante, a cobertura do Blocknews é pautada pelos princípios do bom jornalismo: a publicação de informações confiáveis, claras, equilibradas e imparciais.

Seguimos também o princípio da blockchain de conectar diferentes setores, profissionais e consumidores no mesmo ambiente. Por isso,
nossos leitores são profissionais de TIC, planejamento estratégico, regulação,
direito, fiscal, marketing, logística, segurança cibernética, gestores públicos
e sociais, para citar alguns exemplos. 

O Blocknews é fruto de uma experiência profunda da jornalista responsável pelo serviço, Claudia Mancini, na cobertura de notícias de economia e negócios na Gazeta Mercantil, onde foi editora-chefe, e Dow Jones Newswires, onde foi repórter em Londres, além de prestar consultoria em comunicação estratégica para empresas líderes de diversos setores. 

Claudia sempre viu que a maior angústia de um profissional é conhecer o necessário sobre sobre um desafio que está enfrentando, uma tecnologia ou tendência que estão despontando, para poder dar diretrizes e gerar os melhores resultados. 

Quando o assunto é inovação, a angústia é ainda maior. É para ajudar a diminuir essa angústia que estamos aqui.

Name: StokeonTrentLive & The Sentinel
Description:
As of April 10 2018, StokeonTrentLive is the new go-to news site covering Stoke-on-Trent, North Staffordshire and South Cheshire. The new brand, brought to you by the team behind The Sentinel newspaper, is part of a drive to better reflect our growing online presence.

What is happening to thesentinel.co.uk?

Our thesentinel.co.uk website, mobile app and social media accounts have changed to a new name: StokeonTrentLive.

Why have we changed our name?

To better represent a live, digital news and entertainment website and the needs and interests of our growing online audience. 
It's called StokeonTrentLive because this is the city where The Sentinel has always been based.
Stoke-on-Trent is the city where The Sentinel has chronicled local life for more than 160 years. It's the city The Sentinel continues to champion, day in, day out. It's the city we're inextricably linked to and which we're backing in the years to come.
And if you live or work in Newcastle borough, Stafford borough, the Staffordshire Moorlands or South Cheshire... fear not. You'll see no change to our coverage of these core areas of our patch when visiting StokeonTrentLive.

What can I expect from StokeonTrentLive?

A live, digital news channel which will keep you in the know about what’s happening in Stoke-on-Trent, Newcastle-under-Lyme, the Staffordshire Moorlands, Stafford borough and South Cheshire, every day.
But there’ll be so much more than just news. We’ll cover all that our city talking about, every day.
The latest developments, ways to avoid traffic jams or to ease your travel woes, the latest Stoke City and Port Vale news and chatter, the very newest restaurant openings and guides plus exciting events and things to do across our patch.
Our hashtag will remain #localandproud

What’s happening to the newspaper?

It'll just get better. Everything you've come to expect from one of the best-selling regional newspapers in the UK will remain.

Name: Les Engagés
Description:
Les expéditions extrêmes sont accessibles. Aux limites du globe, aux limites de nous-mêmes. Pour les vivre il faut oser faire le premier pas, s’engager dans cette aventure et construire l’équipe.

Nous ne nous connaissions pas. Nous nous sommes rencontrés autour d’un rêve, celui de traverser l’immensité du Groenland à pied. Un mois à marcher sur la calotte glacière par -30°C et en tractant 90kg.

Nous n’avions aucune expérience de l’extrême. Aucun d’entre nous n’avait couru de marathon. Pas d’ultra-trailer ou d’anciens des forces spéciales. Simplement trois individus habitant en ville, versés dans une carrière entrepreneuriale naissante et marqués par une certaine audace. Une volonté de vivre.

Après avoir osé le premier pas, le travail a commencé. L’analyse des risques, l’entrainement. Nous nous sommes engagés dans la préparation sans pour autant déserter nos vies professionnelles et personnelles. Nous avons développé nos liens d’amitiés, nous avons formé Les Engagés.

Nous avons exploré cette terre polaire. Nous avons ressenti notre vulnérabilité face à elle, avons ressenti son sublime. Nous avons appris à être faibles puis à être fort, à faire corps. Quand il n’y a autour de soi que l’adversité, chacun sait que nous sommes plus grand ensemble que seul.

Forts de cette expérience humaine, nous avons décidé de nous lancer à l’assaut de l’Aconcagua et demain du Cap Nord. 

Chacun vit son expédition extrême. Elle est personnelle : arrêter de fumer, vivre sans produire de déchets plastiques, conquérir la femme de sa vie ou apprendre une nouvelle langue. Elle est aussi professionnelle : fonder une entreprise, pénétrer un nouveau marché, évoluer vers un nouveau poste ou même changer de carrière.

Ces aventures apportent la densité à nos vies, leur richesse. 

Aujourd’hui nous poursuivons notre sillon polaire sans pour autant nous prendre pour des professionnels de l’aventure.  

Nous partageons cette vision au travers d’écrits, de films ou de conférences.

Name: SIMPLEXITY - Intralogistics Insights
Description:
SIMPLEXITY is an online magazine for anyone and everyone with a professional interest in intralogistics. It offers new insights into this innovative world with content addressing all aspects of material and goods flows, from production, to put-away, storage, picking and distribution.

Intralogistics comprises the planning, monitoring and management of the flow of goods and
materials on a defined, self-contained premises – in contrast to transportation over significant
distances (generally via public roads or rail), i.e. logistics.

How do goods and materials get from A to B within a given facility in the fastest, safest and
smartest way? — It is this and similar questions we seek to answer.  And we are not just
interested in the many processes involved, we also wish to look outside the usual box – and to
the future.

As a result, you will find SIMPLEXITY articles on emerging trends, on alternative propulsion systems, and on the latest safety systems.

OUR MISSION is to make the complex simple to unterstand. We know the issues that are front-and-center on decision-makers’ minds. And we provide answers. Without getting lost in technical jargon, unhelpful tangents or long-winded explanations. Instead, we deliver facts, transparency, insider knowledge and focus.

We promise to give you exactly the information you are looking for – brief, concentrated and to the point. And our name says it all: SIMPLEXITY is a portmanteau made up of simple and complexity. In other words, we make difficult subject matter easy to understand.

Name: Warrior Poet Society
Description:
The Warrior Poet Society answers a call; it is a call for a more elite protector. This call is for those who understand the high stakes of violence and who are willing to commit their minds and bodies to the task of defense so that they may prevail and others may live. Warrior Poets are those who train and fight for higher purpose. They are members of a rare fraternity of warriors who fight with intellect, conviction, and great skill. Motivated by a love for others, warrior poets become students of the art of war so that they may triumph when the enemy calls.

About the Founder

John Lovell is a credentialed full-time tactics and firearms instructor and is an NRA instructor. He teaches over 20 different classes including night vision, low light tactics, room clearing, defensive pistol courses, defensive carbine/rifle courses, home defense classes, NRA classes, and more. John is a war veteran and a former member of Special Operations, having served in 2nd Ranger Battalion with numerous combat tours to both Iraq and Afghanistan. His overseas experience also entails having served as a missionary to Central America for four years. He holds a B.A. in Business, and, more than an instructor, John considers himself a student of war, philosophy, theology, and history. When he is not teaching, training, or spending time with his family, you will likely find him reading.

Name: Professionals Path Network
Description:
Welcome to the Professionals Path Network—a global platform dedicated to fostering professional growth and opportunity!

Our mission is to connect talented individuals with exciting job opportunities while showcasing inspiring stories from professionals across various industries around the world. We believe in the power of community and aim to empower you to achieve your career aspirations, no matter where you are.

What We Offer:

Job Postings: Stay updated with the latest job opportunities from around the globe, tailored to various skill sets and professions. Whether you’re an experienced professional or just starting out, we have something for you.

Feature Stories: Celebrate the journeys of remarkable individuals who have made a mark in their fields. We highlight success stories from diverse backgrounds to inspire and motivate our community.

Professional Development: Access valuable resources, tips, and insights to enhance your skills and advance your career. We provide content that helps you stay competitive in today’s dynamic job market.

Community Engagement: Join discussions, share your experiences, and connect with like-minded professionals. Our platform encourages networking and collaboration, creating a supportive environment for all.

We invite you to follow us on this exciting journey and become part of a community committed to growth and opportunity. Together, we can pave the way for professional success and inspire one another to reach new heights.

Join us today, and let’s build a brighter future for professionals everywhere!

With more than half of its 150 million monthly U.S. viewers consuming its content on televisions, UPROXX Studios has emerged as a go-to advertising partner for brands aiming to turn cultural relevance on TV screens into real business results. Founded by creative visionary will.i.am and media titans Rich Antoniello and Jarret Myer, UPROXX Studios has redefined the modern media company model, acting as the definitive youth culture platform through the lens of music. Known for its iconic brands UPROXX, HipHopDX, Dime Magazine, Indie Mixtape, and Country Mixtape, UPROXX Studios connects brands and fans to the energy of music culture. As the exclusive seller of Warner Music Group’s official music video inventory, UPROXX Studios guarantees 100% share-of-voice around superstar artists such as Bruno Mars, Dua Lipa, and Ed Sheeran. For more information about brand opportunities with UPROXX Studios, visit: UPROXXstudios.com.

Name: Gutsy Pictures
Description:
Gutsy Pictures is a team of creators and producers who believe that the world is in need of funny, clever and gutsy content that is above all meaningful. All of the productions are aimed at international audiences and they are based on a concept of genuine social impact.

Gutsy Animations is making a TV series "MOOMINVALLEY" which is a brand new adaptation of the writer and illustrator Tove Jansson’s classic and much beloved body of work. It is an animated TV - series for lifelong Moomin fans and complete newcomers alike.

Moominvalley is a show full of life, laughter, adventure, fantasy, visual humour, whimsical and witty dialogue, elegiac interludes, energy and drama. Like Tove Jansson’s wonderful books, the series will not shy away from the full gamut of sharply contrasting emotions – from happiness and joy at one moment, to sadness, darkness and even fear the next — especially when The Groke is around...

Please contact info@gutsy.fi for more information.

Name: CinéTalks
Description:
CinéTalks, c’est la porte d’entrée dans le monde du cinéma et de l’audiovisuel, pour ceux qui veulent comprendre les codes, construire leur réseau et avancer, même en partant de zéro.

Depuis 2021, on organise des événements de networking à Paris pour aider les étudiants, autodidactes, jeunes pros et passionnés à rencontrer des professionnels, poser leurs questions et créer de vrais liens.

On développe aussi des formats pédagogiques pour vulgariser les coulisses du cinéma et transmettre des outils concrets à ceux qui n’ont pas “le bon parcours”.

 Parmi eux : le programme "Crée ton premier court-métrage (même sans expérience)", une méthode pas à pas pour structurer, écrire, tourner et diffuser son premier film grâce à 18 templates prêts à remplir.

On propose aussi d’autres ressources :
- Un modèle de bible de série à remplir
- Un modèle de dossier de présentation de court-métrage
- Un guide pour créer ton réseau dans le cinéma

On a également lancer du coaching d’écriture personnalisé, encadré par Charlène, consultante pro avec +3 ans d'expérience en production TV.

Nos soirées CinéTalks reviennent chaque mois, dans une ambiance conviviale et bienveillante. Un format unique pour progresser, s’inspirer, et faire décoller ses projets.

 On développe aussi des formats spéciaux comme le CinéTalks Show, une émission où des personnalités du secteur partagent leurs parcours sans langue de bois. Le premier épisode est en ligne sur notre chaîne YouTube.

Tu veux percer les codes de ce milieu et créer des connexions durables ?
Bienvenue chez CinéTalks.

Terminus – The final touch for your images.

Name: Babel Doc
Description:
Nous avons commencé notre aventure en Inde, il y a un peu plus de 15 ans. En tant que réalisateurs, nous avons quitté la France pour avoir l'opportunité de nous retrouver sur un continent que nous ne connaissions pas, mais que nous avions tous envie de découvrir, de montrer et de raconter aux autres. À une époque où les radiodiffuseurs fermaient leurs bureaux à l'étranger, nous avons fait le choix d'être un fournisseur de contenu local, et avec l'aide inestimable de réalisateurs, monteurs et producteurs très engagés et talentueux, le bureau a grandi, et notre réputation avec.
 
En 2010, en plus de notre présence en Asie, nous nous sommes tournés vers une autre aventure passionnante, l'Amérique. Miami a été un choix facile car nous voulions couvrir l'Amérique du Nord, l'Amérique centrale et l'Amérique latine - et une autre aventure a commencé. 

La demande de reportages produits localement est restée forte, tant en Asie qu'en Amérique, et en 2014, nous avons décidé de nous développer à nouveau. Rio de Janeiro semblait être le choix évident au vu des événements que le Brésil était sur le point d'accueillir (Coupe du monde 2014, Jeux olympiques 2016, élections générales 2018). 

Laissant nos bureaux à l'étranger entre de bonnes mains, nous avons décidé de renforcer notre présence en Europe, notamment avec notre bureau à Paris où nous nous concentrons sur le développement de longs métrages documentaires. Avec la même envie indomptable, celle de partager des histoires sur le monde dans lequel nous vivons.

Stéphanie Lebrun, Sébastien Daguerressar, Thomas Ellis

Producteurs et partenaires fondateurs de Babel Doc et Babel Press.

Name: ENTWICKLUNGSSTADT
Description:
ENTWICKLUNGSSTADT BERLIN widmet sich allen Themen, die mit der Entwicklung und Veränderung der einzigartigen und widersprüchlichen Metropole Berlin zusammenhängen.

Städtebau, Architektur, Gesellschaft, Kunst und Sport: Berlin wird niemals aufhören, sich fortwährend neu zu erfinden, im Kleinen wie im Großen. Genauso wenig werden seine Bürger, Institutionen und Funktionsträger aufhören, unerbittlich und oft unversöhnlich über die Zukunft dieser Stadt zu streiten. Große Visionen werden Wirklichkeit oder bleiben auf ewig Luftschlösser.

Bei der Zusammenstellung der Inhalte für ENTWICKLUNGSSTADT BERLIN greifen wir immer wieder auf ein Experten-Netzwerk zurück, welches uns bildliche oder textliche Inhalte zuliefert. Sämtliche Gastbeiträge werden als solche auch gekennzeichnet und ihre Urheber auch namentlich genannt. Bezahlte oder gesponserte Inhalte werden entsprechend gekennzeichnet.

Name: The CEO Forum Group
Description:
The CEO Forum Group is a tier 1 media company, founded in 2007 by Robert Reiss, focusing on top CEOs. Its properties include a quarterly magazine by CEOs and for CEOs received exclusively by the top 10,000 CEOs in America, and the nationally syndicated radio show The CEO Show which has over 600,000 listeners from 25 AM stations and in 2016 was cited as the #1 radio podcast for CEOs. The company also has its Partner Services division which offers CEO connections including roundtables, events, networking and digital.

Today, The CEO Forum Group is recognized as “The Transformative CEO Community” for its efforts in helping to build success, one CEO at a time, by sharing best practices, driving job creation and expanding innovation and value throughout the world.

Name: Vibesolate FM
Description:
Our primary goal is developing an established platform for DJ’s, Producers and Creatives to showcase their talent to a wider audience, and to share the music we love with more people.

Created during a period of never seen before lockdown throughout the world which has created struggles and pain but also both peace and opportunity, we are in a unique position to bring people together in these times due to established music industry networks, and years of experience building tech startups and promoting artists and events. 

Vibesolate FM is streaming thoughtful conversation and music 2/7 from a hand picked group of the world’s best DJ’s, along with thoughtful conversation and discussions about the passions and pitfalls of the fast cha

The founders of Vibesolate FM have been working in the music industry for many years, promoting events, running social media projects for brands, independent artists and major record labels.  We’ve helped launch the music careers of some huge success stories in the industry, helping promote independent artists such as NSG who have had multiple top 10 UK hits, Piers James who has performed with Ed Sheeran, and completed sync deals with Adidas, Stella McCartney, Flannels and Red Bull, and working with Sony Music to promote Lazy Weekends who reached over 13 Million streams in 2019, along with various publishing, social media and video projects.

We’re currently on the lookout for new artists to join the Vibesolate Family, in particular underground music producers, artists, bloggers and vloggers who have depth in their work and a unique sound or style. 

If you would like to be considered for the next wave  contact the team for further information at vibes@vibesolate.com with the subject ‘label’

Name: Athens Voice
Description: Athens Voice is a free weekly newspaper and news and features website in Athens, Greece. The print version of the newspaper is published and distributed every Thursday in Athens, Thessaloniki and other cities in Greece. It contains articles and analyses of current socio-political affairs, as well as arts and culture coverage and listings for events, nightlife and restaurants in Athens. The online version contains both the articles published in the print version, as well as entirely new material and is updated on a daily basis. Athens Voice Publishing also publishes the quarterly magazines HOME and LOOK, the Thessaloniki-based monthly magazine Soul and the Athens In Your Pocket guide. Athens Voice also organizes free admission events and parties. Each week's cover is designed by a different artist. At the end of each year, all covers are exhibited to Benaki Museum.

Name: zero2eight
Description:
zero2eight covers early care, development and education for children 0 through 8 years old. We publish stories from — and for — those passionate about early learning. 

The first eight years of a child’s life are critical for foundational learning and brain development. Our mission is to help readers make sense of the unique challenges facing young children, their families and the early learning workforce — and to highlight innovative approaches to solving them. Our stories elevate voices from the field and the communities being served, and highlight the groundbreaking research, policies and practices moving the sector forward.

HISTORY 
In 2025, zero2eight launched as a dedicated early learning vertical at The 74. Its archive of stories, published from 2018 to 2024, is composed of pieces produced by Early Learning Nation, an independent digital magazine that launched originally as an initiative of the Bezos Family Foundation. The magazine, which focused primarily on children 0-5 years old, aimed to cultivate and strengthen communities, and indeed, to help build a robust early learning nation.

Name: SICURAUTO.it
Description:
SICURAUTO.it è uno dei principali portali automotive italiani, visitato ogni mese da oltre 1.000.000 di lettori, punto di riferimento per automobilisti, professionisti dell’aftermarket, fleet manager, officine, carrozzerie e operatori dell’autoriparazione.

Da oltre 25 anni, il portale offre contenuti autorevoli, esclusivi e aggiornati su manutenzione e assistenza post-vendita, aftermarket, novità tecnologiche, veicoli elettrici e ibridi, ADAS e guida autonoma, recensioni prodotto, B2B e gestione flotte.

SICURAUTO.it è anche ideatore dell’Aftermarket Report, lo studio annuale più completo sul mercato dell’aftermarket e della manutenzione automobilistica in Italia, e del progetto Aftermarket & SERMI Forum, ciclo di conferenze dedicate al settore, con focus su innovazione tecnologica, formazione e sostenibilità.

Grazie a una forte presenza digitale, in particolare su Youtube, Facebook e LinkedIn, e a un approccio giornalistico rigoroso e approfondito, SICURAUTO.it unisce contenuti di interesse generale e strumenti pratici per automobilisti e operatori professionali, diventando un punto di riferimento autorevole per chi vuole comprendere il presente e il futuro dell’automotive in Italia.

Nato circa 20 anni fa, negli anni ha ampliato il suo raggio d’azione creando contenuti curiosi e di interesse su manutenzione auto, aftermarket, tecnica, novità auto nuove ed elettriche, recensioni prodotto, ADAS e guida autonoma, B2B e Flotte, nonché una serie esclusiva di approfondimenti ed inchieste.

Ad oggi è tra i più seguiti portali italiani di riferimento per gli automobilisti che vogliono tenersi aggiornati, i professionisti dell'automotive e gli esperti dal mondo dell’autoriparazione.

Director

Name: SPJ New England
Description:
The Society of Professional Journalists works to improve and protect journalism. The organization is the nation’s most broad-based journalism organization, dedicated to encouraging the free practice of journalism and stimulation high standards of ethical behavior. Founded in 1909 as Sigma Delta Chi, SPJ promotes the free flow of information vital to a well-informed citizenry; works to inspire and educate the next generation of journalists; and protects First Amendment guarantees of freedom of speech and press.
