Today VFX can handle the every aspect of construction related media production, including Architectural 3D Rendering, 3D Walkthrough Animation, Project Launch or Marketing DVD's, Construction Progress and Construction time-lapse videos.

As wildlife filmmaker Yusuf Thakur brings to his work a rare passion for the environment and wildlife. The international awards received for the films made on the wildlife of the region have brought into focus its natural beauty. After working independently for a decade, he started VFX and by continually reinvesting in people and equipment, VFX has grown while maintaining the original philosophy – “the best people, the best equipment.”

Name: ReNew Canada
Description:
ReNew Canada is the voice of public sector infrastructure in Canada. Through our multi-media outlets, we provoke our readers to discuss the policies, planning approaches and funding tools necessary to grow our nation’s public infrastructure assets. Industry key players and policy makers alike turn to ReNew Canada for our exclusive insightful content to help them build resilient public assets.

The annual Top100 Project report ranks Canada’s biggest infrastructure projects based on total dollar value. As a primary research project, Top100 Projects includes an in-depth look at the projects growing the quality of our health care, energy, education, transportation, culture and water assets from coast to coast. With nearly $200 billion in assets currently in construction, Top100 Projects provides an inside look at the companies driving Canada’s new infrastructure forward.

Thousands of Canada’s infrastructure key players and policymakers turn to ReNew Canada for exclusive, insightful content to help them build resilient public assets.

ReNew Canada is Canada’s voice in infrastructure. We’re the only industry magazine that provides high-level coverage of the planning, financing, design, engineering, construction, and management of public assets in the following sectors: transit, transportation, energy, public works and public spaces.

Along with coverage of all main sectors and regular columns on legal and financing trends, each issue explores timely news, best practices, and focused roundtables.

Get the latest news and information in your inbox by subscribing to our e-newsletter: http://eepurl.com/c2DnW5

Name: MTM - Medya Takip Merkezi
Description:
Merkezi İstanbul'da bulunan uluslararası bir medya takip ve analiz şirketi olan MTM- Medya Takip Merkezi; işletmelerin daha akıllı iş kararları almasını sağlayan bir medya takip ve analiz platformudur.

Sosyal medyayı, İnternet sitelerini, Televizyon kanallarını, Haber sitelerini, Gazeteleri, Dergileri, Radyo kanallarını, Podcastleri kısacası tüm medyayı takip edip raporluyoruz. Kişi, kurum, kuruluş ve markalar için; medya yansımalarını anlık olarak kayıt altına alıp, kaotik medya ortamını eylem ve sonuç yaratan genel bakışlara, içgörülere ve tavsiyelere dönüştürüyoruz.

İşletmelerin veriye dayalı stratejik kararlarını desteklemek için onlara; verileri tanımlama, toplama, işleme ve yönetme olanağı sunuyoruz. Yapay zeka destekli gelişmiş medya takip ve analiz platformumuzla, markalara iş kollarıyla ilgili yeni fırsatları görme imkanı veriyoruz.

25 yıllık sektörel deneyime dayanan hızlı, yenilikçi ve kapsamlı çözümlerimizle müşterilerimize, medya mecralarında kendileri, rakipleri veya müşterileri hakkında 7/24 neler söylendiğini raporlayıp, paydaşlarımızın gerçeklere dayalı eylemlerde bulunmalarını sağlıyoruz.

Daha fazla bilgi için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz…

Name: Social Content Factory
Description:
Niente cattura l'attenzione come una storia ben raccontata: noi colleghiamo il vostro brand a quella storia. 

Come?

Producendo visual storytelling e branded content: gestendo a seconda delle vostre necessità tutta la filiera produttiva, dalla creatività al prodotto finito. Siamo due professionisti che si erano stufati della vita di prima: Cristian Micheletti, esperienza pluriennale come producer per MTV Italia e Virgin, autore, filmaker e regista, e Gabriele Ferraresi, giornalista, scrittore, blogger, ex managing editor di Blogo.it, due anni in redazione a Maxim.

Adesso cosa facciamo? Adesso vi aiutiamo a raccontare le vostre storie e i vostri valori. Vi aiutiamo a diventare editori di voi stessi: perché l'unico modo di ottenere un'attenzione positiva è creare contenuti straordinari; mentre far interrompere da un brand una narrazione non funziona più. 

Se questo è vero sui media che conosciamo da tempo, è ancora più vero sul web: dove il messaggio intromesso sarà cancellato, ignorato, spazzato via.

Noi risolviamo questo problema per voi.

A Fênix Editora busca e mantém parcerias de longo prazo com seus fornecedores, dentro da normalidade comercial do mercado.
A Fênix Editora é ética em suas relações com os órgãos públicos e segue a legislação.

Name: Scoop News Group
Description:
Scoop News Group is the leading public sector tech media company in the country. Built on a foundation of award-winning journalism, we are the community's platform for education and collaboration through news, TV, radio and events.

-- How We Got Started --

On October 1, 2008, we launched FedScoop, an innovative and out-of-the-box daily online news site that pulled together the latest news about federal IT trends. It was a one-stop shop for news that the government IT community embraced.

Because of the site's tremendous success, we realized the need for something equally as powerful: To bring together the people behind the news by creating a community platform for government IT executives—from the White House and federal agencies, to academia and the tech industry—to share ideas, collaborate and learn.

Over the next eight years, SNG launched StateScoop, covering topics and events impacting technology decisions in state and local government; EdScoop, covering the latest news and innovations driving technology and digital learning in K-12 and higher education; and CyberScoop, covering cybersecurity news with a devoted audience of information security leaders and power players in the public and private sectors.

-- Fast Forward --

Today, Scoop News Group is the leading public sector tech media company in the country. Our events, including FedTalks and CyberWeek, are considered the best VIP gatherings across the United States, bringing together the most influential leaders and consistently featuring some of the most sought-after speakers from government and the tech industry.

Collectively, they've made the Scoop News Group brand synonymous with quality. That's reflected by our client and sponsor list, which includes the biggest tech companies in the world.

Description:

Today, we operate a broadcast-quality production house with a full-time staff of researchers, producers and video editors. Our primary goal is to render this priceless archival material accessible, making them meaningful to diverse audiences around the world.

JEM is constantly adding new innovative gateways online, to access the recordings, and to enable the wider world to learn and be inspired by the timeless messages from the Rebbe.

As a result of JEM’s embrace of technology, our archive now contains thousands of hours of video, film, and audio recordings. Once preserved, these invaluable moving images and sounds are utilized for inspiration, research and study for today and for future generations.

Description:
Het Vakblad voor de Bloemisterij is hèt vakblad voor professionele telers en handelaren van snijbloemen en pot- en perkplanten in Nederland. Het magazine verschijnt elke vrijdag en analyseert de actuele ontwikkelingen in de Nederlandse en mondiale sierteelt. Ook bezorgt de redactie vier maal per week een nieuwsbrief in de vorm van een e-mail aan een brede groep professionals die in de Nederlandse sierteeltketen werken.

Een ervaren team redacteuren geeft in het Vakblad voor de Bloemisterij aandacht aan de actuele trends en ontwikkelingen in de markten, de teelt, de marketing, de dienstverlening en de politiek. Ook opinie ontbreekt niet in de vorm van columns van telers in binnen- en buitenland en van trendzetters in de keten. De redactie wil met de inhoud van het vakblad van toegevoegde waarde zijn voor de bedrijfsvoering van de professionele teler en handelaar.

Description:
Quillette is an Australian-based but internationally-focused online magazine that specialises in long-form analysis and cultural commentary. We are politically non-partisan, but rely on reason, science, and humanism as our guiding values. 

It was founded by Claire Lehmann in 2015, and incorporated in 2018. In 2023, she remains the sole director of Quillette Pty Ltd, a private company held in Australia. Quillette is edited in Sydney, London, Toronto and Delaware.

Quillette hosts its own podcast, and the Quillette team regularly holds events around the word. These parties are called Quillette Socials, and they're a chance for our community to come together, network, and have fun!

Quillette's revenue comes from our readers. We are a grassroots organisation that relies on voluntary subscriptions and community membership as our primary revenue stream. You can support Quillette by becoming a subscriber today.

If you'd like to contribute, you can do so by emailing pitch@quillette.com.

Today, Europe has two major fronts editorial: 

MAGAZINES - There are 15 titles each month, 5 bimonthly issues, and special issues. Our magazines are distributed throughout Brazil and can be found at newsstands and bookstores. 

BOOKS - Every month Editora Europa publishes 6 new books in different areas of knowledge, most of them are illustrated works of great cultural value and directed to the issues of our publications. By mid-2009 the catalog of the Editora Europa already includes 72 different books.

Merman is a production and entertainment company working across the US and UK. As well as scripting award-winning TV and film, Merman is globally renowned for creating and executing the next generation of branded entertainment, advertising and premium short form content. Merman was founded in 2014 by award-winning duo Sharon Horgan and Clelia Mountford, and under their leadership Merman Television has won multiple accolades including five BAFTAs and multiple Emmy and RTS nominations.

Merman’s recent TV projects include: Dreamland for Sky, Catastrophe for Channel 4/Amazon, Frank of Ireland for Channel 4/Amazon, Divorce for HBO, This Way Up for Hulu/Channel 4, There She Goes for BBC4, Women on the Verge for UKTV, Motherland for BBC2, Bad Sisters for Apple, plus many more.

Merman’s first feature film Herself, a co-production with Element Pictures, written by Claire Dunne and Malcolm Campbell and starring Dunne, premiered at 2020 Sundance Film Festival.

Merman’s advertising and branded division has offices in London, New York and Los Angeles, and is led by Managing Partners Kira Carstensen, Ellen Clarke, and Annique DeCaestecker. The London office is under the directorship of joint Managing Directors Siobhan Murphy and Spencer Dodd. In addition to commercial content helmed by an award-winning roster of directors, Merman’s focus is to bring writers and creators from their TV and film family into scripting entertainment for brands in collaboration with agency partners.

In 2018 Merman launched Mermade, its brand new digitally focused digital sister, specializing in the creation of content of all shapes and sizes, funded by and for social and streaming platforms, brands and publishers, with a particular focus on short-form episodic.

Not limited to positive or negative stories, we identify recommendations and solutions that would enable individuals and communities to better their narratives. With the assistance of correspondents and hosts, stories are collected from within communities where they are shared on several platforms. There is no better person to tell the story than the victim of the story.

Mission: To create awareness of happenings in Africa, and foster local impact and growth within communities through storytelling.

Vision: Our vision is to become the number one platform promoting inspiring stories in Africa while empowering communities to better their narratives to share indigenous knowledge and solutions. 

Themes: Passion, Values, and Environment

Motto: Amplifying stories to inspire change!

SDG Goals: At B.ISA, we believe that stories are gold, they are the gateway to connecting with people and a universal language. Leveraging on the Sustainable Developmental Goals 4, 10, 11 and 17, we are using the power of storytelling to create a positive impact in Africa.

Name: 24sata
Description:
24sata je najveći multiplatiformski medijski brend u Hrvatskoj. Unutar medijske kuće razvijena su četiri snažna brenda – 24sata, JoomBoos, Express i miss7 uz specijalizirane portale missMama, missZdrava i missGastro. 24sata danas je lider na tržištu i to na web, mobilnoj i print platformi. Tvrtka 24sata d.o.o. osnovana je potkraj 2004. godine i nalazi se u vlasništvu austrijskog izdavača Styria AG, jedne od najvećih austrijskih medijskih kuća.

24sata su brzo nakon dolaska na tržište postale vodeće hrvatske dnevne novine, kako po čitanosti, tako i po broju prodanih primjeraka. Već nakon godinu dana bile su najčitanije dnevne novine u Hrvatskoj, a drugu obljetnicu izlaženja dočekale su i kao najprodavanije dnevne novine. Nakon novina, pokrenut je i portal 24sata.hr čija danas iznosi preko 800.000 ljudi dnevno i čini ga prvim na hrvatskom tržištu po broju dnevnih korisnika (Gemius Audience 2022.). Mjesečno portal 24sata posjećuje više od 2 milijuna stvarnih korisnika! (Gemius Audience 2022.). Osim mobilne verzije, 24sata.hr ima i svoje iOS, Android te Huawei aplikacije.  

Tijekom relativno kratkog perioda izlaženja 24sata su dobila nekoliko međunarodnih priznanja, a trend su nastavila i kroz godine prikupila više od 150 nagrada i priznanja, od čega najviše u području native oglašavanja, što native studio s više od 90 nagrada čini najnagrađivanijim u svijetu. 

Vodeću poziciju 24sata ima i na društvenim mrežama s više od 610 milijuna pregleda na YouTubeu i Facebooku (Tubular 2022.), više od 17 milijuna pregleda na Instagramu (Instagram Insights 2022.) i više od 180 milijuna pregleda na TikToku (Tubular 2022.).

Au cœur de DIGITALLI se trouve un collectif uni par l’exigence et une curiosité constante. Notre démarche repose sur l’alliance entre créativité et innovation, soutenue par les dernières avancées technologiques.

Name: Jordan Media City
Description:
Jordan Media City (JMC) was launched in 2001 as the first private media city in the region with the aim of providing the regional and international media industry with state of the art technologies and professional and experienced staff. JMC is a tax free establishment which provides financial incentives to its clients.

Mission

To become the leading media hub in the region, to be able to playout and uplink television channels to cover the whole world, and to have state of art studioes and production facilities.

Background

Jordan Media City is a private company founded as a result of an agreement between the government of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan and Dallah Production Company. It was set up with a capital of ten million JDs (15 million US Dollars). 

JMC awarded a multi-million US dollar contract to supply equipment and software for the operation of ninety playout channels and one hundred back-hauled channels, plus an archive system and software applications to operate the system.

The state of art video servers provided an ideal platform for transmission regardless of the format. All media was acquired and stored on central storage, to be accessed by one or more users to supply multiple services...

Location

The Jordan Media City is centrally located next to Jordan Radio and Television Station. It is a short distance from Queen Alia International Airport, and just a few minutes away from Jordan's main highway which connects the country's northern borders with its only port in Aqaba in the south.

They love working closely with clients through the entire creative process from the idea and concept, to the final production to create evocative experiences.

Name: Radio Kiss Kiss
Description:
Giugno 1976, 97.00 mhz. Nell'etere napoletano, per la prima volta, va in onda  il segnale di Radio Kiss Kiss. 
A lanciare il primo esperimento di radio privata a Napoli è, infatti, Ciro Niespolo, proprietario della più grande discoteca della città .
Pochi mesi dopo, il  12 settembre,  Radio Kiss Kiss  inizia ufficialmente  le trasmissioni con "Dedicato a..." programma di dediche musicali condotto da  Sasà Capobianco e Enzo Giuliano.
Nel giro di un mese le trasmissioni passano da tre a venti ore al giorno.
Nello staff della neonata emittente ci sono una decina di persone, tra queste anche Lucia Niespolo, figlia di Ciro, vivace adolescente con la passione per la musica.
Nel 1977 Radio Kiss Kiss vince il Telegatto . Nel giro di un altro anno l'emittente è diventata una realtà industriale: nuovi studi in via Sgambati e ottanta collaboratori. Il segnale della radio si riceve in tutto il sud. 23 Novembre 1980. 90 secondi che sconvolgono Napoli. Radio Kiss Kiss apre i microfoni e diventa la voce di una città in ginocchio. Febbraio 1981. La prima indagine sull'ascolto delle radio italiane registra il primato di Kiss Kiss nella provincia di Napoli.
L'emittente napoletana dimostra fin da subito la sua capacità di attrarre anche il pubblico del Nord Italia: nel 1990 Radio Kiss Kiss diventa la sesta radio ascoltata a Milano.

Name: STAT Publishing Group LLC
Description:
STAT Publishing Group LLC is a B2B media company specialising in air cargo, logistics, aviation, and supply chain sectors. Established in 1986, the company provides in-depth industry journalism through its publications, conferences, videos and social media.

The STAT Trade Times, popularly known as STAT Times, is a monthly magazine and web portal that provides news, interviews, and analysis on the air cargo, aviation, warehousing, and logistics industries. 

Indian Transport & Logistics News (ITLN) is a mode-agnostic bimonthly publication and news portal dedicated to addressing the logistics ecosystem of the Indian subcontinent, with emphasis on policy, infrastructure, and technology.

Logistics Update Africa (LUA) is a bimonthly publication and digital platform focused on logistics developments across air, sea, land and rail modes in Africa, offering region-specific and vertical-specific coverage.

The company also hosts the annual ‘STAT Times International Award for Excellence in Air Cargo.’

www.transport-press.bg

In the face-to-face media segment, Bulgarian Transport Press is the founder and organiser of the following annual B2B events in the fields of commercial vehicles, transport and logistics:
- Truck Show KAMIONI - for commercial vehicles since 2011
- Logistics Business Conference - since 2013
- StroMa Expo (as co-organiser) - for construction equipment since 2015
- Logistics in Action - Show in the Warehouse - for warehousing equipment since 2016
- Commercial Vehicles of the Year - BG event since 2018

The editors of Bulgarian Transport Press are the Bulgarian members of the following prestigious juries:
- International Truck of the Year (IToY) 
- Truck Innovation Award
- International Bus and Coach of the Year
- International Van of the Year 
- International Pick-up Award
- International Trailer Award
- International Forklift of the Year (IFoY)
and others.

Name: Brickyard
Description:
Brickyard is a female-owned digital production studio skilled in high-end VFX, CG animation, motion graphics, design, live action production and creative development for advertising, social media, films and emerging media.

Brickyard is artist-centric at the core, fostering a close collaboration artist-to-director and also with the entire creative team. Within a cozy eclectic production space right in downtown Boston, Brickyard assembles a customized crew of directors, designers, animators, and compositors for every project. Please contact Ellen (ellen@brickyardvfx.com) with Brickyard VFX or Bill (bill@brickyardfilmworks.com) with Brickyard Filmworks, call (617) 262-3220, or visit us at www.brickyardvfx.com.

Name: Fondovi.hr
Description: Portal o investicijskim fondovima. Vijesti, komentari, analize

Name: xyHt
Description:
xyHt: Positioning and Measurement, Elevated.

xyHt is an independent publication for geospatial professionals and businesses.

Covering surveying, BIM, Lidar, UAS, location tech, and hydrography among other disciplines, xyHt is pioneering the unification of the geospatial professions.

For more information visit xyHt.com or follow on Twitter @xyHt.

Name: OFFICE ROXX
Description: OFFICE ROXX informiert über alle wichtigen Facetten des modernen Büros. Das Magazin existiert seit 1997, der Blog seit 2015. Beide präsentieren Neuigkeiten, Produktempfehlungen und -vergleiche, Anwender- und Messeberichte, Tipps, Tests, Rezensionen und vieles mehr.

Name: BNR Werkverkenners
Description:
Elke week zoekt presentator Rens de Jong in BNR Werkverkenners een vraag uit over werk. Elke dinsdag om 15:00 of altijd op de BNR app. 

Jouw vragen zijn hier ook welkom.

Name: Tucker Carlson Network
Description:
Tucker Carlson Network is the new streaming platform that is home to exclusive all-new content from Tucker Carlson. We will regularly be releasing new video content that tells the stories that matter and helps you make sense of the world around you. Join us!

News coverage in the West has become a tool of repression and control. Reporters no longer reveal essential information to the public; they work to hide it. Journalists act as censors on behalf of entrenched power. They have contempt for the public. They hate the truth.

Democracy can’t function in a society like this. Voters can’t know what they’re voting for. People do understand they’re being manipulated, and they resent it. The population becomes angry and paranoid. Things fall apart.

There’s only one solution to a propaganda spiral like the one we’re living through, and it’s telling the truth about the things that matter — clearly and without fear. That’s our job. We plan to do it every day, no matter what.

Name: InPeak Time
Description:
InPeak Time is a media and consulting company dedicated to bridging Saudi Arabia with the international community. Founded by British filmmaker, author, and business influencer Somi Arian, the company produces original and branded content that highlights Saudi Arabia's developments in venture capital, private equity, and entrepreneurship. Their flagship documentary, "From Silicon Valley to Riyadh," showcases the Kingdom's transformation and is featured on platforms like Saudia Airlines’ in-flight entertainment and stc TV. 

Beyond content creation, InPeak Time offers consulting services to international companies entering the Saudi market and to Saudi entities seeking global partnerships. They also provide public speaking engagements, with Founder Somi Arian sharing her expertise on investment, technology, and international business.

Name: Factoría Henneo
Description:
Produce para Aragón TV "Ahora y aquí", Aquí y ahora", "El campo es nuestro", "Esta es mi tierra", "Conexión Aragón", "Atónitos huéspedes", y "Unidad móvil"; para Telemadrid "Madrid desde el aire" y para Canal Extremadura "El campo es vida".

Con sedes en Aragón y Madrid, elabora contenidos para distintas cadenas de televisión nacionales y autonómicas. 

FACTORÍA tiene amplia experiencia en la producción de formatos tipo factual y en la realización de directos (retransmisiones y magazines). También produce con éxito concursos, galas y talent shows. Cuenta con un departamento propio de I+D+I que trabaja permanentemente en el diseño de nuevos formatos.

Name: Metronome
Description:
Som en af Danmarks største produktionsvirksomheder har Metronome i årtier udviklet succesfuldt indhold på tværs af platforme og målgrupper og gang på gang demonstreret en tydelig kanalprofil og høj produktionsværdi.
Vores opskrift på succes er enkel: Vi tager det at skabe smil alvorligt. Fra pitch til premiere værdsætter vi kreativt samarbejde og legende nysgerrighed, baseret på gennemprøvede arbejdsgange og en struktureret tilgang til historiefortællingens håndværk.
En af vores yndlingsdiscipliner er at udvikle helt nye formater med internationalt potentiale – og vi er stolte af at have sendt Stripped, Alone Together, Shaolin Heroes og Roast on the Coast ud i verden.
Samtidig vidner de utallige sæsoner af store internationale formater som The Block, Taskmaster og Ex on the Beach, som vi har produceret i Danmark, om vores store passion for at bringe lokale versioner af globale hits ud til danske seere.
Metronome ejes af det globale indholdsnetværk Banijay Entertainment, som rummer over 130 produktionsselskaber i 23 lande. Som en innovativ, kreativ frontløber lancerede Banijay i 2024 mere end 250 nye non-scripted titler, i gennemsnit 110+ scripted titler, 80 shows på streamingplatforme og producerede 33 formater i mere end 3 territorier.

Name: Artmonks Film Production House
Description:
Artmonks is a production house based in Bangalore.
We are a team of storytellers with a creative capability to enhance your Audio-Video production. 

The main story : We at Artmonks Creative Monastery, dedicate ourselves to your requirement, taking your story to nirvana.

Video Production: Whether it’s a commercial or a promotional video,  Artmonks ensure a professional creation. We can come up with video campaigns over night to boost your brand and reach.

Photography : No matter whether your requirement is big or small, we are armed with a team of in-house  Professionals delivering great content from fashion to product to what not.

Post Production : Our house providing high quality editorial, visual effects, colour correction and assembly for film, television and commercial projects can provide great satisfaction in your final out.

Name: Pictures for the People
Description:
At Pictures for the People, we help businesses create outstanding video content - while providing training and opportunities to disadvantaged young people across the UK.

We’re a social enterprise production company on a mission to prove that creativity and social impact can go hand in hand. Working with Jobcentre Plus and The King's Trust (The Prince’s Trust), we recruit unemployed and disadvantaged young people to work with us on real productions - gaining paid experience, new skills, and genuine pathways into the industry.

We partner with a wide range of clients, producing commercials, animations, social campaigns, and event coverage - delivering content that looks good and does good.

Name: Böcek Films
Description:
Böcek Films aynı zamanda Reklam Yapımcıları Derneği üyesidir.

Incorporated in 1998, Bocek Production provides services with the partnership between Omer Faruk Sorak and Oguz Peri in the fields of advertisement, cinema film, TV series, TV programs, video music clips, introductory films, and social responsibility projects.

Bocek Production is at the same time a member of the Advertisement Producers Association.

Name: ZUT
Description:
We’re not your average production house, or creative agency. We see ourselves as problem solvers, merging creativity and world class production.

Our aim is to be a collaborator, listener, thinker, creator and maker in order to find a way for you to succeed. With over 15 years of experience working with agencies, brands, and everything in between – locally, nationally, and globally; we have the knowledge and capability to turn a vision into reality. 

Based in Liverpool, our team of 35 live and breathe everything content, constantly innovating to inspire and engage audiences. We craft purposeful content, delivering results that matter.

- Expert production. Agile Execution.

Take a look at some of our latest work at: https://zutmedia.com/work/

Name: Cala Enterprises Corporation
Description:
Cala Enterprises es una plataforma de contenidos multi-formato que ofrece experiencias transformadoras para el crecimiento personal y profesional, con base en la filosofía del estratega de vida y negocios Ismael Cala, su fundador y actual CCO, quien se ha venido perfilando como un embajador del bienestar y para la comunidad de Latinoamérica y el Caribe.

Comunicación, motivación, innovación, productividad, liderazgo y excelencia son los pilares formativos que componen nuestra propuesta de felicidad individual y corporativa. El portafolio incluye conferencias, seminarios, cursos on-line, libros, producciones audiovisuales e incluso viajes de crecimiento y capacitación, cuyo objetivo es apoyar a las personas en el desarrollo pleno de su potencial.

Ya sea que se trate de ejecutivos, emprendedores, educadores o agentes de cambio, la misión de Cala Enterprises es continuar creciendo estratégicamente para así optimizar el impacto positivo que hasta ahora ha generado en millones de personas y organizaciones de Latinoamérica y el mundo.

---

Cala Enterprises is a content platform specializing in learning experiences based on proven methodologies developed by Ismael Cala. As the founder of Cala Enterprises and the Ismael Cala Foundation, Ismael has become a leading authority in personal and professional development. 

Cala Enterprises creates inspirational and life altering content for their conferences, seminars, online courses, best-selling book, media productions and retreats; all focused on topics that range from leadership, motivation, personal growth to design thinking. Cala Enterprises strives to empower people as well as help them discover their strengths and maximize their full potential.

Whether the end users are corporate leaders, start-up entrepreneurs, educators, or agents of change, Cala Enterprises seeks to continue growing organically and strategically while optimizing the positive impact it has proven to have in the lives of millions of people.

Name: Look At Media
Description:
Look At Media is a successful independent digital media company with total monthly audience over 6 500 000  people. It unites several popular web-sites: Lookatme.ru, Furfur.me, The-village.ru and Wonderzine.com. The sites cover fashion, beauty, contemporary culture & technology, urbanism and local entrepreneurship. 

Since launch in 2006 Look At Media have been working with over 310 international and local brands in 23 product categories either placing display advertising or creating innovative brand intergration projects for them

Look At Media internal advertising creative and production unit has over 65 local and international advertising awards including Cannes Lions, One Show, D&AD and etc. In 2012 Look At Media was named 1-st digital agency in Russia according to Russian Association of Communication agencies. 

In 2014 Look At Media have launched a trendwatching and consulting division De:Coding (de-coding.com) to fuel brands with relevant audience data gained through studies of contemporary culture, social behaviors and motivations beneath. 

Look At Media have developed a unique publishing platform including Article editor (http://dpl.look-at-media.com/editor), custom made editorial process management software and other media publishing tools.

Name: Dallah Holding Media
Description:
Welcome to Dallah Holding Media. We are a fully-integrated communications group that provides clients with the best-in-class marcoms solutions in Qatar. Our forte lies in advertising, marketing, and event management.
The Dallah Group traces its origins to 1982, when the signature company Dallah Advertising Agency began offering creative solutions to the market. Since then, the hallmark companies of Dallah Group have shaped the communications landscape in Qatar, and serviced both public and private organisations from many sectors of the Qatari economy.

Name: Unnaggi Productions
Description: Unnaggi specializes in creating and producing high quality photos and video content for clients and artists. This includes commercials, corporate videos, music videos, documentaries, and other types of photo and video content. The process typically involves concept development, scriptwriting, pre-production planning, filming, post-production editing, and delivery of the final product. We at Unnaggi have a team of directors, producers, camera operators, editors, and VFX/GFX/SFX artists to bring our clients' vision to life. Unnaggi also has a sister company called Rosette Productions that blends emotions into handcrafted wedding documentaries.

Name: Scoundrel
Description: Scoundrel is a multi-faceted production company that specialises in film, animation, art, and immersive projects. The Scoundrel collective consists of over twenty-five directors, animators, and creators who are supported by a producing team that has been highly awarded at Cannes, D&AD, One Show, CLIO, Ciclope, and the British Arrows. We strive for integrity and creativity both in the work we do and the way we do business. Creating well-loved and effective storytelling is our passion and to that end, we look forward to working with you.

Name: FlatPlan
Description:
125 million people read 5 billion articles on Apple News every month. Stories appear in fast-loading Apple News Format articles, surfaced to readers based on browsing history, taste and human-meets-algorithm curation.

FlatPlan empowers publishers to reach this huge audience in beautifully branded publications, on optimised articles built to maximise growth on the platform. FlatPlan handles all the heavy lifting including delivery, reporting and optimisation without costly development requirements or maintenance.

Name: Atlantic Pictures
Description: Atlantic Pictures is a creative content studio and video production company that works with agencies and brands to create exceptional content at any budget level. Atlantic also functions as a US co-producer providing production services for feature film, TV, or digital series producers that are developing projects to shoot in the United States.

Name: IndustryNow
Description:
At IndustryNow, we champion the idea that collaboration leads to unparalleled success.

We’ve crafted an innovative platform dedicated to connecting industry leaders with the insights, connections, and resources essential for business growth. Our events serve as dynamic forums where ideas thrive and collaboration sparks ingenuity.

What sets our events apart is the unique design, ensuring not just connections, but the right connections that lead to tangible ROI and impactful results.

Name: Postmodern Company
Description:
Postmodern is the production company creating content that propels today’s best companies into tomorrow.

As malcontent content creators, we strive to be creatively uncomfortable and forever relied upon, trusted and even loved in the relationships we build and keep.

Together with brands, corporations, marketers and nonprofits we connect to the world through content that wows.

We produce inspiring results that can only come from the connectivity of great people, founded process, and relentless creativity.

Name: Comptoir IA
Description:
Bienvenue à bord de Comptoir IA, la référence pour tout comprendre de l'IA générative en 2024 !
Oubliez tout ce que vous saviez sur l'intelligence artificielle. Avec des acteurs majeurs comme ChatGPT ou Midjourney, l'IA n'est plus la même. Imaginez un monde où des millions de personnes dépendent déjà de ces technologies innovantes pour améliorer leur quotidien. Vous êtes curieux de savoir comment tout cela fonctionne ? Comptoir IA est là pour vous éclairer !

Name: Mega TV
Description: Mega TV nace en el 2011 como una empresa de servicios integrales audiovisuales. A pesar de iniciar sus pasos en plena crisis económica de España, en pocos años ha producido más de 5.000 horas de televisión para las más importantes cadenas españolas. Alguno de sus trabajos han sido premiados en distintos festivales internacionales.

Name: Lynx2Market / PharmaSynergy
Description:
#PharmaSynergy is built around one-on-one meetings that connect global pharma BD & Licensing professionals, empowered further by the content-driven program. The event showcases pharma opportunities for internationalization, in/out licensing, investment, and portfolio development.

Our partnering events cover the following products:

#PharmaSynergyRx - Rx, Niche generics, VAMs, Biosimilars, Orphan, Specialty products and NCEs.

#PharmaSynergyOTC - OTC & CHC products.

Lynx2Market is a privately-owned life-sciences events and conferences organiser committed to helping executives that are working in the healthcare and pharmaceutical industry, and who are looking to grow their businesses in emerging and fast-changing markets. We bring together like-minded people who create a supportive network of market knowledge and quality connections that allow companies to achieve their commercial ambitions.

Our 30+ years of combined experience in producing and organising events brought us to formulating a different business approach: we co-create a product with our customers by involving them in every stage - from research and development to innovative content creation, to speaker selection and the delivery of the event on the day. We focus on building active and long-lasting relationships with our delegates, sponsors, and partners. Proof of our success lies in the passionate recommendations from our loyal clients who attend our clinical and commercial conferences globally.

Name: Box Bear Ltd
Description:
When you’re looking to reach your audience in new ways, to see new levels of engagement, and take your product or brand to a new level, you need a specialist media and events creative agency that understands how to innovate, excite and inspire. 
 
For over 20 years we’ve partnered with the world’s best innovators across the healthcare, green energy and professional services sectors, trusted to excite and inspire customers. We’ve seen how excitement sparks ideas, drives behaviour change, and creates lasting impact. At Box Bear, we call this Evolving Media – the continuous transformation of storytelling and communication through creativity and technology.
 
Founded and run by former medical and consumer brand managers, our personal experience means we understand how to gain the advantage in sales and marketing. We can help you fulfil your business needs and strategic aims. We handle brand strategy, creative and ideation, copywriting, filming, animation, motion graphics, editing, 3D modelling, livestreaming, broadcast and events. Our dedicated in-house Research & Development team find the right solutions with pioneering technology. And our flagship marketing tool HoloPresenter, and meeting platform VR TeamSpace, bring cutting-edge extended reality experiences to your sales, congress, and training audiences. 
 
Box Bear. Welcome to the place where media evolves.

Name: Sixtine Groupe
Description:
Sixtine Groupe est un acteur indépendant de référence de la création de contenus pour la communication et le divertissement. 

Il s’articule autour de 12 sociétés spécialisées couvrant l’ensemble des verticales de la production de contenus audiovisuels:

- 1500 contenus par an
- 100 clients récurrents 


Un écosystème créatif unique pour répondre aux nouveaux enjeux de contenus des marques et des médias.

Name: Mediasys
Description:
Mediasys provides the world's leading integrated digital content creation tools and the leading management and distribution solutions so you can create once and use it anywhere, from start to finish, on-screen, on-air, and on-line.

Our Mission: We enable individuals to realize their creative potential in any medium by providing intuitive, integrated tools for broadcast, post-production, games & animation featuring the new standard in visual effects, editing, animation, and bundled software solutions.

Our Commitment: Our primary commitment is to our customers. With our tools, we help them transform the science of virtual manipulation into the art of visual entertainment.

Description: The Official LinkedIn page of Mediasys Dubai. We provide the best solutions in 3D & 2D animation, 3D Scanning, Broadcast, Video wall solutions, Editing & Finishing, Post Production, Motion Capture, Storage, and Rendering. 

We represent BOXX Technologies, AJA Video Systems, NVIDIA, Autodesk, Adobe, PNY, Matrox, The Foundry, Rhinoceros, SolidWorks, Pixar, Optitrack, Redgiant, Genarts, Editshare, Supermicro, Lumion, Next Limit, Atto Technology, Chaosgroup - vray, G-Technology and Promise Technology.

Name: mal ehrlich
Description:
Mal ehrlich ist die Community für selbstbestimmte und gleichberechtigte Elternschaft. Wir zeigen ehrlich und durchaus auch humorvoll auf, was ist und was sein könnte.
Wir informieren, ermutigen, stellen in Frage.
Wir möchten den Diskurs und Dialog fördern, auch dort, wo normalerweise nicht in Frage gestellt wird, wie «man» es macht, und auch ausserhalb unseres Mediums. Wir möchten den Status Quo hinterfragen und Optionen aufzeigen.

(früher hiessen wir: Any Working Mom)

Name: HENRY
Description:
Henry.tv is an award-winning creative production studio.
We specialise in commercials, brand content & music videos.
Ranked amongst the #5 french production companies - we represent today and tomorrow’s talents.
Worldwide productions - Paris office.

Name: ARKA Creative
Description: We are an advertising agency focused on video and animation production with international experience working for the world’s biggest brands. We are an end-to-end service, which means we will complete every step from conceptualisation, script-writing, storyboarding, animatics, casting and filming to editing, animating, colour-grading, visual effects and delivering a top-quality finished product entirely in-house with no outsourcing. We are able to do this as a two-person team, on an economic market rate and with the highest standard of filmmaking. We are based in Islamabad, which means we can set up shoots at a short-notice and can easily transport our cast, crew and equipment within Islamabad and the Northern Areas.

Name: Young Wild Hunters
Description:
We are the first Spanish Production house fully dedicated to the outdoor world. 

It's our mission and passion to generate content that make you think in other ways to see life... to understand it.

Name: IPS Inter Press Service
Description:
http://www.ipsnews.net

IPS Inter Press Service news agency has established itself as a leading provider of news about sustainability, and as a global and regional communication platform for environment and development issues. 

The World Service covers over 150 countries and it's produced in English and Spanish. Selected stories are translated into French, German, Italian, Finnish, Dutch, Swedish and Portuguese.

IPS focuses on the developing regions of the globe, but within the context of globalisation and its impacts. IPS journalists write about economy, politics and social and cultural affairs. Development, environment, health, education, migration, human rights, democratisation, international co-operation and minorities are priority issues.

Name: Altinget.se
Description:
Altinget är en politiskt oberoende nyhetssajt som bevakar politiken i Sverige och EU. Vi tar politik på allvar.

Vår ambition är att förmedla politiska nyheter på ett opartiskt och öppet sätt och samtidigt bidra med fördjupningar, analyser och debatter. Vi rapporterar utifrån elva sakpolitiska ämnesområden där vi redan i ett tidigt skede bevakar den politiska beslutsprocessen. Vi anordnar också nätverk och kurser där deltagarna ges chansen att fysiskt samlas kring ett område.

Altinget.se ingår i AB Altinget Sverige. Systerbolaget i Danmark har bedrivit initierad journalistik om politik sedan år 2000 och är Danmarks största politikredaktion.

Chefredaktör och ansvarig utgivare: Lisa Bjurwald.

Name: Startup Wonders
Description: Read the latest business news, startup news, financial advice and interviews of the founders. A simple place to learn entrepreneurship qualities.

Name: LAUNCH DRTV
Description:
Launch DRTV is a full-service direct response agency, we prioritize what matters most... human emotion .
In an era where the customer IS the channel, our omnichannel, content-driven campaigns are designed to capture the hearts and minds of the customer. Our ROI goes well beyond our acquisition. We create a seamless brand experience, leaving a lasting impression and the foundation for a lifetime relationship.

Name: FMLY CRTV
Description: Production

Name: The Legal Writtygators
Description:
The Legal Writtygators: Navigating Law with Wit and Wisdom

 "The Legal Writtygators," a platform where legal expertise meets wit. Inspired by Article 32 of the Indian Constitution, our name reflects our blend of legal discourse and humor. "Gators" symbolizes our resilience and adaptability.

We offer thought-provoking posts, informative videos, insightful interviews, engaging vlogs, case law reviews, live streams, and concise shorts. Each piece illuminates hidden facets of legal matters.Across platforms.

Our mission is to uncover insights that challenge conventional wisdom. While law is our focus, our content spans various intersecting subjects.

Join our journey. Your feedback drives our growth. At "The Legal Writtygators," we embody perpetual learning and dedication.

Name: Journal of Wound Care (JWC)
Description:
The Journal of Wound Care (JWC) is the definitive international wound-care journal and the leading source of tissue viability research and clinical information. 

Launched in 1992, it is designed to meet the needs of the multidisciplinary team. The journal is essential reading for all wound-care specialists—nurses, doctors and researchers—who are keen to keep up-to-date with all developments in wound management and tissue viability, but also appeals to generalists wishing to enhance their practice.

JWC is internationally renowned for its cutting edge and state-of the-art research and practice articles. The journal also covers management, education and novel therapies. Articles are rigorously peer-reviewed by a panel of international experts.

The journal is indexed on Medline, Scopus, CINAHL and the Thomson Reuters' Science Citation Index-Expanded and Current Contents/Clinical Medicine and has been associated with an Impact Factor of 2.066 for 2021.

Name: LEVEN! Magazine Den Haag
Description: LEVEN! magazine Den Haag is het regionale glossy magazine. Het magazine is bedoeld voor iedereen die in de regio woont, werkt en studeert. Verhalen voor en door zowel particulieren als ondernemers. Iedere editie van LEVEN! biedt een aantrekkelijke mix van redactie en commercie over de laatste nieuwtjes uit uw regio. Het magazine ligt graag bij vele winkels, horecagelegenheden, adverteerders en theaters. En in ruim 2000 wachtruimtes - van huisartsen tot schoonheidsspecialisten - verspreid door heel Haaglanden.

Name: Mahogany Media Group LLC
Description:
Our principal engagement is publishing a upscale, bi-monthly print and online magazine featuring Central Ohio's most influential and affluent People of Color (P.O.C.) that are making outstanding contributions in their careers and in service to others in our community. 

The population we represent accounts for almost 40% of the total population in Central Ohio inclusive of African Americans, Latino/Latinx, and recent African immigrants.

Name: KIDDINX Media GmbH
Description:
KIDDINX – vom Ohr direkt ins Herz

KIDDINX Media ist Audiospezialist im Family Entertainment und Lizenzagentur. Contentgetriebene Marken sind unsere Expertise. Daher vermarkten wir nicht nur die Lizenzrechte der von uns produzierten Audio-Marken wie Benjamin Blümchen, Bibi & Tina, Bibi Blocksberg, Kira Kolumna, Elea Eluanda, DIE FUSSBALLBANDE oder Leo Lausemaus, sondern auch die Lizenzrechte erfolgreicher Brands wie Pippi Langstrumpf, Woodwalkers, Jan Tenner oder Pumuckl. Wir unterstützen mit größter Freude unser Schwesterunternehmen Schmidt Spiele bei der digitalen Vermarktung und Lizenzpartnerbetreuung für Mensch ärgere dich nicht und Kniffel. Wir sind gemeinsam mit den KIDDINX Studios aber nicht nur Audioproduzent, sondern auch Vertriebspartner für Audio-Marken wie Leo und die Abenteuermaschine, Kommissar Kugelblitz oder Wendy und haben eine intensive Verbindung zu Karls Bande, der Hörspiel-Marke hinter dem Erfolgskonzept Karls Erlebnishof.

Name: Prabhat Khabar
Description:
Prabhat Khabar is the fastest growing Hindi daily in Jharkhand, Bihar & West Bengal and is 7th among the top 10 hindi dailies of India with 9 million readers as per IRS Q4, 2012 and circulation of 8 lakh copies daily across 10 editions.

Prabhat Khabar was established in 1984, which was followed by an instant policy failure in 1989 which eventually led to almost shutdown of the newspaper. Operated by some local politicians in a poor/sub-standard infrastructure, overstaffed (250 employees) for six-page newspaper circulated just 500 copies, single edition of Prabhat Khabar printed in Ranchi was in a pathetic situation way back before it was acquired by Neutral Publishing House Limited, promoted by Usha Martin Group. The acquisition marked a big turning point of the newspaper! 

PK is known for its credibility towards the causes for the people & society. Pro-people Prabhat Khabar is proud of its contents presented by a generous editorial team led by chief editor Harivansh. We never compromise on public issues as we are the 1st Hindi daily who pulled the animal husbandry scam out of closet in the region.

KK Goenka, RK Dutta & Harivansh are considerably the three craftsmen behind the overall development of Prabhat Khabar brick by brick which underwent quite an eventful & challenging journey for more than two decades to bring it to the podium where it is standing today. PK boasts its competence in competing 3 leading national dailies viz. Dainik Jagran, Dainik Bhaskar & Hindustan.

Name: Concept Cube
Description: Concept Cube, A Leading Media & Technology Startup in Kolkata, Eastern India with 20 years of Leadership experience, stands as the premier Technology & Media company. The company excels in harmonizing technology and creativity, crafting exceptional movies, web series, and documentaries, alongside innovative branding solutions. More than creators, Concept Cube represents visionaries, driven by passion for media and fueled by expertise in technology. Artık hareket zamanı; Karbonsuz Gelecek yolundaki her adımı öne plana çıkarıp, toplumdaki farkındalığı arttıran, insiyatif almak isteyen gençlerimize ilham veren ve en önemlisi asla yeşil yıkamaya izin vermeden, herkesin güveneceği bir platform var: KarbonsuzGelecek.com 

Odak Alanlarımız;
Sürdürülebilirlik
Yenilenebilir Enerji
e-Mobilite
İnovasyon
Yeşil Finans

Dünya, artık durumunda farkında. Çoktan değerli adımlar adıyor. Birleşmiş Milletler, Karbonsuz Gelecek yolunda ‘Sürdürülebilir Kalkınma Amaçları’ olarak belirlediği 17 adet konu belirledi. Her biri, birbirinde değerli konuda liderlik yapmaya devam ediyor. Peki Türkiye ne durumda? Bizce çok değerli adımlar atıldı ve atılmaya devam ediyor. KarbonsuzGelecek.com olarak her değeri adımı topluma sunmayı birincil görev edindik. 

Karbon, sadece doğa verdiği zararın yanında, yakında zamanda bir finansal argüman olarak da kullanılacak. Özellikle Avrupa Birliği, karbon ayak izini azaltmayan firmalardan alım yapmayacak. Karbon vergisi ortaya çıkıp, hayatımızın ortasına oturacak. Peki daha neyi bekliyoruz? 

Haydi KarbonsuzGelecek.com’a destek olun. Geleceği Bugünden Öğrenin!!!

Name: Beach House Pictures
Description: Founded in 2005 by producers Donovan Chan and Jocelyn Little and acquired by Fremantle in 2024, Beach House Pictures is headquartered in Singapore and is one of Asia’s largest independent TV & Film production companies, with a base in China and partners across Southeast Asia, Korea, Japan and India. BHP is a unique multi-cultural and multi-genre expert that has found commercial success in different key markets from the US to Asia. It specialises in creating and co-financing original IP across scripted, factual, unscripted and branded programming for regional and international platforms such as Netflix, Amazon Prime and Warner Bros Discovery, including Chinese platforms such as Youku, Bilibili and Tencent, producing popular premium shows such as Emmy nominated Netflix lifestyle seriesMIND YOUR MANNERS, Netflix Indonesia Number 1 true crime feature doc ICE COLD: MURDER, COFFEE & JESSICA WONGSO, Netflix Global Top 5 true crime doc MISSING: THE LUCIE BLACKMAN CASE, Netflix S.E.A. Top 10 scripted series MR MIDNIGHT, Netflix Korea Top 5 true crime series THE RAINCOAT KILLER, the Grierson Awards nominated science series EVOLVE (Curiosity, Amazon Prime),highly rated wildlife drama OTTER DYNASTY (Max/Discovery+, Love Nature) and long-running franchises MASTERCHEF SINGAPORE (MediaCorp),BAKE OFF JAPAN (Amazon Prime), ED STAFFORD: FIRST MAN OUT (Discovery+, Bilibili)andWILD CITY with DAVID ATTENBOROUGH (Netflix, Sky, BBC America). In 2021 BHP took a majority stake in Singapore-based Momo Film Co., to further grow its scripted output and extend its reach across South-East Asia. Momo Film Co’s projects include DREAMING & DYING which won two awards at the 2023 Locarno Film Festival as well as A USEFUL GHOST and DON’T CRY, BUTTERFLY which featured at the 2023 Cannes Film Festival.

CYLNDR offers end-to-end production, post-production, and new-age content for the virtual world and Web 3.0. Additionally, it caters to Live and Social commerce services for D2C brands. CYLNDR India also provides state-of-the-art production studios with in-house online and offline editing. Name: Small Creative
Description:
Small Creative aims to be a laboratory dedicated to new technologies that designs, develops and produces the narrative and immersive projects produced by Small by Mac Guff, in an agile and technologically-agnostic manner (AR / VR / MR / immersive installations / interactive video mapping / holograms / immersive theater…).

A team of about twenty people who strive to develop and produce ambitious content, to offer new narrative experiences and the means to implement them in an efficient workflow, using tools and technologies they have mastered for many years.

Over the past 4 years, the team has co-produced and post-produced several high-quality virtual reality experiences, such as Ayahuasca: Kosmik Journey and 7 Lives by director Jan Kounen (selected at numerous festivals around the world ). Small also worked on 3 of the 7 experiences in the VR collection for Arte Trips: Les noces de Cana by Véronèse, Un Bar aux Folies Bergères by Manet and Les Rêves du Douanier Rousseau, as well as - 22,7°C, by musician Molécule. In 2018, the studio carried out the SLRX Experience virtual reality experience for the Poitiers Futuroscope, considered to be the most popular VR experience in the world with 1.2 million users per year. Mixing virtual reality and 4DX effects, the user experiences a race as co-driver to the famous rally driver, Sébastien Loeb, installed in a movie theater equipped with 108 dynamic seats.

Small Creative is based in Paris 11, with team members in 3 locations between Paris and Brussels, and is always looking for international partners, with the aim of developing virtuous and impactful collaborations.

If you wish to make a job inquiry, please send a full application by email to : job@small-creative.io

Name: MTV/MBC Channels Pvt. Ltd - Capital Maharaja Group
Description:
A subsidiary of Capital Maharaja Group, MTV/MBC Channels is Sri Lanka’s leading news and entertainment provider. This electronic media giant owns and operates three TV channels and five FM Radio Stations, broadcasting in all three languages with island wide coverage.

The network is recognized as the most influential and innovative trail blazer in the electronic media field in Sri Lanka, as well as being Sri Lanka’s foremost media and communication strategist.

MTV Channel (Pvt) Limited is the premier private television network in Sri Lanka. Equipped with state-of-the-art audio-visual receiving and transmitting equipment, MTV’s signals are beamed free-to-air across the country. The channels reach over 80% of the country’s geographical area, and to over 85% of the TV households in Sri Lanka.

Description:
Our team of investigative journalists dives deep to tell stories about Canada’s natural environment you can’t find anywhere else.

We’re tired of false dichotomies and business-as-usual perspectives. We’re not shy about the fact we think Canada’s greatest assets are our people, our lakes, our rivers, our forests. We tell stories Canada’s big news outlets miss and hustle to help our readers make sense of complex (sometimes downright messy) issues.

As a non-profit organization, our goal isn’t to sell advertising or to please corporate bigwigs — it’s to bring evidence-based news and analysis to the surface for all Canadians.

We also offer training to become a Web Developer. The goal of CSB's Web Developer Program is to prepare students for entry level work as a Jr. Web Developer. In the course students will learn to understand coding logic using PHP and JavaScript, web design using HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap, WordPress, and relational databases using SQL. 

In 2020, CSB Media Arts Center launched programs in Digital & Social Media Marketing, Filmmaking, and Mobile Application Development.

Our Hands-On, Learn- By-Doing approach means that you'll learn in a small class environment.

All of our campuses are approved training providers for the VA.  Our Florida campus offers Career Source Scholarships for approved applicants.

Focused on the international market, FOUR aims to reach readers in the A/B bracket via precise distribution channels worldwide. This includes close relationships with private jet airline, NetJets and Royal Jets, and many of the world’s top airlines, such as Qatar and British Airways, who distribute the magazine to their Upper and First Class passengers. In addition to this, FOUR is also distributed to the world’s best hotels including Armani, Viceroy, , Cheval Blanc, Nobu, Four Seasons, as well as restaurants, business lounges, spas, golf clubs and private residencies. Because of this precise distribution, FOUR has the ability to reach high-end food lovers in a way that has never been done before.

Each edition of FOUR invites four chefs, who are at the pinnacle of their career, to share their techniques and recipes. By unifying over 400 of the world’s best chefs, such as Daniel Humm, Thomas Keller, Gaggan Anand, Massimo Bottura and René Redzepi, FOUR brings together the brilliant ideas of the greatest minds in haute cuisine.

Working with some of the world’s most well-respected food and wine writers, including Andrea Petrini, as well as some of the world’s top food photographers, travel writers and designers, such as Jean Cazals, Jeremy Jauncey, Michu Travel, Guy Oliver and Kelly Hoppen —FOUR is raising the bar in food and lifestyle publishing.

As of 2019, FOUR will be dedicated to increasing environmental awareness and decreasing our carbon footprint. Not only will FOUR be printed using recycled paper and free of plastic packaging, but FOUR’s content will also showcase chefs and luxury eco-travel destinations that are putting conservation of the environment at their forefront, focusing on sustainability, zero-waste

Canwest operates one of Canada's largest newspaper chains reaching 4.9 million engaged readers on a weekly basis. The publications are complemented by several online properties under the canada.com network which averages over 4.5 million unique visitors per month. The canada.com network also features the entertainment site Dose.ca and in-depth vertical sites such as the popular driving.ca and working.com.

The show is distributed through all major audio streaming and we have interviewed ~500 founders till date. Some of the prominent guests of the show include Sanjeev Bhikchandani (Infoedge), Dinesh Agarwal (Indiamart), Amit Gupta (InMobi, Yulu), Amit Agarwal (No Broker), Sumeet Mehta (Lead School), Rahul Garg (Moglix) and many more.

Webby Award 2025 winner and recognized as the Top #1 Film & Video Production Company in Italy (2019–2025), ORBIS combines cinematic storytelling with strategic precision — crafting commercials, branded content, corporate films, documentaries, fashion and beauty films, and large-scale live events that connect with audiences worldwide.

Headquartered in Milan, with offices in Rome, Paris, Zurich, Vienna, Munich, Ljubljana, Dubai, London, Tokyo, Amsterdam, and Los Angeles, ORBIS operates across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia, managing complex, high-profile productions from concept to delivery.

Our expertise includes:
• Film & video production — TVCs, commercials, branded content, corporate films, documentaries, fashion & beauty films
• Photo production — advertising, fashion campaigns, editorial, stills, product & lifestyle photography
• Creative development & brand storytelling — from concept and script to final visual identity
• Location scouting & production services — permits, logistics, crew, and on-site coordination across all regions
• Aerial, drone & helicopter cinematography — cinematic aerials with licensed pilots and stabilized systems
• Underwater filming — professional dive crews and cinema-grade housings for RED, ARRI, and Sony
• Live & hybrid event production — multi-camera coverage, live streaming, and interactive virtual experiences

We bring bold ideas to life — delivering premium visuals, seamless execution, and unforgettable impact.

We cover stories directly from the streets of law and deliver the true facts to our reader under the categories Legal Insiders, Judiciary, Legislative, Executive, Business, International, Crime, Police & Law, CelebStreet, Speak Legal and so on. 

Our Vision:
To be recognized as India’s leading and most trusted online and offline news resource reaching to every citizen of India. 

Our Mission:

To deliver fascinating news stories to the world which informs, entertains and inspires through:
1: Delightful, spirited, competent and creative people.
2: Stretching out deeper, closer and wider with our news stories.
3: Rebalancing global news by respecting the variety and people of the world.
4: Obtaining exceptional results systematically.

Créateur d’univers plastiques, Nicolas Hesslein, directeur artistique de Lumen Créations, s’entoure d’une quinzaine de collaborateurs issus de la danse, du cirque, du multimédia et de la musique. À la recherche de la symbiose, il met en lumière des voyages hallucinés où rêveries, chorégraphies et imageries futuristes fusionnent en une œuvre singulière. Les mondes de Lumen sont des invitations à l’évasion. Les spectateurs rêvent les yeux ouverts de récits colorés aux ambiances vaporeuses. Des déchaînements d’images numériques contrôlées et connectées aux corps de performeurs habillent un lieu qui, le temps d’un instant, devient un laboratoire d’innovations artistiques.

Chaque commande est un univers à concevoir, une étude consciencieuse du sujet et de l’écrin architectural est requise. Une documentation élaborée permet ainsi de scénariser des éléments graphiques et sonores au regard de chorégraphies. La mise en scène est complexe, elle coordonne plusieurs disciplines. La multiplicité des genres est l’une des marques de fabrique de Lumen Créations.

اگر کسی را شایسته دعوت در پادکست میدانید لطفاً از طریق فرم زیر پیشنهاد دهید تا در یک اپیزود با ایشان صحبت کنم

Name: FemTechnology
Description:
Women account for a disproportionate share of healthcare utilization, caregiving labor, and health related workforce attrition. Yet the systems that govern evidence generation, data infrastructure, reimbursement, capital allocation, and policy were not designed with women’s biology or lived realities in mind. The result is delayed diagnosis, fragmented care, mispriced risk, inefficient investment, and preventable economic loss.

FemTechnology works across health systems, data, finance, and policy to make these gaps legible and actionable.

At the center of our work is ORI, our health navigation and insight tool. ORI translates clinical guidelines, real world data, and patient priorities into structured pathways that help individuals navigate care while generating system level insight into where current models break down. It is designed to reduce friction in decision making, surface unmet needs earlier, and produce data that is meaningful for clinicians, insurers, employers, researchers, and policymakers.

Alongside ORI, FemTechnology conducts original research and convenes senior leaders across insurance, life sciences, technology, government, and capital to:

Identify structural failures in women’s health systems

Translate fragmented data into usable insight

Test new models for risk assessment, care navigation, and intervention

Support collaboration across sectors that rarely coordinate

Our work connects patient experience to system incentives, clinical reality to financial risk, and innovation to governance.

The goal is not awareness alone. It is precision. Better problem definition, better data, and better decisions at scale.

Linking the physical world to the virtual, the on-site experience to the world wide web. Always looking for the right balance between learning and having fun, between content and technology.

We are also specialised in developing visitor database solutions that enable visitors to store and retrieve the things they find, do or make at individual exhibits. And then receive the results by email, or find them on the museum website. To learn more about the endless opportunities to enrich and personalise the visitor experience, please contact us.

Name: netzpolitik.org
Description:
netzpolitik.org ist ein Medium für digitale Freiheitsrechte. Wir thematisieren die wichtigen Fragestellungen rund um Internet, Gesellschaft und Politik und zeigen Wege auf, wie man sich auch selbst mit Hilfe des Netzes für digitale Freiheiten und Offenheit engagieren kann. Mit netzpolitik.org beschreiben wir, wie die Politik das Internet durch Regulierung verändert und wie das Netz Politik, Öffentlichkeiten und alles andere verändert.

Wir begleiten alle gesellschaftlichen Bereiche kritisch bei Prozessen der Digitalisierung: von den großen Datenkonzernen über die Sicherheitsbehörden bis hin zu Bildung, Medien und Umwelt. Wir wollen technologischen Wandel in den Dienst von Freiheit, Solidarität und Gemeinwohl stellen.

Wir verstehen uns als journalistisches Angebot, sind jedoch nicht neutral. Unsere Haltung ist: Wir engagieren uns für digitale Freiheitsrechte und ihre politische Umsetzung. Für unsere Arbeit wurden wir mehrfach ausgezeichnet.

Name: Conversa Ágil podcast
Description:
"Em julho de 2019 o sonho de duas pessoas se concretizava, o primeiro episódio do Conversa Ágil podcast estava no ar! A ideia de gerar conteúdo através de colaboração, com a proposta de trazer os mais variados assuntos relacionados a agilidade, através dos mais diversos pontos de vista tomava forma."

Renato Macedo / Odair Bonin (fundadores e hosts).

---

Convidamos para cada episódio, pessoas que admiramos e são referências na comunidade ágil e em suas áreas de atuação.

Nossas principais categorias de assuntos são: Iniciantes na Agilidade, Cultura & Pessoas, Management 3.0 & Liderança, Agilidade na Essência e Impacto de Negócios. Ou seja, fontes inesgotáveis de informações que se relacionam com praticamente tudo no que se refere a profissionais e ambientes de trabalho.

Um dos nossos maiores diferenciais é que não estamos relacionados a uma empresa, ou seja, somos livres! Livres para abordar qualquer assunto com qualquer pessoa e com a imparcialidade na medida para gerarmos conteúdo de extrema qualidade para nossos ouvintes.

Nos organizamos por temporadas, cada temporada possui 10 episódios. 
Você nos encontra no Spotify, Deezer, Google Podcasts, Apple Podcasts e em todos os apps agregadores de podcasts do universo!

Nosso instagram é super agitado e vale muito a pena: @conversaagil - por lá você encontra dicas, recomendações, spoilers e muita interação com nosso público.

Alguns dos assuntos que já estão no ar: Management 3.0, DevOps, conceitos ágeis, trabalho remoto, o futuro da agilidade, startups, comportamentos anti-ágeis na tecnologia, agilidade organizacional, comunicação não-violenta, segurança psicológica no ambiente de trabalho, métricas ágeis, Kanban, facilitação gráfica, carreiras, diversidade, business agility, metas ágeis, produtos e ferramentas.

Name: WLR FM
Description: WLR (Waterford Local Radio), licensed since 1989 (WLR had previously been a pirate radio station) by the Broadcasting Commission of Ireland, is the local radio station covering Waterford City and County. WLR FM broadcasts on three frequencies: 95.1 MHz for most of the county (and a low-power transmitter also on 95.1 MHz for Waterford city centre), 97.5 MHz for Waterford city and much of East Waterford, and a low-power transmitter on 94.8 MHz to cover the East Waterford coast.

Name: Grupo ADM audiovisual
Description:
En Grupo ADM no somos una productora cualquiera, somos una forma de creer y crear. Desde que nacimos en 1998, hemos estrenado infinidad de formatos exitosos para televisión, algunos de ellos legendarios, como “Andalucía Directo”.

Por tu tele pasan o han pasado programas nuestros como “A Toda Costa”, “Callejeando”, “Andalucía en Semana Santa”, “Tiene Arreglo” o “La Respuesta está en la Historia”, entre otros. Y eso sí, estamos siempre orgullosos de lucir talento andaluz fuera de nuestra tierra, por eso también hemos estrenado formatos en Televisión Española, Movistar, Telemadrid y TVG (Galicia).

Pero no sólo hacemos tele, hemos dado vida a enormes documentales que han deslumbrado. 

Además, apostamos siempre por las últimas tecnologías: desde mappings inmersivos a drones FPV, pasando por la inteligencia artificial, donde hemos sido pioneros en aplicarla a programas de éxito en televisión.

Ya te lo dijimos antes… No somos una productora cualquiera. 

¿Te vienes?

Name: Terra Mater Studios
Description:
Terra Mater Studios were founded January 1st, 2011 and are based in Vienna, Austria. The full-blown production unit is a subsidiary company of Red Bull and specializes in premium factual programming for TV, multimedia platforms and theatrical release. TMS are committed to the highest production values regarding visual excellence, innovative technology and amazing storytelling. Core genres are nature, science and history presented in blue-chip primetime series and specials. The production company also brings together a wide array of genres and styles to create exciting new factual and entertainment programs. For the big screen TMS produce stories that are highly relevant and strongly rooted in reality: from the classical feature doc to wild drama, where nature plays the main role, further on to fiction films, where real stories are the matrix for our scripts. And on their YouTube channel TMS show exclusive short-form videos about the diversity of nature, conservation and environmental topics.

TMS’ diverse portfolio contains more than 400 hours, honoured with more than 500 international film festival awards and over 1300 nominations. 

In early 2022, Terra Mater Studios set up their first subsidiary in Germany. Terra Mater Studios Germany aim at developing and producing a wide media portfolio, spanning from TV, to Online, and Theatrical.

As dedicated nature filmmakers, Terra Mater Studios are aware of their responsibility to spot a light on fragile parts of the world, to give a voice to threatened species and to make a positive impact on our precious planet. TMS’ credo: We need to be able to learn from the mistakes that were made, for our own sake and that of generations to come.

Terra Mater Studios. 
Inspired by nature. Caring for nature.
Driving change frame by frame, because #terramatters.

Name: International Sports Broadcasting
Description:
International Sports Broadcasting (ISB) is a company specialising in the host broadcast coverage of major sporting events.  With offices in Madrid, Spain and Salt Lake City, USA, ISB has solidified itself as “THE” company to engage in terms of broadcasting.  Our reputation is world renowned within the industry.

ISB was founded by Manolo Romero, one of the pioneers in sports television, whose experience is unparalleled and no other company brings this level of experience to event projects.

In 2001, the IOC asked ISB to launch Olympic Broadcasting Services to be responsible for the Host Broadcasting operation of all Olympic Games, Olympic Winter Games and Youth Olympic Games until the end of 2012.

ISB’s broadcasting of each event has continued to exceed all previous occasions and it has been acknowledged by numerous Olympic Golden Rings, Emmy’s and other awards.  This in turn, has assisted many Rights Holding Broadcasters in achieving similar success and broadcast rating records in their home territories.

ISB has been a leader in the use new technologies and production enhancements, primarily through its work on the Olympic Games.  Some examples that were developed by ISB management include the Multi Channel Distribution Service and Olympic News Channel concepts and the extensive usage of high speed slow motion replay cameras. ISB have also pioneered many technological innovations at each of the Games, including High-definition television.

Most recently ISB were awarded the Innovation Prize for “Innovative Use of Mini HSSM Cameras” at the SPORTEL AWARDS Ceremony that took place at the Grimaldi Forum in Monaco in October 2015.

Name: Clash Music Group
Description:
Clash Music is a dynamic independent media agency with established platforms in print and digital media, with a diverse live calendar that includes festivals, international music events and bespoke events organised for brands. The group encompasses Clash Magazine, ClashMusic.com and Clash Events.

Clash has consolidated its position as a leading UK and international title within the music, fashion and film sectors. While music continues to diversify and evolve, Clash endeavours to represent the crossover appeal of different styles and sounds. We feature the best new and emerging bands alongside established and popular acts and legends of the industry across our multiple media platforms.

Clash Magazine is a multi award-winning music magazine that launched to critical acclaim in 2004, combining underground and mainstream music genres that includes fashion, film and entertainment in its subject matter. Previous advertisers have included international brands such as YSL, Nokia, Nike, Apple, Stussy, Lyle & Scott, Topman, Levi's, Lacoste and more. Clash Magazine is currently poised to relaunch with its 100th issue in late-2015.

ClashMusic.com is a definitive online guide to leading music and fashion trends, covering the best of breaking to established artists alongside news, reviews, features, image galleries and shoots, in addition to a collection of the best content from Clash Magazine.

Clash has developed the experience and resources to assist with live event line-ups, booking artists, through to delivering entire events. Through Clash Live, Clash Club and Clash Sessions we continue to break new music as well as showcase some of the more unpredictable appearances. Clash has partnered some of the highest profile music festivals including SXSW in Texas, Iceland Airwaves, Bennicassim, Sonar and Lovebox, as well as high-profile experiential music campaigns for brands such as Levi's, AllSaints Right Guard, Ben Sherman and more.

We focus primarily on the North of England and the Yorkshire Region; however other areas will be considered upon application.

Capricorn’s Security Training Division also offers Door Supervisor training courses to SIA Standard, which now includes the mandatory Physical Intervention requirement.

All our directors and senior staff are also accredited to Close Protection Level, an area of the business which has developed significantly over the last 6 years. This service continually receives excellent feedback from our clients, who include many well-known Sports Stars, Musicians and leading Actors and Celebrities from the Media, TV & Film industry.
We also have significant experience of brand protection working with both national and international companies to ensure that products are protected from being leaked into the public domain before the brand is ready to launch.

Name: River Film
Description:
River Film is a multi-award winning film and CGI production company that exists to visualise experiences, because how something feels is just as important as how it looks.

With the right ambition, strategic intent, talent, creative rigour, and a solid process, we bring a client’s vision to life in memorable ways.

It doesn’t matter whether it’s a single 3D rendering, or a full suite of images, films and VR, we strive always for the highest possible production values because we never want to sell a client’s vision short.

It’s often easy to make things that are emotive or explanatory, but we need to create content that is both: films that speak to the head and to the heart, imagery that explains and inspires, animations that impart knowledge and excitement.

We are creative, bold, diverse, collaborative and technical.
We love creative technologies in all their forms – we just love ideas more. That's why “technical” comes last - because we believe that technology should be a slave to an idea, not pretend to be an idea itself.

Name: AgilaHRpodden
Description:
Världen förändras och blir alltmer komplex. Digitaliseringen och internet har skapat en ny världsordning där kunskap och erfarenhet snabbt sprids till nya mottagare. Idéburna gräsrotsfenomen som #MeToo, och Arabiska våren har ritat om både den moraliska och politiska kartan. Inom näringslivet ser vi små företag som tar marknadsandelar och konkurrerar med stora, globala och etablerade företag. Hur kommer det sig?

Jag är övertygad om att vi befinner oss i ett paradigmskifte där organisationer behöver tänka och arbeta på nya sätt för att överleva. Nutida företag har skapat stora framsteg för mänskligheten med hög välfärd för västvärlden och ett steg från fattigdom i tredje världen. Men metoder att driva företag har sitt pris och en Gallupundersökning visar att 84 procent av arbetskraften i Europa är oengagerade i sina arbetsuppgifter. Oengagerade medarbetare skapar inte nöjda kunder och lönsamhet. Vi behöver tänka mänskligt och hållbart.

Framtidens organisationer går från ett top-down styre och låter den enskilde och teamen ha kontrollen och ansvaret för att på så vis bättre möta marknadens snabbföränderlighet. Några få i toppen kan aldrig konkurrera med den samlade kompetens som tillsammans finns i företaget. 

Hur fungerar då detta i verkligheten? Kan HR bidra till den nya generationens organisationer? Kan vi driva utvecklingen och hur skall processerna se ut i framtiden? 

Detta är vad jag söker svar på i Agila HR Podden.

Frida Mangen
Agile HR
agilahrpodden@gmail.com
https://folkett.se/agila-hr-podden/

https://open.spotify.com/show/1vweo9zdhr9LmC5q44M3Yg
