Name: Analytics Power Hour
Description:
Attend any conference for any topic and you will hear people saying after that the best and most informative discussions happened in the bar after the show. Read any business magazine and you will find an article saying something along the lines of “Business Analytics is the hottest job category out there, and there is a significant lack of people, process and best practice.”

In this case the conference was eMetrics, the bar was….multiple, and the attendees were Michael Helbling, Tim Wilson, and Jim Cain (Co-Host Emeritus).  After a few pints and a few hours of discussion about the cutting edge of digital analytics, they realized they might have something to contribute back to the community. In August 2017, Moe Kiss had a momentary loss of sanity and joined the show as a co-host to ensure a persistent perspective from Down Under. In August 2023, Val Kroll and Julie Hoyer joined as co-hosts to bring us to five amazing co-hosts talking analytics and enjoying a drink or two in the process.

This podcast is one of those contributions. Each episode is a closed topic and an open forum. The goal is for listeners to enjoy listening to Val, Julie, Michael, Moe, and Tim share their thoughts and experiences and hopefully take away something to try at work the next day.

Name: Edit Panda
Description:
It all began in 2008 when I edited my first CS:GO game. I didn't know much at the time, and my edits were very lousy, but I was immediately fascinated by it deeply. I kept moving forward, and I never imagined I'd make a career out of it.

For me, it was a passion. To find aesthetic delight, I experimented with a variety of software, approaches, and a slew of imagination and creativity in what I do.

ith each passing day, my passion for video editing grew stronger, and now, in 2021, I've been doing it full-time for the past 9 years. During that time, I completed over 500 small and huge projects and edited thousands of hours of raw footage, which included promotional clips, numerous commercials, fashion videos, marketing material, Vlogs editing, animation, and, of course, YouTube videos.

What I learned during those years is that creating videos on a weekly or even daily basis for a business owner, marketing manager, or Youtube content creator can be immensely difficult and time-consuming. It requires not only certain skills but also a great deal of precise attention and focus.

Of course, a business owner, like many other categories, has much more to do than to sit before his laptop and create videos for his products. Right?

Even if you have ideas or a script, there are still a lot to accomplish until your video is finished and ready to submit, and one of the most important things is Editing.

As a result, me and my partner Gedas decided to launch "Edit Panda" and assemble a team of highly skilled and qualified experts in the field of video editing in order to take my editing skills to the next level and share them with you.

Our goal is to assist you to focus your valuable time away from laborious editing tasks and toward more fun activities like coming up with new ideas and shooting more content that you've always wanted but couldn't find the time to do. So don't spend any more time editing and join Pandas today!

Description:

Name: Planeta F5
Description:
O Planeta F5 é um hub de curiosidades, ciência e tecnologia criado para quem tem sede de conhecimento e adora descobrir os mistérios por trás do que poucos explicam. Nosso conteúdo é pensado para informar, surpreender e gerar reflexões através de vídeos, artigos, posts e histórias que unem fatos, pesquisa e criatividade.

Acreditamos que o conhecimento transforma — e que ele pode (e deve) ser acessível, instigante e prazeroso. Por isso, trazemos conteúdos originais, baseados em dados e fontes confiáveis, com uma linguagem leve e próxima de quem nos acompanha.

Estamos presentes no YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook e blog, com uma abordagem única que mistura educação e entretenimento para provocar aquele famoso “uau” a cada post.

Descubra o que ninguém te contou.

Name: Mad Entertainment S.p.A.
Description: MAD sta per Musica, Animazione e Documentari. Ma MAD vuol dire anche "elogio della pazzia", la "sana" pazzia che ha portato il nostro team alla creazione di un luogo unico a Napoli. In Piazza del Gesù Nuovo, nel centro storico della città, in un palazzo che trasuda storia del cinema ("Matrimonio all'italiana", "L'oro di Napoli"…) ci affacciamo con i nostri studi di registrazione musicale, con gli studi di produzione di cartoni animati, con i luoghi per la riflessione, la creazione, l'incontro. Ci affacciamo sulla città, sperando di offrirle una location innovativa, avvolgente, divertente, esplosiva. Vogliamo produrre film, cartoons, documentari, colonne sonore, dischi… ma vogliamo anche restare al balcone aspettando che ci vengano a trovare i tanti giovani talenti di Napoli (del Sud, del mondo…) che non aspettavano altro che avere la possibilità di inserirsi in una "corrente del golfo" mai attraversata prima. MAD è partita. Veniteci incontro.

Name: Africa Uncensored
Description:
Africa Uncensored is an independent media house set up by Kenya’s finest investigative journalists. Our goal is to investigate, expose and empower. Having worked in investigative journalism for years we broke off to follow the stories that matter to the country and the people. Our goal is to show Africa as it really is.

Africa’s story is often a disjointed summary of facts (and fiction) that don’t do this continent justice. Yet there is so much to say and show about Africa. We believe that the power of investigative and in-depth journalism can be used to hold up a mirror to Africa, and show it what it really is. We will expose wrongdoing by the powerful, and shine a light on the things that truly matter to the people of this continent.

Our editorial policy is, simply, The Truth.

Name: Automo
Description:
Automo does automated video processing across platforms: Cross Media Playout. We create innovative solutions for creative people, who would like to create instead of render.

From promo endboards for broadcasters, Adaptive advertising, enabling you to manage your advertising to your flexible needs, And innovative projects in which we use the connectivity of the internet with the broadcast quality.

Technically Automo is a tailor made software application that automatically processes the versioning of all kinds of motion graphics or video footage. Input can be derived of multiple data-sources and databases, including titles, photography or another video-source. Output can be any existing video format, but is usually directly broadcasted being integrated in channel branding.

SyncSketch is now part of Unity Technologies (NYSE: U), the world’s leading platform for creating and operating real-time 3D (RT3D) content. Creators, ranging from game developers to artists, architects, automotive designers, filmmakers, and others, use Unity to make their imaginations come to life. Unity’s platform provides a comprehensive set of software solutions to create, run and monetize interactive, real-time 2D and 3D content for mobile phones, tablets, PCs, consoles, and augmented and virtual reality devices. The company’s 1,800+ person research and development team keeps Unity at the forefront of development by working alongside partners to ensure optimized support for the latest releases and platforms. Apps developed by Unity creators have been downloaded more than five billion times per month in 2020. For more information, please visit www.unity.com.

Name: JumpStart Studio
Description:
Chez JumpStart Studio, nous créons bien plus que du contenu.
Nous construisons des prises de parole utiles, engageantes et sur-mesure pour donner du sens, du lien et de la performance à chaque communication.

Notre mission : accompagner nos clients bien au-delà du contenu, en mêlant vision stratégique, audace créative et impact social media.

 Ce que nous faisons :

Création de contenus à forte valeur (vidéo, motion design, photo, podcast)

Stratégies éditoriales sur-mesure et directions créatives affirmées

Gestion opérationnelle des réseaux sociaux et activation social media

Développement de formats propriétaires et narratifs puissants

Conseil en stratégie digitale et marketing d’influence

 Notre conviction :
Les marques ne peuvent plus exister sans une présence digitale authentique, créative et cohérente.
Nous aidons celles qui osent aller plus loin à créer du contenu qui agit… pas qui remplit.

 Ils nous font confiance :
Fédération Française de Triathlon, Ligue Nationale de Handball, Roland-Garros, PME ambitieuses, startups innovantes, institutions publiques.

JumpStart Studio, c’est l’énergie d’une startup, l’exigence d’un partenaire stratégique, et l’envie constante d’écrire avec vous les prochains chapitres de votre marque.

 Vous voulez qu’on parle de votre stratégie de contenu et social media ?
Nous sommes prêts à relever le défi.

Name: UK Construction Media
Description:
UK Construction Media is a leading publishing and marketing services business focused on the construction industry. Based on 25 years of experience within this sector, the business has unrivalled experience with a range of products which target the development of new opportunities and increased business for our clients.

We have developed a dynamic portfolio of products and services allowing suppliers to the UK construction industry to reach their business audience. We cater for large multinational providers through to smaller local enterprises all looking to gain unrivalled access to the professional construction market.

UK Construction Media is underpinned by a high quality database consisting of key decision makers, specifiers, buyers and influencers from managing directors to project managers within government and local authorities, housing associations, architects, quantity surveyors, mechanical, structural and electrical engineers, commercial and residential developers, major contractors, construction companies, sub-contractors, suppliers and association bodies.

Our national database is constantly cleansed, refreshed and updated by our data management teams – we are continually growing the number of records and increasingly segment the database to ensure clients are reaching their key decision makers.

Through an innovative portfolio of products we have a marketing solution for every client’s need and budget. 
We deliver unrivalled analysis and research on the performance of a client’s spend and provide dedicated feedback on campaign management and planning. 

We aim to build long-term relationships with our clients and respect the fact that our success is dependent on the success of the money spent with us.

Name: The Logistics Point
Description:
The Logistics Point is an independent logistics and mobility magazine based in the UK  and read worldwide with audiences in the UK, USA, Canada , Germany, the Netherlands and India.
Our mission is to serve as a bridge between the world of logistics and mobility and help leaders facilitate the challenge of moving goods and people together.
We believe logistics and mobility are part of the same industry and in conversation with leading experts we have found that the two sectors are increasingly moving towards cooperation.
The Logistics Point has a network of highly qualified professionals both in logistics and mobility. With their insights we are able to bring clarity to the way the industry is changing and merging to encompass goods and people.
By working with us you will get not only exposure to a network of experts and trendsetters but you will also be recognised as a disruptive force.
Companies from both logistics and mobility have trusted us as a professional platform to expand their audience and share their expertise and innovations. Some of the organisations we continuously work with are the Port of LA; FTA UK; VISA; RICS.
At The Logistics Point we have a special place in our hearts for startup organisations from any country. Entrepreneurs from all around the world have worked with us to share their know-how and as a platform where they can be seen. Such startups include: Magway; Moovit; Elisa; Iparcelbox.
We want to hear from you no matter your size, location or idea. The Logistics Point is a place for bold innovators and trendsetters. If you have a story to tell, a disruptive new idea, or an insight you believe should be shared, email us. Message us on LinkedIn or Twitter. Follow us and subscribe to our magazine.

Name: Ecrans du Monde
Description:
Ecrans du Monde est un groupe indépendant réunissant plusieurs sociétés de productions :

- GRAND ANGLE PRODUCTIONS, société de production audiovisuelle, qui produit plus de 80 documentaires par an, soit environ 200 heures de programmes par an pour les chaînes de télévision françaises et étrangères (France 2, France 3, France 5, Arte, Canal +, NHK, Planète +, RTBF, SBS, RST…). 
La société affirme son identité et sa vocation à travers des films et des collections documentaires ambitieux, privilégiant une implication forte sur les thématiques Histoire, Société, Mer & Découverte.

Grand Angle Productions s'ouvre résolument vers l'international et crée en 2008 la société de distribution GAD.

- LES FILMS JACK FEBUS, société de production spécialisée dans des programmes à vocation culturelle et patrimoniale, elle est essentiellement centrée dans le domaine des  captations et recréation de spectacles vivants. 

- INEXVIVO, société de production dans les films d’animation notamment scientifique et médicaux à destination d’un jeune public. 

- ANTIPODE, agence de presse spécialisée dans les documentaires et magazines d’investigation, se joint aux autres sociétés afin de compléter l’offre de documentaires.


L’expérience aidant, et grâce à la confiance réitérée de nos partenaires diffuseurs, nous avons  pu élargir notre gamme de production autour de nouveaux genres et de nouveaux formats avec une prédilection pour les émissions, les collections et les documentaires, comme en témoignent les exemples ci-après.


L’esprit EDM: un groupe qui reste indépendant

Nous avons su nous développer dans la durée en intégrant des producteurs indépendants avec des domaines de compétence variés et complémentaires. C’est également une société basée entre Bordeaux et Paris.

Ce sont des orientations franches et audacieuses, alliées au talent et à la fidélité des auteurs et réalisateurs partageant l’aventure depuis ses débuts, qui sont le moteur inextinguible de notre activité et qui nous permettent aujourd’hui de développer des projets d’une qualité croissante, toujours renouvelée, et de plus en plus portés vers un public international.

Piccolo Media Group står bag DSB-udgivelsen af Ud & Se og har siden 2016 finjusteret og forbedret både det redaktionelle og visuelle indhold af magasinet, som i dag fremstår som et af landets skarpeste og mest anerkendte. Det er ikke kun vores mening, men også det, læsere og annoncører fortæller os.

Selvom vi er en lille medievirksomhed, er vores ambitioner store. Hos Piccolo Media Group er 'godt' ikke godt nok. Vi stræber efter stærkt, vedkommende journalistisk indhold og en nyskabende fotografisk og visuel stil. Vores mål er at producere et kundemagasin, der hver måned kan måle sig med og overgå de danske betalingsmagasiner – også selvom det er gratis og lige til at tage med hjem.

Fra 1. februar 2024 udvider vi vores portefølje ved at overtage produktionen af Coop Danmarks månedsmagasin, Samvirke, som udkommer i et nyt og tykkere format. Samvirke, Danmarks største månedsmagasin med næsten en million læsere, vil i samarbejde med Piccolo Media Group blive styrket redaktionelt og kommercielt. Med denne nye tilføjelse vil Piccolo Media Group nå ud til over 1,3 millioner læsere hver måned på tværs af både print og digitale platforme.

Bag Piccolo Media Group står den erfarne magasinudgiver Jesper Sehested Lund, som har en lang række magasintitler bag sig og arbejder på flere medieplatforme. I vores bestræbelser på at gøre Ud & Se til et magasin uden sidestykke, samarbejder vi med branchens bedste magasinjournalister, fotografer og grafikere.

FDC Media is a creative marketing partner that helps build awareness for brands promoting products, services, or causes that align with the fire, rescue, and first-responder industries.

We are a new format of video marketing because when you watch our videos, you do not feel as though you are watching a commercial. Rather, an episode of a great show, only your business is the story's main character. Our videos are unique and carry our special touch of clever humor, which results in high volumes of organic shares.

Viral videos are our specialty, because we design our content with the understanding of what truly engages viewers. Between all of our platforms, our videos have over 400,000,000 views, which is why we are the most recognized video company in Israel. 

Our clients include Microsoft, Google, Nestle, LG Electronics, El Al Airlines, Nokia, Bayer Pharmaceutics, and many more.

With Srutonim, imagination is our only limitation!

Name: WebsEdge
Description:
Trusted by the world’s leading associations WebsEdge helps the world’s sharpest minds to tackle the planet’s biggest problems. 

From science and medicine to society and technology - our work shines a spotlight on the key research being undertaken or issues facing these sectors today. 

Founded in 1998 by broadcast journalists from the BBC we offer world class knowledge-driven media. Using our storytelling and news-making expertise, combined with the latest broadcast technologies, we help member-based organisations at the heart of key sectors to inspire positive change.

In over 20 years we have partnered with hundreds of leading global associations to create world class content. Operating in over 100 countries, with films created in partnership with over 600 global Institutions, WebsEdge is well placed to foster the exchange of knowledge and create collaboration opportunities with association members.

WebsEdge Ltd is based in central London, UK and WebsEdge LLC in Washington DC. We film anywhere in the world - wherever the location our Production team is available.

Built on more than 20 years, we choose to partner with employer brand marketing teams because we love focusing on the people and purpose behind an organization.  As a creative video agency our process is fully self-contained; one team conceives, writes, designs, plans and produces every video from zero to completion. BAYCAT is a non profit social enterprise that educates, empowers and employs San Francisco underserved youth in digital media. Visit www.baycat.org/baycat-studio to find out how you can hire our Studio and our graduates to create your promotional video and branding materials.

We’re creating pathways from education to employment. We empower underserved kids by teaching them technical digital skills. In the process, they develop the support and confidence they need to succeed in life.

Mission

BAYCAT educates, empowers and employs youth and young adults to produce digital media that tells their unique stories and engages them to positively transform themselves, their communities, and the world.

BAYCAT believes that every person’s story matters. We envision a world where media and technology facilitate the telling and the hearing of stories from the broadest possible range of experiences in a way that moves people to create positive change in their communities.

Name: The Why Foundation
Description:
We believe free access to information is a human right.

1 billion people are unable to read and write and more than half of the world's population lack access to the internet. This means that for millions of people across the world free, reliable, information is simply not available.

To combat unequal access to information THE WHY produces & donates documentaries to underserved countries and distributes them on a sliding fee scale to other broadcasters around the world.
Founded in 2004 by documentary visionaries Mette Hoffmann Meyer (former head of documentaries at DR) and Nick Fraser (founder of BBC's documentary strand Storyville), THE WHY encapsulate their vision of making investigative documentaries available to everyone, everywhere. 

Engaging our extensive network of broadcasters, filmmakers and journalists, THE WHY now reaches more than 200 countries and territories with over 70 television broadcasters, local non-profit organizations and schools. By securing access to informative documentary films for everyone, we encourage global critical debate on pressing human rights and environmental issues.

Το Hellenic DNA είναι μια διαδικτυακή τηλεοπτική πλατφόρμα με βάση τη Νέα Υόρκη. Σε μία αναδυόμενη ψηφιακή εποχή, το Hellenic DNA ήρθε να προσφέρει εικόνα και ήχο προσαρμοσμένο στις σύγχρονες ανάγκες της Ελληνοαμερικανικής κοινωνίας, χωρίς αντιγραφές, υπερβολές, και με σεβασμό στις πραγματικές ανάγκες της ενημέρωσης και ανάδειξης του ελληνικού πολιτισμού. Ταξιδεύουμε σε Αμερική και Ευρώπη και καταγράφουμε τις πολιτιστικές και επιχειρηματικές δράσεις των ελλήνων της διασποράς με σκοπό να γίνουν γνωστές στον απανταχού Ελληνισμό. Το πρωτογενές υλικό θα φιλοξενείται με υπότιτλους στο website και στα κανάλια κοινωνικής δικτύωσης του Hellenic DNA-Digital News of America.

Hellenic DNA is an online video platform based in New York. In an emerging digital age, Hellenic DNA came to offer picture and sound adapted to the modern needs of the Greek-American society, without replicas, exaggerations, and with respect to the real needs of information and promotion of the Greek culture. We travel all over America and record the cultural and business activities of the Greek Diaspora in order to spread it to Hellenism worldwide. The primary material will be hosted with subtitles on the website and social networking channels of Hellenic DNA-Digital News of America.

Name: Sugar Studios
Description:
We're Sugar Studios, a versatile space with four unique stages ready to bring your project to life. From cinematic films to brand campaigns to music videos, west-end theatre rehearsals, fashion shoots, events and more, our clients come to us with their creativity and we meet them with our 'can-do' attitude.

We're located conveniently just 15 minutes for London City Airport, right off the A2. With a prime riverside location, we're steps away from the O2 and accessible by car, bus, bike and train.

Our stages include: the Infinity Cove, Green Screen, Blackout Box, and the Big Stage, a large rehearsal space with virtual production capabilities. 

We began by making props, models and scenery for 30 years in an old Tate & Lyle refinery on the Greenwich Peninsula, building for some of the most iconic brands in the world. If they could think of it, we could built it. Now, we've kept that same mindset and collaborate with our clients every step of the way.

We offer drive-in ramps, kit rentals, green rooms, hair and make up stations, free parking, free wifi, and Hollywood-level catering. We also have an onsite cafe along with production office space and a comfortable lounge so you can make yourself at home.

Educational Distribution

Digital Media

Film Festival
CAAM presents CAAMFest (formerly the San Francisco International Asian American Film Festival) every May, the nation’s largest showcase for new films from Asian America and beyond. 

Media Fund
CAAM provides funding and support for provocative and engaging Asian American film and media projects from independent producers. CAAM awards production and completion funds for projects intended for public television broadcast. 

Public Broadcast
CAAM is one of five minority public broadcasting consortia designated by the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB) to provide programming to the Public Broadcast Service (PBS).

Name: Investigative Project on Race and Equity
Description:
The Investigative Project on Race and Equity trains journalists in data-driven reporting and collaborates with news organizations to uncover systemic racism. Our partnerships add depth to the coverage of underrepresented communities and help to build capacity within newsrooms to pursue in-depth projects. By working together, we also expand the reach of reporting on race and equity and amplify its impact. 

Training includes apprenticeships for early-career journalists — with a focus on people of color — and workshops on finding stories in data and other investigative techniques. Our training mission is to help strengthen Chicago’s journalism ecosystem, while helping to build a pipeline of diverse journalists.

Using data and documents, the Investigative Project reports facts, not opinions. We offer proof of known patterns of abuse and failed oversight. And we elevate the voices of people affected by discrimination and inequality, while being respectful of the trauma they have endured. Our stories highlight solutions and share information that community members can use to effect change, including data that is hidden in plain sight.

Name: The Introvert Sisters
Description:
WINNER: SILVER ANTHEM AWARD 2023 - DEI PODCAST

Hi, we’re Lisa (on the left) and Sharon (on the right), and together, we’re The Introvert Sisters. We really ARE sisters. Sharon is Big Sis, and Lisa is Little Sis.

On the Myers-Briggs scale, we both type as INFJ (Introverted, Intuitive, Feeling, Judging). On every other scale, we STILL type as introverts. Hence, the name of the show. We thought that a name that perfectly captured a central element of our personalities would be perfect for us.

Like many introverts, we often find the world to be a noisy, sometimes overwhelming place. We are constantly searching for an oasis of quiet so we can process our thoughts. We either write them out—or we talk!

About The Introvert Sisters Podcast
The Introvert Sisters (TIS) podcast is hosted and produced by Sharon Hurley Hall and Lisa Hurley, two INFJs with a lot to say. The show aims to destigmatize introversion, celebrate the amazingness of introverts, and advocate for greater inclusion and belonging of introverts in the workplace. TIS is also a safe space for amplifying broader, intersectional issues affecting racialized people who identify as neurodivergent and introverted.

Above all, the sisters believe that:

--Introversion is a superpower
--All Black lives matter
--Sisterhood is everything
--Black girls rock
--You don’t have to be extroverted to live your best life
--Using your authentic voice, and amplifying the voices of others, matters

Subscribe to The Introvert Sisters in your favorite podcast player. Enjoy the podcast!

Description:
The Built Economy encompasses the infrastructure and economic activities that shape how humans live, work, travel, socialize, and play. A dynamic ecosystem spanning multiple sectors, the built economy serves as the foundation for sustainable economic growth and remains one of the largest generators of national wealth and employment. 

We engage with all stakeholders, from policymakers and investors to suppliers and end-users, to elevate the conversations around the planning, design, and execution of projects to enhance quality of life across urban and rural environments and achieve economic resilience and long-term growth.  

We pursue these goals by (1) addressing the most pressing challenges facing the built economy, such as sustainability, livability, affordability, mobility, accessibility, and equitable growth; (2) tracking the entire project lifecycle, from concept to completion and beyond, to highlight progress, impact, and accountability at every stage; and (3) promoting innovative solutions and best practices from around the world.

Name: ASU Media and Immersive eXperience (MIX) Center
Description:
The world-class Media and Immersive eXperience (MIX) Center in Mesa, Arizona, which opened in fall 2022, hosts hundreds of students who will be making films, designing new virtual worlds and video games, and creating other immersive media experiences of all kinds.

The MIX Center is part of the ASU at Mesa City Center complex, a collaboration between ASU and Mesa, Arizona, a city rich in history, art, community and industry. The MIX Center is located in the Salt River Valley on the ancestral homelands of those American Indian tribes that have inhabited this place for centuries, including the Akimel O’odham (Pima) and Pee Posh (Maricopa) peoples, whose care and keeping of these lands allows us to be here today. (For more information please see ASU Commitment to American Indian Tribes.) Located in the heart of Mesa’s Innovation District, the site will serve as a laboratory for advanced media technologies and media production, a platform for game development and a driving force for entrepreneurial solutions. It will also be an open and inviting place for the public as well as a source of inspiration, entertainment and education.

Here, a new generation of creators from Arizona and beyond will develop into the media and technology professionals we need in the 21st century.

Name: Heliconia
Description:
In 1997, Ken Whiting won the World Championships for Freestyle Whitewater Kayaking.  Shortly after, he began publishing instructional books and DVDs marking the beginnings of Heliconia, at the same time solidifying Heliconia’s mission to get more people outdoors living healthy lifestyles. Ken’s instructional product line eventually grew to represent other experts, other outdoor niches, and in the early 2000’s, a foray into feature films and TV production.

Since then, Ken and his new business partner, Brendan Mark, have found themselves producing inspiring adventure episodes shown across many of the leading television and digital networks. Over the past twenty years, each new project produced by Heliconia has been inspired by Ken’s early mission. The end result finds vast communities of viewers, followers and supporting partners connected by Heliconia’s inspiring mission of “Guiding people to a lifetime of adventure.”

Today Heliconia’s shows are seen in the US on Outside TV, Discovery Channel, FanDuel Sports Network (formerly Bally Sports), PBS, and other outdoor specialty networks. Each Heliconia project is hosted by celebrated storytellers and influencers. Together with a passionate team of filmmaking talent, we publish outdoor and adventure travel content that inspires and educates consumers while providing promotional value to tourism organizations and outdoor-oriented brands.

Heliconia’s headquarters remains nestled in Beachburg, Ontario, Canada…just minutes from the mighty Ottawa River, where it all began.

Pour être utile.

Prendre notre part dans la transformation du monde vers un monde plus connecté, plus riche en sens, plus simple, agile, sobre en carbone, créatif, qui donne sa chance aux jeunes, en vous accompagnant dans vos projets. Pour nous, performance et bienveillance vont de pair. Nous nous engageons à inscrire votre communication dans une approche humaine et responsable.

Ce qui nous passionne?

Vos enjeux.

Attirer de nouveaux publics, accompagner votre transformation digitale, approfondir votre identité pour nourrir votre image de marque, prendre part au débat public en faisant preuve de pédagogie, réinventer votre expérience client, imaginer une campagne qui fonctionne à l’international, partager votre politique RSE… Relever ces défis, pour nous, c’est construire avec vous le monde de demain.

Notre obsession?

Vous surprendre.

Aborder chaque sujet avec un regard nouveau pour le « revisiter » et proposer une approche inédite. Avec vous, nous explorons de nouveaux territoires, nous faisons naître de nouvelles idées, de nouvelles émotions pour que vos médias émergent, soient repris et propagés. C’est la raison d’être de notre laboratoire, «Le Bulbe» où nous invitons de nouveaux talents et testons de nouvelles technologies en toute liberté.

Name: TASS
Description:
In existence since 1904, theTASS Russian News Agency  is one of the world's largest international information agencies. The successor to the Soviet TASS news agency, it was re-named in 1992, when Russia proclaimed its sovereignty following the collapse of the USSR. It has retained its status of being the state central information agency.

TASS relies on a widespread net of correspondents. Currently, It has more than 130 bureaus and offices in Russia and abroad.TASS also cooperates with more than 80 foreign news agencies.TASS' editorial and other desks process information from correspondents, check and analyze facts, and translate into five foreign languages.

TASS has accumulated a rich body of experience throughout the course of its 100-year history. The agency's widespread network of correspondents, its modern means of distributing and storing information, and a well-oiled mechanism of cooperation between its editorial, reference and reporter departments, all enable TASS to provide quick and full coverage of all kinds of events shaping Russia and the world. 

The agency also operates a photo service, the largest of its kind in Russia. This unique service offers pictures of the latest breaking developments, available for prompt transmission in digital form. Clients also have access to an extremely rich photo archive dating back to the beginning of the 20th century.

Name: Yacht Femme
Description:
Yacht Femme, founded in 2018 by Andrea Tagliaferro—best known for her personal brand, Yacht Dame—is a multi-media platform dedicated to celebrating the achievements of women in the yachting industry. Inspired by her first experience at the Monaco Yacht Show, Andrea launched Yacht Femme to spotlight the remarkable contributions of women across the field.
In 2019, the platform expanded with the launch of the Yacht Femme podcast, and by 2024, it had grown to include both in-person and online events. This evolution culminated in the inaugural Women’s Yachting Awards in Amsterdam, held in partnership with METSTRADE.
Yacht Femme shares engaging content, interviews, and stories that highlight women’s milestones—from their first successes to industry-wide recognition. The platform fosters a vibrant, supportive community where women connect, inspire, and empower each other. By amplifying their voices and experiences, Yacht Femme aims to nurture future leaders and drive collaboration through networking events in the yachting world.

Name: Estudio.pub
Description:
Na PUB, acreditamos que boas histórias não apenas informam, elas transformam. Nosso propósito é dar voz a marcas, empresas e executivos que querem construir reputação de forma autêntica, relevante e conectada com o espírito do tempo. 

Fazemos isso porque temos convicção que comunicação bem-feita é muito mais do que divulgação, é uma força capaz de gerar impacto real nos negócios e na sociedade.

Fundada em 2017, a PUB se consolidou como uma das maiores estruturas independentes de comunicação do Brasil, com mais de 120 clientes e uma equipe de 100 profissionais. Ao longo dessa jornada, nos tornamos um hub de narrativas que une reputação, PR, ESG e agora também uma frente audiovisual de peso. 

É nesse movimento que nasce o Estúdio PUB, resultado da união entre PUB, com profissionais experientes e estrutura moderna para entregar o que há de mais inovador no mercado.

O Estúdio PUB é liderado por Tiago Maranhão (CEO do Estúdio e VP da PUB), carregando a experiência de TV Globo, Amazon e Corinthians, ao lado de Rafael Batista (COO), com mais de 20 anos no audiovisual, passagens por TV Globo, Disney e grandes marcas, e Eduardo Acquarone (CCO), jornalista premiado, ex-TV Globo e Reuters, criador do multipremiado Globo Amazônia. 

Nosso papel é simples e ambicioso: criar, produzir e distribuir conteúdo que gere conexão verdadeira, de vídeos para redes sociais a documentários, podcasts, séries originais, coberturas em tempo real e projetos de impacto que atravessam fronteiras.

Name: RocaNews
Description:
News for the generation that hates the news  

Roca is a media company that lowers blood pressure and covers topics you actually care about. The news shouldn’t be alarmist and partisan: It should be nonpartisan, balanced, and informative. 

Our mission is more important now than ever. The problems with the news industry run deep. Social media platforms incentivize viral over quality content; news websites use alarmist and partisan clickbait to drive ad revenue; and news apps send endless notifications.

We reach millions of people — primarily Gen-Z and Millennials — across social media, newsletters, and an app.

Description:

Products are mainly concentrating on either regional or vertical niches. The entire portfolio consists of 10 daily newspapers, 64 weekly papers, more than 100 websites, 2 printing plants and 1 radio station. Among them are leading products like the daily newspaper Vorarlberger Nachrichten, VOL.AT, erento.com and quoka.de. In Germany, the company runs several successful special interest and classified websites. Further, Russmedia is internet and mobile telephony provider in Austria. 
With its digital activities, the company reaches more than 20 million unique visitiers per month. 1500 people are working for Russmedia.

Name: Pitch Equity
Description:
At Pitch Equity, we break down the deals and dynamics shaping the fast-evolving world of sports ownership - from private equity and sovereign wealth funds making big-ticket investments in sports franchises to venture capital fueling the next wave of sports tech innovation.

Our daily coverage and in-depth analysis equip investors, executives, and industry professionals with the insights needed to navigate this complex landscape. Whether you're an investor, executive, or avid fan, following Pitch Equity ensures you stay ahead of market moves, armed with the knowledge to understand how capital is reshaping the future of sports.

Views expressed are solely those of Pitch Equity and not its affiliates. Content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice.

Description: Die emotionale Wirkung, die Bewegtbilder in uns entfalten, muss sicher niemandem mehr erklärt werden. Name: Plastforum DK
Description:
Plastforum.dk og Magasinet Plast er en del af Nordiske Medier A/S. Vi dækker plastbranchen i Danmark, en branche der er en af industriens største underbrancher. 

Vi tager temperaturen på plastbranchen, beskriver de nyeste løsninger og tendenser og kigger ind i industriens fremtiden. Vi går i dybden med produktionen og de tekniske temaer, når vi besøger de plastproducerende virksomheder til store reportager. Og vi kigger også i et bredt perspektiv på felter som plast og design, plast og miljø, plast i byggeriet, genanvendelse og uddannelse. 

Plastforum.dk bringer nyheder til og om plastbranchen hver dag. Redaktionen udsender nyhedsbrev hver 14.dag (torsdag), mens Magasinet Plast udkommer på print fire gange årligt. 

Læs vores privatlivspolitik her: https://www.plastforum.dk/privacy

TOPANGA CREA es una compañía emergente con una larga historia detrás.
Esta productora de televisión tiene en su ADN un componente claro: la pasión por entretener y contar historias, algo que sus socios vienen haciendo desde hace muchos años y que ahora, en Topanga Crea, se refuerza para seguir creciendo e innovando y ayudar a más clientes a conectar con la audiencia.
Hemos creado mucha televisión y la hemos hecho de todo tipo. Por nuestra trayectoria, abarcamos todos los géneros televisivos siendo expertos en gran parte de ellos. Nuestra intención es avanzar en ese camino sumando una experiencia y un conocimiento del medio que se apoya en un análisis riguroso de las necesidades y la audiencia de nuestros clientes. 
Hasta ahora, los socios de Topanga Crea hemos creado, supervisado y producido contenidos para clientes de diferente naturaleza a nivel editorial y presupuestario, tanto privados como públicos, de ámbito nacional y autonómico. Vamos a seguir haciéndolo porque sabemos adaptarnos a cualquier escala de producción.
Nos encanta la tele y queremos ofrecer a nuestros clientes herramientas para que a su público también le guste.

Si guieres contactar con nosotros hazlo en: info@topangacrea.com

Si quieres trabajar con nosotros contacta en:
talento@topangacrea.com

Name: RejsRejsRejs Travel Magazine
Description:
Travel better, travel longer, travel responsible! 

RejsRejsRejs (literally TravelTravelTravel in Danish) is the largest travel magazine in Denmark, as well as a thriving travel community and an upcoming travel agent. 
We currently reach more than 3 million travel eager Scandinavians each month, of which many are women. 

RejsRejsRejs consist of the website rejsrejsrejs.dk, a newsletter, 2 apps and a number of Social Media sites and groups, 12 channels all in all. 

We focus on providing real insights, travel planning tools and the most relevant travel packages for any traveller across Scandinavia who is keen on going beyond the standard travel routes or seasons. 

We aim to support travellers in discovering local destinations, find new places all over the world, and get social with people during travels - no matter how they travel and where they go. 

We create an easy overview of the best existing travel advice, by working together with a selected network of great writers. Besides this, we are sharing insider guides in the shape of professional articles and pictures delivered by the editors' group. 

RejsRejsRejs has been founded by two keen travellers, Jacob Gowland Jorgensen and Jens Skovgaard Andersen, with a background within travel, communications and culture. They have travelled more than 150 countries in the world, and have worked as travel talkers, travel guides, travel magazine editors, photographers and journalists and are proud members of the Travellers´ Club of Denmark. Jens is also a board member and tourist guide, while Jacob is an adj. associate professor at the business university in Copenhagen, CBS.

Do reach out if you can see a potential for professional cooperation. We are currently cooperating with more than 100 national tourist organisations, travel agencies, hotels and airlines. We do content marketing, awareness campaigns and market travel offers and tours. 

You can contact us at hq@rejsrejsrejs.dk.

Name: GreenPort
Description:
GreenPort provides business information on environmental best practices and corporate responsibility centred around marine ports and terminals, including shipping, transport and logistics.

GreenPort.com is a key source of the latest industry news with new content added every day. As a marketing platform, it can help your business stay ‘front of mind’ for an average of 8,700 visitors a month. It is an effective way to make an impact and drive traffic to your website.

GreenPort Congress Conference is a meeting place for the port community to discuss and learn the latest in sustainable environmental practice. It offers ways to reduce their carbon footprint and be more sensitive to environmental considerations, both of which are vital to future success.

In 2009, ShinAwiL opened its first UK office and 2012 saw its first BBC NI commission, Undercover NI. The latest development is the move into original Drama production. 

As well as dominating the Irish market by producing large-scale international formats, ShinAwiL has also created original formats such as, “Soccastars” which was licensed in Portugal, Turkey, Malaysia and 7 Middle Eastern States while “Rising Stars” has been licensed to 8 countries in the Caribbean Basin. ShinAwiL is currently in development on original factual entertainment series’ for the UK and US markets.

Name: Conservatoire Européen d'Écriture Audiovisuelle (CEEA)
Description:
Association à but non lucratif créée en 1996, le Conservatoire Européen d'Écriture Audiovisuelle a pour missions la formation et la professionnalisation de scénaristes de fictions (cinéma, télévision et animation). 

Le CEEA est un établissement reconnu par le Ministère de la Culture, qui forme des auteurs capables de concevoir et de développer avec la même exigence tous formats de programmes (courts-métrages, films et séries), à travers deux types de formations.

Une formation longue et qualifiante, accessible sur concours, est proposée par le Conservatoire. Elle délivre une certification professionnelle de Scénariste reconnue par l’état et valide l’ensemble des savoirs et savoirs-faire du métier d’écrivain de fictions audiovisuelles. 

Le CEEA propose également des stages de formation professionnelle continue de haut niveau, destinés à répondre aux demandes d’outils et de méthodologies pour l’écriture de scénarios pour la télévision et le cinéma.

Associé aux professionnels de la fiction française, le CEEA met en place des partenariats pédagogiques destinés à renouveler son enseignement et à établir avec ses élèves et ses stagiaires scénaristes des collaborations artistiques durables.

Name: Mainfilm | Agentur für Video- und Filmproduktion
Description:
Möchtest Du Deine Veranstaltung digitalisieren und ein breiteres Publikum erreichen? Dann bist Du bei uns richtig.

Gerade in der heutigen Zeit liegt der Fokus auf Digitalisierung, Nachhaltigkeit und Effizienz-Steigerung. Diesen Fokus haben wir auch bei uns gesetzt - denn unser Ziel ist es, gemeinsam mit Dir die Wahrnehmung für hybride Events in der Gesellschaft zu verändern. Als mehrfach ausgezeichnete und professionelle Live-Streaming- und Video-Agentur, sind wir die Experten für digitale, nachhaltige und hybride Events.

Ob national oder international – wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Produktionen und Live-Streamings für jedes Deiner Projekte an. Deine Wünsche stehen bei uns an oberster Stelle.

Was wir Dir bieten?
-	Digitale, nachhaltige und effiziente Live-Streaming Produktionen.
-	Packendes Storytelling mit Fokus auf erstklassige Bildsprache.
-	Maximale Interaktion mit Deinen Teilnehmern. 
-	Schwerpunkte: Live-Übertragungen, Seminare, Workshops, Präsentationen, Interviews, Webinare, virtuelle Konferenzen, Messen, digitale Veranstaltungen, Imagefilme, Musikvideos und Live-Kommunikationen.

Deine Vorteile von Live-Streamings und Videoproduktionen?
-	Anzahl der Teilnehmer ist unbegrenzt.
-	Einsparung von Kosten (Veranstaltungs-, Reise- und Raumkosten).
-	Live-Streamings sind nicht auf Publikum vor Ort angewiesen.
-	Jeder kann bequem und einfach von Zuhause aus zuschauen und interagieren.
-	Aufzeichnung der Live-Übertragung in höchster Qualität. 
-	Entwicklung der Konzeption und des On- und Offline Designs.
-	Übernahme der Pre- und Postproduktion.
-	Rundum Betreuung (Planung bis Durchführung) durch Experten.

Durch unsere hervorragende Infrastruktur und modularen Plattform garantieren wir einen exzellenten Service, eine sichere und datenschutzkonforme Übertragung. Wir unterstützen Dich mit smarten und innovativen Ideen. Du erhältst einen freien, passwortgeschützten Zugang. Wir garantieren immer auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik und Sicherheitsmaßnahmen zu sein.

NOTION has produced early day cover stories and landmark features with artists including Little Simz, Sam Fender, Tems and Shygirl, alongside shoots with Billie Eilish, Peggy Gou and Megan Thee Stallion. Our live platform has extended this into headline shows and festival moments with FLO, Headie One, Labrinth and Knucks.

Alongside our editorial output, Studio NOTION operates as an entertainment marketing and creative agency, connecting brands with culture through authentic, insight-led campaigns. Our partners have included Apple, Spotify, Gucci, Adidas, Amazon, The North Face, Tate Britain, Converse and ON, as well as culturally-led live moments spanning music, fashion and art.

We carve our niche by identifying talent at pivotal moments - not simply chasing what is underground, but recognising the early signals of artists and creatives destined for long-term impact. Through our editorial platform, creative agency and events, NOTION creates work that defines cultural moments rather than follows trends.

We are an independent, privately owned specialist site focused on North Korea. We have no affiliation to any political organisation or country.

In addition to our team of experts who closely follow all developments in North Korea, ranging from the political and military to social and culture, we have a trusted network of anonymous sources both inside and outside the state who help us shape our analysis.

This helps us give you a perspective that is different to regular news wires where journalists are often shipped in and shipped out to give fast-turnaround reporting on breaking events without specialist long term knowledge of the country.

We also aim to offer perspectives and insights that challenge the think-tank orthodoxy of Washington DC and promote a better understanding of North Korea.

We are a vibrant and popular platform for intellectual exchange on an isolated state, traditionally covered in mainstream media from a perspective that demonstrates little knowledge of the language, culture, and complicated history of the Korean peninsula.

Name: The North Star
Description:
In 1847, with slavery still in full force, two brave men, Frederick Douglass and Martin Delany, started an abolitionist newspaper called The North Star—named for the star, Polaris, that was often used as a guide for those seeking freedom in the North.

Douglass and Delany knew then, as we know now, that in order to fight back against injustice, their stories had to not only be well told—with the color and dimension and nuance that was frequently missing elsewhere, they knew they needed a newspaper that represented the cause of liberation with urgency, clarity, heart, and soul.

While The North Star was originally a print newspaper, we will be launching a news app, a full news website, a collection of podcasts, and more. We’re not just here to change the news—we aim to change the world.

Name: Tango Tango
Description:
The Tango Tango Podcast, or “Tops Talks,” isn’t just another veteran-focused show—it’s a front-row seat to real, raw, and unfiltered conversations with those who’ve served and those who support them. Hosted by Lloyd Knight, retired Air Force First Sergeant, Co-Founder & President of VETLANTA, and Veteran Talent Acquisition Manager at UPS, this podcast delivers powerful stories and hard-earned lessons straight from the voices of veterans.

In the military, “Top” is the trusted First Sergeant—the leader who ensures the morale, welfare, and discipline of the unit. That same leadership, authenticity, and straight-shooting honesty shape every episode of Tango Tango. 

Join us for conversations that get to the heart of what it means to serve, transition, and thrive beyond the uniform. Whether you’re a veteran, a supporter, or just someone who values grit, resilience, and real talk, Tango Tango is where you’ll find inspiration, hard truths, and powerful takeaways you won’t hear anywhere else.

Tune in. Be inspired. Walk away stronger.

Description:
What We Do: We provide inspiration and innovation that enable the businesses we serve to thrive.

How We Do It: We deliver the audiences you need to reach. Whether through print, mobile, digital or events, we can help you connect and grow. The LNP Media Group family of print and digital publications is the biggest and most influential provider of news in the area. 

Our daily newspaper, LNP, and its news website, LancasterOnline, are the number one source of news in Lancaster County and surrounding counties. Vi graver i alt fra brud på internationale love, retningslinjer og konventioner til virksomhedernes egne løfter – og vi dokumenterer konsekvenserne. 

Vores journalistik bygger på grundig research, solid dokumentation og samarbejde med både lokale og internationale medier. Det sikrer, at vores historier er troværdige, vedkommende – og når bredt ud.

Danwatch har en af Danmarks største graverredaktioner, og vi modtager både danske og internationale priser for vores undersøgende journalistik.

Alt, vi publicerer, er frit tilgængeligt for alle. Det kan lade sig gøre, fordi vi finansieres gennem mediestøtte, internationale fonde og er ligesom DR og TV2-regionerne skrevet ind i Medieaftalen – men vores journalistik er og bliver uafhængig.

Vores mål er enkelt: At skabe størst mulig indsigt og oplysning for offentligheden.

Name: Edipresse Group
Description: Edipresse Group has a longstanding place in the history of Swiss press and printing sectors. The company was founded in 1907 by Paul Allenspach, publisher of “La Feuille d’Avis de Lausanne”. This daily newspaper, created in 1762, will become 24 Heures in 1972. Lamunière family, together with Payot family, acquires joint control over the company in 1937. Marc and Pierre Lamunière take majority control of the company in 1982, which is then named Edipresse SA. In the 1980s Edipresse Group undertakes its operations – newspaper and magazine publishing, printing – exclusively in Switzerland. The 1990s are characterized by the group's international expansion, especially in Southern and Eastern Europe. In 2005 Edipresse Group enters several Asian markets. In March 2009 Edipresse Group announces its Swiss activities will progressively be incorporated to those of Tamedia Group (of which Edipresse Group becomes a shareholder). The merger is completed in April 2012. Edipresse Group stepped out of the Swiss stock exchange in 2011. Edipresse Group is now a purely family office, owned by Lamunière family.

The world is evolving, are you?

A little more about the hosts:

New York Times best selling author, Jean Gomes, has more than 30 years experience working with leaders and their teams to help them face their organisation’s most challenging issues. His clients span industries and include Google, BMW, Toyota, eBay, Coca-Cola, Microsoft, Warner Music, Sony Electronics, Alexander McQueen, Stella McCartney, the UK Olympic system and many others.

Award winning leadership development specialist, Scott Allender has over 20 years experience working with leaders across various businesses, including his current role heading up global leadership development at Warner Music. An expert practitioner in emotional intelligence and psychometric tools, Scott has worked to help teams around the world develop radical self-awareness and build high performing cultures.

Lo scopo è fornire chiavi di lettura su come cambia la città e i romani che la vivono, a tutti coloro che amano e desiderano conoscere meglio Roma, agli amministratori che devono pensare e disegnare le politiche, ai ricercatori che studiano in dettaglio le dinamiche urbane, ai giornalisti per approfondire le notizie di cronaca.

Dati e mappe mostrano con un livello di dettaglio territoriale molto fine le caratteristiche urbanistiche, demografiche, sociali, economiche e politiche della città, e permettono di comparare Roma, per alcuni aspetti, con Milano, Napoli e Torino.

Name: Boo Productions S.A.
Description:
Boo Productions was founded in April 2007 in Athens by 4 award winning producers: Angelo Venetis (board member of the Union Film & TV Producers, PACT), Takis Nikolakopoulos, Iraklis Mavroeidis (board member of Association of Independent Audiovisual Producers, SAPOE) and Aris Dagios. Professionalism for us means offering thorough inside knowledge of the industry, delivering high quality within strict timelines, having a problem-solving approach and hands-on involvement at every stage of the production. This is why our clients work with us time and time again. 

Success and recognition came at the film department with the feature film "DOGTOOTH" directed by Yorgos Lanthimos and produced by Boo. The film reached the Oscars in the ‘best foreign language film’ category. Since then, Boo has produced and co-produced other featured and short films like:

•	"FOUR BLACK SUITS" by Renos Charalambides
•	"ATTENBERG" by Athena Rachel Tsaggari
•	“TU HONORERAS TA MERE ET TA MERE” aka “A GREEK TYPE OF PROBLEM" by Brigitte Rouan
•	"JUST A PERFECT DAY" by Evris Pananikolas (Short)
•	"KM" by Christos Nikou (Short)
•	"THE RALLY OF GODS" directed by Vicky Vellopoulou (Documentary)

International recognition offered us great production service opportunities, such as:

•	KEEPING UP WITH THE KARDASHIANS in Mykonos.
•	AMERICA's NEXT TOP MODEL, with producer and presenter Tyra Banks. Shooting took place in Crete.
•	LOVE IN BEIJING in Santorini.
•	BAD GIRLS CLUB in Mykonos.

To My Sisters has since blossomed into a community hub, complete with programs, workshops, productions, and events geared towards growing sisterhood across the world. To My Sisters is unique in its kind by offering women the space for holistic wellness, growth and healing. 

What makes TMS special is its focus and founders. We are two women who have built a genuine friendship over the past 10 years, supporting each other through our struggles with poverty, mental health and more. We share our learnings and our friendship openly, in the hope to inspire women to invest in friendships, and grow holistically - not simply as wives, mothers, boss babes, or productivity gurus - but also as women who deserve nothing but the best for themselves.

Name: Medyascope
Description:
Medyascope, Türkiye, Ortadoğu ve dünyaya dair tarafsız haber, yorum ve analizleri bulabileceğiniz bir medya platformudur. Medyascope'un hedefleri Türkiye'de demokrasi ve basın özgürlüğünün gelişmesine katkıda bulunmak ve yeni medya araçlarını kullanan sürdürülebilir bir medya kurumu olmaktır. 

Sitemiz, Periscope, YouTube ve Facebook sayfalarımızdan siyaset, ekonomi, kültür ve spora dair gelişmelerin tartışıldığı yayınlarımızı ve günlük ve haftalık ana haber programlarımızı izleyebilirsiniz.  Kapsayıcı ve katılımcı bir medya kurumu olmanın öneminin farkında olan Medyascope, Türkçe'nin yanı sıra, Kürtçe, İngilizce, Fransızca ve Almanca da yayınlar yapmaktadır. 

Mottosu "Çünkü Özgür" olan Medyascope'un amacı ve misyonu hem bağımsız ve objektif gazetecilik yapmak hem de sansürün ve otoriterleşmenin arttığı ülkelerde yeni medya araçlarının yaratıcı bir şekilde kullanılmasına katkı sunmaktır.  

---

Medyascope is a pioneering online media platform, providing non-partisan commentary and analysis on national, regional and world news. Medyascope's aim is to contribute to the flourishing of democracy and media freedom in Turkey and become a sustainable media outlet relying on new media tools. 

Medyascope live broadcasts scheduled and non-scheduled programs, consisting of debates, interviews and daily and weekly news shows, on politics, economy, culture and sports via Periscope, Facebook and YouTube. Most of our programs are broadcasted in Turkish, however, you may find content in Kurdish, English, French and German as well. 

Medyascope's purpose and mission is to do independent and objective journalism and contribute to the creative usage of new media tools in socio-political contexts with increasing censorship and authoritarianism.

kronehit ist das meistgehörte Privatradio Österreichs. Erstmals ging kronehit am 28. kronehit befindet sich derzeit am Favoritner Gewerbering im zehnten Wiener Gemeindebezirk.

14,4% Tagesreichweite (Mo-So 10+) bedeuten 765.000 tägliche Hörer, werktags sind es 812.000 ÖsterreicherInnen, die kronehit als Unterhaltungs- und Informationsmedium nutzen.
Mit diesen Werten sind wir weiterhin das mit Abstand größte Privatradio und liegen auch in sechs Bundesländern (Wien, Niederösterreich, Burgenland, Oberösterreich und Tirol sowie erstmals auch in Salzburg) deutlich vor den anderen Privatradios.
Rund 80% unserer Hörer und Hörerinnen befinden sich in der werberelevanten Zielgruppe der 14-49 Jährigen.

kronehit als Lifesyte-Medium erfreut sich aber nicht nur im klassischen UKW- Radio großer Beliebtheit, auch unsere digitalen Kanäle entwickeln sich ausgezeichnet.

    Facebook: 537.106 Likes
    Instagram: 107.000 Follower
    Newsletter: 267.648 Abonnenten
    Sessions in unseren Webradios (Q3/2020) 2.300.000
    Page Impressions auf kronehit.at (Q3/2020): 1.700.000

Testen Sie unsere kronehit smart app! Dem ersten Live-Radio mit Swipe-Funktion. Ab sofort bestimmen die Hörerinnen und Hörer ganz persönlich, was sie hören wollen.

Name: Fumaça
Description:
Fumaça é um podcast de jornalismo de investigação independente, progressista e dissidente. 

Somos independentes, porque são os jornalistas a decidir os destinos da publicação, sem administrações, direções ou hierarquias. As escolhas da redação estão balizadas pelo nosso estatuto editorial, respondendo ao interesse público. Somos progressistas, porque acreditamos na liberdade, na garantia da vida digna efetivamente assegurada e que devemos ambicionar coletivamente corrigir desequilíbrios e desigualdades. Somos dissidentes, porque entendemos que há outras narrativas mediáticas para apresentar, e outras estruturas de comunicação social a construir. Assumimos-nos como um meio contra-poder, ouvindo aqueles prejudicados por sistemas de opressão, e escrutinando quem toma as decisões que os estabelecem e mantêm. 
_________________________________________________________________________________
Fumaça is an independent, progressive and dissident journalism project that takes an in-depth investigative approach to relevant issues in our society. 

Fumaça was founded in June 2016 by a group of volunteers as a non-profit journalism project, focused on human rights, covering topics such as racism, police brutality, immigration rights, climate change, and others. 

Our goal was never to tell people “what happened”, but rather explain “why it happened”, to go deep on the most important issues of our society, and to give ourselves the time to investigate, to inquire, to scrutinize. 

In 2018, we received a 100k grant from Open Society Foundation and a few members of the team are working professionally on the project since then. 

Something that describes us well is the fact that at Fumaça, we believe in the power of giving voice to the people, and that is why most of what we do is audio: podcast, audio-stories, audio-documentaries.

Name: The Branch
Description:
The Branch is a non-profit media company that tells the stories of people who are misunderstood, overlooked, or simply threatening to those with privilege and power.

We’re ethically contrarian, meaning we challenge conventional wisdom—not to be different or provocative—but to highlight issues underrepresented in traditional media.

We’re a home for political eclectics who hold views that don’t fit neatly into any single political party. This includes independents, the undefined, and the just plain confused . We even welcome those with strong party loyalties who want to escape their echo chambers.

But this isn’t a “both sides” project in which we pretend the answer to every question comes down to an imaginary average of two partisan positions. The world is much more complicated than that, and we are far more interested in truth than balance.

Description:
İstanbul Üniversitesi İletişim Fakültesi’nde öğrenciyken, 1990 yılında ‘stajyer muhabir’ olarak Sabah Gazetesi’nde gazeteciliğe başladı.

California Üniversitesi Riverside ve Los Angeles kampusünde, gazetecilik, tv ve ekonomi alanında toplam iki yıl süren sertifika programlarına katıldı.

1998 yılından itibaren Sabah Gazetesi’nde köşe yazarlığına başladı ve iş dünyasının nabzını tutmaya çalıştı. Dünyanın önde gelen şirket başkanları, CEO’ları ve yöneticileriyle ve Türkiye’deki şirket başkanları ve yöneticileriyle yaptığı söyleşileri pazar günleri önce ‘Misafir Odası’ ardından da ‘İş’te İnsan’ adıyla köşesine taşıdı.

‘Değişim İsteyip Değişmeyen Başkanlar’ isimli dizi çalışmasıyla Türkiye Gazeteciler Cemiyeti tarafından 2001 yılında ‘yılın gazetecisi” seçilen Kadak, çeşitli meslek örgütlerinden ödül aldı.
2012-2014 yolları arasında İş’te Hayat isimli bir televizyon programı yaparak iş dünyasının önde gelen isimlerini ekrana taşıdı. 

2012 yılında Londra’da Türkiye adına olimpiyat meşalesini taşıyan 12 isim arasında yer aldı.

30 yıl kesintisiz görev aldığı Sabah Gazetesi’ne 1 Ekim 2020’de veda ederek, gazeteciliğe dijital platformlara devam edeceğini duyurdu.

Name: Bhekisisa Centre for Health Journalism
Description:
The Bhekisisa Centre for Health Journalism specialises in health and social justice reporting, producing solutions-orientated narrative features, podcasts, videos and analysis from across Africa. 

Its high-quality journalism — distributed across digital and print platforms — reaches policymakers, academics, activists and political leaders often resulting in shifts in policy, national agenda-setting and redefining conversations. 

Trained in evidence-based journalism, the centre’s reporters and editors use peer-reviewed studies and reliable statistics to support the narratives in their stories. 

The centre works with leading researchers and policymakers to produce opinion pieces that translate the latest science and thinking around key health issues for large audiences. The centre also conducts trainings for health and science organisations looking to help staff better profile their work.

Bhekisisa also regularly hosts and organises public discussion forums on subjects such as South Africa’s National Health Insurance scheme, tuberculosis and the decriminalisation of sex work. It also works to improve health reporting in South Africa and beyond via training for working journalists and effective media communication for policymakers.

Name: Markt und Mittelstand
Description:
„Markt und Mittelstand“ ist das große Entscheidermagazin für den deutschen Mittelstand. Es erscheint in der WEIMER MEDIA GROUP und bietet crossmedial aufbereiteten Qualitätsjournalismus für mittelständische Unternehmer - aktuell, relevant und nutzwertig.

Seit 1994 unterstützt „Markt und Mittelstand“ deutsche Mittelständler dabei, die Kernfunktionen ihres Unternehmens zu professionalisieren und wichtige Entwicklungen frühzeitig zu erkennen. Die Redaktion von „Markt und Mittelstand“ bürgt für praxisnahe, unternehmerorientierte Nutzwerttexte aus dem Mittelstand für den Mittelstand.

Das Magazin „Markt und Mittelstand“ erscheint zehn Mal im Jahr mit einer Auflage von jeweils 115.000 (Print + E-Paper). Laut der „Leseranalyse Entscheidungsträger in Wirtschaft und Verwaltung“ (LAE 2024) erreicht „Markt und Mittelstand" 313.000 Entscheider* - vor allem Unternehmensinhaber, Gesellschafter, Geschäftsführer und leitende Angestellte. „Markt und Mittelstand“ richtet sich im Kern an Unternehmen in der Größenordnung von fünf bis 250 Millionen Euro Jahresumsatz oder mit 15 bis 500 Mitarbeitern.

Nutzwertig und fokussiert berichtet die Redaktion auf der Website www.marktundmittelstand.de , in wöchentlichen Newslettern und in Podcasts über neueste Entwicklungen in den Bereichen „Strategie & Personal“, „Finanzierung“, „Recht & Steuern“, „Produktion und Technologie“ und „Kunden und Märkte“. So erhalten Unternehmer schnell und übersichtlich Informationen über aktuelle Trends und Tendenzen in der mittelständischen Wirtschaft.

Gleichzeitig bieten die Themenseiten tiefgehende Einblicke in unternehmerische Einzelaspekte und unterstützen so mittelständische Unternehmer bei ihren strategischen und operativen Entscheidungen.

*Cross-Media Monatsreichweite (Leser pro Ausgabe + Nutzer pro Monat) laut Leseranalyse Entscheidungsträger 2024 (Basis: 3.1 Mio Entscheidungsträger)

www.marktundmittelstand.de

Impressum: https://www.marktundmittelstand.de/impressum/

Name: Curious About Cannabis
Description:
Curious About Cannabis provides books, courses, podcasts and other educational media exploring essential questions about Cannabis, cannabinoids, and the endocannabinoid system.

Hosted by science educator and natural products researcher, Jason Wilson, The Curious About Cannabis Podcast explores pertinent issues and connects listeners with conversations with researchers, doctors, chemists, cultivators and other professionals working with Cannabis and cannabinoids that seek to cut through the hype and the hear-say to reach enduring understandings.

The Curious About Cannabis book is a Cannabis science reference text ideal for Cannabis science educators or lifelong learners looking to take their Cannabis education further. Covering a wide survey of topics like taxonomy, botany, cultivation, chemistry, extraction science, clinical research, Cannabis testing, and more - the Curious About Cannabis book is sure to become a critical part of any ethnobotanical library!

Learn more at www.CACPodcast.com or find us on social media on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter. Subscribe to our YouTube channel for educational video content!

Like what we are doing and want to support us? Consider becoming a member of our Patreon at www.Patreon.com/CuriousAboutCannabis

Name: The Global Governance Project
Description:
The Global Governance Project is a joint initiative between GT Media Group Ltd, a publishing company based in London, UK and the G7 & G20 Research Group’s, based in the University of Toronto, Canada. 

Leveraging the heritage and respect that has been fostered by the G7 and G20 Research Groups, the partnership takes the learning, research and summit compliance reports produced by the Research Group and collects independent recommendations from invested organisations on the big issues being addressed in the world today. These are then published in the authoritative G7 and G20 Summit briefing books; given to the world leaders at the annual summits and simultaneously shared with the global stakeholder body. 

The Global Governance Project is a vital function for private- and public-sector organisations in support of their governance responsibilities. To carry out our executive duties effectively, we must have access to unbiased, objective and independent opinion, based on actual policy set at and influenced by the G7 and G20 summits and their leadership.

Based in London, UK, GT Media Group Ltd. is a highly respected publisher of intelligence annuals covering the world’s most dynamic markets. GT Media Group produces bespoke publications on behalf of influential stakeholders, promoting their interests at home and abroad.

Established in 2017, GT Media Group has quickly forged a reputation for providing unrivalled business intelligence and insight into global markets. It publishes specialised journals and works with key stakeholders to produce beautifully designed products that showcase the achievements and ambitions of regional markets.

GT Media Group also provides a platform for foreign businesses, from SMEs to multinational corporations, to promote their products and services to influential decision-makers. Many years of experience make GT Media Group the ideal conduit for international companies looking to gain a foothold and raise their profile in these markets.

The content we produce is tailored to each target audience in the fields of art, culture, heritage, tourism, and education. We offer a respectful rewriting of your scientific content, new forms of storytelling, often literary, sometimes poetic, sometimes documentary, written by authors or journalists, and delivered and performed by voice actors, in any language chosen.

Our creative approach defines the uniqueness of the bespoke productions we offer in the increasingly thriving world of audio production. The artistic direction is led by visual artist and composer Eddie Ladoire. Our well-crafted editing, the creation of soundscapes composed of field-recorded sounds, and the fact that we produce all our own sounds have become our signature.

Our expertise extends to museums, producers of immersive experiences, institutions and cultural or heritage sites, local authorities and regions, companies wishing to showcase their expertise and identity, and more generally, to all organizations or sites welcoming the public and looking to engage visitors or clients in an original and contemporary way.

Digital Solutions

•	AUDIO ROOM : Application for podcast creation practice for all audiences

We are always hiring.  Always seeking talented folks in digital, editorial (reporters, editors, sports, photo, video, audience development/growth), product, marketing and sales.

Name: Mediengruppe Oberfranken
Description:
Wir sind ein Multimediaunternehmen mit mehr als 50 Einzelmarken und rund 2300 Mitarbeiter*innen an etwa 20 Standorten. Mit unseren crossmedialen Produkten und Marken bieten wir ein nutzenorientiertes Angebot für Geschäfts- und Privatkunden. Wir sind das zweitgrößte Medienhaus Nordbayerns. Darüber hinaus sind wir Träger des Spendenvereins Franken HELFEN Franken. 

Unsere Vielfalt macht uns stark!  

Als lokaler Verlag gestartet, sind wir heute ein regional und national tätiges Medienhaus. Mit unseren traditionellen Zeitungen, diversen Anzeigenblätter und Online-Portalen konzentrieren wir uns hauptsächlich auf die Verbreitungsgebiete in Franken, während unsere Fachverlage, Marketing-Agentur und Druckereien bundesweit sowie in der DACH-Region tätig sind.  

Trotz des rasanten Wachstums in den vergangenen Jahrzehnten sind wir uns unserer regionalen Wurzeln stets bewusst. Unser Hauptsitz ist in der oberfränkischen Weltkulturerbestadt Bamberg. Bodenständigkeit und Nähe zu den Menschen in der Region liegen uns besonders am Herzen – als Informationsdienstleister und Arbeitgeber. Gleichzeitig gestalten wir die Zukunft der Medienwelt und erfinden uns immer wieder neu.  

Im Wandel der Medienbranche sehen wir Chancen – um unsere Angebote kundenorientiert weiterzuentwickeln, Innovationen voranzutreiben und neue Geschäftsfelder zu erschließen. Dafür fördern wir agiles Denken und Arbeiten und schaffen Freiräume für die Entwicklung von Ideen. Wir verbinden Bewährtes und Innovatives, Print und digital, lokal und überregional, One-Channel und Multi-Channel. 

Wir sind die Mediengruppe Oberfranken. 

Aktuelle Stellenangebote finden Sie hier: www.mediengruppe-oberfranken.de/karriere

Name: The Global Governance Project
Description:
The Global Governance Project is a joint initiative between GT Media Group Ltd, a publishing company based in London, UK and the G7 & G20 Research Group’s, based in the University of Toronto, Canada. 

Leveraging the heritage and respect that has been fostered by the G7 and G20 Research Groups, the partnership takes the learning, research and summit compliance reports produced by the Research Group and collects independent recommendations from invested organisations on the big issues being addressed in the world today. These are then published in the authoritative G7 and G20 Summit briefing books; given to the world leaders at the annual summits and simultaneously shared with the global stakeholder body. 

The Global Governance Project is a vital function for private- and public-sector organisations in support of their governance responsibilities. To carry out our executive duties effectively, we must have access to unbiased, objective and independent opinion, based on actual policy set at and influenced by the G7 and G20 summits and their leadership.

Based in London, UK, GT Media Group Ltd. is a highly respected publisher of intelligence annuals covering the world’s most dynamic markets. GT Media Group produces bespoke publications on behalf of influential stakeholders, promoting their interests at home and abroad.

Established in 2017, GT Media Group has quickly forged a reputation for providing unrivalled business intelligence and insight into global markets. It publishes specialised journals and works with key stakeholders to produce beautifully designed products that showcase the achievements and ambitions of regional markets.

GT Media Group also provides a platform for foreign businesses, from SMEs to multinational corporations, to promote their products and services to influential decision-makers. Many years of experience make GT Media Group the ideal conduit for international companies looking to gain a foothold and raise their profile in these markets.

Our primary goal is to create and share stories which give you positive emotions, inspire and empower.

4.Tolerance.
We show the world in its diversity and never justify violence

Name: Irish America Magazine
Description:
Irish America Magazine is the leading national glossy publication of Irish interest in North America.

Since its inception in October 1985, Irish America has become a powerful vehicle for expression on a range of political, economic, social and cultural themes that are of paramount importance to the Irish in the United States. It has helped re-establish the Irish ethnic identity in the U.S. (34.7 million according to the last U.S. census) and highlights the best political and business leaders, organizations, artists, writers and community figures among the Irish in America.

Now in print for 35 years, each bi-monthly issue of Irish America is a celebration of the growing resurgence of Irish heritage among Irish Americans here today, with an emphasis on the enormous achievements of distinguished and diverse Irish and Irish Americans such as superstar and humanitarian Bono, former New York City Police Commissioner James O'Neill, Northwell CEO Michael Dowling, and silver screen legend Maureen O’Hara.

Name: WOZ – Die Wochenzeitung
Description:
Die Wochenzeitung WOZ, 1981 gegründet, ist die einzige unabhängige, überregionale linke Zeitung der Deutschschweiz. Sie gehört weder einer Partei noch einem Verband noch einem Medienkonzern.

In der WOZ lesen Sie einmal die Woche das, was wichtig ist. Und zwar in einer Tiefe, die der Komplexität der Welt angemessen ist. Mit einer Kulturberichterstattung, die den Namen verdient.

Die WOZ ist weder von Mäzeninnen noch Werbekunden abhängig. Sie wird zu über neunzig Prozent von ihren Leser:innen finanziert. Und der Förderverein ProWOZ ermöglicht aufwendige Recherchen – seit über dreissig Jahren.

Die WOZ gehört ihren Macher:innen und kennt weder Verleger noch Chefredaktorin. Wichtige Beschlüsse werden basisdemokratisch gefällt, alle Angestellten erhalten einen Einheitslohn.

Name: Empoword Journalism
Description:
Welcome to Empoword Journalism. We are an award-winning publication led by women that aims to unite and empower journalists across the globe.

We were set up following an online workshop in May 2020 with Kay Burley from Sky News, where she encouraged attendees to document their experiences of Covid-19. We have now grown to 40 editors, nearly 200 contributors, and over 900 members on our Facebook group.

We have also won Best Newcomer Publication and highly commended for Best Overall Digital Media at the 2021 SPA awards.

We want our community to be as inclusive as possible, with a space for anyone who feels marginalised in the journalism industry. So do let us know if there are any improvements we can make.

This is a place where you can get feedback on your work and create new content. 

Want to get involved? This is the Facebook group you need to be to join to contribute to our publication.

In this group, you can get any information you need about upcoming projects, feedback on work, and a community of women who can help with any questions you may have about the industry.

Are we on social media you may ask? Of course! This is where your work will be posted. We will always do our best to promote your work - it deserves to be seen. 

Give us a follow to see what we’re up to! The more you share - the further we can go. 

Facebook - Empoword Journalism

Instagram: @empowordjournalism

Twitter: @empowordjournos
