Name: Universal International Studios
Description: Universal International Studios (UIS), a division of Universal Studio Group, partners with storytellers from around the globe to create bold and distinctive shows with universal resonance. Based in London and led by President Beatrice Springborn, the business' in-house production companies include Carnival Films ("The Day of the Jackal," “Lockerbie,” "Downton Abbey”), Monkey ("Made in Chelsea," "The Real Housewives of Cheshire," “Made in Bondi”), Matchbox Pictures (“House of Gods,” "Bad Behaviour," "Made in Bondi"), Working Title Television ("We Are Lady Parts," “Too Much”) and Heyday Television ("Apples Never Fall," "The Capture"). UIS also backs Tony Ayres Productions ("Clickbait," "The Survivors") and is a minority shareholder with a first-look distribution deal in Canada’s Lark Productions (“Allegiance,” "Law & Order Toronto: Criminal Intent"). Additionally, UIS houses a scripted unit that develops and produces original series such as “Hanna,” and the BAFTA Award-winner "Dodger”, as well as partnering with third parties on series such as "Everyone Else Burns" and “One Day”. The studio also includes NBCUniversal Formats, the international sales division that brings content to the global market, including shows such as "The Real Housewives," "Top Chef," "Saturday Night Live," "Hollywood Game Night," "That’s My Jam," "Suits," "Superstore," and more.

Name: Architecture Pulse
Description:
UNI NETWORK Architect & Interior
A Leading Media House for Architecture & Interior Design

Learn, Network, Lead: UNI NETWORK Architect & Interior is a dynamic media house dedicated to the world of architecture and interior design. We serve as a central hub for creative professionals, industry leaders, and design enthusiasts—delivering the latest trends, inspiring projects, expert insights, and in-depth features from across the globe.

What We Do
Curated Content: We publish articles, interviews, case studies, and visual stories highlighting innovative architecture and interior design projects.

Industry Insights: Our platform provides thought leadership, market analysis, and expert commentary on emerging materials, technologies, and design philosophies.

Community Engagement: We connect architects, interior designers, brands, and students through events, webinars, and interactive forums.

Showcasing Talent: UNI NETWORK offers a platform for professionals and firms to showcase their work, gain visibility, and connect with potential collaborators and clients.

Our Mission
To inspire, inform, and elevate the architecture and interior design community by sharing knowledge, celebrating creativity, and fostering meaningful connections.

Who We Reach
Architects & Interior Designers

Design Studios & Firms

Students & Educators

Product Manufacturers & Brands

Design Enthusiasts

UNI NETWORK Architect & Interior is your go-to source for everything architecture and interiors—where ideas take shape and the future of design is imagined.

Name: 1185films
Description:
We’re a boutique, full-service film production company created in 2002 by producer and director Nick Franco. People say we’re a bit rock-n-roll, which we like to think means we break down barriers and take creative risks without fear – but we always deliver and we’re always on time. 

At our cosy studio in the heart of Farringdon, you’ll find a relaxed, friendly team and a supportive environment for every kind of filmmaker and all types of projects. We want your project to be the best it can be, and we go all out to make that happen.

With in-house post-production and VFX, we offer a complete creative package from initial concept to production, delivery and measurement, which we track closely every time so you get a true understanding of ROI.

Everything interests us and we’re hungry for fascinating, challenging projects that get us excited. Our scope is unlimited, and we’ve created work encompassing film, music, art, science, fashion, corporate, advertising and much more. Our team has worked closely on campaigns with Bob Geldof, music videos with The Who drummer Zak Starkey and documentaries with theoretical physicist Stephen Hawking and the artists formerly known as the KLF.

Our comfortable new central London post-production facility two minutes from Farringdon station offers a choice of flexible, scalable production spaces for hire, whether you need a hot desk, an edit room or a whole floor, for as little or as much time as you need.

Name: HCB
Description:
HCB was established in 1980 to help those involved in the transport of dangerous goods to keep up to date with changing regulations.

The magazine continues to cover regulatory developments and to bring its readers news of products and services that aim to make their operations safer or more efficient.

The magazine covers the transport of all kinds of dangerous goods, but particularly liquid chemicals, liquefied gases, explosives and radioactive materials. It covers transport by all modes: road, rail, maritime (bulk and packaged), inland waterway and air. Its coverage is also global in scope, covering not only North America and Western Europe but also the Far East, South-East Asia, Australasia, the Middle East, Africa and Latin America. HCB has full-time writers based in the US and in Poland and a network of part-time contributors in Singapore, India, Brazil, Zambia and elsewhere.

Gomet' Media est un média tout numérique qui traite de l'actualité locale sur la métropole Aix Marseille Provence dans le sud de la France. Les Provençaux d'ailleurs sont aussi invités à s'exprimer pour tirer l'ensemble des acteurs vers le haut et faire d'Aux Marseille Provence l'une des capitales euro-méditerranéennes les plus dynamiques du 21 ème siècle.

Gomet' Media est dirigé, en toute indépendance, par son actionnaire-fondateur, le journaliste Jean-François Eyraud.

30 years of creativity, experience, pressing vinyl, special packaging, successful projects and unrivalled results.

Our service suite includes vinyl pressing, CD manufacturing, DVD replication, merchandise, project management and bespoke packaging for the music industry. We commit to deliver, within budget and to deadline, professionally conceived and beautifully realised products.

Since 1990 our team has grown and developed nurturing a customer-centric service, a standpoint we cherish, preserve and consider a core asset of our company. Over the years, the relationships our experienced staff has built up with suppliers, both in the UK and worldwide, have allowed us to negotiate, establish and maintain the best available balance of quality and value.

Name: Our Kids Media
Description:
Our Kids Media. Your Strategic Partner for Reaching Families Across Canada.

For over 25 years, Our Kids Media has been the trusted leader in connecting families with top private schools, summer camps, and retirement living and care options. As Canada’s premier multi-platform publisher, Our Kids delivers targeted marketing solutions across print, digital, events, and mobile platforms, reaching over 3 million engaged families annually.

Through a combination of annual publications—Canada's Private School Guide, Camp & Program Guide, and Comfort Life Retirement Living Guide—and digital platforms like ourkids.net, camps.ca, and comfortlife.ca, Our Kids connects families with the resources they need to make informed decisions. With over 2.2 million annual visits to our websites, we’ve built an engaged audience actively seeking premium private education, enriching summer experiences, and trusted retirement care options.

Our reach extends beyond traditional advertising. From our expertly crafted editorial content to intuitive digital tools and impactful in-person expos, every touchpoint is designed to drive meaningful engagement. Our team of writers, photographers, and digital strategists collaborates to create compelling stories and valuable insights, positioning our partners directly in front of their ideal audience.

At the core of Our Kids Media is a commitment to empowering families with clear, reliable, and timely information. For our partners, this means access to a targeted audience ready to make critical life decisions. It’s not just about impressions; it’s about delivering measurable results and fostering long-term growth.

Our Kids Media isn’t just a platform, t’s a partnership. Discover how we can help your brand connect, resonate, and grow with families across Canada and beyond. Let’s build something impactful together.

Name: LatiNation
Description:
LatiNation (LATV Evolved) is a bilingual, multi-platform media company transforming Latino representation by creating content that organically represents the modern Latino experience. Its brands include Latino Alternative Television (LATV) linear and LATV FAST network, LatiNation Digital, LatiNation Studios, and LatiNation Creative verticals. 

The company is grounded in over two decades of award-winning bilingual content; its flagship linear channel LATV is seen in 81% of US Hispanic Households and 47 US DMA's. The company's Digital Ad Network reaches over 65% of the total US population and has +180mm monthly uniques. 

LatiNation content emphasizes Latino culture and Latina empowerment, as well as LGBTQ+ and Afro-Latino pride. For more information, visit www.latination.com.

Name: Claims Media
Description:
Claims Media reports on and analyses the insurance claims sector through online and physical channels, while recognising its best and brightest stars and brands for their achievements and dedication to clients.

Claims Media online: The website provides daily updates on and analysis of trending topics throughout claims management and processing, regulation and technology. From tech as a means to counter fraud, to the latest developments in the legislative bid to reduce spurious claims, Claims Media is the go-to free-to-read resource for claims professionals across insurance, law and related sectors.

Claims Media awards and events: The awards ceremonies recognise the key achievements of exceptional claims professionals, be it the claims teams at insurance companies that have gone above and beyond line of duty in handling claims, or the developers of cutting edge technology that has streamlined and improved the claims process. Its innovative conferences and one-off events also provide forums for well-informed discussion and debate.

Name: Redseven Entertainment GmbH
Description:
Redseven Entertainment entwickelt und produziert innovative Formate für den nationalen und internationalen TV-Markt mit den Schwerpunkten Comedy, Clipshow, Dokutainment, Magazin, Show, Corporate Media und Fiction. Seit seiner Gründung im Jahr 2008 blickt das Unternehmen mit Büros in München, Köln und Berlin auf unzählige Hit-Formate zurück, darunter für ProSieben, SAT.1, Kabel Eins, ZDF, RTL, VOX, RTLZWEI, Sky, DMAX, Prime Video und Netflix Deutschland. 

Internationale Marken und eigene Ideen setzen wir für jede Plattform passgenau um: Vom Online-Spin-Off bis zur App entwickeln wir alles rund ums fertige Format gleich mit und sind Experten für Branded Entertainment, Event-Showproduktionen und Visual Effects. 

Zu den bekanntesten Produktionen gehören unter anderem „Hochzeit auf den ersten Blick“ „The Taste“, „The Biggest Loser - Leben leicht gemacht“ (alles SAT.1), „Germany’s next Topmodel - by Heidi Klum“ (ProSieben) und „Rosins Restaurants“ (Kabel Eins).

Mit dem Deutschen Fernsehpreis („Wir sind klein und ihr seid alt", „Hochzeit auf den ersten Blick“ & „Don't Stop the Music“), dem Deutschen Comedypreis („Die Martina Hill Show“) sowie dem Blauen Panther („Don't Stop the Music - KIDS“) erhielt Redseven bereits mehrfach die renommiertesten Auszeichnungen der Unterhaltungsbranche und zählt zu den zehn erfolgreichsten deutschen Produktionsfirmen im Entertainment-Bereich.

Name: The World of Fine Wine
Description:
The World of Fine Wine is an award-winning magazine, website and app speaking to an international readership of discerning individuals who each share a passion for wine. 

We take a sophisticated approach to the assessment of fine wine that is neither dominated by fad or fashion, nor one individual palate, nor the latest over-hyped wines. 

The publication appeals to a broad spectrum of wine lovers because of the range of subject matter we cover and the quality and depth of the articles written on these academic topics. 

Working with some of the world’s most respected wine writers, we offer authoritative editorial content that is seeing us become the go-to place for the global fine wine aficionado. We are a quarterly publication with subscribers extending across 30 countries.

Name: The Lighthouse
Description:
The Lighthouse, a division of Whalar, is a first-of-its-kind Campus for Creators and their teams to learn, make, and belong.

The Creator Economy has outgrown the spaces, resources, and tools available to creators. Giving rise to a new home for creators and teams, The Lighthouse will provide learning and career development programs, state-of-the-art production studios, private offices, open-plan workspaces, and cultural-social events accessible through an application-based membership program. 
 
The campus will host industry leaders, educational institutions, and creator experts to deliver learning and development courses, workshops, and seminars.
 
The Lighthouse will bring together a diverse group of established and emerging creators and their growing teams. There will be an application-based membership program reviewed by an appointed Lighthouse Creator Council.

Name: Studio Private
Description:
Studio Private is a multidisciplinary production, technology, and post-production company uniting artists, producers, and technologists to shape the future of fashion and luxury media. 

With an artist-first, creative-led approach, we blend traditional shoots with cutting-edge technology and post-production expertise to deliver films, images, and experiences across all platforms. 

At the foundation of every project, or long-term production partnership, we help our clients strike the right balance between high-impact shoots and emerging technologies, allocating resources strategically for maximum creative and financial impact.

We bring over 20 years of experience collaborating with leading photographers, directors, brands, and editorials. That legacy lives on in everything we do - honouring the heritage of fashion and luxury storytelling while pushing its possibilities forward.

Our capabilities include a team of post artists, filmmakers, and experience builders with a wealth of fashion and tech expertise, specialising in end-to-end stills and film post-production, tech-enabled storytelling, and immersive content creation.

We can show you what's possible with the latest technology and bring your dreams to life.

Our vision is a screen storytelling future that is inclusive, sustainable, and rewards courageous creativity.

Follow us to join the journey — or connect to explore collaboration.

Name: PozitiVești
Description:
Servus și bun venit în PozitiVești, comunitatea celor care gândesc pozitiv, acționează creativ și sunt capabili de performanțe valoroase, atât în profesie și afaceri, cât și în familie și societate.

Ne vom întâlni aici, zi de zi pe site și săptămânal în newsletter, cu oamenii buni, curajoși, harnici și ambițioși care reprezintă România performantă, pentru că aduc progresul și produc schimbarea benefică, bunăstarea și prosperitatea de care cu toții ne bucurăm.

Aici în PozitiVești îi întâlnim pe cei care explorează cu curiozitate, muncesc cu pasiune și descoperă ideile, drumurile și oportunitățile care ne fac mai buni, mai respectați, mai împliniți.

Am descoperit în ultimii ani sute, chiar mii de astfel de oameni luminoși, curajoși, harnici și ambițioși, ale căror idei, proiecte, produse ori servicii au acum succes uriaș nu doar pe plan național. Pornind de la ei și exemplul lor, putem construi un model de gândire și acțiune care ne conduce spre performanță, progres și bunăstare.

Avem o uriașă nevoie de mai multă încredere în noi și în cei de lângă noi. Ne trebuie inspirație ca să învățăm să descoperim lucrurile bune din jurul nostru, să ne găsim modelele valoroase care deschid drumuri ascendente și să le folosim ca punct de plecare în devenirea noastră.

România aia bună, frumoasă, prosperă și captivantă pe care o visăm cu toții și la care vă invităm să muncim împreună este aici, în PozitiVești. Locul în te bucuri să locuiești, să călătorești, să citești, să gândești și să muncești.

Fiți bineveniți, haideți la treabă. Avem mai multă putere decât ne imaginăm. Hai că putem!

Name: View Imaging
Description:
View Imaging is a New York based high-end creative production and post-production studio that increases your creative team’s capability and capacity to produce visual content at scale.

Winning brands and their agencies know how crucial content is to business success. With ever-growing omnichannel demands, the digital world requires you to endlessly produce more content. 

The last thing you want is to feel limited by your ability to reach your target audience because you’re unable to keep feeding the content beast! 

Since 2007, we’ve been working with the world’s most renowned brands to perfect the process that makes more than 25,000 digital assets annually for industry-leading brands like Sephora, Restoration Hardware, Ralph Lauren, Ippolita, Mark Cross, SPANX and more. 

With each project, we customize a process to integrate perfectly with your in-house or agency team allowing you to:
• Produce high-quality images at scale
• Maintain brand consistency across every channel
• Increase flexibility and capacity to reach new high-volume content goals

Founder, Peter Rundqvist, worked as the head retoucher at Harper’s Bazaar and used his skills on many advertising, editorial, and billboard projects. He eventually started View as a high-end image retouching studio which has now grown to become a full service production and post production studio for brands who care about quality. 

Today View will help you avoid missing dreaded content deadlines and inconsistent branding across countless media channels. Schedule a call with View and slay that content beast with ease. 

Email us today: info@viewimaging.com

Name: ATM Grupa S.A.
Description:
ATM Grupa S.A. is the largest independent television and film production company in Poland.

Founded in 1992, ATM Grupa is the only company in the Polish audiovisual industry listed on the Warsaw Stock Exchange. For over three decades, we have been creating high-quality entertainment, drama, and factual productions for major broadcasters and global streaming platforms.

Our portfolio includes award-winning and widely recognized titles such as "Wataha" (The Pack / The Border), "W głębi lasu" (The Woods), "Zachowaj spokój" (Hold Tight), "Tylko jedno spojrzenie" (Just One Look), "Absolutni debiutanci" (Absolute Beginners), "Pierwsza miłość", "Sprawiedliwi – Wydział Kryminalny", "Policjantki i Policjanci", and "Lombard. Życie pod zastaw".
Recent productions include "The Breslau Murders{ – a Disney+ Original crime series set in 1930s Wrocław – "Drelich", a contemporary crime drama produced for TVP, and "Travel Essentials", a feature film currently presented on the international festival circuit.

Beyond production, ATM Grupa is a leading provider of broadcast and post-production services. We deliver multi-camera coverage for sports and entertainment events such as the Olympic Games in Paris, Polish Ekstraklasa football matches, and combat sports galas (KSW, Fame MMA, GROMDA, Clout). Our teams also produce large-scale concert broadcasts, including Hans Zimmer’s performance in Krakow and Dawid Podsiadło’s stadium tour.

ATM Grupa owns state-of-the-art soundstages, the largest equipment facilities in Poland, and one of the most advanced virtual production portfolios in Central and Eastern Europe. The Group is also active in real estate development and holds a strategic share in BoomBit S.A., a publicly listed game development company.

Our mission is to create stories that matter – combining experience, technology, and creativity to deliver world-class content from the heart of Europe.

So far we've generated more than one billion organic views and tens of millions of subscribers for brands such as MrBeast, Y Combinator, e.l.f beauty, WHOOP, and ClickUp and for creators such as Ali Abdaal, Neil Patel, Chris Williamson, Codie Sanchez, Mike Poser & more.

Name: Channel i
Description:
Channel i is a privately owned television network in Bangladesh. It is owned by the Impress Group, among the largest conglomerates in Bangladesh with interests in textiles, pharmaceuticals and media.

The Impress Group first moved beyond textile production and into television in the early 1980s under the tutelage of Faridur Reza Sagor, who had heretofore worked at state-run Bangladesh Television (BTV) on a freelance basis. The initial steps into television involved setting up Impress Telefilm, which produced small mini-series and one-off shows for BTV.

In the 1997, Impress Group looked into starting up its own satellite channel. Channel i was launched in the June 1, 1997, broadcasting pre-recorded programs 12 hours day. Within two years of its official launch, Channel i began broadcasting 24 hours a day and became the first digital channel in Bangladesh.

Currently, Channel i competes with several other domestic satellite channels, including ATN Bangla, Ekushey TV and NTV. For the past decade, the channel has held the highest market share among non-terrestrial channels in Bangladesh.

In 2009, ShinAwiL opened its first UK office and 2012 saw its first BBC NI commission, Undercover NI. The latest development is the move into original Drama production. 

As well as dominating the Irish market by producing large-scale international formats, ShinAwiL has also created original formats such as, “Soccastars” which was licensed in Portugal, Turkey, Malaysia and 7 Middle Eastern States while “Rising Stars” has been licensed to 8 countries in the Caribbean Basin. ShinAwiL is currently in development on original factual entertainment series’ for the UK and US markets.

Berdiri sejak 2005, MNC Pictures telah menghasilkan beragam program drama seri TV, FTV untuk platform TV, digital dan OTT baik yang dimiliki oleh MNC maupun industri pada umumnya. Dans l’univers des séries documentaires à grand spectacle, KM a créé le format original Leur Vie en Direct qu’elle a décliné pour TF1 dans les univers de la police, des pompiers et des vétérinaires. Flics leur vie en direct, Pompiers leur vie en direct et Vétérinaires leur vie en direct sont aujourd’hui présents sur le marché international et vendus en readymade ou formats dans plusieurs pays.
Parmi les formats de factuals sur lesquels elle est présente, KM a notamment produit pour TF1 La vie Secrète des Enfants.
KM couvre le Festival de Cannes, notamment les cérémonies d’Ouverture et de Clôture, La Cérémonie des César ainsi que les concerts de musique classique de la Folle Journée de Nantes pour Arte.
Enfin, très présente sur les grands documentaires évènementiels, KM produit de nombreux documents et enquêtes. Parmi eux, notamment... Florian Philippot, le Mazarin de Marine diffusé dans Envoyé Spécial sur France 2, Interdites d’école sur Canal+, Enquête sur les premières attaques qui ont frappé Paris.

Name: Die Deutsche Wirtschaft
Description:
DDW Die Deutsche Wirtschaft ist das offene Informationsnetzwerk der Geschäftsführer, Unternehmensinhaber und Vordenker deutschen Wirtschaft. Der Hauptfokus liegt auf den circa 250.000 Gesellschaftern und Geschäftsführern der 35.000 größten Unternehmen in Deutschland (ab rd. 5 Mio. Euro Umsatz). Doch auch alle wirtschaftlich Interessierten, Gründer oder Studenten sind willkommen.

Gegründet wurde DDW 2016 als Impuls aus Unternehmerkreisen, sich für Zukunfts- und Geschäftsimpulse medial zu vernetzen und zugleich für Unternehmergeist und Marktwirtschaft Öffentlichkeit zu schaffen. Die Idee wächst seitdem in beeindruckender Weise: mit IVW-geprüften mehr als einer halben Million Medienabrufen pro Monat auf seinem Portal, einer Reichweite von über 850.000 pro Monat in sozialen Netzwerken und einem der größten Newsletter der deutschen Wirtschaft mit 63.000 Empfängern ist DDW heute eines der Medien mit der stärksten Reichweite im Top-Segment der deutschen Wirtschaft.

Gerne halten wir Sie mit unseren Positionen und Debatten auf dem Laufenden. Tragen Sie sich in unseren wöchentlichen Newsletter ein: https://info.die-deutsche-wirtschaft.de/ddw_newsletter.jsp

Name: ِشبكة الدرر الشامية
Description:
شبكة الدرر الشامية .. مشروع إعلامي مختص بالشأن الشامي. 

أنشئت الشبكة بموازاة الثورة المباركة في سوريا، فكانت رديفة لها، نصرة للشعب السوري والثورة السورية، وتفعيلاً لقضايا الأمة، وذلك عام 1432هـ الموافق 2011م..

الشبكة مشروع تطوعي خيري لايهدف إلى أية أغراض ربحية.

الشبكة تعمل مستقلة لا تنتسب إلى هيئة سياسية أو جماعة حزبية، ولا ترتبط بأى فصيل ثوري أو عسكري.

تقوم الشبكة بنقل أخبار الحراك الثوري الميداني والسياسي بصورة منتظمة على مدار الساعة، فهي مصدر موثوق لدى متابعيها من مختلف بلدان العالم، لتلقي الأحداث ومعرفة ما غاب عنهم، كأنهم مع الحدث لحظة بلحظة.

تعتمد الشبكة على توثيق الحدث عبر شبكة مراسلين متواجدين في كل مكان، فتوثق الحدث بالصوت والصورة، ومقاطع الفيديو والنقل عن المصادر الموثوقة.

الشبكة تتضمن عددًا من النوافذ المتنوعة التي تتناول الحدث بطرق متنوعة، تارة بالتحرير فينقل عبر نافذة الأخبار، وتارة بالتحليل عبر نافذة التحليل الاستراتيجي، وتارة بالتقارير المفصلة، إلى غير ذلك من النوافذ الإعلامية.

Everything we do is grounded in making a positive difference to those who are directly involved and those who experience our content -  triggering debate, thought and conversation.

Get in touch. Small conversations lead to big things.

Name: Wello
Description:
ברוכים הבאים! wello היא פלטפורמה ייעודית וראשונה מסוגה בישראל, המאפשרת לסטודנטים למשפטים, מתמחים ועורכי דין צעירים, להיחשף למידע הרלוונטי ביותר עבורם בצורה נוחה ונגישה.

אנו ב-wello מייצרים, מרכזים ומנגישים את עולם התוכן של השוק המשפטי בישראל. אנחנו מאמינים בשוק יעיל, בו המידע נגיש לכלל הצדדים ובעלי התפקידים השונים – באופן אובייקטיבי ובלי הטעיות וחנופות מיותרות.

זה לא סוד שהשוק המשפטי בישראל הוא זירה בלתי פשוטה להשתלבות, התמודדות והצלחה. ישראל מחזיקה באופן עקבי בשיא גינס העולמי בכמות עורכי הדין ביחס לאוכלוסייה ,לצד אלפי משרדים ועשרות מסלולי לימוד לתואר ראשון במשפטים.

כל אלה מייצרים, בכל רגע נתון, כמות בלתי נתפסת של מידע – ולא סתם מידע – אלא כזה המהווה את המפתח להיכרות עם השוק המשפטי, הבנתו והשתלבות בו בהצלחה.

אז אם אתם סטודנטים למשפטים, מתמחים, עורכי דין או בעלי משרדים – wello יביא בפניכם תמיד את המידע הרלוונטי, הנכון והעדכני ביותר עבורכם.

פרויקט wello צמח מתוך משרד Robus – המשרד המוביל והוותיק בישראל בתחום הליגל מרקטינג – פיתוח עסקי ושיווק למשרדי עורכי דין.

Leidenschaft ist nichts ohne Kompetenz. Kompetenz ist nichts ohne Leidenschaft. Auf die richtige Paarung kommt es an, den Perfect Match.

Wenn es um Filme geht, haben wir dafür einen Namen: e+p. Uns bewegt Bewegbild und das schon seit über 2 Jahrzehnten.
In München, Hamburg, Berlin und Düsseldorf geben mehr als 40 e+pler alles für das eine Ziel: ein exzellentes Stück Film. Ganz egal, ob klassischer Werbespot, Digital Content, Event-Dokumentation, Unternehmensfilm oder Webserien. Wir kennen nicht nur das Business in und auswendig sondern auch alle unsere Regisseur:innen höchstpersönlich.

Zu guter Letzt: Dynamik ist nichts ohne Plan. Deshalb entwickelt sich e+p konsequent aber überlegt weiter. Wir führen junge Wilde an Führungspositionen heran, erweitern unsere Kompetenzfelder in atemberaubend schnellem Gleichschritt mit einer sich stetig verändernden digitalen Welt und haben als erstes deutsches Produktionshaus einen Writer´s Room etabliert, in dem verschiedene Autoren gemeinsam und fokussiert an einem Projekt arbeiten.

Ihr Filmprojekt und e+p? Perfect Match!

Wir begleiten dabei nicht nur Kunden, sondern auch Inventarinhaber von Parkings, Golfparks, Sportstadien und Messeveranstalter.

Wir sind Aussenwerbungsspezialisten mit grossem Fachwissen und langjähriger Erfahrung. Wir arbeiten für Kampagnenauswertungen und Reichweitenberechnungen mit SPR+ oder unserem Partner «dieMarktforscher» zusammen. 

Mit einem eigens entwickelten Kommunikations-Optimizer ermöglichen wir unseren Kunden exklusiv zu überprüfen, wie die Botschaftswahrnehmung beim Zielpublikum aufgenommen wird und ob die Erkenntnisse der Gestaltungslehre, Farbenlehre, Sprachwissenschaft, Psychologie, Augenkunde und Neurowissenschaft richtig eingesetzt wurden. Diese repräsentative Studie kann zu jeder Kampagne gebucht werden.

PLAKATDRUCK - PRODUKTIONSSERVICE

Wir arbeiten mit renommierten Schweizer Druckereien zusammen und können so unseren Kunden eine Full-Service anbieten. Im Jahr 2020 realisierten wir für unsere Kunden über 1’100 Produktionsaufträge. Egal, ob herkömmliche Plakate, Big Poster oder Sonderanfertigungen.

ACE2ACE 

Gegründet 2005. Alle vier Inhaber arbeiten im Tagesgeschäft mit und haben zwischen 12 bis 25 Jahre Erfahrung in der Aussenwerbung. Wir leben und  Out-of-Home.

Name: Yellow Dot Studios
Description:
Yellow Dot Studios is a non-profit media studio founded by filmmaker Adam-McKay (Don’t Look Up, The Big Short, Anchorman, Succession) to expose rampant Big Oil disinformation, so we can finally take necessary action on the rampant Big Oil pollution that is literally cooking us.

In addition to short-form web content featuring comic talents like Tim Robinson, Nikki Glaser, Rainn Wilson and D'Arcy Carden, our productions include:

HEATED CONVERSATIONS - Chat show that puts your favorite people in a tiny sauna to ask them big questions as the temperature rises through five level so extreme heat.

YOU NEED THIS - Documentary from director Ryan Andrej Lough that explores how consumerism emerged from the unbridled optimism of 1950s America and evolved into a global system shaping our desires, identities, and behaviors.

SABOTAGE -  Investigative podcast going inside the world of the controversial activists of Just Stop Oil. Named one of Apple's 10 best podcasts so far of 2025.

LET'S NOT DIE - A live comedy and climate show we've brought to LA, New York and London. 

THE EXTREME WEATHER REPORT - Connecting global extreme weather disasters to the fossil fuel pollution and lies that caused them. 

SO YOU THINK YOU CAN SCIENCE - The world's first live comedy science game show.

COBELL ENERGY - Web series workplace comedy about an oil family battling progress and each other.

Name: Go To Team
Description:
We're an elite company of STAFF camera crews built to shoot storytelling features for major networks, professional leagues, agencies & brands and Fortune 500 companies. 

We shoot features for the biggest sports, news and entertainment events capturing content for our clients to distribute down their many platforms.   

Our eSports division works alongside Turner’s ELEAGUE and ESPN’s Outside the Lines telling the stories of teams and players from all over the world. We shoot for Major League Gaming, Epic Games, The Score, etc. We've seen incredible growth in the industry and the emergence of a fascinating new group of Generation Z fans that are voracious consumers of content.

HGTV's hit, "Fixer Upper" is built around great talent and our team supported production behind the lens from the pilot to seasons 1-3. Our Unscripted team partners with production companies and major networks to shoot sizzles, pilots and full series. We're the Go To for some of the top networks, corporations and production companies in the world. They rely on Go To Team for solutions to the most challenging and critical elements in production: the camera team. 

Go To Team crews are STAFF W-2 employees, insured and bonded. We find developing cameramen, build them through our one of a kind Federally Accredited Apprenticeship program, support them with elite training and equipment and then place them strategically throughout the country to service our clients. Every DP/Cameraman has been through our 12-month apprenticeship and comes out of it ready to shoot for any and all clients. They not only understand the technical part of shooting and how the gear works, but their eye has been further trained along with the adept skills needed to handle themselves and other crew members on any set.

Name: HURUN
Description:
Nobody Knows China's Rich Better! Established in the United Kingdom in 1999, Hurun is a research and media group, promoting entrepreneurship through its lists and research. Widely regarded as an opinion-leader in the world of business, Hurun generated 8 billion views on the Hurun brand in 2023, mainly in China and India, and recently expanded to the UK, US, Canada, and Australia.

Best known for the Hurun Rich List series, telling the stories of the world’s successful entrepreneurs in China, India, and the world, Hurun’s other key series focus on young businesses and entrepreneurs, through the Hurun Unicorns Index, two Hurun Future Unicorns indices, the Hurun Uth series, and the Hurun Pioneers series.

Hurun has grown to become the world’s largest list compiler for start-ups, ranking over 3000 start-ups across the world through its annual Hurun Global Unicorns Index (startups with a valuation of US$1bn+), and two Hurun Future Unicorn Indexes: Gazelles, most likely to ‘go unicorn’ within three years, and Cheetahs, most likely to ‘go unicorn’ within five years.

The Hurun Pioneering Young Startups and Entrepreneurs series focuses on startups set up within the last ten years and founders aged 45 or under. 

The Hurun Uth series includes the Under25s, Under30s, Under35s, and Under40s awards, representing the cream of each generation of young entrepreneurs who have founded businesses with a social impact and worth US$1m, US$10m, US$50m, and US$100m, respectively. 

Other lists include the Hurun 500 series, ranking the most valuable companies in the world, China and India, the Hurun Global High Schools List, ranking the world’s best independent high schools, the Hurun Philanthropy List, ranking the biggest philanthropists and the Hurun Art List, ranking the world’s most successful artists alive today. 

Hurun hosts high-profile events across China and India, as well as London, Paris, New York, LA, Toronto, Vancouver, Sydney, Luxembourg, Istanbul, Dubai, and Singapore.

Name: Stiftelsen Expo
Description:
Expo – Vi utmanar rasismen

Expo är en religiöst och partipolitiskt obunden antirasistisk stiftelse. Vår vision är en levande demokrati där rasistiska idéer och organisationer saknar inflytande. Expos syfte är att öka människors kunskap om rasism, och därmed deras förmåga att bemöta den. Det gör vi genom omvärldsbevakning, journalistik och utbildning.

Omvärldsbevakning
Stiftelsen Expo samlar och analyserar information om rasistiska grupper, nätverk och fenomen. Vi har Nordens största arkiv över extremhögerns aktiviteter från andra världskriget fram till idag.

Journalistik
Stiftelsen Expo ger ut tidskriften Expo som kommer med fyra nummer per år. Den innehåller granskande reportage, analys och opinionsbildande material om de rasistiska grupper, nätverk och fenomen som finns i Sverige och internationellt.

Utbildning
Expo föreläser nästan varje dag för organisationer, skolor, myndigheter och företag. Vi finns tillgängliga i digitala kanaler och på plats ute i landet. Våra utbildningar stärker kunskapen om rasismens idévärld, historia och nutida organisering. Vi erbjuder även konkreta verktyg och förhållningssätt för bemötande av rasistiska idéer, konspirationism och desinformation.

Name: Mein Geld Medien GmbH
Description:

Anlegermagazin Mein Geld ist jetzt seit 30 Jahren auf dem deutschen Markt und eins der führenden, konzernunabhängigen Fachmagazine für Führungskräfte und Entscheidungsträger der Finanzindustrie und Versicherungswirtschaft.

Mit praxisorientierten Fachaufsätzen, Interviews, Urteilen und Kurzmeldungen informiert Mein Geld seine Leser und präsentiert ihnen am Markt erfolgreiche Konzepte und Lösungsansätze für das Tagesgeschäft. Zudem werden die neuesten Trends auf dem Finanzmarkt aufgezeigt.

http://www.mein-geld-medien.de/

Mein Geld TV „mehr Fakten, mehr Wissen“

Mein Geld TV führt in Frankfurt am Main exklusive Roundtable Gespräche mit Videoaufzeichnungen durch. Die Zielsetzung dieser Gesprächsrunden ist ein konstruktiver Erfahrungsaustausch mit kritischen Statements aus unterschiedlichen Blickwinkeln.

Mein Geld TV leitet die Roundtables unter dem Motto: „adopt, adapt, improve“. Zu diesen Diskussionen werden ausgewählte Teilnehmer aus Politik, Wissenschaft und der Finanzbranche eingeladen, um eine hohe Austauschintensität und eine fundierte Wissensqualität zu gewährleisten. 

Für die Streuung der Videoaufzeichnung werden Kooperationspartner von Mein Geld wie Lipper, BörseGo, Mein Geld Online, You Tube, Vimeo, My Video, Dailymotion, Facebook, Twitter, Reuters Insider, Fundinfo, GodmodeTrader und diverse passende Foren und Blogs genutzt. 

Mein Geld TV heißt „mehr Fakten, mehr Wissen“.

Name: Being Patient
Description:
Being Patient is an editorially independent news and community platform that aims to create clarity around complex health issues and be a trusted, accurate source of information for the people impacted by a disease.
We build single-subject platforms looking at health topics from the patient’s point of view, starting with Alzheimer's. Through clear and compelling reporting, we examine the latest research and debates on the prevention, treatment and care of a disease. We find out what patients want to know and go straight to the expert community for the answers.

Our founder, Deborah Kan, left her job as Executive Producer at the Wall Street Journal last year to redesign reporting on health after her mother was diagnosed with Alzheimer’s disease. She found that there was no single place she could go, free of any bias, to help her understand the research. She founded Being Patient with one mission –  to provide patients, caregivers and carriers of the Alzheimer’s gene the tools they need to navigate the disease and elevate the patient’s voice into important conversations on healthcare and research.

Our blog presents a blend of self-improvement techniques, backed by scientific research, and practical skills to enhance your life. We’re not just about ideas; we're about action. From insightful articles to engaging challenges that we undertake and share, our journey is about evolving smarter and wiser.

Join Us:

We are on the lookout for passionate individuals to join our dynamic team. Whether you're a content creator, a social media maven, a savvy business analyst, or a video editing wizard, there's a place for you at KindWiseRich. Collaborate with us to create content that resonates, educates, and inspires.

Join KindWiseRich, where kindness meets wisdom and wealth, and be a part of a blog that's set to redefine the digital landscape.

Name: Harvard Undergraduate Law Review
Description:
The Harvard Undergraduate Law Review (HULR) (formerly known as the Harvard College Law Review) is a student-run organization at Harvard College that is dedicated to providing undergraduates with an opportunity to learn about the field of law and the career options it provides.  It aims to educate Harvard undergraduate students interested in pursuing law after college by exposing them to leaders in the field. As the only pre-law publication on campus, it has a wide audience that is eager to participate in world-class discussion of legal issues and to learn from the resources that the publication offers.

In addition to publishing student work, the HULR seeks to promote greater awareness and understanding of opportunities within the field of law by appropriate means such as meetings, seminars, and other educational events. By working with other law-related student organizations on campus, we hope to establish a support infrastructure for pre-law students at Harvard College.

Name: Future Television
Description:
We are a Lebanese owned and operated company founded in 1993. First launched in Lebanon on February 15, 1993, Future Television, although the youngest of the Lebanese stations back then, became the nation’s fastest growing station. Supported by a large capital, advanced technology, wide coverage and an excellent image quality, Future Television triggered competition on all fronts in the Lebanese TV market.
In the beginning of a post-war epoch where people were seeking quality of life, peace, family ties, reconstruction, culture and development, our main targets were to encourage a family audience and to provide a new outlook for the Lebanese youth. For that, Future Television took off with a sweeping reputation for an eccentric funky look, extensive family programming, an Oriental-Western promotional blend and a diversity of public awareness messages; all in all, an optimistic view of the future.

On October 1994, Future Television started a trial satellite broadcasting over the footprint of Arabsat 1D. The testing period lasted two months and left an audience, mostly in the Arab World, asking for more. Shortly after, following the huge success of the initial experiment, we launched Future International on our transponder on Arabsat 2A.

In less than a year, Future International grew to become one of the leading Arab satellite stations gathering the highest audience ratings in the Gulf, Egypt and the Levant. Ever since, Future International has been an 18 hour open window to Lebanon for the Arab world, North Africa, and South Europe. Like Future Television, Future International is a family TV that promotes Lebanon as a place for reconstruction, civilization, prosperity, coexistence, fun and good times.

Since the very beginning, we have successfully maintained two important characteristics of Future Television: (1) preservation of our Lebanese identity and (2) quality production rather than easy-to-market production.

Vom Frankfurter Parkett berichten täglich die Börsen-Profis Katja Dofel, Sabrina Marggraf, Corinna Wohlfeil, Susanne Althoff sowie Frank Meyer. Dazu schaltet n-tv täglich live nach New York an die Wall Street zu den Börsenkorrespondenten Markus Koch, Jens Korte und Sophie Schmiansky.

Name: AWJ Studios l أَوْج
Description:
In the heart of Saudi Arabia, a group of passionate storytellers came together with a shared mission: to create video content that celebrates the region's rich cultural heritage and promotes sustainability. They knew they needed a name that captured the essence of their vision - something that conveyed their commitment to reaching new heights and pushing the boundaries of what was possible.

As they searched for inspiration, they were drawn to the Arabic word "AWJ" - a term that connotes the highest point, the peak of achievement, and the culmination of one's efforts. It was the perfect embodiment of their values: a reminder that they were striving for excellence in everything they did, and that they were committed to creating work that would endure for generations to come.

With the name AWJ Studio in hand, they set to work. Drawing on their deep knowledge of the region and their love of storytelling, they began creating videos that celebrated the natural beauty of Saudi Arabia, explored the complexities of its history, and showcased the vibrant diversity of its people.

And as they worked, they kept the meaning of their name at the forefront of their minds. Every video was a testament to their commitment to reaching new heights, to pushing themselves to be the best they could be, and to sharing their love of Saudi Arabia and its culture with the world.

Today, AWJ Studio is known throughout the Middle East as a leader in sustainable video content creation. Their work has won numerous awards and has been praised for its creativity, authenticity, and passion. And yet, they know that there is always more to be done - more stories to tell, more people to reach, and more heights to scale.

Name: PremiaPão
Description:
A PremiaPão é uma Empresa especializada na comercialização de Publicidade em Sacos de Pão, divulgando marcas e produtos diretamente ao público-alvo; sem desperdícios, de forma inovadora e impactante, porém, com diferenciais que revolucionaram o mercado e tem levado todo franqueado PremiaPão ao sucesso.

Fundada por 3 jovens empreendedores, com o apoio de um dos maiores grupos de franchising do Brasil, a PremiaPão nasceu com o intuito de criar um produto de mídia inovador que gerasse desejo no consumidor impactado. O objeto de premiação torna-se o atrativo para um maior engajamento do consumidor com as marcas divulgadas, gerando um resultado bastante significativo para o anunciante, comparado a outras mídias convencionais.

Além disso, a empresa decidiu assumir uma grande responsabilidade com o meio ambiente. Seu produto de eco-mídia promove o combate ao desperdício e poluição de sacos plásticos e outros materiais de mídia não biodegradáveis. Ainda mais, o maior compromisso com a sustentabilidade vem com a iniciativa de plantar uma árvore nativa para cada produção fornecida aos seus franqueados.

Este sim é um modelo de negócio sustentável em todos os aspectos, pois capacita e beneficia o franqueado, seus anunciantes, o cliente final e a natureza.

we are a talented group of people with a passion for building brands with far-ranging expertise stretching beyond what you might be accustomed to at other agencies. Name: Meduza
Description:
Meduza (meduza.io) is a public interest media organization founded in Latvia in 2014 by a group of journalists who left Russia to escape political censorship. In exile, outlawed in Russia and under constant pressure, Meduza became the largest independent Russian news outlet with almost 20 million monthly readers. Since the imposition of war censorship and the increased internal repressions that followed the country’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine, Meduza stood by its readers inside Russia and became an important civic institution. 

Meduza produces articles, investigations, news stories, explainers, podcasts and videos, covering a wide spectrum of topics in its reporting. We broadcast from every available platform, and efficiently bypass Russian internet censorship. Importantly, we continue to report from the ground, working with a network of freelancers inside the country.

For more than a century, we have published magazines and weeklies contributing to a diverse and quality-based media landscape. And given our users, young as well old, great content to reflect on, be absorbed into and enjoy.

We constantly develop our hundreds of magazine titles together with our digital media, such as podcasts, lifestyle sites and digital services, with new technology and exceptional content that bring people together and inspire them to live a good life.  

Through our e-commerce companies, focused on niche areas such as parenting, beauty, kitchen and outdoor, we help our audiences live out their hobbies and passions. As category experts, our e-commerce businesses create strong communities by building own brands and telling stories in a world with strong competition.  

Finally, our marketing service agencies are specialized in connecting brands and consumers in an increasingly digital world. With a clear creative and content-based agenda on top of tech and data, our agencies help other companies tell stories and build their brands.  

Story House Egmont is a part of the Nordic media company Egmont, together with companies like Nordisk Film, TV 2 in Norway and Egmont Books. 

All of Egmont is a foundation with a dual purpose: We develop media and support vulnerable children and young people. All profit is reinvested in our companies and donated to charitable initiatives helping children and young people to an education  and a good life. 

We bring stories to life

- Le brand content pour renforcer l’image et incarner vos valeurs

Cette structuration permet de répondre à des enjeux variés – notoriété, engagement, performance commerciale ou collecte de data – grâce à des dispositifs interactifs, immersifs et mesurables. 
Nous mobilisons nos propres équipes techniques et notre méthode en six étapes (stratégie, conception, incarnation, production, diffusion, amplification) pour garantir un accompagnement complet, de l’idée initiale jusqu’à la valorisation post-événement.

Silicon Leaders is a platform built on leadership and entrepreneurship. It started in 2006. A single room with four staff on a quiet industrial park. The idea: to make a simple white background video of a laptop case and upload it onto a small UK retail website, showcasing the product. Since then a few things have changed.

We’ve grown in size and scope and our journey so far has been remarkable.

We are now a global creative and technology company, specialising in the creation, production and injection of original ideas and campaigns. We’ve moved and expanded to over 50,000 sq. ft. of creative studio space, making everything from simple social images through to epic scale TV commercials. We shoot around the world. We produce photo-realistic CG and spectacular animations. We design and implement AR experiences and interactive players for a global retail network, tracking and analysing metrics on services like Where to Buy. These are a few of our constantly growing services and as you read this, we’ve probably added a few more since.

We work with the biggest brands in the world and ingrained in our DNA is to never stand still, always innovating and working relentlessly to build on our original foundation and to give our clients class-leading production and technology solutions.

From humble beginnings to award-winning productions,

We are iSite.

Description:

We uplift Indigenous voices and demonstrate Indigenous joy in the face of oppression. We celebrate the beauty and strength in our communities, which so many other outlets do not, simply because they do not know it exists. We help to open the eyes of our readers, who are forward thinking, open-minded supporters of Indigenous people and communities, as well as members of Indigenous communities.

IndigiNews was created through a partnership between Aboriginal Peoples Television Network (APTN) and The Discourse. The goal of this partnership is two-fold: first, to provide journalism that serves and is driven by what local communities say they want. Second, to experiment with new business models for digital local news that contribute to the long-term sustainability of independent Indigenous news in Canada.

Name: ROSE stories
Description:
Je kent ROSE stories wellicht van het kookboek Melk en Dadels – 100 geheime recepten van Marokkaanse moeders, bekroond met De Gouden Garde bij de Kookboek van het Jaar-verkiezing 2014. Met Melk en Dadels ging een diep gekoesterde wens van ROSE stories-oprichters Chafina en Rachida in vervulling: een ode aan alle Marokkaanse mama’s brengen en de Marokkaanse culinaire tradities vastleggen en delen. 

Melk en Dadels is daarmee het schoolvoorbeeld van de projecten van ROSE. ROSE stories is een plek waar verhalen uit verschillende culturen een vorm vinden. Een vorm die heel concreet is: produceerbaar en verkoopbaar. En minstens zo belangrijk: die bijdraagt aan een maatschappij waar gelijkheid en diversiteit voorop staan.  

We geloven bij ROSE stories in de kracht van het verhaal, voor het teweegbrengen van positieve verandering ter bevordering van gelijkheid en diversiteit in de samenleving. Door de verhalen om te zetten in concrete projecten hebben ze impact op en in alle lagen van de maatschappij. Dat doen we op onze eigen manier: pragmatisch, effectief en liefdevol. Maar ook met gezond verstand, Hollandse nuchterheid en vereende krachten. Per verhaal kijken we naar de meest effectieve manier om het de wereld in te helpen. Kwaliteit en relevantie zijn hierbij sleutelwoorden. 

Het omzetten van deze verhalen naar diensten en producten is vaak ook een kunst: het vraagt om creativiteit, ondernemingslust en een vleugje humor. ROSE helpt hierbij door de verhalenvertellers zakelijk te begeleiden, nieuwe onverwachte visies en inzichten te bieden en door mensen te verbinden. 

Meer informatie over ROSE stories, de makers en huidige projecten vind je op onze website www.rosestories.nl.

Name: Verband Deutscher Tonmeister e.V.
Description:
The association of sound engineers in Germany (VDT e.V.) has existed for 70 years. Today, we connect  2100 members, which makes us one of the oldest and also largest professional organisations in the audio industry.
At its inception, almost all members were highly specialised, academically trained tonmeisters with a strong focus on classical instrumental and vocal music in recording and broadcast. Matching the rapid development pace of the audio industry, today our membership comes from a wide range of backgrounds, from self-taught practitioners over vocationally trained event audio specialists to bachelors, masters and ph.ds in audio engineering, acoustics and related fields. 
VDT colleagues span all age groups and work in music production, radio, cinema, tv, multimedia and theatre. We are particularly proud to support our many young members currently in vocational training, studying, or starting their professional careers, with a unique networking and knowledge platform.
Many leading equipment manufacturers and research facilities are supporting us as  sustaining members.

The online offerings include the various product and industry portals, e-papers and webcasts. Since 2002 the former GIT Verlag is a company of John Wiley & Sons.

From making skate films on VHS as kids, Brother has developed into a production company based in Peckham, London. With a small core team and a tight network of world-class directors and crew, we pride ourselves on delivering creative work with good people.

We love seeing a concept through from idea generation to the final file upload, but are equally adept at jumping into a project at any stage.

Peckham is a big part of Brother’s DNA, and we started up a local event series, Peckham Filmmakers, to link up local creatives and hero their work.

Our sister company Brother Music is an award-winning music and sound studio, creating bespoke scores and soundscapes for both Brother’s work and a range of other directors, agencies and production companies.

We’re still enthusiastic skater kids at heart, and want that to bleed through into everything we do.

DreamingFish has delivered high quality communications since 2001, and has worked with a wide range of clients including UBS, AXA, Lloyds, the Medical Research Council, Gartner, RSA, Defra, Reward Gateway and Serco. Although our origins are in corporate video, our expertise extends to the full range of moving image including motion graphics, 2D and 3D animation, as well as character animation. We provide a full end-to-end service, from scripting through production to encoding and support with getting your video seen.

DreamingFish provides a highly tailored, flexible and personal service to ensure we meet our clients' requirements. We pride ourselves on our customer service, and always create a great working relationship with each client from the outset. We enjoy a very high level of repeat business and like to think that this is a direct result of our approach - we love what we do! 

Our values are enthusiasm, honesty and inspiration and we set our standards very high! We've been lucky enough to have won eight awards for our work since 2014, and delight in sharing these achievements with our clients.

Na essência do InfectoCast, acreditamos apaixonadamente que o conhecimento é a base para uma prática médica eficaz e segura.
Com isso em mente, nossa equipe se dedica incansavelmente a transformar conceitos muitas vezes complexos em informações claras e objetivas, prontas para serem absorvidas por médicos, enfermeiros, estudantes de medicina e todos os interessados na área da saúde. A gente conta o que ninguém te conta!

Through its content, conferencing and research, the company provides an apt platform for peer-to-peer information sharing and learning. Grey Head, since its inception, has stood firm by its core principles of transparency, independence, unbiased and ethics-based working. The collective and diversified experience of the leadership team has made Grey Head one of the preferred platforms for community engagement programs in enterprise technology and security space.

In April of 2022, Information Security Media Group Corp. (ISMG) announced the acquisition of a majority stake in Grey Head Media Pvt. Ltd., under ISMG Partners – ISMG’s growth unit for acquisitions, investments, and global partnerships. The inclusion of GHM’s CIO business into ISMG’s portfolio of offerings enables ISMG to spearhead a push toward changing the narrative around the CIO’s role in security — often considered to be at odds with cybersecurity goals.

In October of 2022,  ISMG announced the launch of its new global CIO platform: CIO.inc. This platform offers expert insight and thought leadership to meet the needs of today’s global technology and business leaders, covering the “business of enterprise information technology.”

CIO.inc is a part of the ISMG network – currently spanning 35+ global media properties – and leverages ISMG’s 15+ years of proven leadership in building trusted global platforms, brands and communities in cybersecurity and allied domains.

Name: Neal Street Productions Ltd
Description:
Founded in 2003 by Sam Mendes, Pippa Harris and Caro Newling, and joined in 2013 by Nicolas Brown, Neal Street Productions has been at the forefront of quality, distinctive film, theatre and television in the UK showcasing the very best British and international talent.  Successes include the award-winning films Revolutionary Road, Jarhead and Starter For Ten; while the theatre slate includes the first ever transatlantic venture of it’s kind, The Bridge Project, enjoyed by audiences world-wide across six years, and two award-winning new musicals for the West End and Broadway,  Shrek The Musical and Charlie and The Chocolate Factory. Directed by Sam Mendes, the stage adaptation of the children’s classic Charlie and The Chocolate Factory has consistently set new records for weekly attendances at the prestigious Theatre Royal Drury Lane.

Neal Street’s diverse television slate includes the award-winning Stuart A Life Backwards, starring Tom Hardy and Benedict Cumberbatch, and the BAFTA award winning BBC ONE hit drama, Call the Midwife, which regularly attracts over 10 million viewers. Neal Street Productions also co-produces John Logan’s Penny Dreadful, which is currently filming a second series for Showtime in the US and Sky Atlantic in the UK, and the award-winning Shakespeare project The Hollow Crown for BBC and PBS.  Production has just completed on a second cycle of history plays starring Benedict Cumberbatch as Richard III.

Neal Street Productions joined the All3Media Group in March 2015.

Name: New Delhi Print Media Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
NDPM is India's most diversified media group with power brands across publishing, technology, core electronics, photonics and domains. 

It is an integrated business-to-business media company providing authoritative print and online publications, conferences and exhibitions, research, databases and information products to strategic global markets.

The story of NDPM goes back to April, 2010 when the flagship publication – ELE Times – was published as a bi-monthly Magazine. Since then, it has consistently moved up the growth curve by successfully entering new markets and launching new titles. The success of the organization has been guided by a simple thought – treating the Magazine not as a commodity or product but as a Brand, whose prime objective is to serve its readers and advertisers and bring them to a common platform. 

NDPM believes in “Journalism with Techmind”, which thrives on telling it the way it is without fear or favour. We discover out every detail that brings out the how, why, where and what next of the subject. So, our readers can formulate their own stands on electronics/ technology in a bias-free manner.


In the last few years, the group has evolved with its namesake. It has reflected public opinion in electronics world as well as shaped it. It has shared the triumphs as well as tribulations. It has been India’s strongest supporter as well as its harshest critic.

It has delivered electronic India to the world.

Name: WILD EARTH OCEANIA
Description:
Wild Earth Oceania (WEO)) are Australia's Wildlife Film Festival and Movement that recover species from threatened extinction through the power of film to create policy reform, persevere biodiversity, and create large Wildlife Impact Outcomes.

Australia is a mega-biodiverse Nation (one of only 17 mega-biodiverse Nations( that is currently at the bottom rung of the ladder for species extinction in developed Nations. Almost all of our Wildlife occur no where else in the world (89%). These wildlife provide ecosystem services to the tune of 44 trillion dollars. They provide clear air, fertile soil, pollination, pharmaceutical wealth, development needs for children, physical and mental health benefits for all people, oxygen (did you know every second breath you take comes from a whale?), and simply put, we simply cannot survive without them. Moreover they have their own precious right to live. 

As humans, we are responsible for wildlife as custodians, caretakers and stewards. We are also born story tellers. Film informs, inspires, educates ovulates and mobilises millions of people around the world to act and to create the impact and necessary changes that we need to preserve our fragile ecosystems and defenceless and vulnerable wildlife. 

Wild Earth Oceania are 100% focused on impact and on driving the change necessary with NGO's, Indigenous leaders, Grassroots Organisations, and Governments, to bring wildlife to the top rung fo the ladder to ensure their health and continued existence for future generations and to protect this beautiful planet and its inhabitants.

We invite you to join us! Follow, share, like our posts on social media platforms, head to our website for more information and to sign up for monthly updates. WE need every adult and child to care enough to want to help create a better future for all. 

WEO accept between 300 and 1000 film submissions p/a globally. 

Thank you for your support for which we are grateful.

Name: PANA FİLM
Description:
Pana Film 2004 yılında TV dizileri ve sinema filmleri yapmak için kuruldu. Aynı sene Ekmek Teknesi ve Kurtlar Vadisi dizileri ile büyük bir seyirci kitlesine hitap etti. Kurtlar Vadisi dizisi Türk Televizyonlarında rating rekorlarına imza attı. Pana Film, Sharon Stone ve Andy Garcia gibi ünlü Hollywood starlarını bu dizi sayesinde Türk TV izleyicisiyle buluşturdu.

3 Şubat 2006’da Kurtlar Vadisi Irak filmi vizyona girdi. Tüm zamanların en çok izlenen filmi oldu. Birçok ülkede vizyona girdi ve ödüllere layık görüldü. 

Filmin oyuncu kadrosunda Necati Şaşmaz'a Titanic filminin başrol oyuncularından Billy Zane ve Cennetin Krallığı filminin başrol oyuncusu Ghassan Massud’un yanı sıra Garry Busey eşlik etti. 10 Milyon Dolar bütçesiyle o zamana kadarki en büyük bütçeli Türk filmi olarak da tarihe geçti.

2007 yılında Kurtlar Vadisi Terör adıyla dizi yeniden ekranlara döndü. İlk bölümde politik içeriği gündeme bomba gibi düştü. Aynı sene Nisan’da Kurtlar Vadisi Pusu dizisi yayın hayatına başladı. Dizi hala Perşembe günleri kendi gününde ve kendi saatinde rating rekorları kırmaya devam ediyor.

Pana Film, Kurtlar Vadisi’nin yanı sıra yeni dizileri ve sinema filmleri ile izleyicisiyle buluşmaya devam edecek.

Pana Film, kendisine ait Pana Film Stüdyolarında, post production, VFX production ve audio production hizmetlerinde de faaliyet göstermektedir. Bütün projeleri inhouse olarak hazırlar ve izleyicisine sunar. Ayrıca dağıtımını da kendisi üstlenir.
