Description:
Bereits seit April 2006 berichten wir mit unserem Spezial-Interest-Online-Magazinen über Kulinarik, Weinwissen, Wandern und Fahrradfahren.

Dabei steht die touristische Ausrichtung von www.genussfreak.de im Mittelpunkt. Mit unseren beiden weiteren Magazinen www.wanderfreak.de und www.radlfreak.de machen wir Appetit auf aktive und genussvolle Freizeit und Urlaub. 2021 wurde www.wanderfreak.de von einer Jury aus Reisejournalisten, -PR-Mitarbeitern und -bloggern unter die Top-Ten der deutschsprachigen Reiseblogs gewählt.

Aktuell bereiten wir unser Projekt ‚Mit dem Genussradler durch…‘ ein neues Format vor. ‚Mit dem Genussradler durch…‘ bringt #kulinarischerTourismus, #Weintourismus, #Fahrradurlaub und #Wandern unter dem Dach des nachhaltigen Tourismus zusammen.

Name: Postimees Grupp
Description:
Postimees Group is the largest and most influential media group in the Baltic countries. Our operations include producing content for print and internet media, television and radio production, classified portals and offering a printing service.

We are the only group on the Estonian media landscape who has outputs in printed newspapers, online, radio and television.

Name: Denník SME
Description:
SME Daily is one of the most widely read mainstream broadsheet in Slovakia. Their website, Sme.sk, is one of the most visited Internet portals in Slovakia. SME appears 6 times a week. It is issued by Petit Press. The sister newspapers of SME include The Slovak Spectator, Új Szó, Korzár, and various regional My noviny newspapers.

In 2022, Petit Press founded Technology Competence Centre that covers open source projects and offers SaaS (software as a service) for other media houses. Petit Press aims to become a major technology provider in the media industry.

Name: John Marshall Media
Description:
Founded in 1995, John Marshall Media is a multi-Grammy winning, full-service, audio production, digital distribution, and marketing services specializing in audiobooks, podcasts, and audio tours.

With three-decades of real-world experience, John Marshall Media has produced the largest number of audiobooks in the industry, trusted by the world’s largest publishers for its biggest titles.

Name: L4M Studio
Description:
L4M is a 3D visual production studio serving all professionals in architectural, landscaping, and technical design: Architects, Landscape Architects, Developers, Municipalities, Urban Planners...

Our expertise also extends to 3D model creation: discover our 3D shop and do not hesitate to entrust us with the modeling of your plants, characters, and 3D objects.

Name: InsideBusiness
Description:
InsideBusiness er det nye dybdeborende erhvervsmedie til ledere, specialister og erhvervsinteresserede danskere. Vi udkommer hver fredag og tirsdag.  

Bag mediet står de to erfarne journalister og erhvervsredaktører Peter Nyholm og Morten Johnsen. I teamet har vi også en række journalister og redaktører: Christian Carlsen, Michael Müller og Asger Jepsen. På holdet er også Freja Rømer (abonnement og annoncer).
 
Vi udgiver desuden InsideForsikring og InsidePrivateEquity, som redaktørerne Michael Müller og Christian Carlsen er ansvarlig for.

Name: Modern Wall Street
Description:
Modern Wall Street is a premier business news channel headquartered in New York and broadcasting internationally to global clients. 

The channel is the flagship enterprise of independent media company JS3 Multimedia, LLC.,  established by veteran Wall Street reporter James Sweeney III in 2013. 

Modern Wall Street is “Bringing Wall Street To The World” through daily broadcasts from a team of business journalists recruited from around the world.  

Reports are streamed from the JS3 Multimedia studio on Wall Street and premier stock exchanges across New York, including the NYSE, NASDAQ & CME Group/NYMEX.

Name: Adver-Online Group
Description:
Adver-Online Group is het fullservice recruitment mediabureau voor succesvol online recruitment. Met onze labels AdverOnline, AdverStrategy, AdverSourcing en HROffice zijn wij de kennispartner voor al jouw arbeidsmarktcommunicatie- en HR-vraagstukken. Met een unieke mix van employer branding, dashboards, job marketing en hr-software oplossingen helpen wij werkgevers om alles uit hun arbeidsmarktstrategie te halen. Dit doen wij door het inzetten van slimme strategieën, aansprekende campagnes, handige apps en persoonlijke begeleiding van onze arbeidsmarkt experts en dataspecialisten. Ons gebruiksvriendelijke ATS bespaart je tijd en zorgt bovendien voor een optimale candidate experience. 
  
Waarom AdverOnline?
Wij begrijpen de uitdagingen van het aantrekken van topkandidaten in een competitieve arbeidsmarkt. Met meer dan 20 jaar ervaring en bewezen resultaten, helpen wij organisaties om niet alleen zichtbaar te zijn, maar ook daadwerkelijk het juiste talent aan te trekken. Ons doel? Jou ondersteunen bij het versterken van je werkgeversmerk en het realiseren van meetbare resultaten, van strategie tot sollicitatie. Met Adver-Online Group als kennispartner bereik je kandidaten die anderen missen. Wij zijn ISO 27001-gecertificeerd en hebben alle expertise onder één dak.

Onze meest ingezette recruitment oplossingen:
-	Arbeidsmarktcommunicatie Platform
-	Jobmarketing & Jobposting
-	Wervingscampagnes
-	Awareness campagnes
-	Doelgroepanalyse
-	Employer branding
-	Talent sourcing
-	ATS 
-	Workforce management
-	Referral tool
-	Werken-bij website

Name: YourFinance.TV
Description: A finance media and video production company, with insights from finance professionals from around the world. Our YouTube channel gives insights from finance professionals from around the world.

Name: Ministry of Motion
Description:
Create moving image magic for your brand!

We are experts in Motion Graphics, Animation, Video production and Video strategy. Offering production assistance, one-off videos or ongoing video content plans/partnerships and retainers. We've a strong in-house team and a network of specialist contacts, providing a truly bespoke creative service that brings together the best creative minds to suit your project requirements. Ensuring the best results possible and aiming to maximise your return on investment. 

We pride ourselves on our guidance and organisation ability, making sure you are always in the loop with progress and can give you as much steer (or as little) as you wish along the way. Based in Solihull, just south of Birmingham, we offer a personal service to a wide range of clientele.

Name: Boathouse Media
Description:
We're more than a studio; we're the heartbeat of edgy global commercials.

Our passionate, young team defies limits, delivering standout production values.

Our mission? Catapult your brand into the spotlight, captivating the world with content that stirs your soul.

Name: L'Onde Porteuse
Description:
Créée en 2015, L’Onde Porteuse agit pour la pratique et la transmission des savoir-faire dans les domaines de l'audio et de la radio auprès d'un public le plus large possible.
L'Onde Porteuse gère ainsi un Atelier Chantier d’Insertion (ACI), développe un Institut de Formation à destination des radios associatives (IOP) et oeuvre dans le champ de l’Éducation aux Médias et à l’Information (EMI), en organisant des ateliers radios en milieu scolaire, carcéral et hospitalier.  Nous proposons également à des entreprises ou institutions des prestations audio  (podcasts, cartes sonores …) dans le cadre de leur communication.
A partir du 8 janvier 2021,  L'Onde Porteuse commence un nouveau chapitre de son aventure. Le Chantier sera la toute première radio associative adossée à un Atelier Chantier d’Insertion. Elle émettra sur 98MHz sur l’ensemble de l’agglomération clermontoise, sur internet via notre site d’information, et sur toutes les plateformes de podcast. www.lechantier.radio

Name: CNN Collection
Description:
CNN Collection, the content licensing division of CNN, is a premier provider of footage, audio, and stills for film, television, advertising, and institutional production companies. With over 600,000 assets available online and over 4 million assets in the CNN archives, CNN Collection offers a library of unparalleled scope, including politics, entertainment, crime, b-roll, and historic coverage.

As the exclusive source for CNN branded content, CNN Collection proudly features CNN’s world-renowned talent, including Anderson Cooper, Larry King, Dr. Sanjay Gupta, Wolf Blitzer, and a wealth of others. In addition, we have CNN’s award-winning, minute-by-minute coverage from the front lines of history, and content from programs such as Black in America and Planet in Peril.

Visit cnncollection.com to preview our ever-growing digital catalog. Or email licensing@cnn.com to speak with an account executive who, along with our team of expert researchers and editors, will help find the right clips and deliver them in your preferred format – on time and within budget. 

If it's newsworthy, CNN Collection has it.

Name: 247PLUS
Description:
247PLUS is a full-service production company dedicated to the power of image. We operate globally in motion, stills, and events, serving clients that encompass fashion and luxury brands, creative agencies, filmmakers, and photographers. Our creative approach and meticulous attention to detail consistently guarantees work of the highest standards and technical expertise.

With a strategic presence in key creative hubs across Europe, South America, and the United States, we maintain a close alignment with our global partners. This ensures our ability to deliver nuanced and standardized services anywhere in the world, meeting the diverse needs of our clientele.

Name: KOOPERATIVE BERLIN
Description: Wir bewegen uns in den Feldern der politischen und kulturellen Bildung, im Journalismus und setzen Events um, die on- und offline zusammenführen. Unser über 35-köpfiges Team setzt Diskurse und bildet Debatten multimedial ab. Wir produzieren zielgruppenspezifische Medienformate und kreieren Begegnungen und Ausstellungen mit innovativen Formaten und Aktionen, die gesellschaftlich relevante Themen verhandeln.

Name: BorrowLenses
Description:
BorrowLenses is the Internet's premiere destination for photographic and video equipment rental. Founded in San Mateo, California, the site has been providing professional and amateur photographers and videographers with the opportunity to rent the latest cameras, lenses, lights, and more for a fraction of the purchase price since 2007. Rent, shoot, return - it's as easy as that. BorrowLenses will ship directly to your doorstep or offsite location, or you can choose to pick up in one of their sites or in 4,000 plus UPS stores.  

The BorrowLenses team are expert photographers and videographers who make sure that all the gear that goes out is tested, cleaned and ready for your next shoot. The customer service agents are happy to answer any of your questions about the equipment.

BorrowLenses was acquired by Shutterfly in 2013. They maintain two regional headquarters on the East and West coasts.

Name: Campus Rec Magazine
Description:
Welcome to Campus Rec Magazine. 

As the premier business resource for college and university recreation centers, Campus Rec’s platforms are the ideal way to connect with the most prestigious and influential minds in the fitness industry. 

In coordination with our mission to educate and empower college and university recreation center decision makers, it is also our purpose to ensure that these leaders are equipped with the best possible services and products to outfit their facilities.

Name: American Dream Media and Tech (ADTV)
Description: The American Dream is an Emmy-nominated national TV show, featuring top-producing real estate professionals in the industry who serve as the authentic voice for their market. The show uses positive media about local neighborhoods to educate, empower, and engage viewers with content that highlights lifestyle and culture of communities across the country, from charming small towns to innovative urban cities. Each episode explores distinctive points of interest to visit, and inspires the audience to achieve their own American dream.

Name: Ark Media Group
Description:
Since 2009 we’ve been a video marketing agency dedicated to creating stunning, high-quality video content. From captivating animation, dynamic TV adverts through to social video content – we can do it all.

Every single member of our fantastic team is first and foremost an expert in video production and has worked in hands-on roles across a variety of sectors including TV, film, corporate video and social media.

We use our creativity and video expertise to make your brand stand out from the crowd

Name: Hauptstadt
Description: Die «Hauptstadt» berichtet über die Stadt und die Agglomeration Bern mit ihren 400 000 Einwohner*innen. Neben einem Newsletter, der den Leser*innen das Sortieren der lokalen Nachrichten erleichtert, sind Recherchen, Reportagen und Kolumnen die publizistischen Kernelemente. Die «Hauptstadt» ist werbefrei und verzichtet auf Klick-Journalismus. Wir werden täglich präsent sein, versprechen aber nicht eine bestimmte Anzahl Artikel pro Tag. Der Grund: Wir wollen kurze Kolumnen und lange Recherchen anbieten. Wofür wir aber einstehen, ist engagierter, vielfältiger und hartnäckiger Journalismus, der im Dialog mit Leserinnen und Lesern entwickelt wird.

Name: Semerkand Şirketler Grubu
Description:
Semerkand Şirketler Grubu, 1997 yılında İstanbul Maltepe’de kurulan Semerkand Basım Yayın Dağıtım San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. ile yayın yolculuğuna başladı. 

1999 yılında aylık tasavvufi dergi olarak yayımlanmaya başlayan Semerkand Dergisi, daha ilk sayısında ikinci baskısını yaparak altmış bin tiraja ulaştı. Bu başarının temellendiği ilkeli yayıncılık anlayışı kısa sürede yeni kurumlar, dergiler, eserler, radyo ve televizyon kanallarına hayat verdi.

Semerkand Şirketler Grubu, Türkiye’de kendi alanlarında en çok okunan Semerkand, Mostar, Semerkand Aile, Genç Okur ve Semerkand Çocuk dergileri; Semerkand Radyo ve Türkiye’nin ilk HD altyapılı televizyon kanalı olan Semerkand TV ile medya sektörünün önde gelen kurumlarından biri haline gelmeyi başardı. 

Bugün Semerkand, yedi şirket ve iki yüzden fazla temsilcilik üzerinden ulusal ve uluslararası piyasalarda faaliyet gösteren ve yaygın dağıtım ağı sayesinde dünyanın 24 ülkesine eserlerini ulaştıran bir şirketler grubudur.

Name: JOAN Studios
Description:
Obsessed with making cool things.
Independent. 
Female Founded. 
Diversity forward. 
Sustainability Champions.

Name: Wise Society
Description:
Wise Society è una piattaforma multimediale internazionale che raccoglie progetti virtuosi, best practice di aziende, testimonianze di imprenditori, ricercatori, professori, medici, creativi impegnati nel promuovere nuovi stili di vita e un nuovo modo di fare impresa più attento al benessere dell’individuo e all’ambiente.
Vivere “Wise” significa credere nella mobilità dolce, in un’alimentazione equilibrata, nel rispetto per l’ambiente, in una più attenta gestione delle risorse, nella ricerca di energie pulite, in un’edilizia sempre più impegnata nella rigenerazione urbana, in un benessere diffuso per costruire un futuro etico e sostenibile.

Vogliamo parlare di fatti concreti, di persone che cercano di cambiare il mondo con le proprie scelte professionali e di vita, promuovendo un’informazione costruttiva idonea a favorire un approccio positivo alla realtà.
Agire nel presente per un domani più giusto e sostenibile è una necessità sentita da molti di noi per dare un contributo concreto allo sviluppo della società e dell’economia, con una più equa redistribuzione delle risorse e nel rispetto dell’ambiente.
Per questo abbiamo realizzato una piattaforma editoriale strategica e dei servizi di comunicazione multimediali pensati per valorizzare idee e risorse proiettate verso un futuro migliore.
Uno strumento adatto a dar voce a una Wise Community che possa svolgere un ruolo di traino nella società civile e che sia punto di riferimento, di diffusione e di condivisione dei temi legati alla sostenibilità.

Name: The European
Description:
The European is a quarterly business publication, published by CP Media Global in London. It is available in hard copy, digital format and is accessible at various trade fairs around the world.

You can subscribe to the digital version here for free: www.the-european.eu/subscribe

At its core, it is intended for decision makers around the globe, through a global distribution network in EMEA, LATAM, North America and Asia. It covers a broad spectrum of business affairs globally, including Energy, Banking and Finance, Foreign Direct Investment (FDI), Shipping, Aviation, Executive Education, Technology, Lifestyle and Business Travel.

The European takes its readers on a thought provoking and objective tour of business, political, geopolitical and cultural initiatives. Readers are provided with the key to success, portraits of achievement, expert advice and the analysis they need to make sense of the changes that are occurring within the world’s economic and political landscape. The publication has a syndicated news partnership with Thomson Reuters.

The European gathers its news and opinion from leading sources and looks to contributing authors to share their experience in providing cutting-edge thought leadership and commentary at the most senior level. C-Suite executives and directors of many of the world’s leading companies comprise the primary audience for The European. It is thanks to this readership that the publication is so valued among the investment community. For several years, The European organises the Global Business, Banking Finance Awards, which rewards excellence in the global business community. The extensive promotion around the awards programme offers increased visibility through our extensive media channels.

More information can be found on: www.the-european.eu/the-european-awards

For more information on CP Media Global Ltd and its various products please visit www.cpmediaglobal.com

Name: LRI
Description:
Based in London, we are an independent live events, video and digital production company.

Established in 1990, our team offers creative and innovative broadcasting and event production expertise incorporating unparalleled technical, design and logistics services.

Our job is to tell your story. We work with companies who are looking for expert event and video production services, who don’t have the time or resources to do this internally and who want to have assurance and support from production specialists.

Our approach is to work as part of your team, to develop a creative production strategy and a shared vision for your project. Always working within the parameters of your budget to create the optimum production and maximum return on your investment

We deliver originality and creativity with our focused and agile core team where innovation and a commitment to excellence are a given. Originality, fast turnaround, attention to detail and a bespoke service come as standard.

All our productions – whether live, on video or on the web – benefit from our passion for delivering exciting stories creatively packaged for the benefit of your target audience.

www.lri.agency

Name: Fight Record
Description: Fight Record is a trusted media partner of ONE Championship and RWS Muay Thai. Providing Muay Thai news, stats, insights, videos and more.

Name: Cloud Wars
Description: Customer-centric analysis about business technology, the digital economy, and where the world’s headed.

Name: The Den Editorial
Description: Our diverse group of talented Editors create award-winning tv commercials, music videos, documentaries and other content.

Name: Little Shadow
Description:
A hybrid between Graphics and Visual Effects. 

Our passion and strength lie in the design, creation & blending of bespoke graphics with visual effects and animation.

As a team we have been crafting visuals for industry leaders for over two decades. Based in London - as a small team we are agile and responsive to the ebb and flow of our industry, with a keen eye to pipeline and process. We continue to keep at the forefront of technological change. We pride ourselves on communication and transparency with our clients throughout the production process and see the only way to successful completion is that our work is a collaboration.

Name: Chief Women Leaders
Description:
Chief Women Leaders is a unique digital PR media platform that showcases outstanding women leaders and their business journeys in the most engaging way. 

About Us:
Chief Women Leaders is an exclusive digital PR magazine that showcases several eminent women in leadership roles across business sectors worldwide. This media interface offers unique coverage about outstanding women leading big corporations and business enterprises through their passion for making a difference in the industry. Chief Women Leaders is on the forefront of highlighting the women who have been instrumental in driving change revolution ahead.

With over 200,000 subscribers to our digital magazines and an exclusive audience of 50,000+ C-suite executives receiving our print copies, the platform showcases the significant stories of women leaders who have been making significant progress in several leadership positions across the leading business sectors. The approach reflects on the challenges faced, the strategies adopted and how they are steering the organizations towards definite victories.

Rising through their meritorious capabilities, women have taken on leadership roles with responsibility, carefully mitigating risks and countering challenges through their wit, dedication, and resilience. 

Guiding the teams with their exceptional leadership acumen, the women leaders have played key roles in driving the organizational success by smartly addressing the client requirements and bridging them with the organizational offerings. Their visionary approach helped in building new business associations and strengthening the existing ones further.

Offering a professional treat of publishing numerous impactful women leaders from different industrial sectors, Chief Women Leaders is a one-of-its-kind media resource which offers global exposure to women leaders and offers a treasure of wisdom to motivate scores of aspiring women worldwide.

Name: Femme Fatale Studio
Description:
Femme Fatale Studio is a creative studio specialising in immersive, interactive and audiovisual experiences for cultural and entertainment fields.

http://www.femmefatale.paris

Name: Binformedia
Description: Binformedia is een multimediaplatform voor transformatie op elk vlak van de samenleving. Wij leggen de nadruk op wat er in de wereld wél werkt. We hebben een positief beeld van de toekomst en stimuleren mensen in hun creatieve vermogens iets moois bij te dragen aan een humane samenleving. Wij zijn er voor het volk en het MKB!

Description:
Mastiff er et av Norges største TV-produksjonsselskaper. 
Vi produserer programmer i alle sjangre for alle fjernsynskanaler i Norge; dokumentarserier, forbrukermagasiner, realityserier og store underholdningsformater. 

Mastiff er en del av Banijay, med hovedkontor i Paris. 
Vår visjon er å ha de mest fornøyde kundene, levere høy kvalitet og ha det gøy på jobben.

Name: Tafleem.uae
Description:
At Tafleem, we empower clients through innovative, high-quality creative solutions that resonate culturally and socially. We're committed to setting new industry standards while prioritizing sustainability and community impact.
Our vision is to redefine the creative industry by shaping storytelling and crafting experiences. We aim to be a beacon of innovation, inclusivity, and sustainability, making a lasting impact on society.

Name: Rapidmooc
Description:
Rapidmooc is a plug & play self-serve video booth that lets anyone make professional quality videos in minutes! 

Create educational content for MOOCs, e-learning courses, tutorials, expert interviews, and blended learning content. 

The user-friendly video studio allows you to record a presentation without technical assistance and delivers a ready-to-use video requiring zero post-production.

Over 500 businesses, universities, and schools are using the Rapidmooc, including University of Oxford, L'Oréal, Sorbonne University Paris, Allianz, EDF Energy, Lloyds Bank, Diptyque Paris, Safran and many others.

Name: BLACK AND WHITE MEDIA OMAN
Description: Everyone has a story. Read in it Black & White.

Name: Production Service Network
Description:
We are local experts at delivering quality content creation for commercial, entertainment and digital media production worldwide.  Contact us for a quote and we plug you into our Production Service Network of more than 50 countries for free(!) to find the optimal choice for your shoot.

We have one partner in each country / territory because each is carefully vetted and fully capable to provide for your needs locally. We are your one-stop shop for:

scouting & permitting
casting & buyouts
english-speaking crew
local directors, DoPs & photographers
equipment
art & construction
studios
post-production

And more led by production management coordinating logistics, meals, accommodations and all else you can (and can’t) imagine so you can focus on your creative.

We work productions big and small with clients from around the world. We are committed to locally competitive rates, transparent cost-control and compliance with industry standards for all production-related insurance coverage. 

All that served up with hospitality and a smile that keeps our clients coming back for more.

Name: GIG creative film production
Description:
Goed verhaal.

Beloofd. Met strategie en storytelling als startpunt, zodat niet alleen je oma en de lokale volleybalclub je verhaal kennen. Versterkt door co-creatie, omdat jij als merk kenner weet wat werkt. Samen raken we de doelgroep in het hart. Versterken je merk. Maken het verschil in de details. Zodat je niet alleen gezien, maar ook begrepen wordt. De ene keer met mooie complexiteit, de andere keer vernuft simpel. Waarbij anderen tegen jou zeggen: goed verhaal.

Name: Africa Media Festival
Description: Africa Media Festival is a bold, Pan-African gathering of creatives, media professionals, and innovators from across the continent. This is where stories come to life, ideas are challenged, and the future of media is reimagined. We’re building a community-first space for real conversations, learning, and collaboration, with a focus on creativity, experimentation, and pushing boundaries. Whether you’re a storyteller, entrepreneur, or changemaker, this is the place to connect, grow, and be part of Africa’s next media frontier.

Name: ICP
Description:
ICP (I Care Producties) is a media production company in Amsterdam. We are producing and creating concepts in the areas of television, internet, film, special events and promotional campaigns. We are working for broadcasters, commercial and non-profit organizations. The mission statement of ICP is 'creating impact'. We want to create and produce concepts that makes people feel good and help them in their own lifes. 

ICP has a young team with a lot of energy. Around 50 people are working at daily basis very hard on all our projects. This all from our beautiful really open office in the north of Amsterdam, laying almost in a marina.

ICP is founded by very famous tv-host and journalist Ria Bremer and tv-producer Joop van den Ende in 1998. Since 2002 IDTV is partly shareholder from I Care Producties and is established an intensive cooperation. During the years a lot of content, events, tv-productions are made by ICP. In 2008 ICP received an Emmy Award nomination.

Name: DTM
Description:
Qatar's premier media production house. Founded in 2003, Company had produced a great number of TV commercials and corporate videos for various international and local clients in Qatar, as well as the dynamic and interesting Websites, CD-ROMs and Touch screen installations. 

DTM's most famous product is "Explore Qatar" series, which is in 2011 expanded to include recruitment video "Explore Qatar - Lifestyle For All", and the Business promotion video "Explore Qatar - Global Business Hub".

DTM is a part of Qatar Expo Group of Companies

Description: Business News Dalarna är den bästa nyhetssajten för näringslivsnyheter om Dalarna. Vi skriver om entreprenörerna, satsningarna, samhällsutvecklingen och utmaningarna.

Name: Aftermedia I Créations audiovisuelles
Description:
CREATION AUDIOVISUELLE             

Aftermedia est une société de création audiovisuelle implantée en Suisse et en France.
Producteurs de contenus pour la télévision, le web et les réseaux sociaux, nous n’avons de cesse de donner du sens à nos images avec une idée forte : partager les valeurs qui nous animent, l’authenticité, l’humanité et l’exigence. 

#BRANDS  #STORIES

Fondé en 2002, Aftermedia Europe est un groupe indépendant composé de deux filiales, Aftermedia Suisse & Aftermedia France, qui comptent plus de 25 collaborateurs internes et externes organisés en réseau de compétences en France comme en Suisse.


Parce que vos projets méritent la plus grande attention tout au long du processus de production, Aftermedia s’associe à vos exigences grâce à son réseau de compétences pour donner du sens à vos contenus et pour vous accompagner dans vos stratégies de communication et de diffusion.

Name: NZ Marketing magazine
Description: NZ Marketing Magazine provides essential marketing intelligence. It is New Zealand's only publication targeted specifically to marketing oriented executives and is required reading for marketers in this country. Its highly practical editorial stance and in-depth examination of the latest marketing trends has earned the magazine a reputation for contributing to the lifting of marketing standards in New Zealand.

Name: Groupe Réalisation Ciné TV
Description: Groupe Réalisation Ciné TV est une maison de services en communication visuelle qui est spécialisée dans la production vidéo. Que ce soit un film d’entreprise, des capsules promotionnelles ou explicatives pour les réseaux sociaux, un message ou témoignage à livrer ou un document de formation en santé-sécurité au travail,  nous pilotons ces projets avec la plus grande rigueur et avec une équipe du tonnerre. Dans le respect du budget de nos clients, nous proposons des projets clé en main allant de l’écriture du scénario, à la sélection des comédiens/narrateurs, les lieux de tournage, l’équipe de tournage appropriée (réalisateurs, caméramans, éclairagistes, direction photo, direction artistique, maquilleur, styliste, monteurs, concepteurs 3D, etc.) et le montage. Name: Home en Trends magazine
Description:
Home & Trends magazine. Gratis te verkrijgen bij de betere handelszaken, grootwarenhuizen, horecazaken, golfclubs, tennisclubs, wachtzalen van vrije beroepen, benzinestations, strandbars en zo veel meer. Dit op meer dan 3000 locaties in Oost- en West Vlaanderen.

Wie zijn wij?
Voor ons, Claudia Byl & Alexandre Villa, begon het hoofdstuk van Home & Trends officieel in 2014. Dat hoofdstuk heeft ondertussen alles bijeen nu al het volume van verschillende magazines gekregen. Met maandelijkse frequentie waarin zowel vastgoed, woning- als tuintrends aan bod komen. Daarmee is Home & Trends veruit het snelst groeiende magazine in deze sectoren.

Wat beogen wij met Home & Trends?
Home & Trends is de invulling van een project dat wij reeds lang koesterden. Onze knowhow hebben wij uit vele jaren ervaring, ook in de media. Het spreekt voor zich dat wij niet alles eigenhandig uitvoeren. Voor elk onderdeel – van concept en redactie tot marketing en distributie - maken wij gebruik van zeer bekwame medewerkers die bovendien – net als wij – behept zijn met een passie voor deze boeiende opdracht. 

Wat is de toegevoegde waarde?
Deze passie doet ons niet opteren voor kortzichtig geldgewin, maar voor investering van de opbrengsten in de verdere uitbouw van Home & Trends. Zo kunnen we blijven vasthouden aan de kwaliteit van een betalend magazine met de sterkte van een gratis magazine. Daarom dwepen wij ook met de regels van de geleidelijkheid. De luxueuze print van Home & Trends is verkrijgbaar in Oost- en West-Vlaanderen.

Name: Rundblick Niedersachsen
Description:
Das Politikjournal RUNDBLICK informiert seine Leserinnen und Leser seit 1964 über die wichtigsten Entwicklungen in Niedersachsen. Von Beginn an ist das Politikjournal RUNDBLICK ein Produkt der Drei Quellen-Mediengruppe GmbH (früher: Drei Quellen Verlag) mit Sitz in Hannover.

Mit seiner vierköpfigen Redaktion im Herzen der Landeshauptstadt Hannover berichtet das Politikjournal RUNDBLICK direkt aus dem niedersächsischen Landtag, seinen Ausschüssen und über die landespolitischen Zusammenhänge drumherum. Die Hintergründe der niedersächsischen Landespolitik sowie ihrer Querverbindungen zu den Kommunen, der Bundes- und der EU-Ebene werden durch hervorragende Kontakte und eine besondere Stellung innerhalb der Landespressekonferenz intensiv ausgeleuchtet. 

Das Politikjournal RUNDBLICK vernetzt Entscheidungsträger aus Politik und Verwaltung, Parteien und Verbänden sowie der Wirtschaft. Seine Inhalte transportiert das Politikjournal RUNDBLICK über den wochentäglich erscheinenden PDF-Newsletter; ein umfassendes Online-Angebot inklusive des RUNDBLICK-Archivs mit mehr als 20.000 Beiträgen sowie extra angelegten Dossiers, die bestimmte Themenschwerpunkte gesondert aufarbeiten; den kostenlosen Sonntags-Newsletter mit den wichtigsten Meldungen und Hintergrundartikeln der Woche; sowie zahlreichen Podcast, Audio- und Videobeiträgen.

Description:
Inspired by the AM airwaves and big farm trucks of Southwest Iowa. 

AutoVision News Radio centers on future vehicle technology, including next-generation ADAS innovations, electrification, and software-defined cars.

As we stand in the middle of what will be deemed one of the most significant eras in automotive, Carl Anthony amplifies the minds and voices behind this historic transformation while coming to terms with middle age, father loss, and what it means to be successful in Detroit.

AV Radio is available on all major podcast platforms. 

About the Podcaster: 

Based in the Motor City, Carl Anthony is the Automotive Segment Lead at How-to-Geek and the host of AV Radio.

A broadcaster by nature, he has appeared on popular podcasts and radio shows, including Wrench Nation, Cars Yeah, The Car Doctor, and Digital PR Explained. Carl’s appearances on MotorMouth Radio (WHPC 90.3 FM) over the last decade have made him a trusted voice among car enthusiasts, while his hosting of the AutoSens Insights series serves as a resource for the ADAS engineering community.  

Carl is a member of the Automotive Women's Alliance Foundation and a supporter of its mission to empower women in the automotive and mobility sectors. Additionally, he serves on the Advisory Board for Reuters Automotive USA, North America's premier automotive executive summit, where he moderates panels with influential leaders and innovators.

Prior roles include serving as a new vehicle launch and dealer trainer for Ford, Honda, Mercedes-Benz, and Volvo. Carl was a senior product specialist on Chevy's National Truck Team and a member of the FCA (now Stellantis) national auto show team, where he served as the resident expert for consumers on the Dodge Charger and Challenger. 

Before the auto industry, Carl was a disc jockey, producer, and programmer at several popular Midwest radio stations, including KIWR, KEZO, KJAN, and KELO-FM.

Name: Türkiye Gazetesi
Description:
Yayın hayatına 22 Nisan 1970 tarihinde başlayan Türkiye Gazetesi, kuruluşundan bugüne sahibi ve yayın politikası değişmemiş tek ulusal gazete olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. 

Türkiye Gazetesi, içeriğin yanı sıra güçlü bir teknik ve dağıtım altyapısına da sahiptir. İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Trabzon ve Antalya’da baskı tesisleri bulunan Türkiye Gazetesi’nin sadece İstanbul tesisinin kapasitesi saatte 55,000 adet gazetedir. Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Trabzon ve Antalya’da bulunan baskı tesisleri sayesinde, yerel haberlerle desteklenen sayfalar üreterek her bölgenin gündemine hitap edilmektedir. 

İhlas Gazetecilik A.Ş. bünyesindeki matbaa işletmeleri ile yayın yönetiminin entegrasyonunu güçlendiren yeni yapı, ulusal ve yerel gazetelere, yayınevlerine ve reklam ajanslarına verilen baskı hizmetinin daha nitelikli hale gelmesini sağlamıştır.

Şirket dinamiklerini çok daha aktif hale getiren bu yeni yönetim modeli, grafik tasarımdan baskıya kadar komple baskı çözümleri sunma imkanı sağlamıştır. Ulusal ve yerel gazetelerin yanında birçok dergi, insert, broşür ve kitabın baskıları da baskı tesislerinde yapılmaktadır.

Name: MONDO MEDIA PRODUCTION
Description:
Mondo Media Production is a full service production and post-production company based in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
Our goal is to help you reach your goals, the quality you demand, the service you expect, a price you can afford and the results you need.
Our experience spans many industries including lifestyle, entertainment, fashion, travel, hospitality, consumer goods, sports and technology.

Name: The Mindset Economy Podcast
Description:
The Mindset Economy Podcast: How will we work, live, and belong in a more uncertain world, where machines can think?

As quantitative work - routine, low cognitive work - is automated, Human Advantage will come from qualitative work - creativity, judgement, social intelligence etc. This show explores the changes taking place; how leaders will respond to creation of the new economy being ushered in by the mass adoption of AI, and how we can accelerate Human Advantage. 

The Mindset Economy features a broad diversity of voices: from leaders at the edge of this transformation to performance scientists and AI thinkers and social philosophers.

Name: SaaS Club - Le Podcast
Description:
Deux fois par mois, un entrepreneur te partage son histoire et ses conseils pour créer, gérer et scaler une startup SaaS.

Avec un casting d'invités varié : startups early stage, scale up, bootstrapped, VC backed, serial entrepreneurs, first time founders.

Mais c'est pas tout...

SaaS Club c'est aussi des hors-séries avec des "Ops" sur des thématiques métiers (Growth, Sales, Marketing, Product...).

A la clé :
 des retours d'expérience sans filtre
 des conseils actionnables
 des ressources en or
 et une bonne dose d'inspiration

Le meilleur moyen de prendre un raccourci avec "ceux qui l'ont fait".

Name: Great Production Team
Description:
Great Prod vous accompagne dans vos projets de création de contenu digital et télévisuel. Créateurs et producteurs de l'émission à succès Zen sur Twitch, les membres de notre équipe sont passés par MTV, Game One, BeIN Sports, RMC, PlayStation North America et le groupe Webedia.

Great Production Team allie une solide expérience de production dans les grands groupes télé à une réelle expertise dans la création de contenu sur internet. Name: Essentielle Magazine
Description:
Essentielle est le magazine qui porte la voix des Mauriciennes et les accompagne depuis 2006.

Essentielle témoigne de leurs rêves, leurs aspirations, leurs interrogations.

Essentielle est le reflet de la femme battante et guerrière dans une société en constante évolution.

Chaque mois, le magazine raconte la vie de femmes inspirantes, décrypte les tendances émergentes, prend position sur des sujets qui touchent la condition féminine, traite la mode, la beauté, le bien-être, l'art culinaire avec autant de créativité que de sérieux.

Parce qu'Essentielle c'est vous, c'est nous, des Mauriciennes en marche.

Name: AAC Worldwide
Description:
AAC worldwide is the only international trade journal for the autoclaved aerated concrete industry. The five sections featured in each issue cover the entire spectrum of the industry – from trends and news from the world´s individual markets to the latest developments in research and science, state-of-the-art in the production of AAC, building material applications and construction solutions and last but not least, interesting buildings from all over the world.

AAC worldwide is a subscription-based journal, which is published 4 times per year. It is available worldwide and published entirely in English and furthermore as a digital Chinese version.

Professionals can make use of the latest information from the industry and subscribers are always up-to-date in the AAC business.

Name: Les Films d'Ici
Description:
Les Films d’Ici occupent une place importante dans la création de contenus documentaires en France, comme à l’étranger, avec notamment des sélections régulières en festivals, des diffusions télévisuelles fréquentes et une présence de plus en plus soutenue sur le web.
 
Les Films d’Ici et les Films d’Ici 2 sont deux sociétés sœurs issues d’un même désir : produire des regards engagés sur le monde.
 
Les producteurs des Films d’Ici accompagnent depuis plus de 30 ans la création des auteurs et des réalisateurs français comme internationaux de documentaire, de fiction, d'animation et maintenant avec les Films d’Ici 2 de production interactive.
 
Avec Les Films d’Ici 2, il s’agit maintenant de faire travailler ensemble plusieurs générations de producteurs pour diversifier les approches, transmettre les savoirs et pérenniser l’aventure.
 
C’est un deuxième œil qui s’ouvre sur les ici et les ailleurs qui façonnent le réel. Un moyen de faire émerger le regard des jeunes talents d’aujourd’hui et de garder à flot les grands noms qui ont bâti les Films d’Ici.
 
Cette diversité des genres que les Films d’Ici souhaitent mettre en avant fait écho à la pluralité des points de vues que proposent les auteurs et cinéastes. Les images documentaires trouvent ici leur place dans la fiction ou dans l’animation et les images de fiction dans le documentaire ou encore les formes de narration interactives. Il s’agit de dépasser la question des genres pour dire le réel, forcément pluriel.
 
Aujourd’hui présents sur un champ plus large de la production et de la diffusion, nous continuons à produire, avec passion, du documentaire. Nous poursuivons également notre travail à l'international et développons les coproductions et la production de longs métrages cinéma.

Name: Rakkerpak Productions
Description:
Rakkerpak Productions er et dansk uafhængigt produktionsselskab med speciale i lyd og digital storytelling.

Vi producerer indhold for Danmarks største radiostationer, organisationer og virksomheder samt vores egne Rakkerpak-originaler. Blandt vores egne produktioner finder man podcasten Psyken, som udforsker sindets dybder og psykiske lidelser gennem personlige fortællinger, samt Periodisk, der i 118 afsnit gennemgår det periodiske system.

Rakkerpak Productions tilbyder også kurser og oplæg inden for podcastproduktion og digital fortælling.

Rakkerpak Productions er stiftet af Dorte Palle og Tor Arnbjørn, der desuden er medgrundlæggere af Nordic Podcast Academy i Struer.

Læs mere og hør nogle af vores produktioner på www.rakkerpak.nu

Name: The Burnouts
Description:
Join former Stanford roommates and startup founders Phoebe Gates & Sophia Kianni as they navigate the chaotic lives of young professionals. From financial literacy to social impact, get an inside look at their journey, featuring insights from top experts. Will they burn out? Tune in to find out.

Our guests include: Kris Jenner, Paris Hilton, Eileen Gu, Ava Max, and more!

Name: recom farmhouse
Description:
Based in London and New York, we’re a happy and diverse band of international creators. Individually, each studio has its own unique spirit. Together, we have immense capacity with a boutique mindset. 

The same artists work equally on car campaigns, fashion editorials and fine art projects - widely different styles that inform and inspire each other to give our work a visible and distinctive aesthetic edge. 

We cherish the good relationships we’ve built over the years, collaborating with some of the world’s best advertising photographers. Equally, we can bring our own vision to work directly with agencies in full CGI.

Name: The Real News Network
Description:
The Real News Network (TRNN) is an independent, nonprofit newsroom producing uncompromising journalism that centers the people, movements, and stories too often ignored by corporate media.

We believe journalism should serve the public—not advertisers. That’s why we never take corporate funding, never run ads, and never put our content behind paywalls. Instead, we rely on the support of our viewers and the strength of our values to guide our work.

At TRNN, we:

Follow the story beyond the headlines—and beyond the news cycle.

Stay rooted in the communities we cover, building trust and amplifying lived experience.

Produce fact-based, movement-connected reporting that helps people understand the systems shaping their lives—and how to change them.

From labor and climate justice to racial equity and grassroots resistance, we shine a light on the struggles and solutions that matter most—because we believe journalism should be a tool for justice.

Headquartered in Baltimore, reporting globally.
 100% independent.
 Powered by the people.

Support our work, if you can. 
Our EIN: 01-0808098

Name: Investor Media Group
Description:
Investor Media Group (Investor.BG AD 4IN /BGTR30/) is a leading media company, based in Bulgaria. Its portfolio consists of first-class TV, radio, online and print media.

Investor Media Group is the only public company in Bulgaria, listed on the BSE, with TV media in its portfolio. Its mission is to be the preferred source of timely and trustworthy information, useful practical knowledge and quality entertainment, delivered with respect to the wide and specialized audiences.

The group’s portfolio includes: 
- Bulgaria ON AIR - one of the four national TV networks, distributed also in the free digital air countrywide.
- Radio Bulgaria ON AIR - with nationwide distribution, airing in 33 cities, and targeting the dynamic urban audience.
- Bloomberg TV Bulgaria - the only business TV channel in Bulgaria, targeting a wider audience and launched in 2015 as a next step in a very successful cooperation with Bloomberg LP. 
- More than 15 digital platforms - the financial information leader investor.bg, the leading news website dnes.bg, the real estate website imoti.net, the leading health website puls.bg, the sports news website gol.bg, the site for automobile news and test drives automedia.bg, the online media for the contemporary woman az-jenata.bg, the media for the modern young people tialoto.bg, the career development website rabota.bg, the online space for teenagers teenproblem.net, the children’s web portal az-deteto.bg, etc.
- the print publications Bulgaria ON AIR The Inflight Magazine, Investor Digest and GO ON AIR The Traveller’s Magazine, distributed on all airplanes of the national carrier Bulgaria Air.
- a series of successful event projects.

Investor Media Group is a socially responsible company, and its priority filed of support is education. In 2017 the company acquired 90% of the shares of the VUZF University of Finance, Business and Entrepreneurship, which is the most significant investment of a media company in an educational institution in Bulgaria.
